TL;DR: 该研究发现，在胸部X光片与放射学报告配对的视觉-语言模型中，随着模型临床专业化程度提高，图像与报告之间的重识别风险显著上升（最强模型在N=100时检索正确率是随机水平的15倍）。通过仅对投影层施加差分隐私优化（ε=0.34），可以在几乎不损失图像表征质量（AUROC从79.63%降至79.43%）的前提下，将Recall@1降低61.8%，有效减轻跨模态重链接风险。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 视觉-语言模型在胸部X光片与放射学报告配对训练后，会学习到保留实例级图像-报告对应关系的共享嵌入空间。这带来了隐私风险：当放射影像和报告在采集后被人为分离（如图像单独共享或报告受控访问），去标识化的图像可能仅通过余弦相似度就与原始叙述性报告重新关联。

Method: 将重识别问题形式化为图像到报告的检索任务，利用MIMIC-CXR（43,793对保留样本）和CheXpert Plus（29,296对）作为基准数据集，评估不同临床专业化程度的视觉-语言模型。为缓解风险，冻结两个编码器，仅对定义对齐层的投影头施加差分隐私优化（ε=0.34, δ=6×10⁻⁶）。

Result: 最强VLM在N=100候选池中正确检索报告的几率是随机水平的15倍，N=10,000时为50倍，全数据库规模仍显著高于随机水平。DP优化后，MIMIC-CXR上Recall@1降低61.8%（N=10,000），且零训练迁移至CheXpert Plus；图像侧线性探测AUROC仅从79.63%微降至79.43%。

Conclusion: 有针对性地对共享对齐层进行差分隐私微调，可以在不显著损害使这些模型具有临床实用性的图像表征的前提下，大幅降低跨模态重链接风险。

Abstract: Vision-language models (VLMs) trained on paired chest radiographs and radiology reports learn a shared embedding space that can preserve instance-level image-report correspondence. This poses a privacy risk in settings where radiographs and reports are deliberately kept separate after acquisition, such as image-only data sharing or access-controlled reports, because a de-identified image may be re-linked to its original narrative report through cosine similarity alone. We formalized this as image-to-report retrieval and used public paired cohorts, in which the true pairing is known by design, as ground-truth benchmarks to audit the risk rather than as the privacy scenario. Evaluating VLMs of increasing clinical specialization on 406,241 paired examples from 126,804 patients across MIMIC-CXR (43,793 held-out pairs) and external CheXpert Plus (29,296 pairs), we found that re-linkage rose systematically with specialization: the strongest VLM retrieved the correct report at 15 times chance at a candidate pool of N = 100, 50 times chance at N = 10,000, and well above chance at full-database scale. The signal persisted under pathology-matched hard negatives that removed disease-label shortcuts, indicating correspondence beyond broad diagnostic categories. To reduce it without retraining, we froze both encoders and applied differentially private optimization only to the projection heads defining the alignment layer (epsilon = 0.34, delta = 6x10-6). This reduced Recall@1 by 61.8% at N = 10,000 on MIMIC-CXR and transferred to CheXpert Plus without retraining, while image-side utility was largely preserved: macro AUROC for linear-probe classification across 14 labels shifted only from 79.63% to 79.43%. Targeted DP finetuning of the shared alignment layer can substantially reduce cross-modal re-linkage without materially degrading the image representations that make these models clinically useful.

</details>


### [36] [StressDream: Steering Video World Models for Robust Policy Evaluation and Improvement](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00267)
*Junwon Seo,Sushant Veer,Ran Tian,Wenhao Ding,Apoorva Sharma,Karen Leung,Edward Schmerling,Marco Pavone,Andrea Bajcsy*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出StressDream方法，通过优化扩散世界模型的初始噪声，在推理时引导想象生成高影响且合理的未来视频（如任务失败场景），用于鲁棒的策略评估与改进。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的视频世界模型在进行策略评估与改进时，通常依赖名义上的（nominal）想象采样，这会遗漏机器人动作的高影响后果（如危险或失败情况），除非进行大量采样，计算成本高昂。

Method: 提出StressDream，在推理时优化扩散世界模型的初始噪声，引导想象朝向高影响且合理的未来。设计两个互补目标：(1) 语义目标，使用视觉语言模型（VLM）通过推理生成视频来提供信息丰富的梯度；(2) 合理性目标，防止优化后的噪声漂移到分布外（OOD）而产生不合理的想象。

Result: 在自动驾驶和机器人操作的先进视频世界模型上，StressDream能有效引导想象生成文本指定的高影响但合理的未来场景（如任务失败），从而识别出会产生不良后果的动作，实现鲁棒策略评估与改进。

Conclusion: 通过在推理时可控地生成高影响且合理的视频想象，StressDream解决了世界模型在策略评估中忽略极端但关键场景的问题，提升了策略的鲁棒性。

Abstract: Video world models (WMs) have shown promise for policy evaluation and improvement by imagining realistic future observations conditioned on ego-robot actions. While WMs can model distributions over futures, policy evaluation and improvement typically rely on nominal imaginations, which can miss high-impact outcomes of robot actions unless prohibitively many samples are drawn. To enable robust policy evaluation and improvement over WM imaginations, we propose StressDream, which steers imaginations toward high-impact yet plausible outcomes specified at inference time by optimizing the initial noise of diffusion-based WMs. However, optimizing high-dimensional noise is challenging: the optimization must reason about nuanced, scene-dependent target events in generated videos while avoiding out-of-distribution (OOD) noise that yields implausible imaginations. We address this with two complementary objectives: a semantic objective with a Vision-Language Model that provides informative gradients by reasoning about the generated video, and a plausibility objective that prevents the optimized noise from drifting OOD. With state-of-the-art video world models for autonomous driving and robotic manipulation, we show that StressDream effectively steers imaginations toward high-impact yet plausible outcomes specified by text at inference time, such as task failures, enabling robust policy evaluation and improvement by identifying actions whose plausible futures include undesirable outcomes. Video results are available at https://junwon.me/StressDream/.

</details>


### [37] [Hyperbolic and Evidence-Prioritized Experts for Large Vision-Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00275)
*Zijie Zhou,Dandan Zhu,Hangxiangpan Wang,Heng Zhang,Huishen Jiao,Yi Zhao*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出AsyMoE架构，通过非对称专家分组（模态内专家、双曲模态间专家、证据优先语言专家）解决LVLMs中视觉与语言模态的固有不对称问题，在减少25.45%参数激活的同时，平均提升1.5%性能，幻觉敏感任务提升达3.8%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有MoE方法对视觉和语言模态采用对称架构，忽略了两种模态处理过程的固有不对称性，导致两个关键问题：1) 文本与视觉是层次关系而非平行关系，欧几里得专家空间难以编码这种包含结构；2) 深层语言专家逐渐从基于证据的处理转向参数记忆依赖，失去对视觉和语言信息的 grounding。

Method: 提出AsyMoE架构，包含三类专家分组：1) 模态内专家处理特定模态；2) 双曲模态间专家通过负曲率几何捕获跨模态层次关系；3) 证据优先语言专家抑制参数记忆激活，在整个网络深度中保持上下文 grounding。

Result: 相比基线方法，AsyMoE平均提升1.5%性能，在幻觉敏感任务上提升达3.8%，同时比稠密模型减少25.45%的参数激活。

Conclusion: 通过显式建模视觉与语言模态的不对称性，AsyMoE在计算效率和任务性能上都取得了显著提升，特别是在减轻幻觉方面表现突出。

Abstract: Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) have demonstrated impressive performance on multimodal tasks through scaled architectures and extensive training. Recent studies introduce Mixture of Experts (MoE) into LVLMs for improved computational efficiency. However, existing MoE approaches treat visual and linguistic modalities with symmetric architectures, overlooking the inherent asymmetry in how these two modalities are processed. This asymmetry causes two critical issues. First, text and vision form hierarchical rather than parallel relationships, as text queries typically describe partial aspects of complete visual scenes. Euclidean expert space struggles to encode such containment structures. Second, language experts in deeper layers progressively shift from evidence-based processing to parametric memory dependence, losing grounding in the provided visual and linguistic information. To address these issues, we propose AsyMoE, a novel architecture that explicitly models this asymmetry through three specialized expert groups. Intra-modality experts handle modality-specific processing. Hyperbolic inter-modality experts capture hierarchical cross-modal relationships through negative curvature geometry. Evidence-priority language experts suppress parametric memory activation and maintain contextual grounding throughout network depth. Extensive experiments demonstrate that AsyMoE achieves consistent improvements over baseline methods, with average gains of 1.5\% over MoE variants and up to 3.8\% on hallucination-sensitive tasks. AsyMoE activates 25.45\% fewer parameters compared to dense models.

</details>


### [38] [Real2SAM2Real: Generative 3D Caches as Complementary Context for Video Diffusion](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00299)
*Jiayi Wu,Haoming Cai,Cornelia Fermuller,Christopher Metzler,Yiannis Aloimonos*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出Real2SAM2Real框架，利用3D提升模型（如SAM3D）提取可编辑的3D缓存作为VDM的几何骨架，实现相机轨迹和多实体运动的解耦控制，克服高动态运动和复杂遮挡下的结构崩溃问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有视频扩散模型（VDM）在高动态运动或复杂遮挡场景中过度依赖隐式扩散先验，导致结构崩溃。需要引入显式的3D几何先验来增强时空一致性。

Method: 1）利用3D提升模型提取前景实体的完整3D缓存（而非仅可见外壳）；2）设计软空间对齐注入机制（Soft Spatial-Aligned Injection）和最小侵入微调策略；3）使用掩码法向图作为跨模态桥梁，构建无需3D数据的数据增强管道。

Result: 实现了相机轨迹和多实体运动的精确解耦控制；在大相机位移和严重遮挡下保持卓越的时空一致性；消除了结构空洞、错误立面及反射折射引起的视角歧义。

Conclusion: 通过将几何与外观解耦，利用生成式3D缓存的互补上下文，克服了过度依赖扩散先验导致的典型结构崩溃问题，为VDM提供了可靠的3D感知引导。

Abstract: While Video Diffusion Models (VDMs) excel at synthesizing high-fidelity videos, enabling precise camera and scene control remains challenging. Existing methods predominantly rely on implicit diffusion priors to generate unobserved regions, inevitably leading to structural collapse during high-dynamic movements or complex occlusions. To address this challenge, we propose Real2SAM2Real, a framework that leverages 3D lifting models (e.g., SAM3D) to extract an explicitly editable 3D cache, serving as a robust geometric scaffold for the VDM. By capturing the entire 3D volume of foreground entities rather than just their visible shells, this cache injects holistic spatial priors into the VDM, providing dependable 3D-aware guidance for complex scene dynamics. To effectively leverage this 3D guidance while preserving pre-trained priors, we design a Soft Spatial-Aligned Injection mechanism alongside a minimally invasive fine-tuning strategy tailored for VDMs. Furthermore, we employ masked normal maps as a cross-modal bridge to construct a 3D-free data curation and perturbation pipeline. Extensive experiments demonstrate that Real2SAM2Real enables precise, decoupled control over both camera trajectories and multi-entity motions. By utilizing the complementary context from generative 3D caches, our framework overcomes typical breakdowns caused by over-reliance on diffusion priors, maintaining exceptional spatiotemporal consistency under large camera shifts and severe occlusions. Crucially, by decoupling geometry from appearance, our VDM-tailored 3D cache eradicates perspective ambiguities caused by structural holes and erroneous facades, as well as misleading cues from reflections and refractions. Project website is available at https://jiayi-wu-leo.github.io/real2sam2real

</details>


### [39] [AdaCodec: A Predictive Visual Code for Video MLLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02569)
*Haowen Hou,Zhen Huang,Zheming Liang,Qingyi Si,Chenglin Li,Shuai Dong,Kele Shao,Ruilin Li,Dianyi Wang,Nan Duan,Jiaqi Wang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出AdaCodec，一种预测性视觉编码方法，通过仅在场景变化大时发送完整参考帧、平时发送紧凑的帧间变化描述（P-token），显著降低视频MLLM的视觉token冗余。在11个基准测试中，同等token预算下性能优于基线；在32k token下超越224k基线的长视频性能，并将首token延迟从9.26s降至1.62s。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有视频MLLM将每一帧独立编码为RGB图像，导致相邻帧之间大量重复内容（物体、背景、布局）被重复编码为视觉token，造成严重的token冗余和计算浪费。

Method: 提出预测性视觉编码（Predictive Visual Code）接口AdaCodec：模型根据条件预测代价决定是否发送完整参考帧（高代价时）或仅发送帧间变化（包括运动残差和预测残差）的紧凑P-token。

Result: 在11个基准测试中，同等token预算下AdaCodec优于Qwen3-VL-8B的逐帧RGB基线。仅用1/7的token（32k）即在所有长视频基准上超越224k基线；在5个通用视频基准上平均分提升，同时首token延迟从9.26s降至1.62s。

Conclusion: 通过利用视频的时间冗余，预测性视觉编码可以大幅减少冗余token，在节省计算资源的同时保持甚至提升视频理解性能，是一种更高效的视频MLLM接口范式。

Abstract: Video is temporally redundant: adjacent frames usually share most objects, background, and layout. Yet existing video multimodal large language models (video MLLMs) usually encode each sampled frame as an independent RGB image, causing visual tokens to repeat content already present in earlier frames. This suggests a more direct video interface: send a full reference frame only when the scene cannot be predicted well from prior context, and otherwise transmit a compact description of inter-frame changes. We call this interface a \emph{predictive visual code}, and instantiate it for video MLLMs as \textbf{AdaCodec}. AdaCodec spends full visual tokens on a reference frame only when its conditional predictive cost is high; otherwise, it encodes inter-frame changes, including motion and prediction residuals, as compact P-tokens. Across all eleven benchmarks, AdaCodec improves over the Qwen3-VL-8B per-frame RGB baseline at a matched visual-token budget. Even at $1/7$ the budget, AdaCodec with 32k tokens surpasses the 224k baseline on all long-video benchmarks; on five general-video benchmarks, it raises the average score while substantially cutting time-to-first-token from 9.26s to 1.62s.

</details>


### [40] [SUPREME: A Multi-GPU Framework for Reproducible Image Unlearning Method Evaluation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00380)
*Petros Andreou,Jamie Lanyon,Axel Finke,Georgina Cosma*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: SUPREME是一个开源的多GPU分布式框架，用于高效评估图像分类中的机器遗忘方法，支持多种子、多加速器和精度模式，并在Pins人脸识别数据集上进行了验证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的机器遗忘评估方法在单GPU上运行，计算成本高昂，难以在合理时间内评估多个种子的结果，缺乏高效的分布式评估框架。

Method: 提出了SUPREME框架，采用注册制设计支持灵活扩展新方法/指标/模型/场景；设计了多GPU架构支持多种加速器（如GPU/TPU）和精度模式；将训练、遗忘、评估三个阶段分布到多个GPU上并行执行。

Result: 在Pins Face Recognition数据集上，使用ResNet18和ViT模型，分别在完整类别遗忘和随机样本遗忘场景下，跨10个种子进行了实验验证，证明了框架的可行性和效率。

Conclusion: SUPREME提供了一个可扩展、高效的多GPU分布式框架，能够显著加速机器遗忘方法的评估过程，代码已开源。

Abstract: Machine unlearning removes the influence of specific training data from a trained model without retraining it from scratch. Evaluating an unlearning method requires repeating training, unlearning, and evaluation across multiple seeds, which is computationally expensive. To our knowledge, existing image classification unlearning frameworks run on a single GPU, which limits how many seeds can be evaluated in reasonable time. We introduce SUPREME, an open-source framework that distributes these stages across multiple GPUs. SUPREME makes three contributions: a registry-based design for adding new methods, metrics, models, and scenarios; a multi-GPU architecture supporting multiple accelerators and precision modes; and a demonstration on Pins Face Recognition using ResNet18 and ViT under full-class and random-sample unlearning across ten seeds. The framework is available at https://github.com/pedroandreou/supreme-unlearning.

</details>


### [41] [Zamba2-VL Technical Report](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00390)
*Hassan Shapourian,Kasra Hejazi,Olabode M. Sule,Beren Millidge*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: Zamba2-VL 是基于混合架构（Mamba2状态空间层+少量Transformer共享块）的视觉语言模型套件，在图像理解、OCR、推理等基准上达到领先Transformer模型水平，同时具备近线性预填充计算和接近常数大小的循环状态，TTFT降低约一个数量级，尤其适合端侧部署。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有视觉语言模型多基于纯Transformer架构，在推理效率尤其是首token生成延迟（TTFT）方面存在瓶颈，阻碍其在边缘设备等资源受限场景的部署。作者希望通过引入混合架构（SSM+Transformer）来兼顾性能与效率。

Method: 基于Zamba2混合语言模型架构（Mamba2状态空间层 + 少量共享Transformer块），构建视觉语言模型套件Zamba2-VL，包含1.2B、2.7B和7B三种规模。

Result: 在图像理解、推理、OCR、定位、计数等广泛基准上，Zamba2-VL与Molmo2、Qwen3-VL、InternVL3.5等主流Transformer VLM性能相当，显著优于VL-Mamba、Cobra、mmMamba等SSM/混合VLM；TTFT相比Transformer基线降低约一个数量级，效率优势在1.2B和2.7B小模型上尤为显著。

Conclusion: 混合SSM-Transformer架构在VLM领域能同时实现高性能和高效率，尤其适合对延迟敏感的端侧部署场景。

Abstract: We present Zamba2-VL, a suite of vision-language models built on Zamba2, a hybrid language-model architecture combining Mamba2 state-space layers with a small number of shared transformer blocks. Across a broad range of image understanding, reasoning, OCR, grounding, and counting benchmarks, Zamba2-VL is competitive with leading Transformer-based open-weight VLMs of comparable scale, including the Molmo2, Qwen3-VL, and InternVL3.5 families, and substantially outperforms prior SSM-based and hybrid VLMs such as VL-Mamba, Cobra, and mmMamba. Inheriting the near-linear prefill compute and small, near-constant recurrent state of its Zamba2 backbone, Zamba2-VL delivers roughly an order of magnitude lower time-to-first-token (TTFT) than these Transformer baselines at matched parameter scale, with the efficiency gap most pronounced at the smaller 1.2B and 2.7B scales most relevant to on-device and edge deployment. We release three models -- 1.2B, 2.7B, and 7B -- together with inference code at https://huggingface.co/collections/Zyphra/zamba2-vl.

</details>


### [42] [Detect Before You Leap: Mirage Detection in Vision-Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00435)
*Sayeed Shafayet Chowdhury,Md. Shaown Miah*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出TC-LIA方法，通过探测CLIP视觉编码器各层中patch-token与问题文本的对齐轨迹，检测VLM是否应在缺乏视觉证据时拒绝回答，在多个VQA场景下实现约94.6-94.7%的三分类检测准确率，幻象率低于3%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: VLM在视觉证据缺失、空白或与问题无关时仍会产生看似自信但无视觉依据的回答（幻象问题），这在医疗和文档VQA等高风险场景尤其危险，因此需要预检测机制决定模型回答还是弃权。

Method: 提出TC-LIA方法：将CLIP ViT-H/14各层图像patch token投影到最终CLIP嵌入空间，计算与问题嵌入的相似度，追踪视觉证据是否在对应层出现。提取最终图文余弦相似度、晚期层top-k patch-文本对齐、早期到晚期增益、层间斜率等特征，结合像素统计空白/噪声检测、零样本域路由和结构化VLM自我评估，形成集成检测系统。

Result: 在5个VQA领域、3种输入条件和12个VLM骨干上，最佳系统达到约94.6-94.7%的三分类检测准确率，幻象率低于3%，而基线幻象率在21.7%-66.6%之间。

Conclusion: TC-LIA方法能有效检测VLM的幻象问题，使模型在缺乏视觉证据时可靠地弃权，显著降低幻象率，且具有模型无关性和跨领域泛化能力。

Abstract: Vision-language models (VLMs) can produce confident visual answers even when the required visual evidence is missing, blank, or unrelated to the question. This failure mode, known as mirage (Asadi et al. 2026), is especially concerning in medical and document visual question answering, where plausible but visually ungrounded responses may be mistaken for image-based evidence. We study pre-release mirage detection: given an image-question pair, the goal is to determine whether a VLM should answer or abstain before producing a response. We propose Text-Conditioned Layer-wise Internal Alignment (TC-LIA), a model-agnostic method that probes patch-token representations across the layers of a CLIP ViT-H/14 vision encoder. TC-LIA projects layer-wise image patch tokens into the final CLIP embedding space and measures their similarity to the question embedding, allowing the method to track whether question-relevant visual evidence emerges across vision layers. The resulting alignment trajectory is summarized using final image-text cosine similarity, late-layer top-k patch-text alignment, early-to-late gain, and layer-wise slope. These features are combined with pixel-statistic blank/noise detection, zero-shot domain routing, and structured VLM self-assessment in an ensemble. Across five VQA domains, three input conditions, and twelve VLM backbones, the best systems achieve approximately 94.6-94.7% three-class detection accuracy with mirage rates below 3%, while baseline mirage rates range from 21.7% to 66.6%.

</details>


### [43] [DarkVesselNet: Multi-Modal Remote Sensing and Trajectory Reasoning for Dark Vessel Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00445)
*Arun Sharma*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: DarkVesselNet是一个多模态遥感系统，融合AIS数据与Sentinel-1 SAR、Sentinel-2光学影像等卫星观测数据，用于暗船检测，提供了完整的Python包和Hugging Face Space实现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决暗船（未通过AIS报告位置的船只）检测问题，需要融合AIS报告数据与卫星遥感观测数据，弥补单一数据源的不足。

Method: 构建多模态遥感堆栈，包括：1) Sentinel-1 SAR和Sentinel-2光学影像；2) 地理空间基础模型骨干网络；3) AIS轨迹推理；4) TGARD风格间隙检测；5) Pi-DPM启发的异常检测头；6) 传感器配准与融合路径。

Result: 当前验证基于软件层面，包括SAR散斑滤波、光学波段比值、Haversine距离、TGARD间隙发射、传感器配准、骨干网络token形状以及可微异常评分等测试。

Conclusion: 该系统通过软件测试验证了各模块功能，提供了可用的Python包和Hugging Face Space，为暗船检测提供了完整的开源解决方案。

Abstract: Dark vessel detection requires fusing what vessels report through AIS with what satellites observe through radar and optical sensors. DarkVesselNet is a multi-modal remote sensing stack that combines Sentinel-1 SAR, Sentinel-2 optical imagery, geospatial foundation model backbones, AIS trajectory reasoning, TGARD-style gap detection, and a Pi-DPM-inspired anomaly head. The repository exposes the system as a tested Python package and a public Hugging Face Space. The paper presents the sensor stack, backbone abstraction, fusion path, anomaly head, and current validation. The evidence currently available is software-grounded: tests for SAR speckle filtering, optical band ratios, Haversine distance, TGARD gap emission, sensor coregistration, backbone token shapes, and differentiable anomaly scoring.

</details>


### [44] [GeoSAM-3D: Geodesic Prompt Propagation for Open-Vocabulary 3D Scene Segmentation from Monocular Video](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00447)
*Arun Sharma*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: GeoSAM-3D提出了一种轻量级的开放词汇3D场景分割方法，仅需单目视频和单帧点击/命名即可通过3D高斯场景和热核传播实现3D掩码传播。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有3D场景分割通常依赖RGB-D视频、多视图图像或重建网格，设置较重。作者希望探索更轻量的设置：用户仅需上传一段单目视频，在一帧中点击或命名目标，就能获得3D掩码。

Method: 结合冻结的图像和视频基础模型与单目3D高斯泼溅重建，在重建场景图上使用热核距离（而非欧氏最近邻）进行可微图-测地线传播，从而实现提示的3D传播。

Result: 论文描述了代码库状态、数学核实现、从SAM掩码训练的特征头，以及代码库中已有的验证方法。评估协议涵盖实现验证、图传播质量、泄漏控制和交互延迟四个方面。

Conclusion: 热核传播相比欧氏最近邻能更好保持曲面连续性，减少邻近但不相连物体间的泄漏，为单目视频3D场景分割提供了有效轻量方案。

Abstract: Open-vocabulary 3D scene segmentation usually assumes RGB-D video, calibrated multi-view imagery, or a reconstructed mesh. GeoSAM-3D studies a lighter setting: a user uploads a short monocular video, clicks or names an object in one frame, and receives a propagated 3D mask over a Gaussian scene. The implementation combines frozen image and video foundation models with a monocular 3D Gaussian Splatting reconstruction and a differentiable graph-geodesic propagation kernel over Gaussian centroids. The central design choice is to propagate prompts by heat-kernel distance on the reconstructed scene graph, rather than by Euclidean nearest neighbors in 3D. This preserves continuity around curved surfaces and reduces leakage across nearby but disconnected objects. This paper describes the repository state, the mathematical kernel implemented in geosam3d.propagate, the feature head trained from Segment Anything masks, and the validation already present in the codebase. The evaluation protocol separates implementation validation, graph propagation quality, leakage control, and interactive latency.

</details>


### [45] [CodeCytos: AI-assisted spatial molecular imaging analysis via code-augmented agent action space](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00472)
*Hung Q. Vo,Huy Q. Vo,Son T. Ly,Zhihao Wan,Anh-Vu Nguyen,Hong Zhao,Jianting Sheng,Stephen T. C. Wong,Hien V. Nguyen*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出CodeCytos，一个基于编码推理的智能体框架，用于实现空间分子成像数据的动态、可编程交互，提升自动化与定制化分析能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统组织图像分析软件需要人工干预、与代码驱动自动化集成差、可扩展性有限，且仅支持固定预实现的空间细胞特征，缺乏自定义分析的灵活性。

Method: 构建CodeCytos编码推理智能体框架，支持动态可编程交互；在四种组织类型数据集上验证；采用最小提示设置，对比多种LLM骨干模型；引入领域无关的少样本上下文编码推理示例提升性能。

Result: 在额叶皮层、非小细胞肺癌、胰腺、扁桃体四个数据集上，CodeCytos优于基线方法，领域无关的少样本示例能显著提升性能。

Conclusion: CodeCytos展示了代码行动智能体在空间分子成像中辅助自定义特征探索和加速生物标志物发现的潜力。

Abstract: Conventional tissue image analysis software provides foundational capabilities for cellular analysis, including segmentation, basic morphological feature extraction, and spatial organization analysis. However, these tools often require manual intervention and are not well integrated with code-driven automation, limiting efficiency and scalability for complex spatial tissue studies. In addition, they offer limited flexibility for custom analyses, as they typically support only a fixed set of pre-implemented spatial cellular features. To address these limitations, we propose CodeCytos, a coding-based reasoning agent framework that enables dynamic, programmable interaction with spatial molecular imaging data to improve automation and customization. CodeCytos is designed to streamline the exploration of custom spatial cellular features and adapt to diverse research needs. We demonstrate its utility through case studies on four expert-curated datasets from distinct tissue types: frontal cortex, non-small-cell lung cancer, pancreas, and tonsil. We evaluate CodeCytos under a realistic minimal prompt setting, where bioscientists pose simple questions without task-specific instructions or contextual information about spatial cellular analysis, and benchmark multiple LLM backbones with strong coding capabilities. We further show that incorporating tailored, domain-agnostic few-shot in-context coding-reasoning examples (randomly sampled demonstrations outside the spatial analysis domain) can substantially improve performance without requiring costly, expert-crafted in-domain demonstrations. Overall, CodeCytos outperforms baseline approaches, highlighting the potential of code-action agents to assist with custom feature exploration in spatial molecular imaging and to accelerate biomarker discovery.

</details>


### [46] [Pre-Deployment Robustness Stress Testing for CT Segmentation Systems Using Clinically Motivated Multi-Corruption Augmentation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00491)
*CholMin Kang,Jonghyun Chung,Amanpreet Kaurb,Nagesh Gulkotwarb,Arthi Sivasankaranb*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了 RAMP（鲁棒性增强的多重劣化流水线），一种面向 CT 分割的鲁棒性增强框架，通过在训练中引入解剖约束的空间扰动、CT 强度变换和随机多重劣化组合，显著提升了模型在临床异构成像条件下的分割鲁棒性，在多个基准上大幅缩小了干净与劣化图像之间的性能差距。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 基于深度学习的 CT 分割系统在干净基准图像上表现优异，但在临床异构成像条件（如噪声、分辨率损失、对比度变化、强度偏移和伪影）下性能会显著下降，这种不稳定性限制了其在真实医疗影像工作流中的可靠部署。

Method: 提出 RAMP 框架，包含三个核心组件：解剖约束的空间扰动、CT 强度变换以及随机多重劣化组合（stochastic multi-corruption composition），在训练过程中向模型暴露临床可解释的图像劣化。

Result: 在五器官噪声评估基准上，RAMP 将平均劣化 Dice 从 0.610 提升至 0.753，鲁棒性差距从 0.264 降至 0.064；在 Abdomen1K 上，平均劣化 Dice 从 0.633 提升至 0.789，鲁棒性差距从 0.290 降至 0.070。虽未取得最高的干净图像 Dice，但显著缓解了严重劣化下的分割崩溃。

Conclusion: 多重劣化增强可以作为 CT 分割系统在实际部署前的一种实用策略，用于提升其在异构临床环境中的可靠性。

Abstract: Deep learning-based CT segmentation systems often achieve high accuracy on clean benchmark images, but their performance may degrade under heterogeneous clinical imaging conditions such as noise, resolution loss, contrast variation, intensity shift, and artifacts. This instability can limit reliable deployment in real-world medical imaging workflows.
  We propose Robustness via Augmented Multi-corruption Pipeline (RAMP), a robustness-oriented augmentation framework for CT segmentation. RAMP combines anatomically constrained spatial perturbations, CT intensity transformations, and stochastic multi-corruption composition to expose models to clinically plausible image degradation during training.
  Across two CT segmentation evaluation settings, RAMP achieved the strongest corrupted-image performance and the smallest clean-to-corrupted robustness gap. In the five-organ noisy evaluation benchmark, RAMP improved mean corrupted Dice from 0.610 to 0.753 and reduced the robustness gap from 0.264 to 0.064 compared with the nnU-Net baseline. In Abdomen1K, RAMP improved mean corrupted Dice from 0.633 to 0.789 and reduced the robustness gap from 0.290 to 0.070. Although RAMP did not achieve the highest clean-image Dice, it substantially mitigated worst-case segmentation collapse under severe image degradation.
  These results suggest that multi-corruption augmentation can serve as a practical pre-deployment strategy for improving the reliability of CT segmentation systems in heterogeneous clinical environments.

</details>


### [47] [V-LynX: Token Interface Alignment for Video+X LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00508)
*Jungin Park,Jiyoung Lee,Kwanghoon Sohn*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文发现Video LLMs中存在一个连续流形——token接口，视觉令牌可独立运作。基于此提出V-LynX框架，通过轻量级辅助通路并行于冻结的视觉编码器，利用非配对单模态数据对齐注意力响应与统计分布，实现新模态与视频先验的整合，在音视频QA、3D推理、高帧率及多视角理解任务上达到SOTA。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有Video LLMs将视频帧转换为文本嵌入，但忽略了视觉token在架构中可作为独立实体运作的连续流形特性；传统多模态融合方法依赖重模态专用编码器或配对监督数据，扩展新模态成本高昂。

Method: (1) 发现Video LLMs内部存在token interface连续流形，视觉token可独立运作；(2) 提出V-LynX框架，在冻结视觉编码器旁并行插入轻量级辅助通路；(3) 利用非配对单模态数据，同时对齐注意力响应与统计分布，确保新模态与视频先验在流形上的兼容性。

Result: 在音视频QA、3D推理、高帧率视频理解、多视角视频理解等多个基准上达到SOTA性能，且计算效率优越。

Conclusion: V-LynX通过利用Video LLMs内在的token interface流形，以轻量级方式高效扩展新模态，避免了传统方法对重编码器和配对数据的依赖，为多模态融合提供了新范式。

Abstract: This study introduces an intriguing phenomenon in Video LLMs: rather than merely translating frames into textual embeddings, Video LLMs establish a continuous manifold, token interface, allowing visual tokens to operate as standalone entities within the architecture. Exploiting this discovery, we propose V-LynX, a scalable framework that integrates novel modalities into Video LLMs by repurposing the internalized interface. Departing from conventional paradigms that necessitate heavy modality-specific encoders or paired supervision, V-LynX employs a lightweight auxiliary pathway in parallel with the frozen vision encoder. Our method integrates new sensory inputs with intrinsic video priors by aligning both attention responses and statistical distributions using unpaired unimodal data sets. This ensures manifold compatibility while preserving the integrity of the Video LLMs. Extensive benchmarks demonstrate that V-LynX achieves SOTA and efficiency across audio-visual QA, 3D reasoning, high-frame-rate, and multi-view video understanding. The code is available at https://github.com/park-jungin/lynx.

</details>


### [48] [CAFOSat: A Strongly Annotated Dataset for Infrastructure-Aware CAFO Mapping Using High-Resolution Imagery](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00548)
*Oishee Bintey Hoque,Nibir Chandra Mandal,Mandy L Wilson,Samarth Swarup,Madhav Marathe,Abhijin Adiga*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: CAFOSat是一个面向美国集中式动物养殖场(CAFO)的大规模遥感数据集，包含超过45,000个图像块、多源标注和负样本，支持基础设施级别的分类与监测。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大规模CAFO遥感制图面临基础设施布局异构、位置记录噪声大、标注不一致和清单不完整等挑战，现有数据难以支撑可靠的自动化监测。

Method: 构建人机协同标注流水线（AI辅助标注+GradCAM定位+几何聚类），结合土地覆盖引导采样负样本、基础设施级标注（畜棚、粪池、放牧设施）及合成增强管道。

Result: 包含45,000+图像块，覆盖20州、4大CAFO类别；基准测试显示精炼标注和负样本显著提升分类与泛化性能。

Conclusion: CAFOSat为高分辨率遥感影像中基础设施感知的农业监测和CAFO制图提供了大规模基准。

Abstract: Concentrated Animal Feeding Operations (CAFOs) play an important role in agricultural production but are also associated with environmental, public health, and disease surveillance concerns. Large-scale mapping of CAFOs from remote sensing imagery remains challenging due to heterogeneous infrastructure layouts, noisy location records, inconsistent annotations, and incomplete inventories. We introduce CAFOSat, a strongly annotated, infrastructure-aware dataset for CAFO mapping across the United States. CAFOSat integrates high-resolution National Agriculture Imagery Program (NAIP) imagery with multi-source CAFO inventories collected across multiple states and transforms weak geolocation records into refined annotations through a human-in-the-loop pipeline combining AI-assisted annotation, GradCAM-based localization, and geometric clustering. To improve dataset quality, we curate challenging negative samples using land-cover-guided sampling with spatial exclusion constraints and provide infrastructure-level annotations, including barns, manure ponds, and grazing-related features, through manual verification. The resulting dataset contains more than 45,000 image patches spanning 20 states and four major CAFO categories. We benchmark a diverse set of convolutional, transformer-based, and vision-language models, demonstrating the value of refined annotations and curated negative samples for CAFO classification and generalization. In addition, we introduce a synthetic augmentation pipeline that generates infrastructure-aware variations to increase training diversity and improve robustness under distribution shifts. CAFOSat provides a large-scale benchmark for advancing infrastructure-aware agricultural monitoring and CAFO mapping from high-resolution remote sensing imagery.

</details>


### [49] [Pause and Think: A Dataset and Benchmark for Video-Grounded Assistive Action Suggestion](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00616)
*Shivam Singh,Saptarshi Majumdar,Pratik Prabhanjan,Zicheng Liu,Emad Barsoum*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出pause-and-think-T训练数据集和pause-and-think-B基准，通过结构化推理监督让4B参数的小模型在视频理解任务上达到接近235B大模型的性能（58.0% vs 58.9%），并在多个基准上展现强泛化能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有VLM在视频推理中缺乏结构化推理能力，无法进行接地推理、时序一致性和上下文感知规划，需要让模型像人类一样先推理再回答。

Method: 1. 构建pause-and-think-T训练数据集，让模型在生成答案前先进行结构化推理；2. 在4B参数小模型上进行微调；3. 提出pause-and-think-B基准评估上下文理解和目标规划能力。

Result: 4B模型在pause-and-think-B上达58.0%准确率，与Qwen3-VL-235B的58.9%接近；在EgoThink和TempCompass上展现强OOD泛化能力，在affordance、assistance等子任务上显著提升。

Conclusion: 针对性推理监督能使紧凑模型提供可操作的、视觉接地指导，无需大规模模型扩展即可泛化到训练数据之外。

Abstract: Recent Vision-Language Models (VLMs) struggle with grounded reasoning, temporal consistency, and context aware planning in videos. We introduce pause-and-think-T, a reasoning-centric training dataset that encourages models to pause, reason over visual evidence, and produce concise, actionable responses. The dataset promotes structured reasoning prior to answer generation, guiding models toward human-like, scene-grounded assistance. We fine-tune a compact 4B-parameter model and evaluate it on our pause-and-think-B benchmark targeting contextual understanding and goal planning tasks. The model achieves 58.0% accuracy at 59x fewer parameters than Qwen3-VL-235B (58.9%), matching GPT-5.2 on scene understanding and surpassing GPT-4o. Beyond our benchmark, it also shows strong out-of-distribution performance on EgoThink and TempCompass, with substantial gains in affordance, assistance, attribution recognition, situated reasoning, and temporal order, without benchmark-specific training. Our results indicate that targeted reasoning supervision enables compact models to deliver actionable, visually grounded guidance while generalizing beyond training data, without requiring large-scale model expansion.

</details>


### [50] [Collaborative Few-Step Distillation and Low-Bit Quantization for Wan2.2 Dual-Expert Video Diffusion Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00658)
*Jinyang Du,Shenghao Jin,Ziqian Xu,Ruihao Gong,Shiqiao Gu,Yang Yong,Jinyang Guo,Xianglong Liu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出了一种面向部署的视频扩散模型压缩流程，结合少步分布匹配蒸馏和低比特量化，在Wan2.2-T2V-A14B上实现高效推理，8步和20步量化模型超越原全精度基线。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大规模视频扩散模型虽然视觉质量高，但推理成本高昂（多步去噪+大参数量），需要面向部署的高效压缩方案。

Method: 将少步分布匹配蒸馏与低比特量化结合，针对双专家去噪路线分别校准高低噪声分支，保护敏感入口层，采用HiF4低比特表示增强动态范围覆盖，量化在蒸馏后的少步模型上校准以减少激活分布不匹配。

Result: 量化模型在8步和20步设置下平均超越原全精度基线，20步设置实现最佳质量-效率权衡。

Conclusion: 协同设计的蒸馏-量化流程能有效降低视频扩散模型部署成本，同时保持甚至提升生成质量。

Abstract: Large video diffusion models achieve strong visual quality but remain expensive to deploy because each sample requires many denoising steps and a large resident parameter footprint. This paper studies a deployment-oriented compression pipeline for Wan2.2-T2V-A14B by combining few-step distribution-matching distillation with low-bit quantization. The pipeline follows the model's dual-expert denoising route, calibrates the high-noise and low-noise branches separately, protects sensitive entrance layers, and uses HiF4-style low-bit representation to improve dynamic-range coverage. Quantization is calibrated on the distilled few-step student rather than on the original long-step trajectory, reducing activation-distribution mismatch during inference. The proposed co-design keeps the quantized model close to the same-step full-precision model and surpasses the original full-precision baseline at 8 and 20 steps on average. The 20-step setting gives the best quality-efficiency trade-off in the tested configurations.

</details>


### [51] [SkyShield: Occupancy as a Safety Interface for Low-Altitude UAV Autonomy](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00747)
*Jie Gao,Jie Ma,Kaihui Lin,Kai Ye,Miaohui Zhang,Pingyang Dai,Liujuan Cao*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出SkyShield——首个面向低空无人机（20米以下）的前视单目语义占据栅格基准，配套提出KAR-mIoU安全感知评估指标和SkyOcc基线方法，将3D占据感知确立为无人机飞行安全接口。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有无人机数据集只提供2D标注或3D框，自动驾驶占据栅格基准又假设地面固定传感器，均无法覆盖低空飞行场景（前视单目、6-DoF位姿实时变化、稀疏障碍物）。亟需一个专门针对低空无人机前视占据感知的基准。

Method: 基于CARLA构建36K前视样本，含6-DoF位姿、动态相机几何、占据标签。提出KAR-mIoU指标，用运动学可达性和碰撞时间重加权体素评估。提出SkyOcc基线，融合无人机姿态投影、时序占据特征、安全先验优化。

Result: 建立首个低空无人机前视占据感知基准，KAR-mIoU能揭示mIoU掩盖的安全风险，SkyOcc在稀疏碰撞关键结构上有更好保持。

Conclusion: SkyShield、KAR-mIoU和SkyOcc共同将占据感知确立为低空无人机安全飞行的核心接口。

Abstract: For low-altitude Unmanned Aerial Vehicle (UAV) autonomy, 3D spatial understanding is not merely a perception objective, but the safety interface between human instructions and physical flight. In human-scale urban airspace below 20 meters, thin geometry, occlusions, vegetation, and urban clutter define whether an aerial agent can safely enter the space ahead. However, existing UAV datasets mainly provide 2D annotations or 3D boxes, while driving-oriented occupancy benchmarks assume stable ground-level sensor rigs. Both miss the defining regime of low-altitude flight: a front-facing monocular camera observing occupied and free space from a moving aerial body with frame-wise changing 6-DoF pose and camera extrinsics. To bridge this gap, we introduce \textbf{SkyShield}, to the best of our knowledge the first front-view monocular semantic occupancy benchmark for urban UAV flight below 20 meters. Built on CARLA, SkyShield contains 36K front-view UAV samples across diverse urban scenes and weather conditions, pairing each image with frame-wise 6-DoF UAV pose, frame-wise dynamic camera geometry, UAV states, and front-frustum semantic occupancy labels. We further propose \textbf{KAR-mIoU}, a UAV-centric and dynamics-aware metric that re-weights voxel-level evaluation by kinematic reachability and time-to-collision, revealing safety-critical risks hidden by conventional mIoU. To tackle this challenging new setting, we provide \textbf{SkyOcc}, a geometry-first monocular baseline that integrates frame-wise UAV attitude into projection, fuses temporal occupancy features, and applies safety-prior optimization to preserve sparse collision-critical structures. Together, SkyShield, KAR-mIoU, and SkyOcc establish occupancy as a safety interface for low-altitude aerial autonomy. Code and dataset will be released publicly.

</details>


### [52] [GIRL-DETR: Gradient-Isolated Reinforcement Learning for Video Moment Retrieval](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00775)
*Shihang Zhang,Mingjin Kuai,Ye Wei,Zhen Zhang,Wei Ji*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出GIRL-DETR，首次将强化学习后训练引入轻量级时序定位框架，通过三阶段渐进式RL策略优化不可微指标，在保持轻量网络的同时显著提升视频时刻检索精度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有VMR模型在训练后期因连续替代损失与非可微指标之间的错配导致优化停滞，边界预测陷入次优解。直接对轻量网络应用RL后训练会破坏监督阶段建立的脆弱特征表示。

Method: 1) 跨模态交互(CMI)实现早期对齐；2) 文本引导门控(TGG)注入语义先验；3) 监督训练收敛后冻结骨干网络保护特征流形；4) 三阶段渐进式强化学习(TPRL)直接优化非可微tIoU指标。

Result: 在Charades-STA、QVHighlights和TACoS三个数据集上，GIRL-DETR有效解决了替代损失退化问题，以最小参数更新实现了显著的精度提升。

Conclusion: 实现了状态表示与指标优化的正交解耦，为RL在轻量级VMR模型中的应用提供了稳健的新路径。

Abstract: Video Moment Retrieval (VMR) task requires accurately localizing temporal boundaries aligned with natural language queries, but many models suffer from a misalignment between continuous surrogate losses and non-differentiable metrics, leading to optimization stagnation during the late stages of training and trapping boundary predictions in suboptimal solutions. Although Reinforcement Learning (RL) post-training successfully optimizes localization results for large models, applying it directly to lightweight networks easily disrupts the fragile feature representations established during the supervised phase. To overcome this optimization bottleneck, we propose Gradient-Isolated Reinforcement Learning for DETR (GIRL-DETR), introducing RL post-training into a lightweight temporal localization framework for the first time. The input video and text features first establish early alignment through Cross-Modal Interaction (CMI) before entering the transformer encoder. Subsequently, a Text-Guided Gating (TGG) mechanism dynamically injects semantic priors into the queries before the transformer decoder generates candidate proposals, providing high signal-to-noise ratio inputs for temporal prediction. After the supervised training reaches convergence, the backbone network is frozen to protect the feature manifold, while the detection head directly optimizes the non-differentiable evaluation metric tIoU to enhance localization accuracy through a Three-stage Progressive Reinforcement Learning (TPRL) strategy. This approach achieves an orthogonal decoupling of state representation and metric optimization. Experiments on Charades-STA, QVHighlights, and TACoS demonstrate that GIRL-DETR effectively resolves surrogate loss degradation and achieves substantial accuracy improvements with minimal parameter updates, providing a robust new pathway for RL applications in lightweight VMR models.

</details>


### [53] [DASH: Dual-Branch Score Distillation for Guidance-Calibrated Compact Diffusion Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00798)
*Abdullah Al Shafi,Kazi Saeed Alam,Sk Imran Hossain,Engelbert Mephu Nguifo*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: DASH是一个双分支蒸馏框架，通过独立监督无条件分支和条件分支，结合课程转移和锚点正则化，在5.9x压缩下保持扩散模型引导保真度，FID仅差4个点。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有类别条件扩散模型的输出级蒸馏中，无条件分数分支未被监督，导致分类器自由引导差距在student中不确定，产生退化解（两分支折叠为相同预测），使引导失效。

Method: 提出DASH框架：(1) 双分支蒸馏，独立监督两个分数分支；(2) 锚点正则化，约束条件预测向真实噪声；(3) TIRT Transfer，将教师每步重要性课程复制给学生作为冻结先验。

Result: CIFAR-10/100上5.9x压缩后，50步DDIM采样FID仅差教师4个点；无条件监督贡献超60%蒸馏增益；引导保真度优于从头训练。

Conclusion: 双分支约束对引导保持的压缩至关重要，无条件分支监督是主要贡献来源，课程转移和锚点正则化提供补充收益。

Abstract: Parameter compression of class-conditional diffusion models reveals an underexplored limitation in output-level distillation: the unconditional score branch remains unsupervised, leaving the classifier-free guidance gap underdetermined in the student. This gap, amplified at every denoising step, admits degenerate solutions where both branches collapse toward identical predictions, rendering guidance ineffective despite low output-level training loss. This paper introduces DASH, a dual-branch distillation framework that independently supervises both score branches, uniquely specifying target branch outputs for each training sample through independent branch constraints, with an anchor term regularising conditional predictions toward ground-truth noise. The framework further introduces TIRT Transfer, which copies the teacher's converged per-timestep importance curriculum into the student as a frozen prior, eliminating the need to relearn it within limited distillation budgets. Experiments on CIFAR-10 and CIFAR-100 demonstrate that 5.9x compression maintains quality within 4 FID points of the teacher at 50-step DDIM sampling, considerably outperforming training from scratch with guidance fidelity well preserved. Ablation studies confirm that unconditional supervision is the dominant contribution, accounting for over 60% of total distillation gain. Curriculum transfer and anchor regularisation provide complementary benefit, together validating dual-branch constraints as empirically essential for guidance-preserving compression.

</details>


### [54] [Physics from Video: Identifiability of Time-Invariant Second-Order ODEs under Minimal Trajectory Conditions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00115)
*Yuanyuan Wang,Wenjie Wang,Kun Zhang,Mingming Gong*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文证明在特定条件下（水平集斜率覆盖条件），仅用编码器即可从像素中唯一恢复二阶线性ODE的物理参数，无需像素重建。欠阻尼系统单段视频即可辨识，其他情况需三组轨迹，并引入方差地板正则化器防止潜在坍缩。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 弥合视觉真实感与物理理解之间的鸿沟，研究从原始像素中识别连续时间物理定律的结构可辨识性。

Method: 理论证明了水平集斜率覆盖条件可确保潜在空间与真实物理状态局部仿射；提出方差地板正则化器稳定无解码器目标；分析不同阻尼机制下的最小数据需求。

Result: 欠阻尼系统从单段视频可辨识，其他阻尼机制需三段多样化轨迹；方差地板正则化器有效防止潜在坍缩；在合成和真实数据上验证了物理常数可被可靠估计。

Conclusion: 无需计算密集的像素重建，即可从视频中可靠估计可解释的物理常数，保证了物理正确性和透明度。

Abstract: Bridging the gap between visual realism and physical understanding is a core challenge for video-based world models. We study the structural identifiability of continuous-time physical laws from raw pixels, focusing on whether an encoder-only pipeline can uniquely recover the parameters of second-order linear ODEs. We prove that a level-set slope-coverage condition ensures the learned latent space is locally affine to the true physical state, enabling exact parameter recovery. Our theory provides the first characterization of minimal data requirements across damping regimes, establishing that underdamped systems are identifiable from a single video clip, whereas other regimes require three diverse trajectories. We further introduce a variance-floor regularizer to stabilize the decoder-free objective and prevent latent collapse. Validated on synthetic and real-world data, our approach demonstrates that interpretable physical constants can be reliably estimated from video without the need for compute-intensive pixel reconstruction, ensuring both physical correctness and transparency. Code is available at https://github.com/wenjiewang3/PhysicsFromVideo.

</details>


### [55] [MoEIoU: Rethinking Bounding-Box Regression as a Mixture of Experts](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00844)
*Vinay Edula,Priyanka Bagade*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出MoEIoU，一种基于混合专家模型的边界框回归损失函数，通过log-sum-exp函数动态聚合重叠、中心对齐和纵横比三个误差项，并采用课程学习式的权重调度策略，在不同训练阶段自适应地侧重不同优化目标，在多个数据集和YOLO架构上超越现有IoU损失函数。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于IoU的损失函数引入的几何惩罚项（如中心距离、纵横比）在整个训练过程中固定不变，未能考虑优化动态：预测框初期存在较大的中心距离和形状误差，后期则应侧重于提升与真实框的重叠度。这种静态惩罚无法适应不同训练阶段的需求。

Method: MoEIoU利用log-sum-exp函数聚合重叠度、中心对齐和纵横比三个专家组件，该函数能够突出主导误差项同时保持其他项的平滑贡献；并采用课程学习的权重调度策略，在训练早期优先修正位置和形状，后期侧重提升重叠度。

Result: 在PASCAL VOC、HRIPCB和MS COCO数据集上，结合多种YOLO架构进行实验，该损失函数一致优于标准和最新的SOTA损失函数，表现出更快的收敛速度和更高的定位精度；且该自适应聚合策略可推广至其他IoU损失函数，带来持续增益。

Conclusion: MoEIoU通过动态自适应聚合和课程式调度，为边界框回归提供了更有效的优化指导，在多个目标检测框架中展现出显著的性能提升和通用性。

Abstract: Bounding-box regression is a fundamental component of object detection, playing a critical role in precise object localization. Existing Intersection-over-Union (IoU)-based loss functions extend the IoU objective by incorporating geometric penalties, such as center-distance and aspect-ratio mismatch, to improve bounding-box regression. However, these penalties typically remain fixed throughout training and do not account for the optimization dynamics in which predicted boxes initially exhibit large center-distance and shape errors, with later stages focusing on improving overlap with the ground truth. To address this limitation, we introduce MoEIoU, a mixture-of-experts based regression loss that jointly models overlap, center alignment, and aspect-ratio mismatch. MoEIoU aggregates these components using a log-sum-exp function, which emphasizes the dominant localization error while maintaining smooth contributions from other terms. Additionally, a curriculum-based weighting schedule is employed to prioritize correcting box position and shape in early training stages and improving overlap in later stages. We evaluated proposed MoEIoU on PASCAL VOC, HRIPCB, and MS COCO using multiple YOLO architectures, along with large-scale simulation experiments. It consistently outperforms standard and recent state-of-the-art losses, demonstrating faster convergence and improved localization accuracy. We further show that this adaptive aggregation improves existing IoU-based losses, yielding consistent gains and providing more effective optimization guidance for bounding-box regression in object detection frameworks.

</details>


### [56] [Positional Encodings Anchor Spatial Structure in Vision Transformers: A Geometric Perspective on Robustness](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00124)
*Mahmoud Mannes*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文研究视觉Transformer中不同位置编码对内部表征几何结构的影响，提出SSDC指标量化空间结构，发现无位置编码的ViT仍能发展空间结构但依赖视觉内容，而各类位置编码（绝对、正弦、旋转）能建立稳定的索引锚定空间组织，提升模型在内容破坏性分布偏移下的鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 位置编码已知影响ViT的性能和鲁棒性，但其如何塑造内部空间表征的几何结构尚不清楚，作者希望从几何角度理解这一机制。

Method: 提出Spatial Similarity Distance Correlation (SSDC)指标来量化token表征中的空间结构；通过对比无位置编码、绝对位置编码、正弦编码和旋转编码等多种设置，分析ViT内部表征的空间组织方式及其与鲁棒性的关系。

Result: (1) 无位置编码的ViT仍能发展出非平凡的空间结构，但该结构由视觉内容驱动，在token排列下崩溃；(2) 所有位置编码都促使表征向索引锚定的空间组织偏移；(3) 有位置编码的模型在内容破坏性分布偏移下表现出显著更好的鲁棒性；(4) 不同位置编码在深度方向的空间结构轨迹不同，但鲁棒性大致相似。

Conclusion: 鲁棒性主要依赖于稳定的位置参考框架的存在，而非具体的编码机制；这一几何视角为未来编码方案的设计提供了原则性指导。

Abstract: Positional embeddings (PEs) in Vision Transformers (ViTs) are known to impact performance and robustness, but their role in shaping internal spatial representations is not well understood. In this work, we study how different forms of PEs influence the representational geometry of ViTs and how these changes relate to robustness under content-disrupting distribution shifts. We introduce a metric, the Spatial Similarity Distance Correlation (SSDC), to quantify spatial structure in token representations. Using this metric, we show that ViTs trained without PEs still develop non-trivial spatial structure, but this structure is driven by visual content and collapses under token permutation. In contrast, we find that all PEs considered (learned absolute, sinusoidal, and rotary) are associated with a consistent shift toward an index-anchored spatial organization. Representations in these models remain stable under perturbations that disrupt content, and exhibit substantially improved robustness to such distributional shifts. We further show that while different PEs produce distinct depth-wise trajectories of spatial structure, their robustness properties are largely similar (with secondary variation across encoding schemes), suggesting that robustness appears to depend on the presence of a stable positional reference frame more than it depends on the specific encoding mechanism. These results offer a geometric account of how positional encodings shape internal representations, with implications for the principled design of future encoding schemes.

</details>


### [57] [RefDiffNet: Learning to Expose Subtle PCB Defects Before Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00852)
*Vinay Edula,Nilesh Badwe,Priyanka Bagade*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出RefDiffNet，一种轻量级即插即用的输入增强模块，通过引入无缺陷参考图像来突出缺陷区域，显著提升PCB缺陷检测性能，且计算开销极小。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有深度学习PCB检测方法仅依赖被检图像本身，忽略了无缺陷参考图像中包含的期望布局信息，导致对微小缺陷及复杂背景下的缺陷检测困难。

Method: 提出RefDiffNet，作为检测器骨干网络前的即插即用增强模块：将有缺陷图像与对齐后的无缺陷参考图像进行对比，捕捉结构变化，通过轻量级编码器输出缺陷区域被突出的增强图像，从而简化下游检测任务。

Result: 在HRIPCB和DeepPCB上，RefDiffNet在YOLOv8至YOLOv26、RT-DETR、Faster R-CNN等检测器上均取得一致提升，mAP50:95相对提升最高达18%，仅引入0.004-0.005M参数和0.7-0.8 GFLOPs。

Conclusion: RefDiffNet是一种轻量级、即插即用、与检测器无关的输入增强模块，能以极低计算成本显著提升PCB缺陷检测性能。

Abstract: Printed circuit board (PCB) defect detection is challenging because many defects are small and difficult to distinguish from complex background patterns. Most deep learning-based PCB inspection methods rely only on the inspected PCB image for defect detection, ignoring the defect-free reference image that encodes the expected layout of traces, pads, and other PCB structures. In this work, we propose RefDiffNet, a lightweight plug-and-play input enhancement block placed before the detector backbone to enhance the image before defect detection. RefDiffNet brings one proven idea from classical inspection into the deep learning era, using a defect-free reference image to reveal defects. RefDiffNet compares the defective image with the aligned reference, captures structural changes relative to the reference, and uses a lightweight encoder to output the original image with defective regions highlighted, thereby making the downstream detector's task easier. Results on HRIPCB and DeepPCB show that RefDiffNet consistently improves performance across detector families, including one-stage detectors from YOLOv8 to YOLOv26, the transformer-based RT-DETR, and the two-stage Faster R-CNN. It achieves up to 18% relative mAP50:95 gain with negligible overhead, introducing only 0.004 - 0.005M additional parameters and 0.7 - 0.8 GFLOPs, amounting to at most 0.25% of the parameter count of any evaluated detector. Results establish RefDiffNet as a lightweight, plug-and-play, detector-agnostic input enhancement module that substantially improves PCB defect detection with minimal computational cost.

</details>


### [58] [Benchmarks for Vision-Language Models in Urban Perception Should Be Reliability-Aware and Negotiated](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00871)
*Rashid Mushkani*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文论证在评估视觉语言模型（VLM）处理街景图像时应将人类标注者的分歧和弃权视为测量结果，并基于蒙特利尔100个街景的基准测试发现：模型与人类共识的一致性随维度信度变化，且存在分布不匹配问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有VLM基准测试忽略城市感知任务中的人类判断分歧和弃权问题，无法为城市治理提供可靠参考。

Method: 构建包含100个蒙特利尔街景、30个维度、12位来自7个社区组织参与者的标注基准，并对7个VLM进行确定性零样本评估。

Result: 模型与人类共识的一致性随维度信度变化；在"整体印象"评估维度上，模型与标注者存在分布不匹配，包括"不适用"选项的比例差异。

Conclusion: 基准创建者、模型开发者和机构应将不确定性和基准假设在评估报告中显式呈现。

Abstract: Vision-language models (VLMs) are increasingly used to generate structured descriptions of street-level imagery for tasks such as streetscape auditing, mapping, and public consultation. These uses combine observable attributes with appraisal categories, and the human targets are often distributions of judgments with disagreement and explicit non-response. This paper argues that benchmarking VLMs for urban perception should treat disagreement and abstention as measurement outcomes, report inter-annotator reliability alongside model alignment, and treat the label space and scoring policy as negotiable artifacts when outputs are intended to inform urban governance. We ground the argument in a benchmark of 100 Montreal street scenes annotated along 30 dimensions by 12 participants from seven community organizations, and in a deterministic zero-shot evaluation of seven VLMs. Across dimensions, model agreement with human consensus co-varies with dimension-level human reliability, and for the appraisal dimension Overall Impression models and annotators exhibit distributional mismatch including different rates of Not applicable. We close with actions for benchmark creators, model developers, and institutions to make uncertainty and benchmark assumptions visible in evaluation reports.

</details>


### [59] [LastAct: Trajectory-Guided Latest-Activity Localization for Real-Time Smart-Home Activity Recognition](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00260)
*Zishuai Liu,Ruili Fang,Jin Lu,Fei Dou*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: LastAct是一个面向流式智能家居HAR的轨迹中心框架，通过将传感器事件投影到房屋平面图形成布局对齐的轨迹图像序列，并引入边界门控与定位机制处理混合活动窗口，在四个数据集上显著提升跨/混合窗口的Macro-F1性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法在流式传感器事件中面临两大问题：1) 滑动窗口含有混合活动（边界污染），破坏预分割假设；2) 多数方法将传感器ID视为独立token，未充分利用空间上下文。

Method: 1) 将传感器事件投影到房屋平面图形成布局对齐的轨迹图像序列，保留空间连续性；2) 轻量级门控识别污染窗口；3) 边界定位器估计最后一次活动转换，通过边界引导掩码强调边界后证据、抑制陈旧上下文；4) 预计算布局对齐模板缓存避免重复渲染。

Result: 在四个公开智能家居数据集上，LastAct在纯窗口上达到竞争性或更优性能，在跨/混合窗口上取得显著的Macro-F1提升，展现出在近真实滑动窗口场景下的鲁棒性。

Conclusion: 通过显式建模空间结构和混合窗口边界，LastAct有效解决了流式HAR中的边界污染问题，为近真实部署场景提供了更鲁棒的解决方案。

Abstract: Human Activity Recognition (HAR) from ambient sensors enables smart-home applications such as health monitoring and assisted living. In realistic deployments, however, sensor events arrive as a continuous stream and activity boundaries are unknown. Sliding-window inference therefore produces many windows that straddle transitions and contain mixed activities, creating boundary contamination that violates the pre-segmented instance assumption used by most benchmarks and models. Moreover, many pipelines under-use spatial context by treating sensor IDs as independent tokens. We present LastAct, a trajectory-centric framework for streaming smart-home HAR that targets the most recent activity under mixed windows while explicitly modeling spatial structure. LastAct projects sensor events onto the home floorplan to form a layout-aligned trajectory image sequence that preserves spatial continuity. A lightweight gate identifies contaminated windows, and a boundary localizer estimates the last transition to enable boundary-guided masking that emphasizes post-boundary evidence and suppresses stale context. For efficiency, we reuse a precomputed layout-aligned template cache to avoid repeated rendering. Empirically, across four public smart-home datasets under near-realistic mixed-activity protocols, LastAct achieves competitive or superior performance on pure windows and yields substantial Macro-F1 gains on cross/mixed windows, demonstrating improved robustness under near-realistic sliding-window regimes.

</details>


### [60] [CV-Arena: An Open Benchmark for Instructional Computer Vision Problem Solving with Human-AI Collaborative Preferences](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00931)
*Fangzhou Lin,Peiran Li,Lingyu Xu,Wenjing Chen,Qianwen Ge,Shuo Xing,Mingyang Wu,Xiangbo Gao,Siyuan Yang,Kazunori Yamada,Ziming Zhang,Haichong Zhang,Zhen Dong,Ming-Hsuan Yang,Zhengzhong Tu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出CV-Arena基准，包含12K高分辨率真实图像指令对，覆盖16种视觉任务类型，用于评估指令引导的图像编辑能力。同时提出Active Elo偏好协议和CV-Agent轻量级代理模型，实验发现现有21个系统在指令遵循、物理推理等方面存在明显不足。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有图像编辑基准过于关注狭窄的外观编辑，未能充分覆盖真实图像在专业工作流中的多样性。作者希望将指令引导的图像编辑扩展为"指令性计算机视觉问题求解"，涵盖更丰富的视觉任务类型，并建立大规模、高保真的专业级评估基准。

Method: 1) 构建CV-Arena基准：通过CogRetriever双轨检索-整理流水线，结合网络搜索、代理查询精炼、验证和可追溯性，收集12K高分辨率真实图像指令对，覆盖16种视觉任务类型。2) Active Elo评估协议：结合CV-Judge逻辑门控多维VLM评估器自动拒绝明显失败和解决高置信度比较，将高质量比较路由给专家评分员，通过可靠性加权Elo聚合人类与AI的混合监督。3) CV-Agent：轻量级代理模型，集成了规划、编辑和验证的闭环推理。

Result: 对21个系统（包括专有、开源和代理模型）的综合评估显示，现有模型在指令遵循、物理推理、结构控制和细粒度细节保留方面存在持续差距。CV-Agent展示了闭环推理在专业级指令遵循视觉编辑中的潜力。

Conclusion: 指令性计算机视觉问题求解是一个比传统图像编辑更广泛的框架，现有模型在此框架下仍有显著不足；结合规划-编辑-验证的闭环推理是提升专业级视觉编辑能力的有前途方向；CV-Arena和Active Elo为未来研究提供了可靠的评估平台。

Abstract: Instruction-guided image editing is becoming a general interface for visual work, yet existing benchmarks still focus largely on narrow appearance edits and do not fully capture the diversity of real-image tasks in professional workflows. Here, we define instructional computer vision problem solving as a broader formulation of image editing: given a real input image and a natural-language instruction, a system must produce an edited output that realizes the requested transformation while satisfying explicit preservation, geometric, physical, and usability constraints. We introduce CV-Arena, an open benchmark designed to evaluate this capability at professional scales. CV-Arena contains 12K high-resolution real-image instruction pairs spanning 16 instruction-based visual task types, constructed using CogRetriever, a dual-track retrieval-and-curation pipeline that combines targeted web search, agentic query refinement, verification, and traceability. To evaluate models at scale while preserving human fidelity, we propose Active Elo, a human-AI collaborative preference protocol that leverages CV-Judge, a logic-gated, multi-dimensional VLM evaluator, to reject clear failures and resolve high-confidence comparisons; and to route close, high-quality comparisons to expert raters. Mixed human and AI supervision is then aggregated through reliability-weighted Elo updates. Our comprehensive evaluation of 21 systems, including proprietary, open-source, and agentic models, on CV-Arena reveals persistent gaps in instruction adherence, physical reasoning, structural control, and fine-grained detail preservation. We further develop CV-Agent, a lightweight agentic model that combines planning, editing, and verification, and demonstrate that closed-loop reasoning is a promising direction for professional-grade instruction-following visual editing.

</details>


### [61] [Rethinking Amortized Neural Representations for High-Resolution Terrain Elevation Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00404)
*Haoan Feng,Xin Xu,Leila De Floriani*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出HUVR+SIREN，一种用于地形高程数据的隐式神经表示方法，通过替换坐标解码器为平滑可微函数，在统一基准测试中取得了最佳的高度和导数保真度，且支持量化压缩。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有隐式神经表示方法主要针对自然图像开发，将其直接应用于地形高程数据存在域差距（cross-domain gap），缺乏针对地形数据的系统评估和适配方法。

Method: 建立1米/像素地形数据统一基准，评估三种代表性方法（HUVR等）；提出HUVR+SIREN，将HUVR的坐标解码器替换为平滑且解析可微的SIREN激活函数网络，保持共享解码器架构不变。

Result: HUVR+SIREN在高度和导数保真度上达到最佳，无额外瓦片存储开销且解码成本更低；支持激进的后训练量化压缩，质量损失可忽略不计。

Conclusion: 平滑可微解码器对地形数据至关重要，每个瓦片的瓶颈已接近上限，性能差距主要来自共享超网络架构设计。

Abstract: Implicit neural representations (INRs) model a signal as a continuous coordinate-to-value function. For terrain elevation data, this supports analytic derivatives, arbitrary-resolution decoding, and a smooth surface model of the underlying heightfield. However, fitting and storing a separate INR for every tile does not scale to large terrain datasets. Amortized neural representations reduce this cost with a shared network: a new tile is mapped to a compact per-tile payload, and a shared decoder reconstructs the heightfield from it. Most such methods are hypernetworks that predict the payload in a single forward pass, while others recover it through a short per-tile optimization. These methods were developed primarily for natural images, and their suitability for terrain heightfields remains unclear. We introduce a controlled benchmark on a 1 m/pixel terrain dataset and evaluate three representative methods under a unified protocol. Observing a clear cross-domain gap, we propose HUVR+SIREN, a hypernetwork that adapts the strongest benchmarked method (HUVR) by replacing its coordinate decoder with a smooth, analytically differentiable one. It attains the best height and derivative fidelity on the benchmark with no additional per-tile storage and lower decode cost, and tolerates aggressive post-training quantization with negligible quality loss, giving a compact terrain neural format. Ablations and diagnostics further identify which design choices transfer to terrain and show that the per-tile bottleneck is already near its useful limit, leaving the remaining gap in the shared hypernetwork's architectural design.

</details>


### [62] [An Open-Source Benchmark and Baseline for Multi-temporal Referring Segmentation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00987)
*Bingyu Li,Da Zhang,Tao Huo,Zhiyuan Zhao,Junyu Gao,Xuelong Li*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出多时相指代分割（MTRS）新任务，构建了CRAFT-Agent自动化数据构建流程和MTRefSeg-21K基准数据集，并提出了MTRefSeg-R1模型，通过两阶段训练实现语言引导的多时相变化感知与分割。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LVLMs在视觉理解和语言引导方面表现优异，但多时相视觉推理能力尚未被充分探索，缺乏对应的任务定义、数据集和基准模型。

Method: 1）提出MTRS任务，联合时序对应推理、语言定位和像素级掩码预测；2）设计CRAFT-Agent自动化数据构建管道，经人工审核构建MTRefSeg-21K数据集；3）提出MTRefSeg-R1，采用两阶段训练策略：先通过20K视觉样式例学习通用时相变化感知，再在MTRefSeg-21K上微调进行细粒度语言引导的时序定位。

Result: 直接推理的VLM/LVLM基线表现较差，任务特定微调仍有限；MTRefSeg-R1在多项指标上显著优于现有LVLM基线，证明了MTRS的挑战性与潜力。

Conclusion: MTRS是一项具有挑战性的新任务，MTRefSeg-R1通过显式建模跨时相视觉差异和对齐语言指令与时序变化，实现了有效的多时相指代分割，为多时相视觉推理提供了新方向。

Abstract: Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) have shown strong visual understanding and language-guided grounding abilities, yet their capacity for multi-temporal visual reasoning remains underexplored. To bridge this gap, we introduce \textbf{Multi-temporal Referring Segmentation (MTRS)}, a new task that aims to segment language-described temporal changes from multi-temporal images. MTRS extends conventional referring segmentation and change detection by jointly requiring temporal correspondence reasoning, language grounding, and pixel-level mask prediction. We propose \textbf{CRAFT-Agent}, an automated data construction pipeline with human auditing, and build \textbf{MTRefSeg-21K}, the first MTRS benchmark, containing 21K high-quality multi-temporal image-text-mask triplets across diverse scenes, viewpoints, and domains. Benchmarking a broad set of VLM- and LVLM-based models reveals that direct inference performs poorly, while task-specific fine-tuning remains limited. To address this, we propose \textbf{MTRefSeg-R1}, a change-aware LVLM framework trained with a two-stage strategy. It first learns general temporal-change perception from 20K vision-only bi-temporal samples, and is then fine-tuned on MTRefSeg-21K for fine-grained language-guided temporal localization. MTRefSeg-R1 explicitly models cross-temporal visual differences, aligns language instructions with temporal variations, and predicts referred change masks. Extensive experiments show that MTRefSeg-R1 achieves strong and often superior performance compared with existing LVLM baselines, demonstrating the challenge and potential of MTRS.

</details>


### [63] [Cross-Axis Feature Fusion with Joint-Wise Motion Difference Prediction for Text-Based 3D Human Motion Editing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01014)
*Gyojin Han,Junmo Kim*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种新的文本驱动的3D人体动作编辑方法，通过双轴锚定Transformer架构和Soft-DTW辅助任务，实现了对动作风格和结构的保持，同时根据自然语言指令进行精准编辑，在MotionFix数据集上取得了最优结果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法主要关注编辑的时间定位（何时编辑），而忽视了关节定位（哪些关节需要修改）。本文旨在创建一个同时理解"何时编辑"和"编辑哪些关节"的模型，以更精细地控制动作编辑过程。

Method: 提出双轴锚定Transformer架构：一个关节锚定Transformer（提取关节维度特征）和一个时间锚定Transformer（提取时间维度特征），加上跨轴融合模块整合两种表征。同时引入辅助任务，训练关节锚定Transformer回归源动作和目标动作之间的Soft-DTW距离，使模型学会识别哪些关节需要修改、哪些需要保留。

Result: 在MotionFix数据集上的实验表明，该方法在文本指令对齐、源动作保持和生成动作保真度方面均显著提升，达到了最先进的性能。

Conclusion: 通过显式建模关节维度的编辑信息，结合有效的辅助训练任务，可以大幅提升文本驱动3D动作编辑的质量，为细粒度的动作编辑提供了新思路。

Abstract: We address text-based 3D human motion editing, where the goal is to preserve the style and structure of a source motion while applying edits described in natural language. The release of the MotionFix dataset has spurred active research into training-based diffusion models that directly generate an edited motion from a source motion and a text instruction. While previous works have focused primarily on learning when an edit should occur temporally, our goal is to create a model that understands not only this temporal aspect but also which specific joints are responsible for the change. Targeting this, we propose a novel architecture and a complementary auxiliary task to aid its training. Our architecture consists of two axis-anchored transformers, which extract distinct features along the joint and time dimensions respectively, and a cross-axis fusion block that integrates these representations. We further introduce an auxiliary task that trains the joint-anchored transformer to regress the Soft-DTW distance between source and target joint rotations. This objective teaches the module to understand which joints to modify and which to preserve. Through comprehensive experiments on the MotionFix dataset, we demonstrate that our method significantly improves semantic alignment with both the text instruction and the source motion, as well as the overall fidelity of the generated motion, achieving state-of-the-art results.

</details>


### [64] [ProductWebGen: Benchmarking Multimodal Product Webpage Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01022)
*Zhihong Liu,Siqi Kou,Zheng Li,Ye Ma,Quan Chen,Peng Jiang,Kai Yu,Zhijie Deng*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出ProductWebGen，一个用于系统评估多模态生成模型在商品网页生成任务中能力的基准测试，包含500个样本覆盖13个品类，并设计了基于编辑和统一模型两种流程进行对比评估。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 从源商品图像生成包含布局和视觉内容指令的商品展示网页，在营销、广告和电商领域具有重要实用价值。该任务要求严格的视觉一致性和高保真指令遵循能力，当前缺乏系统性的基准来评估多模态生成模型在此任务上的表现。

Method: 构建ProductWebGen基准，包含500个测试样本（13个品类），每个样本包含源图像、视觉内容指令和网页指令。设计两种工作流：1）基于编辑的方法（LLM生成HTML + 图像编辑模型生成图像）；2）基于统一模型的方法（单个UM同时生成HTML和图像）。同时构建了ProductWebGen-1k微调数据集（1000组真实产品图像与LLM生成的HTML代码）。

Result: 基于编辑的方法在网页指令遵循和内容吸引力方面领先，而基于统一模型的方法在视觉内容指令执行上更具优势。在开源UM BAGEL上验证了ProductWebGen-1k数据集的有效性。

Conclusion: ProductWebGen为商品网页生成任务提供了系统化的评估基准，两种流程各有优势，为后续研究提供了数据与代码支持。

Abstract: Crafting a product display webpage from a source product image, along with layout and visual content instructions, holds significant practical value for domains such as marketing, advertising, and E-commerce. Intuitively, this task demands strict visual consistency across product displays and high-fidelity instruction following to jointly generate renderable HTML code. These requirements on controllability and instruction-following are closely aligned with the core features of advanced multimodal generative models, such as image editing models and unified models. To this end, this paper introduces ProductWebGen to systematically benchmark the product webpage generation capacities of these models. We organize ProductWebGen with 500 test samples covering 13 product categories; each sample consists of a source image, a visual content instruction, and a webpage instruction. The task is to generate a product showcase webpage including multiple consistent images in accordance with the source image and instructions. Given the mixed-modality input-output nature of the task, we design and systematically compare two workflows for evaluation -- one uses large language models and image editing models to separately generate HTML code and images (editing-based), while the other relies on a single UM to generate both, with image generation conditioned on the preceding multimodal context (UM-based). Empirical results show that editing-based approaches achieve leading results in webpage instruction following and content appeal, while UM-based ones may display more advantages in fulfilling visual content instructions. We also construct a supervised fine-tuning dataset, ProductWebGen-1k, with 1,000 groups of real product images and LLM-generated HTML code. We verify its effectiveness on the open-source UM BAGEL. The data and code are available at https://github.com/SJTU-DENG-Lab/ProductWebGen.

</details>


### [65] [Data Collection for Training Quality-Control AI in Carpet Manufacturing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01023)
*Akbar Erkinov*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种用于地毯生产的在线机器视觉检测系统设计方案，该系统结合线阵相机与多角度照明，通过无监督异常检测起步、逐步过渡到有监督检测的分阶段建模策略，并将数据收集作为核心工程目标，旨在解决传统人工质检速度慢、主观性强的问题，同时持续积累缺陷数据以训练更优模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统机织和簇绒地毯生产中依赖人工目视质检，但现代织机线速度快、幅宽大，人工检测速度慢、主观性强且不一致，导致质量控制瓶颈。同时，工厂计划增加织机数量将加剧这一问题，且现有基准缺陷率和质量故障带来的财务风险较高，因此需要自动化在线检测方案。

Method: 1) 基于同步线阵相机与明场+掠射照明的成像子系统，推导分辨率与吞吐量要求；2) 定义地毯专用缺陷分类体系；3) 分阶段建模策略：从无监督异常检测（基于MVTec AD基准范例）起步，经过人在回路的标注飞轮，过渡到有监督的检测与分割模型。

Result: 提出了一套端到端、可部署的工业蓝图，将缺陷逃逸率的降低转化为过程质量与过程Sigma水平的提升，明确了检测性能与DMAIC目标的关联。

Conclusion: 该方案的核心贡献在于将数据收集作为一等工程目标而非事后考虑，为地毯行业提供了一个完整的在线机器视觉检测系统设计指南，兼顾实时检测与持续模型改进。

Abstract: Visual inspection remains the dominant quality-control practice in woven and tufted carpet production, yet it is slow, subjective, and inconsistent at the line speeds and widths of modern looms. We present a design proposal for an in-line machine-vision system whose primary purpose is twofold: to inspect the carpet web in real time and, equally importantly, to systematically collect and label images of defect patterns so that increasingly capable quality-control models can be trained over the life of the installation.The proposal is grounded in a concrete industrial setting: a Six Sigma (DMAIC) project at a woven-carpet production facility that anticipated a production bottleneck following the installation of additional weaving machines, with a substantial baseline defect rate and significant financial exposure associated with quality failures. We describe an imaging subsystem based on synchronized line-scan cameras with combined bright-field and grazing illumination, derive the resolution and throughput requirements needed to resolve fine structural defects across a multi-metre web, and define a carpet-specific defect taxonomy.We then lay out a staged modelling strategy that begins with unsupervised anomaly detection trained on defect-free material, following the paradigm exemplified by the carpet category of the MVTec Anomaly Detection benchmark, and matures through a human-in-the-loop annotation flywheel into supervised detection and segmentation models. Finally, we connect detection performance to the DMAIC objectives, showing how reductions in escaped defects translate into improved process quality and process sigma levels. The contribution is an end-to-end, deployable blueprint that treats data collection as a first-class engineering objective rather than an afterthought.

</details>


### [66] [DeepLatent: Think with Images via Parallel Latent Visual Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00562)
*Dongchen Lu,Zhimo Li,Mao Shu,Huo Cao*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出DeepLatent，一种并行潜在视觉推理框架，通过LatentFormer和连续空间强化学习算法，实现视觉状态下意识推理，在多项基准上达到最优性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有"用图像思考"方法分为工具辅助型和潜在推理型，前者延迟高、操作受限，后者性能不足且潜在token无法有效捕捉视觉信息。因此需要一种高效、高性能的潜在视觉推理方法。

Method: 1) 提出LatentFormer，使用可学习2D token并行生成上下文条件的潜在状态，将视觉更新锚定在原始图像特征上。2) 设计连续空间强化学习算法，直接在嵌入空间优化潜在调制参数。3) 采用知识蒸馏+连续空间RL两阶段训练。4) 构建DeepLatent-180K大规模数据集。

Result: 在多个基准评测中，DeepLatent取得了最先进的性能（state-of-the-art）。

Conclusion: DeepLatent通过并行潜在视觉推理框架，结合连续空间RL优化，有效解决了现有方法的延迟和性能瓶颈，为视觉语言模型的推理提供了新范式。

Abstract: The emerging paradigm of "thinking with images" embeds visual states into intermediate reasoning steps, defining a new frontier for Vision-Language Models. Existing approaches diverge along two lines. Tool-assisted methods apply explicit visual operations but suffer from high latency and restricted manipulation types. Latent reasoning methods autoregressively produce implicit visual states, but underperform tool-assisted methods, and their latent tokens fail to capture effective visual information. In this work, we propose DeepLatent, a parallel framework for latent visual reasoning. First, we introduce LatentFormer. It uses learnable 2D tokens to generate context-conditioned latent states in parallel, anchoring every visual update directly in the original image features. Second, we design a continuous-space reinforcement learning algorithm. It optimizes latent modulation parameters directly in the embedding space, significantly improving latent representation quality. The framework is trained via knowledge distillation followed by this continuous-space RL algorithm. Furthermore, we contribute DeepLatent-180K, a large-scale dataset tailored for latent visual reasoning. Extensive evaluations across multiple benchmarks demonstrate that DeepLatent achieves state-of-the-art performance.

</details>


### [67] [3DCodeBench: Benchmarking Agentic Procedural 3D Modeling Via Code](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01057)
*Yipeng Gao,Lei Shu,Genzhi Ye,Xi Xiong,Ameesh Makadia,Meiqi Guo,Laurent Itti,Jindong Chen*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出3DCodeBench，一个评估视觉语言模型代理进行程序化3D建模的基准测试，并构建3DCodeArena平台通过人类偏好进行排名。研究发现主要失败源于API不匹配，且测试时扩展能提升性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 程序化3D建模通过代码生成确定性、可编辑的3D资产，但需要深厚的软件API和几何推理专业知识。现有神经3D生成器缺乏这些特性，因此需要评估VLM代理在程序化3D建模中的能力。

Method: 构建3DCodeBench基准，包含多模态提示（文本/图像）、程序代码和3D对象三元组；建立3DCodeArena平台，基于成对人类偏好进行排名；评估12种先进VLM在程序化3D建模中的表现。

Result: (1) 失败主要源于API不匹配，成功渲染的模型仍存在几何组件断开或悬浮问题；(2) 测试时扩展（如更高思考预算、多轮细化）能提升整体性能。

Conclusion: 需要高质量程序化编码数据来推进商业VLM；有效的程序化3D建模需要提供高保真反馈的稳健执行环境进行迭代细化。

Abstract: Procedural 3D modeling through code is emerging as a versatile paradigm, offering deterministic, engine-ready, and precisely editable assets that neural 3D generators inherently lack. Authoring such procedural content, however, demands deep expertise in 3D software APIs, parametric design, and code-level geometric reasoning. In this paper, we propose 3DCodeBench, a systematic benchmark for evaluating vision-language model (VLM) agents for procedural 3D generation in 3D modeling software. Specifically, 3DCodeBench evaluates how effectively 12 advanced VLMs can serve as procedural 3D modelers by translating text and image references into procedural code for 3D modeling software. Recognizing that automated metrics may not fully capture the perceptual quality of 3D shapes, we build 3DCodeArena, a ranking platform based on pairwise human preferences over generated 3D outputs. From extensive evaluations and results, we observe that: (1) Failures mostly arise from API mismatches, while successful renders still suffer from disconnected or floating 3D geometric components. (2) Test-time scaling, such as higher thinking budgets and multi-turn refinement, improves performance overall. Our findings highlight a critical need for high-quality procedural coding data to advance commercial VLMs. Furthermore, effective procedural 3D modeling requires a robust execution environment that provides high-fidelity feedback for iterative refinement. We release 3DCodeBench, including the curated large-scale dataset of multimodal (text/image) prompts, procedural code, 3D object triplets, evaluation protocol, and the public 3DCodeArena platform as a foundational toolkit for exploring VLM-based procedural 3D modelers.

</details>


### [68] [Scaling Parallel Sequence Models to Foundation-Scale Vision Encoders](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00746)
*Yitong Jiang,Hongjun Wang,Collin McCarthy,Hanrong Ye,David Wehr,Xinhao Li,Qi Dou,Tianfan Xue,Ka Chun Cheung,Simon See,Wonmin Byeon,Ke Chen,Kai Han,Jinwei Gu,Hongxu Yin,Pavlo Molchanov,Jan Kautz,Sifei Liu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: C-GSPN 提出基于2D空间传播的视觉基础模型编码器，通过高效CUDA实现、压缩潜空间传播块和跨算子蒸馏，在保持接近线性复杂度的同时匹配或超越ViT性能，实现4倍端到端加速。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 视觉基础模型受限于自注意力的二次方计算代价，限制了可用分辨率和预训练规模。次二次方替代方案（如线性注意力、状态空间模型）虽降低成本，但往往弱化2D空间结构。GSPN通过2D网格线扫描递归实现近线性复杂度但未被用作基础级编码器。

Method: (1) 高效GSPN CUDA核：融合单步启动为warp专用实现，采用共享内存分块、合并访问和紧凑多通道传播，速度提升40-52倍；(2) 压缩潜空间传播块：融合归一化，将核级速度转化为块级和模型级效率；(3) 两阶段跨算子蒸馏：从注意力教师模型蒸馏新架构，避免从头训练基础模型的代价。

Result: 使用6亿图文对蒸馏，C-GSPN以少15%的参数匹配同构ViT基线，ADE20K分割提升+2.1%，高分辨率迁移所需数据量大幅减少，2K分辨率下实现4倍端到端块级加速，且单次无分块推理。

Conclusion: C-GSPN证明了基于2D空间传播的编码器可以成为注意力机制的高效替代方案，在保持视觉任务所需空间结构的同时实现近线性复杂度，为高分辨率视觉基础模型提供了实用化路径。

Abstract: Vision foundation models are bottlenecked by the quadratic cost of self-attention, which limits usable resolution and increases the cost of large-scale pretraining. Subquadratic alternatives such as linear attention and state-space models reduce this cost, but often serialize images into 1D token streams and weaken the 2D spatial structure important for vision. Generalized Spatial Propagation Networks (GSPN) instead propagate context directly on the 2D grid through line-scan recurrences, achieving near-linear complexity without positional embeddings, but have seen little use as foundation-scale encoders.
  We present C-GSPN, a foundation-scale vision encoder based on 2D spatial propagation. C-GSPN makes the operator practical through three improvements: (1) a fast GSPN CUDA kernel that fuses per-step launches into a single warp-specialized implementation with shared-memory tiling, coalesced access, and a compact multi-channel propagation, reaching over 90% of peak memory bandwidth and running up to 40--52x faster than the original GSPN implementation; (2) a compressed latent-space propagation block with fused normalization, which turns kernel-level speed into block- and model-level efficiency; and (3) a two-stage cross-operator distillation recipe that trains the new architecture from an attention teacher without the cost of from-scratch foundation-scale training. Distilled with 600M image-text pairs, C-GSPN matches an isomorphic ViT baseline with 15% fewer parameters, improves ADE20K segmentation by +2.1%, transfers to high resolution with a fraction of the data needed from scratch, and delivers a 4x end-to-end block speedup at 2K with single-pass, tiling-free inference.

</details>


### [69] [Reason, Retrieve, Re-rank: A Zero-Shot Reasoning-Aware Framework for Composed Video Retrieval](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00910)
*Ali Alavi*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: R3-CoVR是一个无需训练的零样本视频检索流水线，通过推理、检索和重排序三个步骤，在Composed Video Retrieval任务中实现91.9%的R@1和98.2%的R@10。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决Composed Video Retrieval (CoVR)任务中的零样本推理挑战，即在不依赖训练数据的情况下，根据对参考视频的文本修改描述，检索出对应的目标视频。

Method: 提出R3-CoVR流水线：(1) 使用多模态大语言模型(Qwen3-VL-8B)推理编辑后的效果并生成简洁描述；(2) 用对比性视频-文本编码器(SigLIP-2)进行初步检索；(3) 通过约束感知的重排序阶段，用同一个多模态模型作为裁判对候选视频评分重排。

Result: 在挑战测试集上达到91.9% R@1和98.2% R@10。其中描述长度适配编码器窗口使R@1从67.5提升至72.7，约束感知重排序使R@1从72.7提升至91.9，是最大的增益来源。

Conclusion: 证明了训练-free、纯由冻结基础模型构建的流水线在零样本CoVR任务中的有效性，特别是约束感知重排序阶段带来的显著提升，并发布了清晰的3层实现代码。

Abstract: Composed Video Retrieval (CoVR) seeks the target video that results from applying a free-form textual modification to a reference video. We address the \emph{Reason-Aware} CoVR (CoVR-R) challenge at the CVPR~2026 VidLLMs workshop, where retrieval is strictly zero-shot. We present \textbf{R3-CoVR} (\emph{Reason, Retrieve, Re-rank}), a training-free pipeline built entirely from frozen foundation models. A multimodal large language model (Qwen3-VL-8B) reasons about the \emph{after-effects} an edit implies -- state transitions, action phases, scene, camera and tempo -- and verbalises a concise post-edit description; a contrastive video--text encoder (SigLIP-2) embeds this description and the gallery for first-stage retrieval; finally a constraint-aware re-ranking stage uses the same multimodal model as a judge that scores each shortlisted candidate against the intended edited result. On the challenge test set, R3-CoVR attains \textbf{91.9\% R@1} and \textbf{98.2\% R@10}. Two findings drive these results: (i)~matching the description length to the contrastive encoder's text window lifts \Rk{1} from $67.5$ to $72.7$; and (ii)~the constraint-aware re-ranker, which reorders only the shortlist, lifts \Rk{1} from $72.7$ to $91.9$ -- the single largest gain.
