We analyse the re-ranker's behaviour, the retrieve/re-rank blend, and the shortlist depth, and we release a clean three-layer implementation.

</details>


### [70] [Single-Channel Tissue Segmentation via Cross-Modal Distillation from Foundation Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00928)
*Sakib Mohammad,Jarin Ritu,Md Sakhawat Hossain*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出一种跨模态知识蒸馏框架，利用冻结的多通道基础模型教师（SAM ViT-H/CellSAM）将知识蒸馏到仅使用核通道（DAPI）的轻量级学生网络（四种U-Net变体），在TissueNet上实现13.05 Dice点提升，以23倍参数缩减恢复教师87.9%性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多通道荧光显微镜图像提供丰富空间信息，但多通道模型在推理时需所有通道输入，限制了仅部分通道可用场景下的部署。因此需要一种能在仅使用单一核通道时仍保持高性能分割的方法。

Method: 提出跨模态知识蒸馏框架：使用冻结的SAM ViT-H/CellSAM作为教师（输入多通道），轻量级U-Net学生（Swin-Tiny/ResNet18/EfficientNet-B0/MobileNetV3）仅输入核通道；蒸馏损失结合MSE概率匹配、边界感知监督和可学习不确定性加权。

Result: 在TissueNet上，SAM蒸馏的Swin-Tiny学生Dice达78.36±1.44，相比无KD基线提升13.05点，以23x参数缩减恢复教师89.12的87.9%性能；四种学生均提升约12 Dice点；SAM ViT-H作为教师优于CellSAM；BBBC038跨数据集验证也取得一致增益。

Conclusion: 提出的跨模态蒸馏框架能有效将多通道基础模型知识迁移到单通道轻量级学生，实现架构无关的性能提升，显著降低推理时通道依赖性和模型参数量，具有良好泛化性。

Abstract: Multiplexed fluorescence microscopy improves tissue segmentation by providing complementary channels including nuclear (DAPI) and membrane (E-cadherin), that together encode richer spatial context than single-channel imaging alone. However, multiplexed models require all channels at inference, limiting deployment where only a subset is available. This work proposes a cross-modal knowledge distillation framework that transfers semantic information from a frozen foundation model teacher processing multiplexed input to a lightweight student operating on the nuclear channel only. The distillation objective combines MSE-based probability matching, boundary-aware supervision, and learnable uncertainty weighting. SAM ViT-H and CellSAM are evaluated as teachers across four U-Net students: Swin-Tiny (27M), ResNet18 (11M), EfficientNet-B0 (5.3M), and MobileNetV3 (1.5M), on TissueNet and BBBC038. On TissueNet, the SAM-distilled Swin-Tiny student achieves Dice 78.36 (plus or minus 1.44), a 13.05-point improvement over the no-KD baseline (65.31 plus or minus 1.35) and 87.9% recovery of teacher oracle performance (89.12 plus or minus 1.21) at a 23x parameter reduction. KD consistently improves all four students by approximately 12 Dice points, confirming architecture-agnostic distillation. SAM ViT-H outperforms CellSAM as teacher across all settings. Cross-dataset evaluation on BBBC038 shows consistent gains without teacher retraining.

</details>


### [71] [Feature Alignment Determines Fusion Strategy: A Comparative Study of Cross-Attention and Concatenation in Multimodal Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01207)
*Zhiqiang Zhou,Xuezhen Xie*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文通过理论分析和实验证明，在多模态融合中，特征对齐质量而非数据规模是决定拼接（concatenation）与交叉注意力（cross-attention）孰优孰劣的关键因素。当特征经过预训练对齐后，拼接在样本效率上显著优于交叉注意力（O(d_v+d_t) vs O(d_v*d_t)），且在实际数据集规模下始终占据优势。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前多模态融合中交叉注意力与拼接方法的选择缺乏理论指导，主要依靠从业者的直觉经验。作者旨在建立一种基于原理的决策框架，揭示影响融合策略选择的核心因素。

Method: 在Flickr8k数据集上，使用ResNet18和CLIP ViT-B/32两种特征提取骨干，在2048-16384样本规模下进行受控实验；提供了基于样本复杂度分析的理论解释，推导了两种方法的样本需求差异；并通过对齐退化实验验证了特征对齐质量与拼接优势之间的单调关系。

Result: 当特征经过预训练对齐后，拼接比交叉注意力高出4.1-5.1个百分点；理论分析表明交叉注意力需要O(d_v*d_t)样本学习双线性注意力权重，是拼接O(d_v+d_t)的256倍以上（对512维CLIP特征）；对齐退化实验中，拼接优势从1.3%增长到2.8%。

Conclusion: 特征对齐质量是多模态融合方法选择的首要决定因素。当特征已对齐时，拼接在实用数据集规模下具有压倒性的样本效率优势，为多模态系统特别是多模态大语言模型的设计提供了基于理论原理的融合策略选择依据。

Abstract: The choice between cross-attention and concatenation for multimodal fusion remains governed by practitioner intuition rather than principled understanding. In this paper, we demonstrate that feature alignment quality, not data scale alone, is the primary determinant of which fusion strategy excels. Through controlled experiments on Flickr8k using two feature extraction backbones (ResNet18 and CLIP ViT-B/32), we show that concatenation outperforms cross-attention by 4.1-5.1 percentage points across all tested scales (2048-16384 samples) when features are pre-aligned by a vision-language pretraining objective. We provide a theoretical explanation grounded in sample complexity analysis: concatenation requires O(d_v + d_t) samples to learn its fusion projection, while cross-attention requires O(d_v * d_t) samples to learn bilinear attention weights, over 256 times as many for 512-dimensional CLIP features. When features are already aligned, the approximation error gap between the two methods vanishes, and concatenation's sample efficiency dominates at all practical dataset sizes. An alignment degradation study confirms a monotonic trend: as feature alignment degrades, concatenation's advantage grows from 1.3% to 2.8%. These findings provide a principled decision framework for fusion method selection in multimodal systems, with direct implications for the design of Multimodal Large Language Models.

</details>


### [72] [Analysis of Ethnic Disparities in Autism Spectrum Disorder among Toddlers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01217)
*Aadithya Prabha Ramaharsha,Deevna Reddy,Uma Ranjan*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本研究探讨了种族、行为评分、性别和新生儿黄疸与自闭症谱系障碍（ASD）的关系。通过逻辑回归发现，种族对ASD发病率有显著影响：白人欧洲人ASD风险比亚洲人高81%，中东人风险低79%。同时证实新生儿黄疸是ASD的重要预测因子，男性儿童风险显著高于女性。研究建议诊断框架需考虑种族差异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究对ASD与种族关系的关注不足，且不同种族间ASD表现的差异可能影响诊断准确性。作者希望通过跨种族分析，揭示种族因素在ASD发病中的作用，为个性化诊断提供依据。

Method: 采用逻辑回归模型，分析白人欧洲人、亚洲人和中东人三个种族群体中，种族、行为评分、性别和新生儿黄疸与ASD发病率之间的关系。

Result: 种族对ASD有显著影响：白人欧洲人ASD风险比亚洲人高81%，中东人比亚洲人低79%。新生儿黄疸是显著预测因子，男性儿童ASD风险远高于女性。

Conclusion: ASD诊断和干预框架需考虑种族差异，不同种族群体的ASD表现和风险因素存在显著不同，应制定更具文化适应性的评估工具。

Abstract: Autism Spectrum Disorder (ASD) is a neurodevelopmental disorder characterized by challenges in communication and behavior. This study examines the relationship between ethnicity and ASD traits, along with behavioural scores, sex and neonatal jaundice across three ethnic groups: White Europeans, Asians, and Middle Eastern individuals. We perform a logistic regression and show that ethnicity has a significant effect on incidence of ASD. White Europeans are 81% increased risk of ASD and Middle Easterners are at 79\% reduced risk of ASD compared to Asians. We also confirm earlier studied which show that neonatal jaundice is a significant predictor of ASD, while male children are at much higher risk of ASD compared to female children. These results suggest the need for diagnostic frameworks and interventions that account for ethnic in the presentation and assessment of ASD traits

</details>


### [73] [KG-FairDiff: Knowledge Graph-Guided Prompt Refinement for Demographically Fair Text-to-Image Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01282)
*Farbod Davoodi,Seyed Reza Tavakoli Shiyadeh,Pooria Safaei,Sana Harighi,Parsa Gholami,Amirali Amini,Kimia Vanaei,Emad Firoozi,Parham Abed Azad,Babak Khalaj,Siavash Ahmadi,Amir Hossein Payberah,Mohammad Hossein Rohban,Soheil Kolouri,Ali Diba*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出KG-FairDiff，一个模型无关的推理时框架，通过知识图谱引导的提示词优化循环，在保持语义的同时减少文本到图像系统中的人口统计和文化偏见。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 文本到图像系统在新闻、教育、广告等日常基础设施中被广泛部署，但训练数据中的刻板偏见（如性别、种族、年龄、非西方文化的刻板呈现）在规模化部署中造成群体级伤害。现有方法要么需要昂贵重训练（不适合闭源商业模型），要么依赖固定模板忽略文化语境。

Method: 将公平感知的提示词精炼形式化为带约束的优化问题，实施为闭环管道：①知识图谱（~1200个文化与偏见相关三元组）检索结构化上下文；②LLM重写器提出精炼方案；③验证器仅接受降低基于散度的公平损失且保持语义保真度的提示词。同时证明了精炼循环的有限终止界，并构建了基于散度的数学一致评估套件。

Result: 在8个广泛部署的骨干生成器上，KG-FairDiff显著减少了性别、种族、年龄和交叉性差异，同时保持了提示语义。

Conclusion: 提供了一个实用、可部署的公平生成AI路线，无需修改模型本身，适合当前闭源商业模型主导的生产环境。

Abstract: Text-to-Image (TTI) systems are now everyday infrastructure for journalism, education, advertising, and public communication, and the demographic and cultural stereotypes they inherit from training data (rendering women, people of colour, older adults, and non-Western cultures as under-represented or caricatured) become a population-level harm at deployment scale. Existing mitigations either require costly retraining, infeasible for the closed-source backbones that dominate consumer products, or rely on fixed demographic templates that ignore cultural context. We present KG-FairDiff, a model-agnostic, inference-time framework that formalises fairness-aware prompt refinement as a constrained optimisation problem and operationalises it as a closed-loop pipeline: a knowledge graph of ~1,200 culture- and bias-related triples retrieves structured context, an LLM rewriter proposes refinements, and a validator accepts only prompts that reduce a divergence-based fairness loss while preserving semantic fidelity to the user's original intent. We prove a finite-termination bound for the refinement loop, contribute a mathematically consistent evaluation suite linking Bias-P/Bias-W to divergence from target distributions and ENS to KL divergence, and audit eight widely-deployed backbone generators. KG-FairDiff substantially reduces gender, race, age, and intersectional disparities while preserving prompt semantics, offering a practical, deployment-ready route to more equitable generative AI.

</details>


### [74] [Knowledge-Intensive Video Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01285)
*Chenxu Wang,Mingda Chen*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出知识密集型视频生成（KIVI）任务，构建KIVI-Bench基准（1080个提示），并设计事实性和有用性的自动评估指标。实验表明现有模型在视觉属性、操作流程和信息清晰度上远落后于人类表现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有文生视频模型在视觉质量上进步显著，但缺乏对生成内容的事实性和实际有用性的系统评估。

Method: 提出KIVI任务（模型需根据简短信息寻求型提示生成视频）；构建KIVI-Bench（1080个提示）；设计面向事实性和有用性的自动评估指标。

Result: 自动指标与人类标注的一致性优于现有替代方案；7个先进模型在事实性和有用性上均低于人类水平，尤其在视觉属性、操作流程和信息清晰度方面差距明显。

Conclusion: KIVI是一个具有挑战性的研究方向，推动视频生成模型向事实准确和教学有用的方向发展。

Abstract: Text-to-video generation has advanced rapidly in visual quality, but remains under-evaluated for factuality and practical usefulness. We introduce knowledge-intensive video generation (KIVI), where models generate videos from short information-seeking prompts that ask for explanations, procedures, or demonstrations. To evaluate this setting, we construct KIVI-Bench, a benchmark of 1,080 prompts, and propose automatic metrics for factuality and helpfulness. Human evaluation shows that our metrics significantly better align with human annotations than existing alternatives. Experiments on seven state-of-the-art video generation models show that current systems still lag behind human performance, especially on visual properties, procedural operations, and clear information presentation. These results highlight KIVI as a challenging direction for factual and instructionally useful video generation.

</details>


### [75] [Beyond Visual Memory: Mechanistic Diagnostics of Latent Visual Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01287)
*Garvin Guo,Yu Chen,Xiang Wang,Shuai Li,Xinpei Zhao,Huaxing Liu,Shuai Dong*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本研究将潜在视觉推理中的潜在token分解为三个可测试组件（潜在槽、边界标记、格式），通过分析发现性能提升并非来自潜在槽（视觉记忆），而是来自边界标记、格式以及特定注意力模式，并指出不同训练监督会导致不同机制依赖。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 以往研究认为潜在视觉推理的增益来自潜在token编码视觉证据，但近期分析发现这些token与图像关联弱且对答案贡献小。这些分析将潜在token视为单一整体，掩盖了真正增益来源。因此需要分解潜在token，明确各组件的作用。

Method: 将潜在token分解为三种可测试组件：潜在槽（latent slots）、边界标记（boundary markers）和格式（format）。开发了一种SOTA方法作为探针，在6种方法-阶段设置和4个感知密集型基准上进行测试，系统性地检验视觉记忆假说的各项预测。

Result: 潜在槽在所有预测上都失败（不支持视觉记忆假说）。仅保留边界标记即可在多个设置中保持78-100%的增益。模型在潜在位置对图像的注意力比答案位置更集中。不同训练监督下，即使准确率相同，模型依赖的机制也存在显著差异。

Conclusion: 潜在视觉推理的增益来源于边界标记、格式以及窄化注意力模式，而非潜在槽（视觉记忆）。评估潜在视觉推理时不仅要看准确率，还需要分析模型实际依赖的机制。

Abstract: Recent latent visual reasoning methods achieve substantial gains by inserting continuous latent tokens into multimodal language models. These gains are commonly attributed to the tokens encoding visual evidence; recent analyses, however, reveal a paradox: the tokens are loosely tied to the image and contribute little to the answer. Critically, these analyses treat latent tokens as a single unit, obscuring the true source of the gains. We therefore decompose latent tokens into three testable components: latent slots, boundary markers, and format, and develop a state-of-the-art method as a probe under favorable conditions. Across six method-stage settings and four perception-heavy benchmarks, latent slots fail every prediction of the visual-memory account. Strikingly, retaining only the boundary markers preserves 78 to 100% of the gain in several settings, while the model attends to the image more narrowly at latent positions than at answer positions. The gain therefore comes from boundary markers, format, and this attention pattern, not from latent slots. How each method engages this mechanism depends on its training supervision: at matched accuracy, mechanisms can still differ markedly. Latent visual reasoning thus needs evaluation not only by accuracy but by what the model actually relies on.

</details>


### [76] [Perception First: A Frontier Native-Video Model with Self-Consistency for Implicit Video Question Answering](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01485)
*Ali Alavi*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文系统研究了VRR挑战中的视频问答任务，发现该基准测试的核心瓶颈在于感知能力而非推理能力：推理增强策略无益甚至有害，而基础模型的感知能力和轻量级测试时去噪才是有效手段。错误分析表明，相对深度、视角和计数等低级感知任务最难，而因果和社会推理几乎已被解决。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究视频问答（尤其是VRR-QA基准）中，模型表现受限的根本原因究竟是推理能力不足还是感知能力不足，并系统评估多种开放视频大模型和推理时策略的效果。

Method: 对多种开源Video-LMM（Qwen2.5-VL、Qwen3-VL、InternVL3、Gemma-3、Video-R1、VideoChat-R1.5）进行无训练的系统研究，测试多种推理时策略（思维链、问题分解、描述-推理级联、音频转录、空间状态提示、自一致性、多模型集成、类别路由），并进行逐类别错误分析。

Result: 1）该基准是感知受限而非推理受限，推理增强策略中性甚至有害；2）基础模型感知能力和轻量级测试时去噪是关键因素；3）相对深度、视角、计数最难，因果和社会推理几乎已解决；4）针对最弱类别注入深度线索反而导致准确率下降5.8个百分点。

Conclusion: VRR-QA基准的核心瓶颈在于模型的感知能力而非推理能力，改善模型需要更好的感知器（percept），而非更好的推理过程（procedure）。

Abstract: We describe our submission to the VRR Challenge @ CVPR 2026, built on the \emph{ImplicitQA} / \emph{VRR-QA} benchmark~\cite{implicitqa}: multiple-choice video question answering in which answers are deliberately \emph{not} observable in any single frame and must be inferred from spatial layout, motion, depth, viewpoint, causality, and social context across discontinuous frames of creative video. We conduct a systematic, training-free study spanning open-source Video-LMMs (Qwen2.5-VL~\cite{qwen25vl}, Qwen3-VL~\cite{qwen3vl}, InternVL3, Gemma-3, and the RL-tuned video reasoners Video-R1~\cite{videor1} and VideoChat-R1.5~\cite{videochatr15}) and a battery of inference-time strategies (chain-of-thought, question decomposition, describe-then-reason cascades, audio transcripts, spatial state prompting, self-consistency~\cite{selfconsistency}, multi-model ensembling, and category routing). Our central finding is that this benchmark is \emph{perception-bound rather than reasoning-bound}: reasoning-side augmentations are neutral-to-harmful, whereas base-model perceptual capability and lightweight test-time denoising are the only reliable levers. A per-category error analysis localizes the difficulty to low-level perception -- relative depth, viewpoint, and counting are the hardest categories, while causal and social reasoning are nearly solved -- and a prompt that explicitly injects monocular depth cues to attack the weakest category \emph{lowers} test accuracy by $5.8$ points, confirming that the model needs a better \emph{percept}, not a better \emph{procedure}.

</details>


### [77] [PaCX-MAE: Physiology-Augmented Chest X-Ray Masked Autoencoder](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01537)
*Yancheng Liu,Kenichi Maeda,Manan Pancholy*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: PaCX-MAE是一种跨模态蒸馏框架，通过在CXR编码器中注入生理先验（ECG和实验室数据），在推理时保持单模态，显著提升生理依赖任务的性能（如+2.7 AUROC, +6.5 F1），并高效利用标签数据。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 临床诊断常需结合影像与生理测量，但现有模型通常只处理单模态数据，缺乏跨模态信息的有效整合。

Method: 提出PaCX-MAE框架，在域内掩码自编码基础上增加双对比-预测目标，使CXR表示与配对的ECG和实验室嵌入对齐。

Result: 在9个基准测试上一致优于域内MAE，生理依赖任务显著提升（MedMod +2.7 AUROC, VinDr +6.5 F1），1%标签数据下高效，分割任务与MAE持平。

Conclusion: PaCX-MAE成功学习关注生理指标（如心影区域），这些在标准视觉预训练中缺失，实现了跨模态知识注入而不牺牲推理时的单模态效率。

Abstract: Clinical diagnosis often requires combining imaging with physiological measurements, yet deployed models typically operate on unimodal data. We present PaCX-MAE, a cross-modal distillation framework that injects physiological priors into chest X-ray (CXR) encoders while remaining strictly unimodal at inference. PaCX-MAE augments in-domain masked autoencoding with a dual contrastive-predictive objective, aligning CXR representations with paired ECG and laboratory embeddings. Extensive evaluation across nine benchmarks demonstrates consistent improvements over domain-specific MAE, particularly on physiology-dependent tasks (e.g., +2.7 AUROC on MedMod; +6.5 F1 on VinDr). The method proves highly label-efficient in the 1% regime and preserves anatomical fidelity, achieving parity with MAE on segmentation tasks. Zero-shot and attention analyses confirm that PaCX-MAE successfully learns to attend to physiological indicators, such as the cardiac silhouette, absent in standard visual pretraining.

</details>


### [78] [TLG: Temporal-Logic Grounding for Video Question Answering via Source-Annotation Reconstruction and Category-Targeted Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01591)
*Ali Alavi*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 作者提出TLG系统，通过重构视频动作时间线、解析问题为时序逻辑程序并确定性执行，将时序逻辑推理准确率从46.9%提升至71.37%，接近排行榜榜首，并证明时序定位是核心瓶颈，真实标注比大模型更关键。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有视频-语言模型在时序逻辑推理任务上表现接近随机水平，因为它们将视频视为帧的集合，无法定位动作发生的时间位置。作者希望解决这一核心瓶颈。

Method: TLG采用三级架构：1）从公开数据标注重构视频动作时间线，将问题解析为时序逻辑程序并确定性执行；2）无标注时回退到强开源VLM；3）仅将VLM最弱的题型路由给前沿推理模型。

Result: 测试准确率从VLM基线的46.9%提升至71.37%，绝对提升24.5个百分点，距离排行榜第一名仅差3个百分点。

Conclusion: 时序定位是不可约的瓶颈，真实标注（而非更大模型）才是提升准确率的关键。三种基于模型的时序重建变体均不如整体VLM，进一步验证了这一点。

Abstract: The TimeLogic Challenge evaluates formal temporal-logic reasoning over video - 16 operators (before, after, until, since, always, co-occur, ordering, ...) in boolean and 4-way multiple-choice form. End-to-end video-language models (VLMs) hover near chance on this task because they treat video as a bag of frames and cannot localize when actions occur. We present TLG (Temporal-Logic Grounding), a three-tier system that (i) reconstructs each video's action timeline from the public source-dataset annotations the benchmark was generated from, parses every question into a temporal-logic program, and executes it deterministically; (ii) falls back to a strong open VLM where no annotation exists; and (iii) routes only the question categories where the VLM is empirically weakest to a frontier reasoning model. TLG raises test accuracy from a 46.9% VLM baseline to 71.37%, a +24.5 absolute gain, reaching within 3 points of the leaderboard top. We report extensive ablations, including three model-based timeline-reconstruction variants that all underperform a holistic VLM, isolating temporal grounding as the irreducible bottleneck and showing that real annotations - not larger models - drive accuracy.

</details>


### [79] [Self-Improving Small Object Grounding in LVLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01612)
*Tianze Yang,Yucheng Shi,Ruitong Sun,Ninghao Liu,Jin Sun*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文发现LVLMs的注意力结构可以直接用于小目标定位，无需微调。通过训练一个轻量级IoU回归器（仅基于注意力图）可实现强IoU预测（Pearson r > 0.67），并据此提出ACS框架（含训练版ACS-Learned和无训练版ACS-Free），在COCO和Objects365上实现小目标定位最高19%的提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索LVLMs内部注意力模式能否在不微调的情况下可靠地识别小目标框，从而提升目标定位的可解释性和可靠性。

Method: 1) 训练轻量级IoU回归器（仅基于注意力图），验证注意力结构编码了定位质量。2) 基于回归器提出ACS-Learned框架，从多个候选框中选出最优框。3) 分析回归器所学，识别关键Transformer层和注意力头，据此提出ACS-Free——一种无训练的选择器，通过注意力熵排序候选框。

Result: 在COCO和Objects365上，小目标定位提升最高达19%。ACS-Free在所有无训练方法中表现最佳。

Conclusion: LVLMs的注意力结构中确实编码了可用于定位质量的信号，利用这一结构可以在不微调的情况下显著提升小目标定位的性能和可解释性。

Abstract: Can internal attention patterns in Large Vision Language Models (LVLMs) identify reliable small-object boxes without fine-tuning? In this work, we provide an affirmative answer. Attention structure in LVLMs encodes grounding quality-a lightweight IoU regressor trained solely on attention maps achieves strong IoU prediction (Pearson r > 0.67). This regressor powers the regressor-based variant of our Attention-based Candidate Selection (ACS) framework, called ACS-Learned, which selects the best box from multiple sampled candidates to improve object grounding. By analyzing what the regressor learns, we reveal which transformer layers and heads are most critical and derive ACS-Free: a training-free selector that ranks candidates by attention entropy on these discriminative heads, with no learned component at inference. Experiments on COCO and Objects365 demonstrate up to 19% self-improvement on small object localization, with ACS-Free ranking best among all training-free methods, demonstrating that useful attention structure improves both localization reliability and interpretability in LVLMs.

</details>


### [80] [Density-Aware Translation of Spurious Correlations in Zero-Shot VLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01710)
*Afsaneh Hasanebrahimi,Hanxun Huang,Christopher Leckie,Sarah Erfani*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出密度感知翻译（DAT）方法，通过局部几何密度项修正CLIP的图像-文本相似度分数，以缓解零样本分类中虚假相关性问题。该方法利用CLIP嵌入的各向异性壳结构特征（常见模式聚集在均值附近，稀有模式被推向外围），基于嵌入密度重新缩放相似度，抑制稀疏区域的高置信度分数，保留密集的语义一致性匹配。实验表明该方法在多项基准上提升了最差组和平均准确率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: CLIP等视觉-语言模型在零样本分类中易受虚假相关性影响，即上下文线索主导语义内容。现有解决方案依赖微调或提示工程，但微调会削弱预训练优势，提示工程容易产生幻觉。作者观察到CLIP嵌入存在模态间隙且位于各向异性壳上，导致语义稀有模式被边缘化而虚假相关性被放大，亟需一种无需微调的校准机制。

Method: 提出Density-Aware Translation (DAT)：利用组参考集计算局部几何密度项，以调整图像-文本相似度分数。具体基于CLIP嵌入空间中常见模式密度高、稀有模式密度低的结构特性，通过相对密度度量重新缩放相似度——抑制扩散区域（低密度）的过度自信分数，同时保留密集区域（高密度）的语义一致匹配。

Result: 在基准数据集上，DAT一致提升了最差组准确率（worst-group accuracy）和平均准确率（average accuracy），有效缓解了虚假相关性问题。

Conclusion: 密度感知翻译作为一种简单而有效的校准机制，无需微调或复杂提示工程，即可提升多模态模型零样本分类的可靠性，验证了利用嵌入空间几何结构进行后处理校准的可行性。

Abstract: Vision-Language models (VLMs), such as CLIP, achieve powerful zero-shot classification. However, their predictions remain sensitive to spurious correlations, where contextual cues dominate over semantic content. Earlier solutions typically rely on fine-tuning or prompt engineering, which either undermine the advantages of pre-trained models or are prone to hallucination. In this work, we propose Density-Aware Translation (DAT) that refines image-text similarity scores using a local geometric density term derived from group reference sets. Our approach is motivated by the phenomenon that CLIP embeddings exhibit a modality gap and lie on an anisotropic shell in the feature space: common patterns cluster near the mean, while rare patterns are pushed outward. This geometry creates uneven alignment, where spurious correlations are amplified while semantically meaningful but rare cues are marginalised. To address this, we employ a relative measure to rescale similarities based on embedding density, suppressing overconfident scores in diffuse regions while preserving dense, semantically consistent matches. Experimental results on benchmark datasets demonstrate consistent improvements in worst-group and average accuracy, highlighting density-aware translation as a simple and effective calibration mechanism for reliable zero-shot classification using multimodal models.

</details>


### [81] [FlatVPR: Plug-and-play Geo-linear Residual Adapter for Geometric Rectification of Foundation Model Feature Manifolds](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01734)
*Rai Hisada,Kanji Tanaka*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: FlatVPR通过拉平特征流形的曲率（Pullback Flatness Loss），实现仅用线性插值重建锚点间描述子，在极度稀疏锚点（100米间隔）下仍保持高定位精度，打破了地图轻量化与定位精度之间的权衡。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有VPR方法中，轻量化地图（稀疏锚点）与定位精度之间存在根本性矛盾，主干模型（如DINOv2）的特征流形高度弯曲，导致在稀疏锚点下线性插值重建不可靠。

Method: 提出可学习残差适配器$\hat{\mathbf{z}} = \mathbf{z} + \text{Res}(\mathbf{z})$，配合Pullback Flatness Loss惩罚中间特征偏离相邻锚点线性连线，抑制流形曲率；将地图构建建模为EM框架（连续M步：流形适配；概念E步：锚点选择指南）。

Result: 在NCLT数据集上，即便锚点间隔100米且存在极端季节变化，应用该适配器后仍取得显著性能提升。

Conclusion: 通过几何整流范式有效拉平特征空间曲率，使VPR系统能在极稀疏地图下保持高精度，为轻量化长期视觉定位提供了可行方案。

Abstract: This paper proposes ``FlatVPR,'' a novel geometric rectification paradigm that effectively bridges the trade-off between map lightweightness and localization accuracy in visual place recognition (VPR) by enforcing a feature manifold structure where any descriptor between two adjacent anchors $\mathbf{z}_A$ and $\mathbf{z}_B$ can be accurately reconstructed via linear interpolation $\hat{\mathbf{z}}_{pseudo} = (1-t)\mathbf{z}_A + t\mathbf{z}_B$, where $t \in [0,1]$ denotes the relative position. While state-of-the-art foundation models such as DINOv2-ViT-S/14 provide robust semantic features, their latent manifolds exhibit prominent curvature, projecting uniform linear motion in physical space onto highly non-linear trajectories in the feature space, which hinders reliable reconstruction under sparse anchor conditions. To enable the aforementioned interpolation-based reconstruction, we introduce a residual transformation $\hat{\mathbf{z}} = \mathbf{z} + \text{Res}(\mathbf{z})$ to the raw foundation features $\mathbf{z}$, where $\text{Res}(\cdot)$ represents a learnable adapter. Our method explicitly suppresses manifold curvature using a mathematically grounded Pullback Flatness Loss that minimizes the deviation of intermediate features from the linear segment connecting adjacent anchors, thereby minimizing the intrinsic curvature of the manifold. Through this spatial flattening, map construction is formulated within an Expectation-Maximization (EM) framework, decoupled into a continuous M-step for manifold adaptation and a conceptual E-step for optimal anchor selection guidelines. Experiments on the NCLT dataset demonstrate that the application of our adapter leads to significant performance improvements even under extremely sparse anchor conditions with 100m intervals and extreme seasonal changes.

</details>


### [82] [Sensitivity as a Double-Edged Sword: A Trade-off Between Discriminability and Adversarial Robustness](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01746)
*Kai Wang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文指出全连接(FC)分类器的高敏感性是其对抗脆弱性的根源，而ℓ2距离分类器虽鲁棒但性能有限。为此提出混合原型混合(HPM)框架，结合FC判别力与ℓ2鲁棒性，并设计混合代理攻击(MSA)评估协议解决梯度模糊等问题。轻量级模块可即插即用提升现有对抗训练模型的鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 识别出神经网络对抗脆弱性的一个重要来源——全连接(FC)分类器对扰动的敏感性，并发现ℓ2距离分类器虽更鲁棒但性能受限，希望在两者间取得平衡。

Method: 提出混合原型混合(HPM)框架，包含两类原型：(1)通过EMA更新的稳定数据集级原型；(2)利用直通估计器(STE)从FC分类器预测生成的动态批次级原型。同时设计混合代理攻击(MSA)评估协议，使用多个代理模型和AutoAttack进行公平评估。

Result: 实验表明，该轻量级即插即用模块在最小微调下有效提升多种现有SOTA对抗训练模型的鲁棒性。

Conclusion: FC分类器的高敏感性与ℓ2分类器的鲁棒性之间存在可权衡的机制，HPM框架能有效结合两者优势，MSA协议为含有STE的动态架构提供了可靠的评估标准。

Abstract: Modern neural networks are highly susceptible to adversarial perturbations. In this work, we identify that part of this vulnerability stems from the sensitivity of the widely used fully connected (FC) classifiers to such perturbations. In contrast, simple $\ell_2$ distance-based classifiers exhibit significantly greater robustness. We provide thorough theoretical and empirical analysis showing that while FC classifiers' high sensitivity makes them discriminative, it also makes them vulnerable. Conversely, $\ell_2$-classifiers' insensitivity grants robustness but limits performance. Motivated by this trade-off, we propose a novel $\ell_2$-reclassifier based on a Hybrid Prototype Mixing (HPM) framework. This method retains the discriminative power of FC classifiers while leveraging the robustness of $\ell_2$ distance. It yields $\ell_2$-distance-based predictions by fusing two prototype types: (1) stable, dataset-level prototypes updated via EMA, and (2) dynamic, batch-level prototypes generated from the FC classifier's predictions using a Straight-Through Estimator (STE). However, this dynamic, STE-based architecture introduces significant challenges for evaluation, such as gradient obfuscation and forward discontinuity. To address this, we propose a new, rigorous evaluation protocol, the Mixed Surrogate Attack (MSA), which uses multiple surrogates along with powerful AutoAttack to ensure a fair and robust assessment. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our lightweight, plug-and-play module, with minimal fine-tuning, effectively enhances the adversarial robustness of various existing SOTA adversarially trained models.

</details>


### [83] [A Structured Benchmark for Text-Guided Anomaly Detection: When Language Stops Conditioning the Decision](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01992)
*Stefano Samele,Eugenio Lomurno,Teodora Jovanovic,Sanjay Shivakumar Manohar,Alberto Crivellaro,Matteo Matteucci*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出TGAD基准，系统评估多模态异常检测模型是否真正利用了文本指导。实验表明，当前方法对语言指令仅做出表面响应，一旦文本条件变化（如移除物体名词、引入组件级指令），性能大幅下降（AUROC从97.4降至82.6，从90.3降至66.3），甚至低于随机水平（31.5），揭示了现有基准高估了文本指导能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有工业异常检测的多模态方法虽然声称支持文本引导的零样本/少样本检测，但评估协议沿用单模态基准（文本条件恒定不变），无法衡量语言是否真正影响决策。报告的性能提升是来自文本指导还是强大的预训练视觉特征，这一问题尚未明确。

Method: 提出TGAD基准，渐进式增加语言的功能角色：（1）MVTec AD上的提示敏感性控制实验；（2）组件标注扩展的MVTec AD，要求模型将评估限制在指定部件；（3）新构建的组装面板数据集（APD），结合缺陷类型和组件位置知识。评估三类范式模型：生成式大视觉语言模型、免训练判别式模型、嵌入自适应判别式模型。

Result: 所有三类模型中，文本接口仅表面影响决策：生成模型移除物体名词后AUROC从97.4降至82.6；组件级指令下，当非指定部件缺陷被视为正常时，AUROC从90.3降至66.3；APD上图像级判别能力崩溃（71.2、50.5、31.5），其中一个模型低于随机水平。

Conclusion: 标准基准夸大了当前多模态异常检测系统的文本指导能力。本文提出的评估协议是构建可在工业部署中通过语言可靠控制的模型的必要前提。

Abstract: Industrial anomaly detection has historically been a unimodal task. Recent multimodal vision-language models have produced systems that admit textual input alongside the image and are presented as enabling text-guided zero- and few-shot inspection. Yet these methods are evaluated with protocols inherited from unimodal benchmarks that hold the textual condition constant and therefore cannot measure whether language conditions the decision; whether reported gains reflect text guidance or strong pretrained visual features remains open. We introduce Text-Guided Anomaly Detection (TGAD), a structured benchmark that progressively increases the functional role of language across three scenarios: a controlled prompt-sensitivity setting on MVTec AD; a component-tagged extension of MVTec AD that requires the model to restrict its assessment to an instructed part; and the new Assembled Panel Dataset (APD), a realistic industrial setting that requires both defect-type and component-location knowledge. We evaluate one representative model per paradigm: generative large vision-language, training-free discriminative, and embedding-adaptive discriminative. In all three, the textual interface conditions the decision only superficially: prompt content is absorbed unless the object noun is removed (the generative model's I-AUROC drops from 97.4 to 82.6); component-level instructions do not constrain the decision once defects outside the instructed part are admitted as normal (from 90.3 to 66.3); and when both combine on APD, image-level discrimination collapses below the MVTec level, in one case below chance (71.2, 50.5, 31.5). These results suggest that standard benchmarks overstate the text-guided capabilities of current multimodal anomaly detection systems, and that a protocol of this kind is a prerequisite for models that can be reliably controlled through language for industrial deployment.

</details>


### [84] [Ranking vs. Assignment: The Metric Mismatch in Multi-View Object Association](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02022)
*Matvei Shelukhan,Timur Mamedov,Aleksandr Chukhrov,Karina Kvanchiani*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文指出多视图目标关联中常用的评估指标（AP、FPR-95）与真实分配目标之间存在根本性不匹配，并证明Sinkhorn归一化可缓解此问题，但优化排名指标未必带来分配质量的提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有工作多使用AP、FPR-95等排序指标评估多视图目标关联，但这类指标与任务本质的一对一分配目标存在根本性错配。

Method: 通过理论分析证明AP/FPR-95在分配正确时仍可能不完美，而Sinkhorn归一化可使其完美；同时证明最优排序仍可能导致错误分配。实验上以此归一化作为后处理压力测试。

Result: 仅优化少数后处理参数即可显著提升AP和FPR-95，但分配级指标（ACC、IPAA）并未相应改善，验证了指标错配。

Conclusion: 多视图目标关联任务应重新审视评估指标，避免依赖排序指标而忽视真正的分配目标。

Abstract: Multi-view object association is an important computer vision problem that underlies many multi-camera perception tasks. While this task is naturally formulated as a constrained one-to-one matching problem, recent works heavily rely on pairwise ranking metrics like AP and FPR-95 for model evaluation. We highlight a fundamental mismatch between these metrics and the actual assignment objective. Theoretically, we show that AP and FPR-95 can be imperfect even when the assignment is already correct, and that Sinkhorn-based normalization can make them perfect. Conversely, optimal pairwise ranking can still lead to incorrect assignments. We validate this mismatch in practice by using our Sinkhorn-based normalization as a controlled post-processing stress test. We show that optimizing just a few post-processing parameters significantly boosts AP and FPR-95 without corresponding improvements in assignment-level metrics such as ACC and IPAA.

</details>


### [85] [Understanding-Enhanced Model Collaboration for Long-Tailed Egocentric Mistake Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02120)
*Boyu Han,Qianqian Xu,Shilong Bao,Zhiyong Yang,Ruochen Cui,Qingming Huang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出UE-MCM方法，通过小模型（粗粒度理解）与大模型（细粒度推理）协同，结合CLIP4CLIP+扩散对比重建与Qwen3-VL嵌入，解决第一人称视频中用户操作错误检测问题，兼顾速度与准确性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 从第一人称视频中判断用户是否错误执行了操作，现有方法难以同时兼顾高效粗粒度理解与精确细粒度动作推理，尤其对局部正确但整体不一致的动作及长尾罕见错误检测效果不佳。

Method: 提出UE-MCM：1）小模型分支（CLIP4CLIP+扩散对比重建）联合粗粒度视频与细粒度片段识别局部正确但流程不一致的动作；2）大模型分支（Qwen3-VL）聚焦细粒度动作是否正确执行；3）轻量级协作门控自适应融合双分支预测；4）互补目标优化（重加权交叉熵、AUC导向学习、标签感知调整）处理长尾分布。

Result: 提出的系统在平衡速度与准确性的前提下，能有效检测第一人称教学视频中的细微、罕见及模糊的操作错误。

Conclusion: UE-MCM通过大小模型协作与多目标优化，为第一人称视频中的操作错误检测提供了高效且精确的解决方案，尤其适用于长尾分布场景。

Abstract: In this report, we address the problem of determining whether a user performs an action incorrectly from egocentric video data. To this end, we propose an Understanding-Enhanced Model Collaboration Method (UE-MCM) that combines efficient coarse-grained video understanding with accurate fine-grained action reasoning. Specifically, UE-MCM contains a small model branch and a large model branch. The large model branch focuses on whether the fine-grained action itself is executed incorrectly, while the small model branch jointly takes the coarse-grained video and fine-grained segment as input to identify actions that may be locally correct but inconsistent with the overall workflow. The small model branch is built on a CLIP4CLIP video encoder initialized from a CLIP model enhanced by Diffusion Contrastive Reconstruction, and the large model branch uses the Qwen3-VL Embedding model to extract high-capacity representations from fine-grained action segments. The small-branch prediction and the large-branch prediction are then adaptively fused by a lightweight collaboration gate. To handle the long-tailed distribution of mistake instances, we optimize the classifiers with complementary objectives, including reweighted cross-entropy, AUC-oriented learning, and label-aware adjustment. The resulting system balances speed and accuracy, making it effective for detecting subtle, rare, and ambiguous mistakes in egocentric instructional videos.

</details>


### [86] [Disentanglement-Based Equivariant Learning for Compositional VQA](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02168)
*Zhou Du,Zhaoquan Yuan,Xiao Wu,Changsheng Xu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出DEAL框架，通过因果启发的解耦学习和等变性约束，仅依赖真实答案进行训练，显著提升组合视觉问答的泛化能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有组合VQA方法忽视了潜在概念的解耦，缺乏捕获组合变化机制的能力，且依赖额外线索训练，不适用于真实场景。

Method: 提出DEAL框架：(1) 在重编码框架中采用因果启发的干预手段，解耦视觉和文本输入中的概念；(2) 基于等变性原理，对推理输入进行组合变换，并对输出施加等变性约束，增强组合推理能力。

Result: 在CLEVR-CoGenT和GQA-SGL基准上，DEAL在视觉和语言泛化设置下均优于现有最先进方法。

Conclusion: DEAL仅依赖真实答案监督即可有效提升组合VQA性能，更具实际可行性。

Abstract: Compositional visual question answering (VQA) represents a challenging yet fundamental task that requires models to comprehend novel combinations of previously learned concepts. The current methods often overlook the disentanglement of underlying concepts and are restricted in terms of their ability to effectively capture the compositional variation mechanism. Moreover, the state-of-the-art techniques depend on additional clues for training, which is not feasible in real-world VQA scenarios. To address these issues, in this paper, we introduce a novel Disentanglement-based EquivAriant Learning (DEAL) framework for compositional VQA, which is guided exclusively by ground-truth answers. In DEAL, we employ causality-inspired interventions to disentangle concepts derived from visual and textual inputs within a re-encoding framework. Based on the principle of equivariance, we subsequently perform a compositional transformation on the inference input and impose the equivariant constraint on the output to augment the compositional reasoning capacity of the model. Comprehensive experiments conducted on the benchmark CLEVR-CoGenT and GQA-SGL datasets validate the superiority of our proposed DEAL approach over the existing state-of-the-art methods for compositional VQA tasks in both visual and linguistic generalization settings.

</details>


### [87] [CORE-MTL: Rethinking Gradient Balancing via Causal Orthogonal Representations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02221)
*Chengfeng Wu,Tao Zou,Yanru Wu,Jingge Wang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: CORE-MTL提出一种因果启发的新框架，通过对共享表征进行语义-残差正交分解来分离任务相关结构与虚假信息，从而缓解多任务学习中的负迁移和泛化问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有多任务学习方法（梯度平衡或架构修改）忽视共享表征的内容，无法解耦任务相关结构与无关上下文，导致负迁移和泛化能力差。

Method: 提出CORE-MTL框架：将共享表征分解为正交的语义流（保留任务相关结构）和残差流（吸收无关变异）。在视觉领域，利用物理先验约束结构化场景，并用统计约束处理属性。

Result: 理论上：获得比优化导向方法更紧的分布外泛化界，无需显式梯度投影或加权即减少任务梯度干扰。实验上：在视觉多任务基准的分布内和分布外设置中一致优于现有方法。

Conclusion: CORE-MTL通过因果驱动的表征分解有效解决了多任务学习中的负迁移问题，兼具理论保障和实际效果提升。

Abstract: Multi-task learning (MTL) aims to construct a joint model for multiple tasks by sharing a common representation across domains. To achieve this goal, existing optimization-centric methods either balance task gradients or modify the shared architecture. However, as these approaches remain agnostic to the content of the shared representation, they fail to disentangle task-relevant structure from spurious context, leading to negative transfer and poor generalization. To overcome this limitation, we propose Causal Orthogonal Representations for Multi-Task Learning (CORE-MTL), a causally motivated representation-centric framework that encourages a structured semantic-residual factorization of the shared representation, concentrating task-relevant structure in the semantic stream while relegating nuisance variation to the residual stream. We instantiate this framework in the visual domain by leveraging physical priors for structured scenes and statistical constraints for attributes. Theoretically, our method enjoys a tighter out-of-distribution generalization bound than optimization-centric methods and reduces task gradient interference without explicit gradient projection or reweighting. Empirically, CORE-MTL consistently outperforms existing methods on visual multi-task benchmarks in both in-distribution and out-of-distribution settings. Code is publicly available at https://github.com/Hope-Rita/CORE-MTL.

</details>


### [88] [RPCASSM: Robust PCA State Space Model For Infrared Small Target Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01689)
*Pingping Liu,Aohua Li,Yubing Lu,Jin Kuang,Tongshun Zhang,Qiuzhan Zhou*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出RPCASSM网络，基于鲁棒主成分分析范式，通过设计背景状态空间模块（BSSM）和目标状态空间模块（TSSM），分别利用空间探针扫描机制（SPCM）和可变形提示扫描机制（DPCM），解决了现有视觉状态空间模型对红外小目标边缘结构建模不准确的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 红外小目标在远距离成像中像素占比较低，现有主流视觉状态空间模型难以准确建模目标边缘结构，且现有红外状态空间模型未从红外小目标的结构特性出发设计架构。

Method: 基于RPCA模型范式，提出RPCASSM网络：1）背景状态空间模块（BSSM）利用空间异质信号的显著性设计空间探针扫描机制（SPCM）建模背景；2）目标状态空间模块（TSSM）利用目标的稀疏性和局部高亮特性设计可变形提示扫描机制（DPCM）聚焦目标可变空间进行状态空间建模。

Result: 在现有基准数据集上的实验结果证明了RPCASSM设计的有效性。

Conclusion: RPCASSM通过解耦背景与目标的建模，有效解决了主流视觉状态空间模型对红外小目标边缘结构建模困难的问题。

Abstract: The detection and segmentation of infrared small targets have important application significance in the fields of surveillance and security, maritime rescue and so on. Due to the low occupancy of these targets in long-distance imaging, the mainstream visual state space model is inefficient and difficult to accurately model the target edge. The existing infrared state space models do not deviate from the mainstream visual state space structure framework from the structural properties of infrared small targets. In order to solve this problem, this paper proposes the RPCASSM network based on the model paradigm of robust principal component analysis(RPCA), which aims to design the background state space module(BSSM) and the target state space module(TSSM) by the nature of the infrared small target in the spatial domain. The BSSM aims to use the saliency of spatial heterogeneous signals to design a spatial probe scanning mechanism(SPCM) to model background information. The TSSM designs a deformable prompt scanning mechanism(DPCM) by using the sparsity and local highlight of the target to focus on the deformable space of the target for state space modeling. According to the above design, we effectively solve the problem that the existing mainstream vision state space model is difficult to accurately model the edge structure of infrared small target. Experimental results on the existing benchmark data sets prove the effectiveness of the RPCASSM design. Our code will be made public at \href{https://github.com/PepperCS/RPCASSM}{RPCASSM}.

</details>


### [89] [Towards Resolving Optimization Conflicts Between Image- and Text-Based Person Re-Identification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02242)
*Karina Kvanchiani,Timur Mamedov*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出一种解耦的两阶段训练流程，通过单一视觉编码器同时支持图像和文本两种模态的ReID任务，避免跨任务干扰，并发现I2I预训练和文本监督能提升整体性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 图像ReID和文本ReID由于模态差异和训练目标冲突，导致联合优化时共享表征效果不佳，现有方法常分开研究，缺乏有效统一的训练范式。

Method: 提出解耦的两阶段训练流程：第一阶段用I2I ReID预训练视觉编码器；第二阶段引入文本监督，在单一视觉编码器上同时支持I2I和T2I检索，避免跨任务干扰。

Result: 实验表明I2I ReID预训练能提升T2I的泛化能力；文本监督引入对I2I和T2I性能均有提升。

Conclusion: 该解耦训练策略为统一ReID系统和跨模态检索提供了有效思路。

Abstract: The joint optimization of image-based (I2I) and text-based (T2I) person re-identification (ReID) is hindered by modality discrepancies and conflicting training objectives, leading to suboptimal shared representations. While I2I ReID focuses on identity-level invariance across images of the same person, T2I ReID is driven by instance-specific textual descriptions tied to unique visual traits. This paper explores the fundamental difference between two ReID tasks and their optimization processes for effective training. Since I2I and T2I ReID are often studied separately, the loss functions optimized for one retrieval setting may negatively affect the representation quality required by the other. Motivated by these findings, we propose a decoupled two-stage training pipeline for learning a shared representation across image and text modalities. The pipeline is based on a single vision encoder that supports both I2I and T2I retrieval while avoiding cross-task interference during training. We provide extensive experiments across multiple configurations, varying domain mixing procedures, learning strategies, and task objectives. We observed that I2I ReID pre-training positively impacts the generalization ability to T2I data. Besides, we find that incorporating textual supervision during the vision encoder training stage enhances both I2I and T2I performance. We believe our insights provide a meaningful step toward unified ReID systems and cross-modal retrieval overall.

</details>


### [90] [Deep Learning for Remote Sensing to Improve Flood Inundation Mapping](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02310)
*Yogesh Bhattarai,Vijay Chaudhary,Wai Lim Kim,Sanjib Sharma*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于去噪扩散概率模型（Masked Diffusion Transformer架构）的云去除框架，用于洪水卫星影像处理，能生成保持视觉保真度和水文一致性的无云图像，有效支持洪水监测与灾害风险管理。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 光学卫星影像在洪水监测中因云层覆盖严重受限，传统云去除方法（如时间合成或插值）无法捕捉洪水动态变化，亟需一种能有效去除云层同时保留水文信息的方法。

Method: 采用Masked Diffusion Transformer架构，利用自注意力机制捕捉宽域空间上下文，通过掩码token建模显式学习云遮挡区域的重建，在Sentinel-2B多光谱洪水场景上训练。

Result: 模型生成的无云图像在视觉保真度和水文一致性上均表现良好，改善了水体连续性，保留了水检测指数所需的光谱特征，并通过标准图像质量指标和洪水专用水文指标进行验证。

Conclusion: 基于扩散的生成模型为光学洪水监测中的云去除提供了鲁棒且物理一致的替代方案，能够支持更可靠的连续观测，助力灾害风险管理与洪水决策。

Abstract: Flooding is the most pervasive natural disaster worldwide. Timely and accurate flood inundation mapping are essential for informing disaster risk management. Optical satellite missions provide high-resolution, multispectral observations critical for flood detection and inundation mapping. However, their operational utility is severely constrained by cloud cover during extreme precipitation events. Conventional cloud-removal techniques based on temporal compositing or interpolation often fail to capture inundation dynamics. In this study, we introduce a cloud-removal framework for flood imagery based on Denoising Diffusion Probabilistic Models, leveraging the Masked Diffusion Transformer architecture. The proposed approach exploits self-attention mechanisms to capture wider spatial context and employs masked token modeling to explicitly learn the reconstruction of cloud-obscured regions. Trained on multispectral Sentinel-2B flood scenes with realistic cloud patterns, the model generates cloud-free image realizations that preserve both visual fidelity and hydrological consistency. Reconstruction performance is evaluated using standard image quality metrics alongside flood-specific hydrological measures, demonstrating improved continuity of water bodies and preservation of spectral signatures critical for water detection indices. The results indicate that diffusion-based generative modeling offers a robust and physically consistent alternative for cloud removal in optical flood monitoring, enabling more reliable, continuous observations to support disaster risk management and flood-related decision making.

</details>


### [91] [Hallucination-Aware Diffusion Sampling for Inverse Problems via Robust Prior Updates](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02331)
*Pengfei Jin,Yiqi Tian,Kailong Fan,Bingjie Qi,Quanzheng Li*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出鲁棒先验更新（RPU）模块，通过探测扩散先验更新的局部稳定性并重新锚定位移，在不改变测量更新的情况下减少扩散逆问题求解器中的幻觉现象，在FFHQ和ImageNet上提升了重建的真实感和测量一致性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 扩散逆问题求解器虽能产生逼真重建，但"真实性"并不保证恢复的细节有测量数据支撑，存在测量条件性幻觉问题。

Method: 提出RPU模块：探测扩散先验更新的局部稳定性，将得到的位移重新锚定到当前迭代点，保持测量更新不变。在DPS上实例化RPU。

Result: FFHQ上：在框修复、高斯去模糊、运动去模糊任务中PSNR和LPIPS均优于DPS。人类评估中：FFHQ框修复获得91.9%盲选非平局偏好和91.1%有GT辅助非平局偏好。ImageNet高斯去模糊实验非平局情况下偏好RPU。

Conclusion: 鲁棒化先验更新能提升扩散逆求解器的实例忠实度，尤其当先验塑造弱约束内容时效果显著。

Abstract: Diffusion-based inverse problem solvers can produce realistic reconstructions, but realism alone does not ensure that the recovered details are supported by the measurement. We study this failure as measurement-conditioned hallucination: visually meaningful content that is either implausible or inconsistent with the measured instance. Our analysis separates Bayes-rule-based diffusion inverse solvers into a prior update and a measurement-conditioning step, showing that hallucinated content can enter through the prior-side proposal before the measurement correction is applied. Motivated by this view, we propose Robust Prior Update (RPU), a solver-level module that probes the local stability of the diffusion prior update, re-anchors the resulting displacement at the current iterate, and leaves the measurement update unchanged. We instantiate RPU in DPS and evaluate it on FFHQ and ImageNet inverse problems using automatic metrics and human faithfulness studies. On FFHQ, RPU improves PSNR and LPIPS over DPS across box inpainting, Gaussian deblurring, and motion deblurring. In human judgments, RPU receives 91.9% of blind non-tie majority preferences and 91.1% of ground-truth-assisted non-tie preferences on FFHQ box inpainting, while the ImageNet Gaussian reader study is tie-heavy but favors RPU among non-tie cases. These results support a targeted claim: robustifying the prior update can improve instance faithfulness in diffusion inverse solvers, especially when the prior shapes weakly constrained content.

</details>


### [92] [GC-MoE: Genomics-Guided Cell-Type-Specific Mixture of Experts for Histology-Based Single-Cell Spatial Transcriptomics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02424)
*Kaito Shiku,Ahtisham Fazeel Abbasi,Ryoma Bise,Yuichiro Iwashita,Kazuya Nishimura,Andreas Dengel,Muhammad Nabeel Asim*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出GC-MoE方法，通过细胞类型特异性专家混合和共表达感知预测器，从组织病理图像和细胞位置预测单细胞空间转录组，在公开数据集上优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有组织学到空间转录组方法主要预测包含多个细胞的局部区域（spot-level）表达谱，无法捕捉细胞间表达变异，而这种变异与细胞类型高度相关。因此需要建模单细胞级别的细胞类型特异性表达模式。

Method: 提出GC-MoE，包含：(1) 路由网络估计细胞类型概率，软组合细胞类型特异性专家进行预测；(2) Cell-Type-Specific Co-Expression-Aware Predictor (CAP) 编码细胞类型依赖的基因共表达程序；(3) 轻量级Cell-to-Cell Interaction Attention (C2CA) 模块捕获相邻细胞上下文信息。

Result: 在公开单细胞空间转录组数据集上的实验和消融研究表明，GC-MoE在现有单细胞方法和适配的spot-level基线方法上均实现了一致性的改进。

Conclusion: GC-MoE通过细胞类型特异性建模有效提升了组织学估计单细胞空间转录组的性能，验证了细胞类型信息在该任务中的关键作用。

Abstract: Histology-based single-cell spatial transcriptomics (ST) estimation aims to predict gene expression for individual cells from histopathological images and cell locations, reducing the need for costly single-cell ST measurements. Unlike existing histology-to-ST methods that mainly predict spot-level profiles for local regions containing multiple cells, this task requires modeling cell-to-cell expression variability, which is strongly structured by cell type. We propose Genomics-Guided Cell-Type-Specific Mixture-of-Experts (GC-MoE), which estimates cell-type probabilities with a routing network and softly combines cell-type-specific experts for gene expression prediction. To further encode cell-type-dependent gene programs, we introduce the Cell-Type-Specific Co-Expression-Aware Predictor (CAP), together with a lightweight Cell-to-Cell Interaction Attention (C2CA) module for neighboring-cell context. Experiments and ablations on public single-cell ST datasets show consistent improvements over existing single-cell and adapted spot-level baselines.

</details>


### [93] [STaR-KV: Spatio-Temporal Adaptive Re-weighting for KV Cache Compression in GUI Vision-Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01790)
*Yuhang Han,Wenzheng Yang,Yujie Chen,Xiangqi Jin,Yaojie Zhang,Siteng Huang,Linfeng Zhang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出STaR-KV，一种基于时空自适应重加权的无训练KV缓存压缩框架，从三个维度校准视觉token重要性，在GUI任务中实现40%的峰值显存节省且不增加计算开销。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: VLMs驱动GUI代理的部署受限于KV缓存随交互步数线性增长（如仅5张截图即消耗76GB显存），现有压缩方法存在两个错误假设：将视觉token重要性聚合到单一共享显著性图，以及使用固定top-B截断。

Method: STaR-KV从三轴校准token重要性：(i) 基于在线空间互信息的子空间感知评分；(ii) 时序稳定性折扣，抑制持续关注子空间中的冗余缓存条目；(iii) 熵驱动的温度自适应重塑分数分布。

Result: 在四个GUI基准上，STaR-KV在匹配预算下取得SOTA平均准确率，压缩阶段无FLOPs开销（-0.07%），在20% KV缓存预算下峰值显存降低约40%。

Conclusion: 证明了视觉token重要性在注意力子空间层面具有空间专门化且跨层迁移，分数分布沿轨迹漂移，STaR-KV通过三轴自适应校准实现高效压缩。

Abstract: Vision-language-model-based graphical user interface (GUI) agents have shown broad automation capabilities, yet deployment is bottlenecked by a key-value (KV) cache that grows linearly with interaction steps. For instance, UI-TARS-1.5-7B consumes 76 GB of GPU memory on merely five screenshots, approaching the capacity of mainstream 80 GB accelerators. Existing KV compression methods share two structural assumptions: aggregating visual-token importance into a single shared saliency map, and applying a fixed top-B cutoff to the fused score distribution. Pilot measurements refute both: spatial specialization lives at the attention-subspace level and migrates across layers, while the score distribution drifts in shape along a trajectory. We propose STaR-KV (Spatio-Temporal Adaptive Re-weighting), a training-free KV cache compression framework that calibrates token importance along three axes: (i) subspace-aware scoring driven by online spatial mutual information; (ii) a temporal stability discount that suppresses redundant cache entries from persistently attended subspaces; and (iii) an entropy-derived temperature that adaptively reshapes the score distribution. Across four GUI benchmarks, STaR-KV achieves the strongest average accuracy among state-of-the-art KV compression methods (e.g., GUIKV, SnapKV) at matched budgets, with no compression-stage FLOPs overhead (-0.07%) and cutting peak GPU memory by nearly 40% at a 20% KV-cache budget. Code is available at https://github.com/kawhiiiileo/STaR-KV.

</details>


### [94] [ProtoAda: Prototype-Guided Adaptive Adapter Expansion and Geometric Consolidation for Multimodal Continual Instruction Tuning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02576)
*Yu-Cheng Shi,Zhen-Hao Xie,Jun-Tao Tang,Da-Wei Zhou*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: ProtoAda提出了一种原型引导的自适应微调框架，通过格式感知的任务原型对齐任务分配与路由，解决多模态持续指令微调中因视觉-语言语义相似但响应结构不同导致的任务路由错误和梯度干扰问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法使用图像-文本相似度路由的稀疏架构（如MoE LoRA）进行多模态持续指令微调，但不同任务即使响应结构不同，也可能因语义相似而被错误路由到同一专家，导致格式盲目的任务分配，引发梯度干扰和专家协作低效。

Method: 提出ProtoAda框架：1) 引入格式感知的任务原型（format-aware task prototypes），对齐任务分配与路由，同时考虑任务语义和输出结构；2) 以几何感知的方式整合格式兼容的更新，有效重用并逐步优化已有参数。

Result: 在多个基准上取得优越性能，特别是在输出结构容易受到顺序微调破坏的任务上表现突出。

Conclusion: ProtoAda通过感知输出格式的原型引导机制，有效解决了持续指令微调中任务路由的格式盲目性问题，提升了多模态模型持续学习的能力。

Abstract: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) achieve strong performance through instruction tuning, but real-world deployment requires them to continually acquire new vision-language capabilities, making Multimodal Continual Instruction Tuning (MCIT) essential. To reduce inter-task interference and promote collaboration, recent methods often employ sparse architectures like Mixture of LoRA Experts with image-text similarity routing. However, tasks with distinct response structures could share highly similar visual-linguistic semantics and thus be wrongly routed to the same expert; image-text similarity alone is insufficient for reliable task assignment. For example, an expert in a grounding task requiring coordinate prediction may be biased toward producing short textual answers after learning semantically similar VQA tasks. This format-blind task assignment integrates heterogeneous response types into shared parameters, inducing gradient interference and ineffective expert collaboration. To address this problem, we propose ProtoAda, a prototype-guided adaptive tuning framework. ProtoAda introduces format-aware task prototypes to align task assignment and routing with both task semantics and output structure, and further consolidates format-compatible updates in a geometry-aware manner to effectively reuse and progressively refine existing parameters. Extensive experiments on multiple benchmarks demonstrate that ProtoAda achieves superior performance, especially on tasks whose answer structures are easily corrupted by sequential tuning.

</details>


### [95] [Physics-Guided Attention in a Lightweight TCN for Efficient WiFi CSI-Based Human Activity Recognition](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01834)
*Chinthaka Ranasingha,Tharindu Fernando,Sridha Sridharan,Clinton Fookes,Harshala Gammulle*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于时间卷积网络（TCN）的轻量化框架，通过引入多普勒能量引导的时序注意力机制和方差驱动的通道注意力模块，利用CSI信号的物理特性作为归纳偏置，在不增加网络深度的情况下实现高效的人体动作识别，在多个数据集上以更少的参数和计算开销超越了深层基线模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于CSI的HAR方法依赖深层神经网络隐式捕获运动动态，导致模型复杂度高、计算效率低。作者认为利用CSI信号的物理特性设计合适的归纳偏置可以实现更高效的学习。

Method: 提出紧凑的TCN框架，包含两个关键模块：1) 多普勒能量引导的时序注意力机制，用于突出运动显著的时间片段；2) 方差驱动的通道注意力模块，根据时序运动统计信息自适应加权子载波。通过整合这些领域先验知识来显式捕获运动动态。

Result: 在多个基准数据集上，该方法以更少的参数量和更低的计算成本取得了优于深层基线模型的性能。

Conclusion: 通过引入物理启发的归纳偏置（多普勒能量和方差统计），紧凑型TCN框架能够在不增加网络深度的情况下高效捕获运动动态，验证了领域知识在CSI-HAR任务中的关键价值。

Abstract: Human Action Recognition (HAR) using WiFi Channel State Information (CSI) has gained increasing attention due to its non-contact, low-cost, and privacy-preserving nature. However, existing learning-based approaches largely rely on deep, computationally intensive architectures to implicitly capture motion dynamics from CSI measurements, thereby increasing model complexity and reducing efficiency. Instead, we argue that incorporating appropriate inductive biases tailored to the physical characteristics of CSI signals enables more efficient and effective learning. In this work, we propose a compact temporal convolutional network (TCN)-based framework that explicitly incorporates motion-aware inductive biases into feature learning. Specifically, we introduce a Doppler-energy-guided temporal attention mechanism in feature space to emphasize motion-salient time segments, and a variance-driven channel attention module to weight informative subcarriers based on temporal motion statistics adaptively. By integrating these domain-specific priors, the proposed model effectively captures motion dynamics without increasing architectural depth. Extensive experiments on multiple benchmark datasets demonstrate that our approach achieves superior performance compared to deeper baselines, while significantly reducing parameter count and computational cost.

</details>


### [96] [Suppressing Forgery-Specific Shortcuts for Generalizable Deepfake Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01843)
*Yihui Wang,Yonghui Yang,Jilong Liu,Fengbin Zhu,Le Wu,Tat-Seng Chua*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出Shortcut Subspace Suppression (S^3)框架，通过子空间建模显式表征和抑制伪造方法特定的捷径，在训练和推理阶段双重抑制，显著提升深度伪造检测的跨方法泛化能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有深度伪造检测模型泛化能力差，因为它们倾向于依赖特定伪造方法的伪影（捷径），无法迁移到未见过的伪造方法。而现有改进方法缺乏显式识别和抑制表示学习中这些捷径的机制。

Method: 1) 训练轻量线性探针对伪造方法分类；2) 对探针进行SVD分解提取主导捷径子空间；3) 训练时对特征表示中的捷径子空间进行软抑制；4) 推理时无需训练的神经元衰减策略，对齐捷径方向进行抑制。

Result: 在多个基准数据集上显著提升了跨方法泛化性能，同时保持了较强的域内检测能力。

Conclusion: 通过显式建模和抑制方法特定的捷径子空间，可以有效提升深度伪造检测的泛化能力，并且推理时的无训练策略具有即插即用和可解释性的优势。

Abstract: Deepfake detection suffers from poor generalization across forgery methods, as existing models tend to rely on spurious method-specific shortcuts that fail to transfer to unseen manipulations. While recent approaches attempt to improve generalization, they lack an explicit mechanism to identify and suppress such shortcuts in learned representations. In this work, we propose Shortcut Subspace Suppression (S^3) framework that explicitly characterizes and suppresses method-specific shortcuts via subspace modeling. Our key insight is that variations distinguishing different forgery methods capture method-specific artifacts and thus serve as an effective proxy for method-specific shortcuts. To this end, we train a lightweight linear probe for forgery method classification and perform Singular Value Decomposition (SVD) to extract the dominant shortcut subspace. Building on this formulation, we develop two complementary strategies to reduce shortcut reliance. During training, we softly suppress the shortcut subspace in feature representations, encouraging the model to rely on more generalizable cues for real/fake discrimination. At inference time, we introduce a training-free counterpart that attenuates neurons aligned with the identified shortcut directions, enabling plug-and-play generalization enhancement with improved interpretability. Extensive experiments on multiple benchmarks demonstrate that our method significantly improves cross-method generalization while maintaining strong in-domain performance. The code will be released upon acceptance of the submission.

</details>


### [97] [Collaborative Space Object Detection with Multi-Satellite Viewpoints in LEO Constellations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01895)
*Xingyu Qu,Wenxuan Zhang,Peng Hu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文研究多视角观测融合在深度学习框架下提升低地球轨道空间目标检测性能，实验表明三视图融合相比单视图在mAP50和mAP50-95上分别提升36.3%和46.5%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 近地轨道卫星数量激增导致空间环境拥挤，现有空间目标检测系统需在严格星载约束下实现快速准确检测以降低碰撞风险。

Method: 设计多视角观测管线与多种输入表示方法，将多视图数据输入基于YOLO的检测器中进行融合检测。

Result: 多视角输入在多数情况下可行且效果更优：YOLOv9-m上三视图RGB融合使mAP50从0.638升至0.732，mAP50-95从0.227升至0.276；最佳三视图灰度配置使mAP50提升36.3%，mAP50-95提升46.5%。

Conclusion: 多视角融合是空间目标检测可行且有效的策略，对低轨星座部署中的空间态势感知具有广泛意义。

Abstract: With the growing number of satellites in low Earth orbit (LEO) constellations, the near-Earth space environment has become increasingly congested, making space object detection (SOD) a pressing challenge for space safety and sustainability. To mitigate collision risks and ensure the continuity of space operations, SOD systems must deliver fast and accurate detection under stringent onboard constraints. In this paper, we investigate the potential of multi-viewpoint observation fusion within a deep learning (DL) framework to enhance SOD performance. We design a practical multi-view pipeline and several input representations for feeding multi-view data into YOLO-based detectors. Our experiments show that using multi-view inputs is feasible in most cases and typically produces better results for mAP50 and mAP50-95. For example, in model YOLOv9-m, single-view compared to a three-view fused RGB setting, mAP50 increases from 0.638 to 0.732, while mAP50-95 improves from 0.227 to 0.276. Compared with the single-view setting, the best three-view grayscale configuration improves mAP50 by 36.3% and mAP50-95 by 46.5%. These findings establish multi-view fusion as a viable and effective strategy for SOD, with broad implications for space situational awareness in LEO constellation deployments.

</details>


### [98] [Train, Test, Re-evaluate: Schedule-Sensitive Evaluation of Generative Data for Hand Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01896)
*Atmika Bhardwaj,Silvia Vock,Nico Steckhan*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文研究了利用生成式图像修补技术为手部检测任务合成带配饰（如手套）的手部图像，通过多阶段训练策略，显著提升了模型在安全关键场景中的检测性能，缩小了分布偏移。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有公开手部数据集多为裸手，忽略了手套、纹身、珠宝等配饰造成的外观变化，导致在职业安全等实际部署场景中出现分布偏移，而收集真实配饰数据成本高、难度大。

Method: 采用生成式修补技术仅对手部区域进行编辑，生成带配饰的合成图像；在真实-合成配对数据集上训练YOLOv8n手部检测器，设计了六种训练与调度方案（实验A-F，各3个随机种子），并在真实测试集和真实手套测试集上评估mAP@0.5和mAP@0.5:0.95。

Result: 两阶段实验（真实+合成数据训练，再在低学习率下用真实数据微调）在标准真实测试集上mAP@0.5高于纯真实基线，并缩小了真实手套的分布外差距；三阶段实验在框紧致度上表现最佳，达到了最高的mAP@0.5:0.95。

Conclusion: 合成数据在安全关键型手部检测中的效用取决于训练策略，简单的多阶段实验能从修补生成的配饰数据中提取显著的部署收益。

Abstract: Generated (or synthetic) image data is increasingly used to augment or replace real training datasets when target imagery is scarce, expensive, or biased. For hand detection, particularly in occupational safety settings, public datasets mostly contain bare hands. This under-represents the variation in hand appearance introduced by gloves, tattoos, jewelry, and other personal protective equipment, creating a distribution shift that safety-critical applications encounter at deployment. We test whether generative inpainting, editing only the hand region of a real photograph to introduce accessories, can close this shift gap. On a paired dataset of real images and their synthetic counterparts, we train YOLOv8n hand detectors under six training-and-scheduling regimes (Experiments A-F, three random seeds each), evaluate every detector on a real test set and on a real-gloves-only test split, and report the mean average precision (mAP) at two overlap thresholds (mAP@0.5 and mAP@0.5:0.95) along with paired statistical tests. A two-stage experiment: train on real U synthetic data, then fine-tune the resulting weights on real-only at a lower learning rate, increases mAP@0.5 compared to the real-only baseline model on the standard real test set, and improves the real-gloves out-of-distribution gap. Another three-stage experiment preserves box-tightness best, reaching the highest mAP@0.5:0.95 of any other experiment in the study. The synthetic-data utility for safety-critical hand detection is determined by the training procedure, and simple multi-stage experiments extract substantial real-deployment benefit from inpainted accessory data.

</details>


### [99] [Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning of Large Pretrained Models for Instance Segmentation Tasks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01947)
*Nermeen Abou Baker,David Rohrschneider,Uwe Handmann*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本研究首次探索了参数高效微调（PEFT）方法（适配器和LoRA）在基于Transformer的实例分割模型中的应用，仅需微调1-6%的模型参数即可达到竞争性能，相比传统微调的40-55%大幅提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大规模预训练模型参数激增带来训练成本问题，而PEFT方法在实例分割领域的研究尚属空白，本文旨在填补这一空缺。

Method: 将适配器模块顺序集成到Transformer块中，并将LoRA应用于可变形注意力机制（首次探索），在两个模型和四个基准数据集上进行实验。

Result: 仅微调1-6%参数即达竞争性能；每Transformer块使用2-3个适配器平衡性能与效率；LoRA在可变形注意力上表现优异，甚至在某些配置下超越适配器。

Conclusion: PEFT方法在实例分割中具有巨大潜力，其效果受数据集复杂度和模型架构影响，需根据具体场景调整策略，为实现可扩展、定制化且计算高效的迁移学习提供了新路径。

Abstract: Research and applications in artificial intelligence have recently shifted with the rise of large pretrained models, which deliver state-of-the-art results across numerous tasks. However, the substantial increase in parameters introduces a need for parameter-efficient training strategies. Despite significant advancements, limited research has explored parameter-efficient fine-tuning (PEFT) methods in the context of transformer-based models for instance segmentation. Addressing this gap, this study investigates the effectiveness of PEFT methods, specifically adapters and Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA), applied to two models across four benchmark datasets. Integrating sequentially arranged adapter modules and applying LoRA to deformable attention--explored here for the first time--achieves competitive performance while fine-tuning only about 1-6% of model parameters, a marked improvement over the 40-55% required in traditional fine-tuning. Key findings indicate that using 2-3 adapters per transformer block offers an optimal balance of performance and efficiency. Furthermore, LoRA, exhibits strong parameter efficiency when applied to deformable attention, and in certain cases surpasses adapter configurations. These results show that the impact of PEFT techniques varies based on dataset complexity and model architecture, underscoring the importance of context-specific tuning. Overall, this work demonstrates the potential of PEFT to enable scalable, customizable, and computationally efficient transfer learning for instance segmentation tasks.

</details>


### [100] [Towards 3D-Aware Video Diffusion Models: Render-Free Human Motion Control with Mesh Tokenization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02000)
*Jingyun Liang,Min Wei,Shikai Li,Yizeng Han,Hangjie Yuan,Lei Sun,Weihua Chen,Fan Wang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出一种基于3D人体网格令牌化的免渲染视频生成框架，通过将压缩的3D人体网格令牌与视频令牌在DiT架构中联合处理，使扩散模型能够更好地捕捉3D人体结构及其与环境的交互，在人体运动控制任务上取得优异效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究视频扩散模型是否真正理解视觉观察背后的3D结构，而不仅仅是生成合理的2D投影。现有方法依赖2D渲染引导视频，容易产生视角依赖的伪影和轨迹-姿态不匹配问题。

Method: 提出免渲染框架，直接将压缩的3D人体网格令牌作为条件输入视频生成过程，采用DiT架构联合处理视频令牌和运动令牌，让模型在生成过程中同时推理外观、3D结构和相机视角。

Result: 在人体运动控制基准上表现优异，减少了2D引导引入的视角依赖伪影和轨迹-姿态不匹配问题。

Conclusion: 配备网格令牌化的视频扩散模型能够更好地捕捉复杂3D人体结构及其与环境的交互关系。

Abstract: Diffusion models have shown remarkable success in video generation. However, whether such models are truly aware of the 3D structure underlying visual observations, rather than simply reproducing plausible 2D projections, remains an open question. In this work, we investigate this question through human motion control, a task that requires precise modelling of 3D human geometry, motion, camera viewpoint, and scene context. Unlike prior methods that rely on rendered 2D motion guidance videos, we propose a render-free framework that conditions video generation directly on compressed 3D human mesh tokens. This representation preserves full 3D geometric information while enabling a unified token-based generation pipeline that processes video tokens jointly with motion tokens in a DiT-based architecture. This design requires the model to reason jointly about appearance, 3D structure, and camera viewpoint during video generation. Experimental results demonstrate strong performance on human motion control benchmarks, while reducing artifacts induced by view-dependent 2D guidance and trajectory-pose mismatches during editing. These findings suggest that video diffusion models, when equipped with mesh tokenization, can better capture complex 3D human structures and their interactions with the surrounding environment.

</details>


### [101] [Attention mechanisms and transfer learning for robust peach leaf damage classification under domain shift](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02045)
*Adrián Cánovas-Rodriguez,Miguel A. González-Illán,Maria Fernanda García-Cruz,Pedro Nortes Tortosa,José Salvador Rubio-Asensio,Miguel A. Zamora Izquierdo,Juan Antonio Martínez Navarro,Antonio F. Skarmeta*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于深度学习的桃树叶部损伤分类方法，构建了包含1,366张图像的六类公开数据集，评估多种架构后发现EfficientNetB5+CBAM在公开集上达93.3%准确率；通过迁移学习在本地180张四类数据集上，EfficientNetB3+CBAM取得93%宏F1分数，展现了注意力机制对少数类鲁棒性和跨域泛化能力的提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 气候变化加剧了桃园非生物胁迫与病虫害压力，不同胁迫源产生的叶片症状在视觉上高度相似，人工诊断困难且跨田块泛化能力不足，亟需自动化、强泛化性的图像分类模型。

Method: 1) 构建公开桃叶图像基准数据集（1,366张，六类）；2) 评估多种深度学习架构（EfficientNet系列、DenseNet等）；3) 集成CBAM注意力模块增强特征提取；4) 收集本地数据集（180张，四类），采用三种微调策略进行迁移学习以解决域偏移问题。

Result: 公开集上EfficientNetB0达92.9%，DenseNet121达92.6%，EfficientNetB5+CBAM最优（93.3%）；本地数据集上EfficientNetB3+CBAM通过迁移学习达93%宏F1分数。CBAM对多数骨干网络有提升，但对部分模型效果有限或负向。

Conclusion: 基于注意力的深度学习模型（尤其是EfficientNet结合CBAM）能有效识别桃叶多类损伤，在跨域场景下通过迁移学习保持高鲁棒性，为田间早期决策提供了可行方案。

Abstract: Artificial intelligence provides a practical framework for crop damage assessment from imagery data, supporting early decision-making in agricultural management. In peach orchards, climate change increases abiotic stress and biotic pressures, including pests and diseases, which often produce visually similar foliar symptoms. This overlap makes manual diagnosis difficult, especially across multiple fields with varying environmental conditions, highlighting the need for automated models with strong generalization ability.
  We propose an image-based classification approach for peach leaf damage detection. A benchmark dataset was created through manual annotation of publicly available images, consisting of 1,366 peach leaves across six damage categories. Several deep learning architectures were evaluated. EfficientNet models achieved the best results, with EfficientNetB0 reaching 92.9 percent accuracy, EfficientNetB3 achieving 91.5 percent, and EfficientNetB5 showing the strongest performance on minority classes. DenseNet121 reached 92.6 percent accuracy. The integration of the Convolutional Block Attention Module (CBAM) improved performance in several backbones, particularly EfficientNetB5 and InceptionV3, while showing limited or negative impact in others. The CBAM-enhanced EfficientNetB5 achieved the best overall accuracy of 93.3 percent.
  To evaluate robustness under realistic conditions, a local dataset of 180 images across four classes was collected, and transfer learning strategies were applied to address domain shift. Three fine-tuning strategies were tested. EfficientNetB3 combined with CBAM achieved the best performance in the local domain, reaching a 93 percent macro F1-score after transfer. Overall, attention-based models showed improved robustness for minority classes and better generalization across different field conditions.

</details>


### [102] [Fast and Lightweight Novel View Synthesis with Differentiable Multiplane Image](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02068)
*Kaidi Zhang,Guanxu Zhu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出基于多平面图像（MPI）表示的改进方法，利用视觉基础模型预测点图进行几何初始化，并通过一步扩散模型解决稀疏初始化中的空洞和伪影问题，在保持合成质量的同时实现了比3DGS方法快30.7%、模型大小仅为其14.8%的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有NeRF和3DGS等方法在渲染速度、模型大小、训练时间和稀疏视图性能之间存在权衡，且前馈式重建方法产生的数百万高斯体限制了移动端部署。

Method: 采用MPI表示（紧凑的平面层集合），利用视觉基础模型预测点图进行可靠的几何初始化，结合可微优化；引入一步扩散模型参与MPI可微优化和渲染结果后处理，解决稀疏初始化中的空洞和伪影问题。

Result: 相比代表性基于高斯泼溅的方法，速度提升30.7%，模型大小仅为其14.8%，在前视图场景下达到有竞争力的合成质量。

Conclusion: 所提方法在渲染速度、模型紧凑性和合成质量之间取得了更好的平衡，更适用于移动设备等资源受限场景。

Abstract: Recently, novel view synthesis has witnessed remarkable progress, with mainstream methods such as Neural Radiance Fields (NeRF) and 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) delivering impressive results. However, these approaches often struggle to balance rendering speed and model size, and their optimization-based training can be highly time-consuming. Furthermore, they typically rely on dense observations, often failing to produce satisfactory results under sparse-view conditions. Although feed-forward reconstruction significantly reduces the optimization time of 3DGS, its pixel-aligned formulation generates millions of Gaussians from a single image, severely limiting its practical deployment on mobile devices. To address these limitations, we revisit the Multiplane Image(MPI) representation, which represents scenes using a compact set of planar layers for efficient novel view synthesis. Leveraging recent advances in visual foundation models, we utilize predicted point maps for reliable geometric initialization, followed by differentiable optimization. To address the issues of holes and artifacts in sparsely initialized MPI, we introduce one-step diffusion, which participates in both the differentiable optimization of MPI and the postprocessing of rendering results. Compared with a representative GS-based method, our approach is 30.7% faster and uses only 14.8% of its model size, while achieving competitive synthesis quality on front-view scenarios

</details>


### [103] [Order within Chaos: Capturing Intrinsic Energy Anomalies for AI-Manipulated Image Forgery Localization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02178)
*Yiming Wang,Baiqi Wu,Qingming Li,Jiahao Chen,Tong Zhang,Shouling Ji*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出FLAME框架，利用扩散模型在生成图像中抑制局部高频方差的统计特性（能量间隙），结合LAD图与SAM适配器实现精准的像素级伪造定位，并设计了自动化训练数据合成管道EditStream，在AI生成伪造检测任务上达到SOTA。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有图像编辑模型能生成逼真伪造图像，传统伪造定位方法依赖于物理噪声特征，而合成数据中缺乏这种噪声，导致检测失效。因此，需要一种针对AI生成伪造图像的定位方法。

Method: 1) 理论分析发现扩散过程会抑制局部高频方差，形成与自然成像熵不同的统计能量间隙；2) 提出FLAME框架：利用LAD图捕获上述内在异常，结合参数高效的SAM适配器实现像素级定位；3) 提出EditStream自动化管道，持续合成基于指令的训练数据，弥补基准数据集与进化生成模型之间的滞后。

Result: FLAME在AI生成伪造数据集上显著超越以往方法，建立了新的SOTA，并且能有效泛化到未见过的生成架构。

Conclusion: 基于扩散过程内在统计特性（能量间隙）的伪造定位方法可行且有效，FLAME结合自适应数据合成管道为AI生成伪造检测提供了可靠的统一框架。

Abstract: Recent advancements in generative AI have led to image editing models capable of producing realistic forgeries that evade traditional image forgery localization methods, as these approaches depend on physical noise absent in synthetic data. To address this challenge, we theoretically demonstrate that the diffusion process inherently suppresses local high-frequency variance, creating a statistical energy gap that is distinguishable from the natural entropy of optical imaging. Guided by this insight, we propose FLAME, a unified framework that utilizes a LAD map to capture these intrinsic anomalies, coupled with a parameter-efficient adapter for SAM to achieve precise, pixel-level forgery localization. Furthermore, to bridge the lag between forensic benchmarks and evolving generative models, we introduce EditStream, an automated pipeline for continuous, instruction-based training data synthesis. Extensive experiments demonstrate that FLAME establishes a new state-of-the-art, significantly outperforming previous methods on AI-generated forgery datasets while effectively generalizing to unseen generative architectures. Our code is available at https://github.com/phoenixnir/FLAME.

</details>


### [104] [DefocusTrackerAI -- A Generalized Framework for the Automatic Detection of Defocused Particle Images](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00076)
*Gonçalo Coutinho,Ana S. Moita,António L. N. Moreira,Massimiliano Rossi*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: DefocusTrackerAI是一个基于深度学习的通用框架，用于自动检测和定位各种光学配置下的离焦粒子图像。研究比较了Faster R-CNN和YOLOv9两种模型，发现YOLOv9在召回率和不确定性方面表现更优，适用于多类光学实验（包括荧光和阴影图数据），并提供了预训练模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 开发一个通用的深度学习框架，能够在任何光学配置下自动检测和定位离焦粒子图像，同时不牺牲召回率和不确定性，作为开源项目DefocusTracker的后续工作。

Method: 对比Faster R-CNN和YOLOv9两种目标检测模型，使用包含像散和非像散离焦粒子图像（不同直径）的多样化合成图像集进行训练，并在多种光学设置下进行验证。

Result: YOLOv9在召回率和不确定性上优于Faster R-CNN，尤其在高粒子图像密度下优势明显；空间分辨率增强，不确定性在0.1-0.4像素之间（N_s≤0.5），优于现有算法；模型能检测像散和非像散离焦粒子图像，适用于荧光和阴影图等真实DPT实验。

Conclusion: DefocusTrackerAI（基于YOLOv9）可以作为高精度自动检测各类离焦粒子图像的有效工具，结合适当的深度位置标定方法，可作为三维离焦粒子追踪的第一步。

Abstract: The present work introduces DefocusTrackerAI, a generalized deep-learning framework for the automatic detection and position estimation of defocused particle images from any kind of optical configuration without compromising uncertainty and recall, intended as a follow-up of the open-source project DefocusTracker. We selected the deep neural network architecture from the direct comparison of two well-known object detection models, Faster R-CNN and YOLOv9, trained on a diverse and feature-rich synthetic image set containing astigmatic and non-astigmatic defocused particle images of varying diameters. The model evaluation on synthetic data showed that, first, YOLOv9 outperforms Faster R-CNN, achieving higher recall and lower uncertainty, particularly at high particle image densities; and second, that YOLOv9 provides enhanced spatial resolution, with uncertainty values between 0.1 and 0.4 pixels for particle image densities N_s up to 0.5, outperforming state-of-the-art algorithms. We demonstrated that our models are able to detect astigmatic and non-astigmatic defocused particle images in multiple optical setups with varying lighting conditions. In addition, we successfully applied our models on real DPT experiments, including fluorescence and shadowgraph data, showing that they can be used beyond conventional DPT applications, including the tracking of sprays and droplets. A pre-trained, ready-to-use version of DefocusTrackerAI based on YOLOv9 is available at https://gitlab.com/goncalo.coutinho/defocustrackerAI-main/-/tree/7e0f11f649ebad50e20dca5b9545f26ca303ebe0 and can be used for automatic detection of defocused particle images of any kind with high accuracy. In combination with a suitable calibration approach for the depth position, it can be used as an effective first step for three-dimensional defocusing particle tracking.

</details>


### [105] [Do Multimodal Agents Really Benefit from Tool Use? A Systematic Study of Capability Gains](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02357)
*Garvin Guo,Donglei Yu,Yu Chen,Xiang Wang,Shuai Li,Xinpei Zhao,Huaxing Liu,Qinghao Wang,Minpeng Liao*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文质疑工具增强多模态智能体在基准测试中的性能提升是否真正源于工具使用能力，通过对比实验发现工具访问并未带来一致的性能提升或成本降低，且工具单独解决的问题极少，表明智能体更多是学习了工具调用模式而非工具带来的实际能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究常将工具增强智能体在基准测试中的性能提升视为其学会了使用工具的证据。作者认为这一推断可能为时过早，因为工具调用记录本身无法证明工具是否提供了回答关键信息。因此，需要重新审视工具对智能体能力的实际贡献。

Method: 研究了两种代表性的"图像思考"智能体（Thyme和DeepEyesV2），在真实世界理解、OCR、图表理解和数学推理等任务上，将它们与无工具版本以及纯文本推理模型进行对比。通过机制消融实验，进一步分析工具使用循环中各组件（工具调用格式、执行结果）的实际贡献。

Result: 工具访问未带来一致的聚合性能提升，未能可靠降低生成token成本，且工具单独解决的问题集极小：DeepEyesV2中93%的工具解决任务、Thyme中96%的工具解决任务也至少被一个无工具设置解决。机制消融显示，完整的工具使用循环并未始终优于仅使用工具调用格式或仅使用执行结果。

Conclusion: 在所研究的设置中，智能体学习工具调用模式的能力强于学习工具带来的实际能力，评估时应当区分工具的可用性与工具是否真正扩展了智能体的解决能力。

Abstract: Tool-augmented multimodal agents show strong benchmark gains, often taken as evidence that agents have learned to use tools. We argue that this interpretation can be premature: a tool-call trace alone does not show whether the tool supplied answer-critical information. We study two representative ``thinking with images'' agents, Thyme and DeepEyesV2, across real-world understanding, OCR, chart understanding, and mathematical reasoning. Each agent is compared with its Tool-Free counterpart and with a Pure-Text Reasoner trained from the same source pool without tool-calling trajectories. Tool access yields little consistent aggregate improvement, does not reliably reduce generated-token cost, and leaves only a small tool-only solved set: 93% of DeepEyesV2's tool-solved problems and 96% of Thyme's are also solved by at least one non-tool setting. Mechanism ablations further show that the full tool-use loop does not consistently outperform either the tool-call format or the returned execution result alone. In the settings we study, the analyzed agents appear to learn tool-calling patterns more reliably than tool-contributed capabilities, suggesting that evaluation should distinguish tool availability from whether tools actually expand what agents can solve.

</details>


### [106] [Segmentation-Guided Spatial Indexing for Generalizable and Explainable Deepfake Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00098)
*Izaldein Al-Zyoud,Abdulmotaleb El Saddik*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出分割引导的空间索引方法用于可泛化且可解释的深度伪造检测，通过选择语义有意义的图像块（patch）令牌而非全局池化，利用DINOv3的空间一致性和FaRL解析器实现区域级检测，在Celeb-DF v2上达到AUC 0.905，优于多个基线方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统深度伪造检测方法将所有人脸令牌统一池化后再分类，导致与操作相关的证据被全脸特征稀释，可解释性差，泛化能力有限。
