Unlike static concatenation fusion, the proposed gating network suppresses or amplifies each stream's contribution based on the input, producing weights that correlate positively (Spearman rank correlation rho=0.33) with the per-distortion NSS contribution measured by independent ablation on KADID-10k. The framework requires no end-to-end fine-tuning of the VLM backbones and is trained with a hybrid loss combining mean squared error, Pearson linear correlation, and pairwise ranking objectives. We evaluate on three standard benchmarks: KonIQ-10k (SROCC=0.9142, PLCC=0.9279), KADID-10k (SROCC=0.9715, PLCC=0.9733, surpassing recent state-of-the-art methods), and LIVE Challenge in-the-Wild (SROCC=0.8527, PLCC=0.8802 with cross-dataset pretraining and fine-tuning). A per-distortion analysis on KADID-10k reveals that NSS features contribute most on noise and color-shift distortions where pixel statistics are directly affected, and least on perceptual distortions such as color saturation changes. The learned gate values validate these findings, confirming that the model autonomously discovers distortion-stream affinity patterns consistent with the manual per-distortion study.

</details>


### [253] [PerBite: A Curated Diagnostic Workflow for Bite-Aware Food Volume Estimation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02021)
*Ahmad AlMughrabi,Farid Al-Areqi,David Fernández Gómez,Umair Haroon,Marc Bolaños,Ricardo Marques,Petia Radeva*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种结合SAM-3、Hunyuan3D、Blender后处理和MoGe-2辅助的餐饮体积估计方法，在MetaFood Challenge中排名第一，平均Chamfer距离8.31，状态级体积MAPE为33.87%，但消耗体积MAPE为53.74%，表明需分别评估各环节对膳食评估的影响。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究视觉上逼真的食物网格是否可用于准确估计消费食物体积，评估表面重建、度量尺度、网格清理、水密体积积分和物理消耗一致性等各环节的单独贡献。

Method: 采用SAM-3分割食物与餐盘区域；Hunyuan3D/SAM-3D生成无量纲食物网格；利用餐盘直径提供度量尺度；在Blender中去除餐盘几何；对剩余网格进行孔洞填充、水密化并积分计算体积。MoGe-2仅作为辅助提示用于初始餐盘直径估计。

Result: 在MetaFood Challenge中排名第一，34个网格的刚性ICP平均Chamfer距离8.31；17个前后状态对的体积MAPE为33.87%，零单调性违规，但消耗体积MAPE为53.74%。

Conclusion: 表面重建、度量尺度、受控网格清理、水密体积积分和物理消耗一致性应分别评估，不能仅靠视觉逼真度判断体积估计可靠性。

Abstract: Can a visually plausible food mesh be trusted to estimate the volume of consumed food? \method investigates this question using selected paired before- and after-consumption states from the MetaFood CVPR 2026 Continuous 3D Reconstruction While Eating Challenge. The submitted workflow follows a curated reconstruction protocol: SAM~3 segments the food and plate regions; Hunyuan3D/SAM~3D generates a dimensionless food mesh; the plate diameter provides the metric scale; the plate geometry is removed in Blender; and the remaining mesh is hole-filled, made watertight, and integrated to estimate volume. MoGe-2 is used only as an auxiliary cue for initial dish-diameter estimation when direct plate measurement is uncertain; it is not the primary scale source for the reported challenge result. \method ranks first, with an average Chamfer distance of 8.31 across 34 meshes using rigid ICP without scale correction. On 17 before- and after-pairs, it achieves 33.87\% state-level volume MAPE and zero monotonicity violations, while consumed-volume MAPE remains 53.74\%. The results show that surface reconstruction, metric scale, controlled mesh cleanup, watertight volume integration, and physical depletion consistency should be evaluated separately for dietary assessment. Source code and evaluation scripts will be available at \href{https://github.com/GCVCG/PerBite-CVPR-MetaFood-2026}{github.com/GCVCG/PerBite-CVPR-MetaFood-2026}.

</details>


### [254] [Normality-Preserving Continual Industrial Anomaly Detection via Orthogonal LoRA Banks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02042)
*Weibai Fang,Haijun Che,Feiyang Ren,Qiancheng Lao*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 针对持续工业异常检测中历史正常性先验漂移和灾难性遗忘问题，提出基于历史冻结正交LoRA库（HF-OLB）和分层新颖性自适应库增长模块（HNABG）的正常性保持持续异常检测框架，在MVTec和VisA数据集上取得SOTA结果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有持续扩散方法通过重放或约束优化保留旧知识，但缺乏显式机制来隔离和保护类别特定的正常性先验；标准LoRA既不能冻结历史正常性子空间，也无法防止新适配器干扰旧适配器。

Method: 提出两个核心模块：1) HF-OLB：冻结预训练U-Net和已学LoRA库，将新任务正常性残差约束到历史LoRA子空间的正交补空间；2) HNABG：分配层依赖的残差容量，仅当残差正常性新颖性超出已有库表达能力时才扩展库。

Result: 在VisA 2x6设置上，图像/像素级A-AUROC达83.6/91.8，FM为3.8/3.9；像素级A-AUROC比SOTA高3.2点，像素级FM降低1.3。

Conclusion: 所提方法能有效在长序列持续类别场景中保留历史正常性先验。

Abstract: Continual industrial anomaly detection with diffusion models suffers from historical normality prior drift and catastrophic forgetting. Existing continual diffusion methods preserve previous knowledge through replay or constrained optimization, but they lack an explicit mechanism for isolating and protecting category-specific normality priors during sequential adaptation. Although low-rank adaptation provides modular residual updates, standard LoRA neither freezes historical normality subspaces nor prevents new adapters from interfering with previous ones. To address this issue, we propose a normality-preserving continual anomaly detection framework based on two modules: History Frozen Orthogonal LoRA Bank (HF-OLB) and Hierarchical Novelty Adaptive Bank Growth module (HNABG). HF-OLB freezes both the pre-trained U-Net backbone and the learned LoRA banks, and constrains new task-specific normality residuals to the orthogonal complement of historical LoRA subspaces. HNABG further allocates layer-dependent residual capacity and expands the bank only when the residual normality novelty exceeds the expressive capacity of existing banks. Extensive experiments on MVTec and VisA demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method. On the challenging VisA 2x6 setting, our method achieves 83.6/91.8 image and pixel level A-AUROC with 3.8/3.9 FM, improving pixel level A-AUROC over the state of the art by 3.2 points while reducing pixel level FM by 1.3. These results show that our method effectively preserves historical normality priors in long horizon continual category sequences.

</details>


### [255] [TIDES: Time-Derivative Event Simulation via Deformable Reconstruction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02058)
*Christopher Thirgood,Dipon Kumar Ghosh,Simon Hadfield*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: TIDES是一种基于动态高斯泼溅的连续时间事件模拟器，通过显式3D场景表示直接推导像素强度动态，实现精确的阈值穿越预测，并采用自适应时间步长和有限传感器带宽建模，在事件流保真度和下游任务迁移性上达到最优。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 真实世界事件数据集稀缺，现有模拟器大多从帧序列推断事件时间戳，导致"时间戳批处理"问题（多个阈值穿越共享少量离散时间点），在快速运动和遮挡场景下尤为严重。

Method: 1) 基于动态高斯泼溅构建显式3D场景表示，学习几何与运动；2) 直接从场景推导逐像素强度动态而非差分渲染帧，支持每渲染步多次阈值穿越；3) 利用3D场景模型识别遮挡区域，指导自适应时间步长，仅在遮挡动力学导致亮度模型不可靠的区域集中计算；4) 采用瓦片级仲裁器建模有限传感器带宽，模拟吞吐量、抖动和事件丢弃等真实传感器伪影。

Result: 在配对RGB-事件基准上，TIDES取得了最优的事件流保真度；模拟的事件在下游真实任务中的迁移效果优于现有方法。

Conclusion: TIDES通过连续时间建模和3D场景感知，有效解决了事件模拟中的时间戳批处理和遮挡问题，生成的仿真事件能更好地泛化到真实场景任务。

Abstract: Event cameras emit asynchronous events in response to environmental appearance changes. The scarcity of real-world event datasets makes simulation essential. However, most simulators infer event timestamps from frame sequences, forcing many threshold crossings to share a small set of discrete times; a failure mode we term timestamp batching that worsens under fast motion and occlusion.
  We present TIDES, a continuous-time event simulator built on dynamic Gaussian splatting. Because TIDES operates on an explicit 3D scene representation with learnt geometry and motion, it can derive per-pixel intensity dynamics directly from the scene, rather than by differencing rendered frames. This enables accurate threshold-crossing prediction, including multiple crossings per rendering step, without temporal upsampling or frame interpolation. The same 3D scene model reveals where objects partially occlude one another; TIDES uses this to guide adaptive time stepping, concentrating computation only in regions where occlusion dynamics make simple models of brightness change unreliable.
  Finally, we model finite sensor bandwidth using a tile-level arbiter whose throughput, jitter, and event drops reproduce realistic sensor artifacts. Across paired RGB-event benchmarks, TIDES attains state-of-the-art event-stream fidelity. We also show that events simulated by TIDES transfer more effectively to real downstream tasks than competitors'.

</details>


### [256] [FACT: A Simple and Efficient Framework for Active Finetuning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02079)
*Wenshuai Xu,You Song,Yuzhuo Cui,Minjie Ren,Qingjie Liu,Zhenghui Hu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出FACT框架，一种三阶段分层微调方法，专门用于主动微调场景，解决了全参数微调在数据稀缺时扭曲预训练特征的问题，在多个数据集和架构上取得显著提升，尤其在低采样率下ViT模型在CIFAR10等基准上性能提升超过20%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有主动微调研究主要关注数据选择（主动学习部分），而统一采用全参数微调进行模型适配，这在大模型相对微调数据量较大时会因分布偏移扭曲预训练特征，加剧过拟合风险。为解决这一关键空白，作者正式提出FiAF任务，强调在主动学习中系统探索微调方法。

Method: 提出FACT框架，一个三阶段分层微调框架：设计具有高效性和简洁性的层次化微调策略，专门针对主动微调场景；同时系统性研究了冻结特征增强（FroFA）策略。

Result: 在三大类数据集（经典、不平衡、细粒度）、多种预训练架构（ConvNeXt、ViT、ViL）和不同采样比例下进行实验，结果显示FACT框架具有显著的性能提升、强泛化性和鲁棒性。低采样率下ViT模型在CIFAR10、CIFAR100和ImageNet-1k上性能提升超过20%，建立了新的SOTA。

Conclusion: FACT框架在保持参数效率的同时建立了新的最优性能，在标注数据稀缺的情况下尤为有效，体现了强泛化性和鲁棒性。

Abstract: The main goal of active finetuning is to improve a pretrained model's performance on a specific task or domain by finetuning it with carefully selected informative or challenging data. Previous research has predominantly focused on the active aspect (i.e., data selection) while uniformly employing full finetuning for model adaptation, which inevitably distorts pretrained features due to distribution shift. This issue becomes particularly pronounced when the model size is large relative to the finetuning data quantity, leading to heightened overfitting risks. To address this critical gap, we formally outline the FiAF task that emphasizes systematic exploration of finetuning methodologies in active learning. We propose FACT, a three-phase hierarchical finetuning framework featuring both efficiency and simplicity, specifically designed for active finetuning scenarios. Our comprehensive experiments span: (1) Three major dataset categories encompassing classic (CIFAR10, CIFAR100, ImageNet-1k), imbalanced (CIFAR10-LT, CIFAR100-LT), and fine-grained (StanfordCars, FGVCAircraft) image classification datasets, each evaluated under 3-5 distinct sampling ratios; (2) Diverse pretrained architectures including Convolutional Neural Network (ConvNeXt), Vision Transformer (ViT), and Vision LSTM (ViL) networks; (3) A systematic investigation of frozen feature augmentation (FroFA) strategies. (4) A comprehensive and rigorous analysis of efficiency and generalizability. The results demonstrate significant improvements with strong generalization and robustness. Notably, under low sampling ratios, our framework achieves remarkable performance gains of over 20% on the ViT model for CIFAR10, CIFAR100, and ImageNet-1k benchmarks. This systematic approach establishes new state-of-the-art performance while maintaining parameter efficiency, proving particularly effective when labeled data is scarce.

</details>


### [257] [FocusDiT: Masking Queries in Diffusion Transformers for Fine-grained Image Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02090)
*Xueji Fang,Liyuan Ma,Jianhao Zeng,Jinjin Cao,Mingyuan Zhou,Guo-Jun Qi*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: FocusDiT通过对Diffusion Transformer中的关键查询令牌进行掩码处理，使其专注于FFN层中的视觉词汇解码，从而提升细粒度图像生成质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有DiT模型在处理所有查询令牌时一视同仁，未能区分复杂细节区域与简单区域，导致细粒度视觉生成效果不佳。作者认为聚焦于关键查询令牌（对应复杂细节）并鼓励模型改进这些令牌至关重要。

Method: 提出FocusDiT，设计掩码机制（Masking scheme）筛选关键查询令牌，仅将这些关键令牌送入FFN层。掩码后的查询能够从FFN词汇表中检索视觉语义信息，用于解码其对应的视觉细节。

Result: 通过大量文生图实验验证了令牌掩码机制在提升生成性能方面的有效性。

Conclusion: FocusDiT通过选择性关注关键查询令牌，有效提升了扩散Transformer在细粒度视觉生成任务中的表现，证明了FFN作为视觉词汇库的作用以及重要令牌聚焦策略的价值。

Abstract: Diffusion transformer (DiT) has been widely adopted in the generative diffusion field, advancing the denoising of query tokens through attention and Feed-Forward (\text{FFN}) layers. FFN actually acts as the key-value vocabulary for decoding visual contents where the value embeds the visual semantical knowledge. We present that focusing on critical query tokens corresponding to more complex details and encouraging the model to improve these tokens is essential for fine-grained visual generation. To this end, we propose FocusDiT, which applies a Masking scheme to focus on critical query tokens that are exclusively fed into FFN. The masked queries can retrieve visual tokens from the FFN vocabularies, and use them to decode their visual details. Extensive text-to-image experiments validate the effectiveness of token masking in enhancing generative performance.

</details>


### [258] [WebSpline: Structure-Informed Splines for Real-Time 3D Gaussians from Monocular Videos](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02096)
*Jongmin Park,Jeonghwan Yun,Minh-Quan Viet Bui,Munchurl Kim*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出WebSpline，一种基于结构信息样条（SIS）表示的动态3D高斯框架，通过结构代理图（SPG）和可学习的埃尔米特样条建模运动轨迹，实现从单目视频中高质量、结构连贯且快速渲染的动态场景重建。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法在有限多视角线索下难以平衡全局结构一致性与局部细节保真度，单目视频动态场景重建面临挑战。

Method: 提出WebSpline框架，核心是结构信息样条（SIS）表示，每个动态高斯轨迹用可学习的立方埃尔米特样条建模，并通过结构代理图（SPG）组织运动。两阶段优化：第一阶段从2D点轨迹初始化SPG并使用时域刚性正则化；第二阶段从优化后的SPG初始化SIS并在空间和结构邻域约束下优化。推理时仅需评估SIS即可获得高斯运动。

Result: 在iPhone和NVIDIA单目动态场景基准上达到SOTA渲染质量，在iPhone数据集上渲染速度比第二名WorldTree快10倍以上。

Conclusion: WebSpline通过结构感知的样条表示有效平衡了全局结构连贯性与局部细节，实现了高质量、高效率的单目动态场景重建。

Abstract: Dynamic scene reconstruction from monocular videos remains highly challenging, as existing methods often struggle to balance global structural coherence and local fine-grained details under limited multi-view cues. To address this challenge, we propose WebSpline, a novel dynamic 3D Gaussian framework that enables structurally coherent and high-fidelity reconstruction from monocular videos with fast rendering. The core of WebSpline is the Structure-Informed Spline (SIS) representation, which models each dynamic Gaussian trajectory using a learnable cubic Hermite spline whose motion is structurally organized with an auxiliary Structural Proxy Graph (SPG). The proposed framework is optimized in two stages: (i) in the first stage, the SPG is initialized from 2D point tracks and refined with temporal rigidity regularization to establish structural coherence for moving objects across the sequence; and (ii) in the second stage, the SIS representation is initialized from the refined SPG and optimized under both spatial and structural neighborhood constraints. At inference, Gaussian motion is obtained solely by evaluating the learned SIS, enabling fast rendering. Extensive experiments on the challenging monocular dynamic scene benchmarks, iPhone and NVIDIA, demonstrate that our WebSpline achieves state-of-the-art rendering quality while rendering over 10 times faster than WorldTree, the second-best method on the iPhone dataset.

</details>


### [259] [Multimodal Action Diffusion for Robust End-to-End Autonomous Driving](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02105)
*Jorge Daniel Rodríguez-Vidal,Diego Porres,Gabriel Villalonga Pineda,Antonio M. López Peña*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出Action Diffusion Transformer (ADT)，一种基于扩散Transformer的端到端驾驶模型，通过原生建模多模态动作分布，在Bench2Drive基准上超越先前SOTA，同时延迟降低10倍。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有端到端驾驶系统大多预测中间轨迹路点，依赖手工控制器，而直接预测控制信号（油门、转向、刹车）的端到端方式未被充分探索；动作多模态性在驾驶系统中的作用尚未被清晰理解。

Method: 提出ADT（Action Diffusion Transformer），一种无锚点的扩散Transformer，使用MSE损失训练，原生建模多模态驾驶动作分布；推理时通过最近邻匹配（NNM）从K个候选动作中选择最合适的。

Result: 在闭环Bench2Drive基准上超越先前SOTA，延迟降低10倍；同时证明动作多模态性在表示学习和行为一致性方面带来可衡量的收益。

Conclusion: 表达性多模态动作建模不仅是实际高效的，也是稳健端到端驾驶在概念上必不可少的要素；超越确定性单动作输出是提升驾驶性能、表示质量和训练稳定性的关键。

Abstract: End-to-End Autonomous Driving (E2E-AD) systems have largely converged on predicting intermediate trajectory waypoints, delegating final control to hand-crafted controllers with GPS access. Direct control-signal prediction (outputting throttle, steer and brake in an end-to-end fashion) remains underexplored, and critically, the role of action multimodality in such systems is not well understood. We argue that moving beyond deterministic, single-action outputs is not merely a modelling choice, but a key driver of driving performance, representational quality, and training stability. To validate this, we introduce the Action Diffusion Transformer (ADT), an anchor-free diffusion transformer trained with a MSE objective that natively models the multimodal distribution of plausible driving actions. Rather than committing to a single deterministic command, ADT generates K action candidates and selects the most suitable one at inference via Nearest Neighbour Matching (NNM). Beyond strong benchmark numbers, we show that action multimodality yields measurable benefits in learned representations and behavioral consistency, effects that deterministic architectures cannot replicate. ADT surpasses previous state-of-the-art on the challenging closed-loop Bench2Drive benchmark while achieving ten times lower latency, demonstrating that expressive, multimodal action modelling is both practically efficient and conceptually essential for robust end-to-end driving.

</details>


### [260] [Equilibrated Diffusion: Frequency-aware Textual Embedding for Equilibrated Image Customization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02129)
*Liyuan Ma,Xueji Fang,Guo-Jun Qi*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出Equilibrated Diffusion，一种频率驱动的方法，通过将概念分解为低频（主体内容）和高频（风格）成分并独立优化，实现主体保真度与文本一致性之间的平衡。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法通过微调将概念属性打包到统一隐嵌入中，但属性交织导致无法消除风格和背景等无关干扰。

Method: 1) 利用频率成分与语义的固有联系（低频=主体，高频=风格），在频率空间分解概念并独立优化嵌入；2) 合并多频率嵌入保持空间定制能力；3) 引入掩码引导扩散限制背景变化；4) 插入残差参考注意力（RRA）保持主体结构和身份一致性。

Result: 在主体保真度和文本对齐方面超越主流基线方法。

Conclusion: 频率驱动的解耦策略能有效分离主体与风格属性，实现更平衡的图像定制和文本-视觉匹配。

Abstract: Image customization learns target subjects from reference concept images and generates conditioned images per text prompts, mainly modifying styles or backgrounds. Prevailing methods adopt fine-tuning to pack diverse concept attributes into a unified latent embedding, yet entangled attributes hinder elimination of irrelevant disturbances from style and background. To address this issue, we propose Equilibrated Diffusion, a frequency-driven approach that disentangles tangled concept features for balanced customization and consistent text-visual matching. Unlike conventional methods learning full concepts with shared embeddings and unified tuning, our work utilizes the inherent link between image frequency components and semantics: low frequencies represent subject content and high frequencies correspond to styles. We decompose concepts in frequency space and optimize each embedding independently. This separate optimization enables the denoiser to capture style detached from subject identity and generalize better to unseen stylistic prompts. Merging multi-frequency embeddings preserves the model's original spatial customization ability. We further deploy mask-guided diffusion to restrict irrelevant background changes and boost text alignment. Residual Reference Attention (RRA) is inserted into spatial attention to retain subject structure and identity consistency. Experiments prove Equilibrated Diffusion exceeds mainstream baselines on subject fidelity and text adherence, verifying our method's superiority.

</details>


### [261] [Ultra Diffusion Poser: Diffusion-Based Human Motion Tracking From Sparse Inertial Sensors and Ranging-Based Between-Sensor Distances](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02153)
*Dominik Hollidt,Tommaso Bendinelli,Christian Holz*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出Ultra Diffusion Poser，通过扩散模型显式建模UWB距离的几何约束，结合空间布局模块和扩散引导，在惯性动作捕捉中减少22%的关节位置误差。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法仅将UWB距离作为额外输入特征，忽略了它们对传感器位置施加的物理约束，导致姿态估计精度受限。

Method: 1) 空间布局模块(Spatial Layout Module)：从UWB测量中解析重建3D传感器位置；2) 扩散条件化：将传感器位置、IMU信号和UWB距离作为扩散条件；3) UWB扩散引导(UWB-Diffusion Guidance)：在扩散采样过程中强制预测姿态与实测距离对齐。

Result: 在关节位置误差上相比现有方法降低了22%，达到了最先进水平。

Conclusion: 显式建模UWB几何约束能够显著提升稀疏惯性姿态估计的精度，验证了物理约束在扩散模型中的有效性。

Abstract: Methods using inertial measurement units (IMUs) provide a wearable alternative to camera-based motion capture. To mitigate drift from inertial signals, recent sparse inertial pose estimators integrate inter-sensor distances measured by ultra-wideband (UWB) ranging. So far, UWB distances have only been used as an additional input feature, ignoring the physical constraints they impose on sensor positions. However, these distances can also be used to reconstruct the underlying 3D sensor layout, which in turn provides more informative input for pose reconstruction. We propose Ultra Diffusion Poser, a diffusion model that explicitly models these geometric constraints. It includes a Spatial Layout Module that analytically reconstructs the 3D sensor positions from UWB measurements. These sensor positions are used alongside IMU signals and UWB distances as a conditioning signal during diffusion. Still, network predictions can violate inter-sensor distance measurements. To address this, we introduce UWB-Diffusion Guidance, which encourages alignment between predicted poses and measured distances during diffusion sampling. Together, these contributions enable our model to achieve state-of-the-art performance, reducing joint position error by up to 22% over prior work.

</details>


### [262] [InsightVQA: High-Dimensional Emotion-Cognitive Visual Question Answering Benchmark](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02171)
*Shiyu Wang,Ziyu Liu,Chaoyi Yu,Yujie Yin,Zhongqian Mao,Jing Chen,Jiaqi Song,Yunshi Lan,Yan Wang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: InsightVQA是一个大规模层次化视觉问答数据集，包含725K QA对，支持从感知、理解到认知推理的情感理解。同时提出了InsightVQA-Bench评估基准和InsightNet基线模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有情感理解基准主要关注情感识别，缺乏对情感起源（grounded understanding）和认知推理（response-oriented analysis）的支持。

Method: 从6个公开来源收集351K图像，经过多阶段筛选得到138K高置信度图像。按照三个层次（感知QA、基于视觉触发提取的理解QA、认知推理QA）进行标注，共生成725K QA对，并构建30K样本的评估基准InsightVQA-Bench和情感调优基线InsightNet。

Result: InsightVQA对多模态大语言模型的情感理解和推理提出了显著挑战，InsightNet作为基线展现了当前模型在该任务上的不足。

Conclusion: InsightVQA填补了情感理解领域缺乏层次化、可推理数据集的空白，为未来情感认知研究提供了重要资源。

Abstract: Visual emotion understanding requires models not only to recognize emotional states, but also to why they arise and perform higher-level cognitive reasoning. However, existing benchmarks mainly focus on emotion recognition, offering limited support for grounded understanding and response-oriented analysis. To address this gap, we introduce \textbf{InsightVQA}, a large-scale dataset for hierarchical visual question answering on emotion understanding and cognitive reasoning. Building from 351K images collected from six public sources, we apply a rigorous multi-stage filtering pipeline to curate 138K high-confidence images. Each image is annotated at three hierarchical levels: perception QA for emotion and valence recognition, grounded understanding QA constructed from visual trigger extraction through constraint-guided generation, and cognition QA centered on response intent prediction and sequential insight reasoning. In total, InsightVQA contains 725K QA pairs. We further present \textbf{InsightVQA-Bench}, a high-quality evaluation benchmark comprising 30K samples for fine-grained evaluation. To support evaluation, we introduce \textbf{InsightNet}, an emotion-tuned baseline for MLLMs. Results demonstrate that InsightVQA poses significant challenges for grounded emotion understanding and reasoning.

</details>


### [263] [Symmetry-Aware 9D Pose Estimation with Sim(3)-Consistent Feature and Spherical Inception Convolution](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02219)
*Panfei Cheng,Hongshan Yu,Wenrui Chen,Xiaojun Tang,Jian Liu,Naveed Akhtar*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出SSH-Pose，一种用于类别级物体姿态估计的新方法。通过语义引导的对称性模块（利用大视觉模型）预测平移和尺寸，再通过球形大核初始卷积融合模块学习旋转，解决了Sim(3)空间非线性学习和类内变化两大挑战，在基准测试和真实场景中达到SOTA，并成功用于机器人抓取系统。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有实例级姿态估计方法难以泛化到未见物体，类别级方法受限于Sim(3)空间的非线性学习难度以及类内外观变异，亟需一种无需形状先验、能处理类内变化的有效方法。

Method: (1) 翻译/尺寸估计器：利用大视觉模型(LVM)的强泛化能力，设计语义引导的对称感知模块来推断对称点，从而无需形状先验即可获得准确的平移和尺寸估计，为旋转估计提供先验线索。(2) 特征融合模块：提出球形大核初始卷积(SLK-Inception)，融合LVM的语义特征与几何特征，通过建模长程依赖关系从类内变异中提取关键姿态特征，且计算成本可控。

Result: 在多个基准数据集和真实场景中达到SOTA性能，并成功开发出能处理多样化物体的鲁棒机器人抓取系统。

Conclusion: 通过解耦平移/尺寸估计与旋转估计、利用LVM的泛化能力以及高效的特征融合设计，有效解决了类别级姿态估计中的关键难题，验证了该方法在真实机器人应用中的可行性。

Abstract: Object pose estimation is a fundamental problem for an agent system to perceive or manipulate objects in images or videos. However, current instance-level methods struggle with generalization to unseen objects. Category-level methods seek to address this, but remain constrained by the complexities of learning in the non-linear Sim(3) space and intra-class variations. To address these challenges, We propose an effective method for category-level object pose estimation with two key innovations: (1) A translation/size estimator, featuring a semantic-guided symmetry-aware module that leverages robust generalization capabilities of a large vision model (LVM) to infer symmetry points, resulting in accurate translation and size without shape priors. This result serves as a precomputed cue for rotation estimation, thereby reducing the difficulty of learning in the non-linear Sim(3) space and laying a robust foundation for tackling the inherently more challenging rotation estimation. (2) A feature fusion module, based on our proposed spherical large-kernel inception convolution, fuses semantic features from the LVM with systematically computed geometric features to extract essential pose features from intra-class variations by modeling long-range dependencies without excessive computational cost. Built on these innovations, we achieve SOTA on benchmarks and real-world scenes, while developing a robust robotic picking system capable of handling diverse objects. Our code will be available at the project page: {\hypersetup{urlcolor=blue}https://panfei-cheng.github.io/SSH-Pose}.

</details>


### [264] [Chroma Clues: Leveraging Color Statistics to Detect Synthetic Images](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02224)
*Lea Uhlenbrock,Davide Cozzolino,Christian Riess*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文发现当前图像生成模型在色彩统计上存在缺陷（LPIPS损失对色度不敏感），通过设计六种手工色彩变换和学习任务优化色彩变换，实现了93.27%的平均泛化准确率，能有效检测AI生成图像并具备强鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: AI生成图像快速进化，对图像取证构成挑战；现有方法忽略了一个未充分探索的线索——生成模型在模仿自然图像色彩统计方面的弱点。

Method: 1) 发现LPIPS损失对色度不敏感导致合成图像色彩统计差异；2) 设计六种手工色彩变换和一种任务优化色彩变换；3) 定义像素级/块级色彩敏感特征；4) 利用变换增强色彩模式进行多类别归因。

Result: 平均泛化准确率93.27%，对六种后处理具有强鲁棒性；色彩变换可产生特征性视觉噪声模式，支持直观图像评估和改善多类别归因。

Conclusion: 色彩统计差异是检测AI生成图像的有效线索，本文方法在可解释性、鲁棒性和泛化能力上均表现优异。

Abstract: The evolution and dissemination of AI-synthesized images is occurring at an unprecedented rate. Image generators are making rapid progress in their goal of perfectly imitating natural images, which also challenges image forensics.
  In this work, we exploit an underexplored cue in current generative models, namely their weakness to imitate color statistics of natural images. We first show that the LPIPS loss used for training image generators is less sensitive to chrominance than to luminance, which may lead to statistical discrepancies in the colors of synthetic images. Building on this observation, we then introduce six hand-crafted color transformations and a method to learn a task-optimized color transform to statistically expose generated images. These transformations can be used in various ways. First, we define color-sensitive features at pixel-level or patch-level. A simple, interpretable classifier achieves with these features an average generalization accuracy of 93.27% and strong robustness against six types of post-processing. Second, we demonstrate that the transformations exhibit characteristic visual noise patterns in natural and synthetic image areas, which enables an intuitive visual image evaluation. Third, we demonstrate that the transforms can enhance color patterns in generated images for improved multiclass attribution.

</details>


### [265] [Ego-METAS: Egocentric online Multimodal Energy-efficient Temporal Action Segmentation benchmark](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02246)
*Maria Santos-Villafranca,Jesus Bermudez-cameo,Alejandro Perez-Yus,Giovanni Maria Farinella,Antonino Furnari*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出Ego-METAS，首个面向在线、多模态、能量高效的自我中心视频时序动作分割基准，涵盖100+小时未裁剪视频、5种模态，要求模型在严格能耗预算下动态选择传感器，并提供了统一划分、标注、特征和多种基线策略。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有具身感知研究通常假设无限计算资源，忽略了资源受限设备上的能量约束；缺乏标准化的、面向在线时序分割的能量感知基准。

Method: 构建Ego-METAS基准：整合EgoExo4D、CMU-MMAC、CaptainCook4D三个数据集（100+小时），包含RGB、音频、凝视、IMU、单色相机5种模态；定义在线时序动作分割任务，要求模型在每一步动态选择传感器并遵守硬件典型能耗预算；提供统一分割、清洗标注、预提取特征和多种路由策略基线。

Result: 最优路由策略高度依赖于具体场景；现有主要为修剪片段设计的策略学习方法难以适应连续未裁剪环境；即使是简单的随机路由动态融合互补模态，在平衡预测精度和能耗方面也至关重要。

Conclusion: Ego-METAS为开发鲁棒、成本感知的自主始终在线具身AI策略提供了标准化基础。

Abstract: To operate in the physical world, embodied agents must perceive their environment in an "always-on" fashion, selectively accessing the most informative sensors to balance energy constraints and task accuracy. Despite its importance for resource-constrained devices, energy-aware perception remains under-explored, with most prior work assuming unlimited compute. To address this, we introduce Ego-METAS: the first Egocentric online Multimodal Energy-efficient Temporal Action Segmentation benchmark. Ego-METAS provides a unified testbed of more than 100 hours of untrimmed egocentric video from EgoExo4D, CMU-MMAC, and CaptainCook4D, spanning 5 modalities (RGB, audio, gaze, IMU, and monochrome camera). We formulate an online temporal action segmentation task where models must dynamically select which sensors to activate at each timestep while strictly adhering to hardware-representative energy budgets. Alongside the benchmark, we release unified splits, cleaned annotations, pre-extracted features, and a diverse suite of baseline routing policies. Our evaluations show that optimal routing is highly scenario-dependent, and that existing policy-learning methods, designed primarily for trimmed clips, struggle to adapt to continuous, untrimmed environments. However, even simple dynamic fusion of complementary modalities (e.g., via random routing) proves critical for balancing predictive accuracy against strict energy budgets. Ultimately, Ego-METAS provides a standardized foundation to develop robust, cost-aware policies for autonomous, always-on embodied AI.

</details>


### [266] [From Extrinsic to Intrinsic: Geodesic-Guided Representation Learning for 3D Geometric Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02268)
*Yuming Zhao,Junhui Hou,Qijian Zhang,Jia Qin,Ying He*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: PRISM是一种通过恢复内在表面测地度量来学习等距嵌入的3D表示学习预训练范式，结合拓扑约束和目标函数，在测地距离预测及多个下游任务中表现优异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有3D表示学习主要依赖外在空间结构或高层语义，难以捕捉形状本质和流形拓扑。作者旨在弥合外在与内在几何之间的鸿沟，学习更本质的3D表示。

Method: 提出PRISM范式，通过恢复内在表面测地度量学习等距嵌入；包含拓扑增强目标函数以约束潜空间结构；设计两阶段训练策略缓解测地距离分布中的样本不平衡问题。

Result: 在测地距离预测上达到满意的精度、鲁棒性和高效性；在形状识别、表面参数化、非刚性对应等多个下游任务中取得优越性能。

Conclusion: PRISM有效连接了外在和内在几何视角，为3D表示学习提供新范式，代码已开源。

Abstract: Geometric analysis fundamentally distinguishes between \textit{extrinsic} and \textit{intrinsic} perspectives. The dominant paradigm in current 3D representation learning relies on either extrinsic spatial structures or high-level semantics, struggling to capture the essence of shape identity and underlying manifold topology. To bridge this gap, we introduce a novel 3D representation learning paradigm, namely \textbf{PRISM}, for \textbf{P}re-training, which learns isometric embeddings by \textbf{R}ecovering the \textbf{I}ntrinsic \textbf{S}urface geodesic \textbf{M}etric. PRISM incorporates a topology-enforcing objective that explicitly constrains the structure of latent space, alongside a specialized two-stage training recipe mitigating sample imbalance inherent in the distribution of geodesic distances. Experiments demonstrate that our approach shows satisfactory accuracy, robustness, and high efficiency in geodesic distance prediction and achieves superior performance across diverse downstream tasks, including shape recognition, surface parameterization, and non-rigid correspondence. The code will be publicly available at https://github.com/AidenZhao/PRISM.

</details>


### [267] [Vision-language Models for Driver Monitoring Systems: A Driver Activity Description Dataset](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02273)
*David J. Lerch,Sarath Mulugurthi,Manuel Martin,Frederik Diederichs,Rainer Stiefelhagen*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文针对现有视觉语言模型（VLM）难以识别细微驾驶员动作的问题，构建了Drive&Act描述数据集（含细粒度自然语言描述），微调后的VLM在ACCR评分上从66提升至76，并在跨数据集评估中展现良好泛化能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有VLMs在通用数据集上训练，无法准确识别驾驶员行为的细微差异，缺乏细粒度的驾驶员行为描述数据来提升模型理解能力。

Method: 1）为Drive&Act数据集创建细粒度的自然语言描述版本（Drive&Act description dataset）；2）基于LLM评分方法评估三种VLMs在新基准上的表现；3）在Drive&Act描述数据集上微调VLM，并在Driver Monitoring Dataset (DMD)上进行跨数据集评估。

Result: 微调后的VLM在ACCR评分上达到76，显著优于零样本基线（66）；跨数据集评估表明模型对DMD中的动作具有良好的泛化能力。

Conclusion: 利用丰富描述的驾驶员动作数据微调VLMs，能显著提升其解释驾驶员行为的能力，同时未来需要更多样化的数据集以支持更广泛的泛化。

Abstract: Understanding subtle driver actions is essential for building reliable driver monitoring systems. Existing visionlanguage models (VLMs) are trained on general datasets and struggle to recognize fine distinctions in driver behaviors. This paper addresses this limitation by creating a detailed natural language version of the Drive&Act dataset. We evaluate three VLMs on our new benchmark using LLM-based scoring methods. Their performance on the new benchmark shows that they cannot reliably generate accurate fine-grained driver activity descriptions. Based on the labeled Drive&Act dataset we create a new Drive&Act description dataset containing finegrained descriptions to train VLMs on driver activity understanding. Cross dataset evaluation on the Driver Monitoring Dataset (DMD) shows that the VLM fine-tuned on our new Drive&Act description dataset generalizes well to actions in the DMD dataset. The VLM fine-tuned on our Drive&Act description dataset achieves an ACCR score of 76 outperforming the zero-shot VLM baseline with an ACCR score of 66. These findings demonstrate that adapting VLMs with richly described driver actions can significantly improve their ability to interpret driver behavior while also highlighting the need for more diverse datasets to support broader generalization in future applications. Our Drive&Act description dataset and code will be publicly available on GitHub.

</details>


### [268] [Neural Acquisition & Representation of Subsurface Scattering](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02292)
*Arjun Majumdar,Raphael Braun,Hendrik Lensch*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出了一种通过U-Net CNN学习物体表面每点像素足迹响应来获取和估计高细节次表面散射属性（光传输）的方法，利用立体投影仪-相机系统结合相移轮廓测量法高效采集数据，实现高分辨率重光照。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统次表面散射重建方法难以达到高细节水平，且数据采集效率低，难以泛化到未知散射材质。

Method: 利用立体投影仪-相机系统结合相移轮廓测量法(PSP)高效采集数据，将3D扫描技术输入U-Net CNN，学习每点的像素足迹响应，重建密集像素足迹后用于任意高分辨率投影模式的重光照。

Result: 预测的像素足迹与实际响应几乎一致，定性定量比较均证明了方法的有效性；同一模型可在多视角多物体上训练，泛化到未见过的次表面散射材质。

Conclusion: 该方法能够高细节地重建次表面散射光传输属性，实现逼真重光照，且具有良好的泛化能力。

Abstract: We present a method to acquire and estimate the sub-surface scattering properties of light transport at a highly detailed level by learning the pixel footprint response at each point on the object surface. The reconstruction leverages 3D scanning techniques as input to a U-Net CNN. A stereo projector-camera setup using phase-shifted profilometry (PSP) patterns efficiently captures the data for a variety of scattering objects. Reconstructing dense pixel footprints allows for relighting with arbitrary high-resolution projector patterns. The final output is a relit color image. Qualitative and quantitative comparison against illuminated real-world captured images demonstrate that the predicted footprints are almost identical to the actual responses. The same model is trained for multiple views across multiple objects such that the learned representations can be used to generalize to unseen sub-surface scattering materials as well.

</details>


### [269] [Cross-Domain Dead Tree Detection via Knowledge Distillation in Aerial Imagery](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02303)
*Anis Ur Rahman,Mete Ahishali,Einari Heinaro,Samuli Junttila*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本研究提出知识蒸馏（KD）方法，将TreeMort-1T-UNet模型从芬兰航拍图像迁移到波兰、德国、爱沙尼亚等多国森林数据中。特征级KD表现最佳，在波兰数据上实现Mean Tree IoU 0.106、Instance F1 0.63，并展现出更强的领域不变性和低数据场景鲁棒性，为精准林业监测提供了可扩展的跨域解决方案。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 全球气候变暖导致树木死亡率上升，航拍图像检测死树对森林健康评估至关重要，但不同地理区域的领域差异性以及标注数据稀缺严重限制了模型的泛化能力。本研究旨在通过知识蒸馏技术解决模型跨域迁移的挑战。

Method: 基于TreeMort-1T-UNet模型（源域：芬兰航拍数据），应用知识蒸馏（KD）适应多个目标域（波兰、德国、爱沙尼亚）。评估四种KD变体：Basic、Self、Feature-level、Ensemble，以微调为基线。使用Mean Tree IoU、Instance F1-score、Instance Precision、Mean Centroid Error等指标，并结合余弦相似度、CKA、SSIM、t-SNE、线性探测等表征分析评估领域不变性。

Result: Feature-level KD表现最优：波兰数据集上Mean Tree IoU 0.106，Instance F1-score 0.63，Instance Precision 0.55，Mean Centroid Error 3.039。跨域精度稳健（芬兰0.15，波兰0.67，德国0.60，爱沙尼亚0.59）。在低数据场景下假阳性更少，表征不变性更优（深层CKA/SSIM更高，t-SNE域混合更好，线性探测AUC 0.95）。消融实验证实特征对齐等关键组件有效提升指标平衡。

Conclusion: 知识蒸馏能够有效增强遥感领域的跨域迁移学习，Feature-level KD在精度关键的林业应用中表现出卓越的领域鲁棒性和数据效率，为生态监测和可持续森林管理提供了可扩展的工具。

Abstract: Detecting dead trees in aerial imagery is vital for assessing forest health, especially as tree mortality increases globally due to climate change, but domain variability and scarce labeled data often limit model generalization. This study advances the TreeMort-1T-UNet (Tree Mortality 1-Task U-Net) model, initially trained on Finnish aerial imagery (source domain), by applying knowledge distillation (KD) to adapt it to various target domains, including Polish, German, and Estonian datasets representing diverse forest types. We assess four KD variants: Basic, Self, Feature-level, and Ensemble, against a fine-tuning baseline, using Mean Tree IoU, Instance F1-score, Instance Precision, and Mean Centroid Error as key metrics, alongside representational analyses (e.g., cosine similarity, CKA, SSIM, t-SNE, and linear probing) for domain invariance. Feature-level KD outperforms others, yielding a Mean Tree IoU of 0.106, Instance F1-score of 0.63, Instance Precision of 0.55, and Mean Centroid Error of 3.039 on the Polish dataset, with robust precision across other target domains (e.g., 0.15 on Finnish, 0.67 on Polish, 0.60 on German, 0.59 on Estonian). It excels in low-data scenarios with fewer false positives and shows superior representational invariance (e.g., higher deep-layer CKA/SSIM, better domain mixing in t-SNE, and linear probing AUC of 0.95), making it ideal for precision-critical forestry applications. Additional ablation studies confirm that key components like feature alignment enhance its performance balance across metrics. Our findings demonstrate KD's potential to enhance transfer learning in remote sensing, offering a scalable, domain-robust tool for ecological monitoring and sustainable forest management.

</details>


### [270] [Training-Free Composed Video Retrieval via Visual Representation-Guided Video-LLM Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02321)
*Yang Liu,Qianqian Xu,Peisong Wen,Siran Dai,Qingming Huang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种无需训练的组合式视频检索框架，使用冻结的DINOv3模型筛选候选视频，再利用视频大语言模型进行指令推理和精排，在CVPR 2026挑战赛上取得48.78%的Recall@1和51.48%的Recall@5。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的视频检索正从简单的文本搜索向更灵活的场景演进，用户可通过视觉示例和文本指令共同指定检索目标。组合式视频检索任务要求系统根据参考视频和修改指令检索目标视频，但现有方法往往依赖大量训练数据，缺乏灵活性和泛化能力。

Method: 提出Visual Representation-Guided Video-LLM Reasoning框架，包含三步：(1) 使用冻结的DINOv3模型从候选池中快速筛选出视觉相关的候选视频；(2) 利用大视觉语言模型评估每个候选是否满足修改指令；(3) 对排名靠前的候选进行基于推理的精排优化，最终提升首位预测的准确率。整个流程无需训练。

Result: 在CVPR 2026挑战赛测试集上，Recall@1达到48.78%，Recall@5达到51.48%。

Conclusion: 该无训练框架在组合式视频检索任务上取得了有竞争力的结果，未来可通过更强的视频-LLM以及视觉表征与语言推理的深度融合进一步提升检索精度。

Abstract: Recent advances in large vision-language models have expanded video retrieval from simple text-based search to more flexible scenarios, where users may specify the desired result through both visual examples and textual instructions. In the CVPR 2026 Reason-Aware Composed Video Retrieval Challenge, the system is required to retrieve a target video according to a reference video and a modification instruction. To address this task, we develop Visual Representation-Guided Video-LLM Reasoning for Training-Free Composed Video Retrieval. Our framework first uses frozen DINOv3 models to obtain a compact set of visually relevant candidates, and then applies large vision-language models to evaluate whether each candidate satisfies the modification instruction. A final reasoning-based refinement is further performed on the top candidates to improve the first-ranked prediction. Without training, our system achieves 48.78 Recall@1 and 51.48 Recall@5 on the test set. Future work may further improve retrieval accuracy through stronger video-LLMs and detailed integration between visual representations and language reasoning.

</details>


### [271] [Detecting Pen-In-Air States from Video: A Proof-of-Concept Toward Complementary Handwriting Analysis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02342)
*Lauren Sismeiro,Remy Plastre,Binbin Xu,Frederic Puyjarinet,Gerard Dray*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于顶部视频的手写笔-纸接触状态检测方法，通过YOLO追踪笔尖结合运动特征和机器学习分类，实现了对抬笔片段的可靠检测（F₂分数最高0.805），可作为数字化平板的低成本、非侵入式补充方案。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统数字化平板只能检测笔在短距离内的抬笔行为，无法捕捉高抬笔（空中运动）的完整动态，而这对评估书写障碍（如书写困难症）至关重要。因此需要一种互补的低成本、非侵入式方案。

Method: 提出混合管道：先用基于YOLO的检测器追踪笔尖位置，再提取运动学特征，最后使用机器学习分类器判断笔-纸接触状态。数据集为人工逐帧标注的手写视频，评估采用逐视频留出法（LOVO）。

Result: 在事件级抬笔片段检测上达到F₂分数最高0.805，在强调召回率的筛查场景下表现良好。

Conclusion: 基于视频的抬笔检测是可行的，可作为数字化平板的低成本、非侵入式互补工具，为未来大规模研究奠定基础。

Abstract: Dynamic aspects of handwriting are critical for assessing developmental disorders such as dysgraphia and are typically captured using digitizing tablets. However, tablet-based sensing restricts analysis of Pen-Up behavior to a short proximity range above the writing surface, potentially missing high-lift in-air movements. As a proof of concept, we investigate whether top-view video can provide a complementary source of information for inferring pen-contact states without relying on tablet proximity sensing. We propose an interpretable hybrid pipeline combining pen-tip tracking using a YOLO-based detector with kinematic feature extraction and machine learning classification. A pilot dataset of diverse handwriting videos was manually annotated at the frame level and evaluation used a Leave-One-Video-Out (LOVO) protocol. The method achieved reliable event-level detection of Pen-Up segments, with an F_2 score up to 0.805, consistent with the emphasis on recall in a screening-oriented setting. These results support the feasibility of video-based Pen-Up detection as a low-cost and non-intrusive complement to digitizing tablets, and provide a foundation for future large-scale studies.

</details>


### [272] [VEDAL: Variational Error-Driven Asynchronous Learning for 3D Gaussian Splatting Pruning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02346)
*Aoduo Li,Jiancheng Li,Huan Ye,Hongjian Xu,Shiting Wu,Xiujun Zhang,Zimeng Li,Xuhang Chen*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: VEDAL将高斯剪枝形式化为变分自由能最小化，通过预测误差门控和变分不确定性头实现5.2倍压缩，仅损失0.31 dB PSNR，同时保持185 FPS实时渲染。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 3DGS虽然实现了高质量实时新视角合成，但大量高斯基元导致内存消耗过大。现有剪枝方法依赖启发式重要性分数或同步批量更新，导致压缩次优和训练不稳定。

Method: 提出VEDAL框架：(1)预测误差门控机制，基于每个高斯的重建不确定性异步激活剪枝；(2)变分不确定性头，将剪枝决策建模为具有可学习先验的潜变量。通过自由能目标函数在信息论视角下平衡重建保真度与模型复杂度。

Result: 在Mip-NeRF 360、Tanks&Temples和Deep Blending数据集上，实现5.2倍压缩，PSNR仅下降0.31 dB；优于PUP 3D-GS（+0.05 dB，更高压缩比）和LightGaussian（+0.35 dB，相当质量），保持185 FPS实时渲染。

Conclusion: VEDAL为3DGS压缩提供了第一个基于变分自由能最小化的理论框架，通过异步门控和变分推理实现了更优的压缩-质量权衡。

Abstract: 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) achieves remarkable novel view synthesis quality with real-time rendering, yet suffers from excessive memory consumption due to millions of Gaussian primitives. Existing pruning methods rely on heuristic importance scores or synchronous batch updates, leading to suboptimal compression and training instability. We propose VEDAL, a principled framework that formulates Gaussian pruning as variational free energy minimization. Our approach introduces (1) a prediction-error gating mechanism that asynchronously activates pruning based on per-Gaussian reconstruction uncertainty, and (2) a variational uncertainty head that models pruning decisions as latent variables with learnable priors. The free energy objective naturally balances reconstruction fidelity against model complexity through an information-theoretic lens. Extensive experiments on Mip-NeRF 360, Tanks&Temples, and Deep Blending demonstrate that VEDAL achieves 5.2x compression with only 0.31 dB PSNR drop, outperforming PUP 3D-GS by +0.05 dB at a higher compression ratio and LightGaussian by +0.35 dB at comparable quality, while maintaining real-time rendering at 185 FPS.

</details>


### [273] [TROPHIES: Temporal Reconstruction of Places, Humans, and Cameras from Multi-view Videos](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02350)
*Jinpeng Liu,Yukang Xu,Yutong Li,Xingyu Liu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了TROPHIES框架，从多视角视频中联合重建动态人体、静态场景和相机位姿，实现全局一致的4D时空感知，在EgoHuman和EgoExo4D数据集上优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有工作通常假设单视角输入，或将人体、场景、相机解耦处理，导致无法恢复一致的几何结构、稳定的运动和物理对齐的轨迹。因此需要提出统一的人-场景-相机联合重建任务。

Method: 提出TROPHIES框架，包含Human Branch（通过时空推理建模人体）、Scene Branch（使用人体感知注意力重建静态几何）以及全局对齐与优化模块（强制尺度一致性、接触先验和跨视角时间一致性）。

Result: 在EgoHuman和EgoExo4D数据集上，TROPHIES实现了全局对齐、物理合理的4D重建，在全局保真度和人-场景一致性上持续优于现有范式。

Conclusion: TROPHIES通过统一的人-场景-相机联合重建框架，有效解决了多视角视频中全局一致4D感知的难题，为沉浸式感知提供了新思路。

Abstract: Reconstructing humans and their surrounding environments in a globally consistent 4D space is essential for comprehensive perception. However, prior works typically assume single-view inputs or decouple humans, scenes, and cameras, making them unable to recover coherent geometry, stable motion, and physically aligned trajectories. These limitations motivate us to introduce a new task: unified human-scene-camera reconstruction from multi-view videos, which aims to jointly estimate dynamic humans, static scenes, and camera poses in one global coordinate frame. We propose TROPHIES--Temporal Reconstruction of Places, Humans, and Cameras from Multi-view Videos-a unified framework tailored for this task. TROPHIES features a Human Branch that models humans through temporal and spatial reasoning, and a Scene Branch that reconstructs static geometry with human-aware attention. A global alignment and optimization module couples both branches by enforcing scale consistency, contact priors, and cross-view temporal coherence. Experiments on EgoHuman and EgoExo4D demonstrate that TROPHIES achieves globally aligned, physically plausible 4D reconstructions and consistently outperforms existing paradigms in both global fidelity and human-scene consistency.

</details>


### [274] [Multi-modal Video Representation Alignment for Robust Self-supervised Driver Distraction Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02352)
*David J. Lerch,Livien Majer,Zeyun Zhong,Manuel Martin,Frederik Diederichs,Rainer Stiefelhagen*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种鲁棒的自监督多模态视频表示学习框架，通过软目标和加权机制处理错误负样本和不可靠正样本，在Drive&Act数据集上优于现有方法，适用于驾驶员分心检测等真实场景。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统对比学习方法(如InfoNCE)假设所有负样本同等信息量、所有正样本可靠，但在多模态数据中这一假设常被违反(视角变化、遮挡、模态间语义重叠)，导致学习效果不佳。

Method: 提出多模态全局对齐框架：1)利用循环一致性得分生成软目标，放松硬负样本假设；2)基于相似度分布的加权机制减轻噪声正样本影响；3)将传统成对对齐扩展为全局多模态对齐，聚合所有模态对的对齐信息。

Result: 在Drive&Act数据集上的RGB、IR、Depth、Skeleton四种模态上，该方法一致优于成对对齐和现有全局对齐基线；跨视角消融实验证明对未见视角具有强泛化能力。

Conclusion: 该框架为自监督全局多模态表示学习提供了可扩展且有效的解决方案，能够实现可靠的驾驶员分心检测，并在真实世界多模态视频理解中具有开创性意义。

Abstract: Robust self-supervised learning of multi-modal video representations is critical for real-world applications such as driver distraction detection, where multiple sensors provide complementary but noisy signals. Conventional contrastive objectives, such as InfoNCE, assume all negatives are equally informative and all positives are reliable. However, this assumption is frequently violated in multi-modal data due to viewpoint changes, occlusions, or semantic overlap across modalities. In this work, we propose a novel framework for multi-modal global alignment that addresses these challenges by jointly modeling faulty negatives and unreliable or faulty positives. We introduce soft targets derived from cycle-consistency scores to relax the hard-negative assumption, and a weighting mechanism based on similarity distributions to mitigate the impact of noisy or faulty positives. Our approach extends traditional pairwise alignment to a principled global multi-modal setting, aggregating alignment information across all modality pairs. We evaluate our method on the Drive&Act dataset, demonstrating that it consistently outperforms both pairwise and existing global alignment baselines across RGB, IR, Depth, and Skeleton modalities. Cross-view ablation studies further show strong generalization to unseen camera perspectives, highlighting the robustness of our representations. Overall, our framework provides a scalable and effective solution for self-supervised global multi-modal representation learning, enabling reliable driver distraction detection and pioneering in real-world multi-modal video understanding. Our code will be published on GitHub.

</details>


### [275] [PRIMA: Boosting Animal Mesh Recovery with Biological Priors and Test-Time Adaptation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02366)
*Xiaohang Yu,Ti Wang,Mackenzie Weygandt Mathis*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: PRIMA是一个通过引入BioCLIP生物先验嵌入、测试时自适应(TTA)策略和构建大规模伪3D数据集Quadruped3D，来解决四足动物3D网格恢复中物种和姿态不平衡问题的框架，在多个基准上取得了SOTA结果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有动物重建方法因3D监督有限和长尾物种分布，往往回归到平均形状和姿态，对稀有物种和罕见姿态泛化能力差。

Method: 1) 引入BioCLIP嵌入作为生物先验，注入语义和形态学知识；2) 提出测试时自适应(TTA)策略，利用2D重投影约束和辅助关键点引导优化SMAL预测；3) 基于TTA构建大规模伪3D数据集Quadruped3D。

Result: 在Animal3D、CtrlAni3D、Quadruped2D和Animal Kingdom上取得SOTA结果，特别是对稀有物种和困难姿态提升显著。

Conclusion: 生物先验和自适应驱动的数据扩展对于可扩展且泛化的动物网格恢复至关重要。

Abstract: We present PRIMA (*PRI*ors for *M*esh *A*daptation), a framework for robust 3D quadruped mesh recovery under severe species and pose imbalance. Existing animal reconstruction methods often regress toward mean shapes and poses due to limited 3D supervision and long-tailed species distributions, resulting in poor generalization to underrepresented animals and rare articulations. PRIMA addresses this challenge through three key contributions. First, we incorporate BioCLIP embeddings as biological priors to inject semantic and morphological knowledge into the reconstruction process, enabling more accurate and generalizable shape prediction across diverse quadrupeds. Second, we introduce a test-time adaptation (TTA) strategy that refines SMAL predictions using 2D reprojection constraints together with auxiliary keypoint guidance, improving pose and shape estimation while enabling the generation of high-quality pseudo-3D annotations from existing 2D datasets. Third, leveraging this TTA framework, we construct Quadruped3D, a large-scale pseudo-3D dataset that covers diverse species and pose variations to systematically improve model performance. Extensive experiments on Animal3D, CtrlAni3D, Quadruped2D, and Animal Kingdom demonstrate that PRIMA achieves state-of-the-art results, with particularly strong improvements on underrepresented species and challenging poses. Our results highlight the importance of biological priors and adaptation-driven data expansion for scalable and generalizable animal mesh recovery. Code is available at https://github.com/AdaptiveMotorControlLab/PRIMA.

</details>


### [276] [Honey, I Shrunk the Arc de Triomphe!](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02379)
*Yuanbo Xiangli,Hanyu Chen,Xueqing Tsang,Noah Snavely*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出MetricScenes数据集，通过互联网照片和立体影像收集真实世界尺度信息，缓解单目几何估计中的"尺度坍缩"问题。微调MoGe-2模型后，在开放场景中显著提升了度量精度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有单目度量估计模型存在"尺度坍缩"——远处地标和大尺度景观被度量低估，根本原因是训练数据受限于硬件（车载LiDAR、室内扫描）或合成数据，缺乏真实世界多样性。

Method: 1) 从互联网照片集和立体影像中收集MetricScenes数据集；2) 使用现成方法估计相机位姿和初始深度图；3) 从地理标签和立体基线恢复绝对尺度；4) 提出两阶段泊松补全方法提升深度质量；5) 在MetricScenes上微调MoGe-2模型。

Result: 微调后的MoGe-2显著缓解了尺度坍缩，在无约束开放场景中取得更优的度量精度，同时在标准基准上保持最先进性能。

Conclusion: 通过构建真实世界尺度数据集的方案有效解决了单目几何估计的尺度问题，验证了数据多样性对模型泛化能力的关键作用。

Abstract: Metric scale monocular geometry estimation has seen significant progress through large-scale data aggregation, yet current foundation models suffer from a persistent ''scale-collapse'' phenomenon: distant landmarks and vast landscapes are metrically underestimated. We hypothesize that this performance gap stems from a training data bottleneck, where existing metric-scale datasets are hardware-constrained to homogenous vehicle-captured LiDAR or short-range indoor scans, or consist of synthetic data that lacks the semantic complexity of the physical world. To bridge this gap, we curate a new metrically-grounded, in-the-wild dataset that we call MetricScenes, gathered from a variety of sources including Internet photo collections and stereo imagery. We estimate camera poses and initial depth maps for each scene using off-the-shelf methods, and recover absolute scale from geo-tagged metadata as well as known stereo camera baselines. We also improve the quality of depth maps derived from MetricScenes via a new two-stage Poisson completion method. Fine-tuning MoGe-2 on our dataset significantly mitigates scale-collapse and achieves superior metric accuracy in unconstrained, open-domain scenes while maintaining state-of-the-art performance on standard benchmarks.

</details>


### [277] [Explainable Forensics of Manipulated Segments in Untrimmed Long Videos](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02402)
*Yue Feng,Jingjing Li,Qijia Lu,Wei Ji,Jingrou Zhang,Fei Shen,Xiao Li,Yizhen Jia,Qiang Chen,Limin Wang,Wentong Li,Jie Qin*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出TASLE基准数据集（12,472个未修剪长视频）和MSLoc方法，用于检测、定位和解释长视频中稀疏嵌入的AI生成片段，填补了现有视频取证方法仅处理短片段、缺乏时空定位与可解释性的空白。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有视频取证方法仅处理短片段，无法应对长视频中AI生成内容稀疏嵌入的真实场景，缺乏对伪造片段的时序定位和可解释分析能力。

Method: 提出MSLoc方法，采用粗到细的取证框架：边界敏感提案生成模块进行高效长视频扫描，结合MLLM精炼模块实现精确边界定位和可解释推理。

Result: 实验验证了MSLoc基线方法的有效性，证明了片段级可解释取证对长视频AI生成内容分析的重要性。

Conclusion: 长视频AI生成片段定位与解释是重要且可行的研究方向，TASLE基准和MSLoc方法为后续研究提供了基础。

Abstract: The rapid advancement of AI-driven video generation has transformed content creation, while simultaneously increasing the risk of misinformation through localized manipulations in long-form videos. Existing video forensic methods predominantly operate on short, independent clips, and thus fail to capture realistic scenarios where AI-generated content is sparsely embedded within otherwise authentic footage. To bridge this gap, we formulate the task of Temporal AI-Generated Segment Localization and Explanation, which targets authenticity detection, temporal localization, and interpretable analysis of manipulated segments in untrimmed long videos. We further introduce TASLE, a large-scale benchmark comprising 12,472 untrimmed videos with diverse manipulation patterns and rich annotation signals, including temporal boundaries, authenticity labels, and segment-level rationales. In addition, we propose MSLoc, a coarse-to-fine forensic baseline that combines a boundary-sensitive proposal generation module for efficient long-video scanning with an MLLM-based refinement module for precise boundary localization and interpretable reasoning. Experiments validate the effectiveness of the proposed baseline, highlighting the importance of segment-level explainable forensics for long-form AI-generated video analysis. Our dataset and code are publicly available at https://debby-0527.github.io/TASLE.

</details>


### [278] [Edge Prediction for Roof Wireframe Reconstruction with Transformers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02406)
*Gustav Hanning,Ludvig Dillén,Jonathan Astermark,Johanna Lidholm,Viktor Larsson*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于Transformer编码器-解码器架构的端到端方法，用于从稀疏SfM点云和地面语义分割/深度图中重建3D房屋屋顶线框模型。通过语义优先动态子采样、Gestalt与ADE20k特征增强，以及交叉注意力机制解码查询嵌入为3D线框边，在HoHo 22k数据集上取得HSS 0.6476，位列挑战赛第二名。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: S23DR Challenge 2026旨在从稀疏SfM点云和地面语义数据中重建3D房屋屋顶线框模型，现有方法（手工规则或传统学习模型）效果不佳，亟需一种能有效融合几何与语义信息的端到端解决方案。

Method: 采用DETR启发的Transformer编码器-解码器架构。输入稀疏SfM点云基于语义优先级动态子采样，并融合Gestalt与ADE20k类别特征；点特征进一步与冻结自编码器生成的Gestalt潜在特征投影融合；通过可学习查询嵌入经交叉注意力机制直接解码为3D线框边。

Result: 在HoHo 22k数据集上，该方法显著超越手工规则与学习基线，Hybrid Structure Score (HSS)达到0.6476，在挑战赛私有排行榜上位列第二。

Conclusion: 基于Transformer的端到端架构能有效融合稀疏几何与语义信息，实现高质量的3D屋顶线框重建，验证了注意力机制在此类任务中的优越性。

Abstract: This paper presents a competitive solution to the S23DR Challenge 2026, which aims to reconstruct 3D house roof wireframe models from sparse SfM point clouds and ground-level semantic segmentations and depth maps. Our proposed method utilizes an end-to-end Transformer encoder-decoder architecture inspired by DETR. To effectively process the geometric and semantic data, the sparse SfM point cloud input is dynamically subsampled based on semantic priority and augmented with Gestalt and ADE20k class features. To further increase segmentation context, we fuse the point features with additional Gestalt feature encodings which are obtained by projecting the points into latent feature maps produced by a frozen autoencoder. Learned query embeddings are then decoded directly into 3D wireframe edges via cross-attention mechanisms. Evaluated on the "HoHo 22k" dataset, our approach significantly outperforms both handcrafted and learned baselines, achieving a Hybrid Structure Score (HSS) of 0.6476 and securing the second-highest position on the challenge's private leaderboard.

</details>


### [279] [Geometry-Aware Implicit Memory for Video World Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02436)
*Zhengxuan Wei,Xu Guo,Xinghui Li,Xunzhi Xiang,Min Wei,Yiran Zhu,Qiulin Wang,Xintao Wang,Pengfei Wan,Xiangwang Hou,Qi Fan*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: GIM-World提出了一种几何感知的隐式记忆框架，通过轻量Transformer编码器将变长历史压缩为固定大小的记忆token，并利用相机可查询的几何头在训练中从冻结的基础模型蒸馏3D场景结构，同时使用信息引导的剪枝规则控制编码成本，在长时域推演中比显式和隐式记忆基线更好地保持几何与视觉一致性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有视频世界模型在长时域推演中面临记忆问题：显式记忆（帧或在线3D重建）存在启发式检索错误、冗余外观存储或重建伪影；隐式记忆虽压缩历史但缺乏对跨视角场景几何的显式编码约束。

Method: 1) 轻量Transformer编码器将变长历史压缩为固定大小的记忆token；2) 相机可查询的几何头在训练时从冻结的基础模型（几何教师）蒸馏3D场景结构到记忆；3) 信息引导的剪枝规则控制编码成本随历史增长保持有界；推理时丢弃几何教师，仅保留轻量记忆模块。

Result: 在MIND数据集上，GIM-World在长时域几何一致性和视觉一致性上均优于显式记忆和隐式记忆基线方法。

Conclusion: 本文验证了几何感知的隐式记忆能有效提升视频世界模型在长时域推演中的表现，且训练后无需额外几何模型即可保持轻量推理。

Abstract: Video world models aim to simulate controllable visual environments, but long-horizon rollouts depend on what the model remembers after observations leave its native context window. Explicit memories retain frames or online 3D reconstructions, which can suffer from heuristic retrieval errors, redundant appearance storage, or reconstruction artifacts. Implicit memories compress history into a compact state, but existing designs are not explicitly constrained to encode cross-view scene geometry. We propose GIM-World, a geometry-aware implicit memory framework for video world models. A lightweight transformer encoder compresses variable-length history into fixed-size memory tokens, a camera-queryable geometry head distills 3D scene structure from a frozen foundation model into the memory during training, and an information-guided pruning rule keeps encoding cost bounded as history grows. The geometry teacher is discarded at inference, leaving a lightweight memory module. Experiments on MIND show that GIM-World better preserves long-horizon geometric and visual consistency than both explicit- and implicit-memory baselines.

</details>


### [280] [Spatial-Temporal Decoupled Reference Conditioning for Identity-Preserving Text-to-Video Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02441)
*Yuheng Chen,Teng Hu,Yuji Wang,Qingdong He,Lizhuang Ma,Jiangning Zhang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出ST-DRC框架，通过空间-时间解耦参考条件机制实现身份保持的视频生成，在LTX-2.3上轻量级设计下达到SOTA效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有身份保持视频生成方法难以平衡高层语义控制（文本对齐）和低层身份保真度（身份细节保留），二者之间存在权衡困境。

Method: 1) 框架层面：潜在上下文特征注入，将参考图像编码后与噪声视频潜在表示拼接。2) TASS-RoPE机制：参考token在时间上靠近视频序列但在空间上偏移，抑制像素级复制粘贴。3) 外观不变参考增强+面部引导身份目标，防止捷径学习。4) 推理时三流参考无分类器引导，独立控制文本和身份。

Result: 在身份保持、提示对齐、时间一致性、视频质量等方面均表现优异，在面部身份保持视频生成赛道中排名前列。

Conclusion: 空间-时间解耦参考条件机制有效解决了身份保留与文本控制之间的冲突，轻量级设计即可实现高水平身份保真。

Abstract: Identity-preserving video generation (IPVG) aims to synthesize high-fidelity videos that follow text prompts while faithfully preserving a reference identity. Despite recent progress, existing IPVG methods still struggle to balance high-level semantic control and low-level identity fidelity. To bridge this gap, we propose ST-DRC, an effective Spatial-Temporal Decoupled Reference Conditioning framework for identity-preserving text-to-video generation. At the framework level, ST-DRC performs latent in-context feature injection by encoding the reference image with the video VAE and concatenating it with noisy video latents, enabling rich low-level identity details to be accessed without additional adapters. To separate identity-aware reference retrieval from appearance copying, we introduce TASS-RoPE, a Temporal-Adjacent Spatial-Shifted RoPE scheme that places reference tokens near the video sequence in time but shifts them in space, allowing reference information to flow through spatio-temporal attention while suppressing pixel-level copy-paste shortcuts. To further prevent shortcut learning and strengthen the otherwise diluted identity supervision in the diffusion objective, we combine appearance-invariant reference augmentation with face-guided identity objectives, encouraging the model to preserve identity under variations in color, pose, and layout. At inference time, we introduce a three-stream reference classifier-free guidance strategy that independently controls text adherence and reference fidelity. Experiments demonstrate that ST-DRC achieves strong identity preservation, prompt alignment, temporal consistency, and video quality with a lightweight design built on LTX-2.3. Our method ranks among the top submissions in the facial identity-preserving video generation track, validating the effectiveness of spatial-temporal decoupled reference conditioning.

</details>


### [281] [Reason-Then-Retrieve for CoVR-R with Structured Edit Prompts and Dense-Sparse Fusion](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02450)
*DongQing Liu,MengShi Qi,HongWei Ji*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出CoVR-R，一种基于推理的零样本组合视频检索方法。该方法利用Qwen3.5-27B对查询和候选视频分别生成结构化描述与嵌入，结合稠密检索与TF-IDF双分支排序，在CoVR-R基准上取得领先性能（验证集R@1 80.81，盲测R@1 89.73）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 组合视频检索（CoVR）中目标视频并非直接描述，而是需要从参考视频与编辑指令中推断出对象身份、动作顺序、最终状态、手部交互、场景转换等细粒度变化，现有方法缺乏明确的推理机制来建模这些编辑语义。

Method: 构建零样本"先推理后检索"流水线：1）对每个候选视频，用Qwen3.5-27B生成面向检索的结构化描述和稠密嵌入（池化生成token的隐状态，带token权重）；2）对每个查询，先对参考视频和编辑指令进行编辑推理，再生成目标视频描述，其隐状态作为查询嵌入；3）稠密检索与TF-IDF文本分支双路融合，按拆分（验证/测试）设置不同权重。

Result: 验证集R@1 80.81, R@5 94.86, R@10 97.11, R@50 98.59；盲测集R@1 89.73, R@5 95.79, R@10 96.63, R@50 97.98。

Conclusion: 通过显式的推理步骤和双分支检索融合，零样本方法能够在组合视频检索任务中有效捕捉编辑语义，取得当前最佳性能。该框架不依赖目标任务训练数据，具有良好的泛化潜力。

Abstract: CoVR-R studies reason-aware composed video retrieval: given a reference video and an edit instruction, the system must retrieve the target video that satisfies the edit. The main difficulty is that the target is not described directly; it must be inferred from fine-grained changes in object identity, action order, final state, hand interaction, and scene transition. We build a zero-shot reason-then-retrieve pipeline around Qwen3.5-27B. For each gallery video, the model generates a retrieval-oriented structured description and a dense embedding by pooling generated-token hidden states with token-dependent weights. For each query, the model first performs edit reasoning over the reference video and instruction, then generates a target-video description whose hidden states serve as the query embedding. We complement dense retrieval with a TF-IDF branch over the generated texts and fuse the two rankings with split-specific weights. On validation, the current best submission reaches 80.81 at R@1, 94.86 at R@5, 97.11 at R@10, and 98.59 at R@50. On the blind test split, it reaches 89.73 at R@1, 95.79 at R@5, 96.63 at R@10, and 97.98 at R@50.

</details>


### [282] [Active Exploring like a Pigeon: Reinforcing Spatial Reasoning via Agentic Vision-Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02459)
*Wei Deng,Xianlin Zhang,Mengshi Qi*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种受鸽子认知地图启发的主动空间推理管线，通过动态认知地图参数化场景布局，并引入空间断言代码（SAC）作为Python表达式来验证中间推理步骤，提供密集奖励信号，在MindCube基准上达到80.5%的整体准确率，比当前最佳方法在Rotation子集上提升29.5个准确率点（相对提升53.2%）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有VLM将模型视为被动观察者，难以处理真实世界的空间推理；而强化学习方法依赖稀疏奖励，对复杂推理任务效果有限。

Method: 1）构建动态认知地图，将场景布局参数化为对象位置和朝向，作为持久记忆；2）提出空间断言代码（SAC），用Python表达式程序化描述空间关系，与动态认知地图协作提供密集奖励信号；3）通过监督学习和强化学习联合微调优化模型。

Result: 在MindCube基准上达到80.5%整体准确率，在Rotation子集上比当前最佳方法提升29.5个准确率点（相对提升53.2%）。

Conclusion: 提出的主动空间推理方法显著优于现有方法，验证了将认知地图与程序化空间断言结合的有效性，为VLM的空间推理能力提升提供了新思路。

Abstract: Enabling Vision-Language Models (VLMs) to perform spatial reasoning remains challenging. Existing approaches treat VLMs as passive observers, which is difficult for real-world applications. Moreover, reinforcement learning methods rely on sparse rewards, limiting their effectiveness for complex reasoning tasks. Inspired by pigeons' building and exploiting cognitive maps for navigation, we propose a novel agentic pipeline for spatial reasoning. First, we introduce a new \emph{dynamic cognitive map} parameterizing scene layout as object positions and orientations, serving as persistent memory for new observations. Second, we propose a novel \emph{Spatial Assertion Codes (SAC)}, Python expressions programmatically describing spatial relationships. By collaborating with the dynamic cognitive map, SAC enables verification of intermediate reasoning steps, providing dense reward signals. We optimize the model via supervised and reinforcement finetuning. Experiments on the MindCube benchmark demonstrate state-of-the-art performance with \emph{80.5\%} overall accuracy, outperforming the best current method by \emph{29.5} accuracy points (a relative improvement of \emph{53.2\%}) on the challenging \textsc{Rotation} subset. Our code and data are open-sourced at https://github.com/dw-dengwei/active-spatial-reasoning.git.

</details>


### [283] [Retrieve What's Missing: Coverage-Maximizing Retrieval for Consistent Long Video Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02479)
*Minseok Joo,Dogyun Park,Taehoon Lee,Kyujin Lee,Hyunwoo J. Kim*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: COVRAG 提出基于深度图的记忆检索框架，通过目标视角覆盖图最大化残差覆盖增益，在长视频生成中实现高效几何一致性维护。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有长时域视频生成方法在维持几何一致性上存在两难：轻量级方法（相机位姿/FoV重叠）无法推理像素级可见性，而显式3D重建方法计算成本过高，难以在长序列中持续维护。

Method: 利用预训练3D先验构建目标视角覆盖图作为轻量级3D记忆证据；采用残差覆盖增益最大化策略迭代选择记忆帧；引入滑动窗口深度缓存提升长视频生成的几何估计效率。

Result: 在RealEstate10K和DL3DV10K数据集上，COVRAG相比基线方法显著提升了长时序几何一致性，同时保持较低的推理延迟。

Conclusion: 基于深度覆盖感知的记忆检索框架能有效平衡检索粒度与计算开销，为长视频生成中的几何一致性维护提供了高效可行的新范式。

Abstract: Maintaining long-term geometric consistency remains challenging for long-horizon autoregressive video generation. Memory-augmented generative models address this by retrieving historical frames, but their effectiveness depends on two key design choices: what 3D-geometric evidence should represent past observations, and how memory frames should be selected from this evidence. Existing methods often rely on camera poses or field-of-view overlap, which are lightweight but too coarse to reason about pixel-wise visibility, or use explicit 3D reconstruction, which provides fine-grained evidence but is costly to maintain over long rollouts. We propose Coverage-Maximizing Retrieval-Augmented Generation (COVRAG), a depth-based memory retrieval framework that uses pretrained 3D priors to construct a target-view coverage map as lightweight 3D memory evidence. For frame selection, COVRAG maximizes residual coverage gain, iteratively retrieving frames that explain target-view regions not covered by the current context or previously selected memories. To improve scalability in long-video generation, we introduce sliding-window depth caching for efficient geometry estimation. Experiments on RealEstate10K and DL3DV10K show that COVRAG improves long-horizon geometric consistency while maintaining low latency compared to baselines.

</details>


### [284] [Places in the Wild: A Large, High-Resolution RAW Photograph Dataset for Ecologically Valid Vision Research](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02481)
*Michelle R. Greene*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: Places in the Wild是一个包含67,574张高分辨率全景照片的场景数据集，覆盖810个物理地点、260个场景类别，使用45MP相机在360度视角下采集，同时提供RAW和JPEG格式，支持认知神经科学和计算机视觉研究。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有图像数据集多为低分辨率、互联网来源的JPEG图像，采集条件未知且缺乏空间上下文信息，无法满足对真实场景统计特性和视点依赖识别的研究需求。

Method: 使用45兆像素Canon EOS R5安装在全景三脚架上，在每个地点以5度水平间隔拍摄72张图像，并在不同仰角拍摄12张图像，实现密集的360度视点采样。同时记录14-bit RAW和压缩JPEG格式，并提取完整EXIF元数据和图像质量指标。

Result: 构建了包含67,574张高分辨率图像的场景数据集，覆盖810个物理位置、260个基本场景类别（室内、城市、自然环境），提供丰富的视角变化和传感器级别的图像细节。

Conclusion: 该数据集可支持视点依赖的识别机制研究、真实条件下场景理解系统的训练评估、自然场景统计特性分析以及需要近乎全视野显示的实验。

Abstract: Large image datasets have accelerated progress in cognitive neuroscience and computer vision. However, most datasets are low-resolution, internet-sourced JPEGs with unknown capture conditions and limited spatial context. Places in the Wild is a dataset of 67,574 high-resolution photographs collected in situ across 810 physical locations spanning 260 basic-level scene categories, including indoor, urban, and natural environments. At each location, a 45-megapixel Canon EOS R5 mounted on a panoramic tripod captured 72 images at 5-degree horizontal intervals plus 12 images at varying elevations, yielding dense 360-degree viewpoint sampling. All images were recorded simultaneously as 14-bit RAW (CR3) files and compressed JPEGs, preserving sensor-level detail for analyses of luminance, contrast, color, and other image statistics. The dataset is accompanied by complete EXIF metadata and a suite of image-quality metrics. Places in the Wild supports research on viewpoint-dependent recognition in humans and models, training and evaluation of scene-understanding systems under realistic conditions, characterization of natural scene statistics, and experiments requiring near-full-field visual displays.

</details>


### [285] [X-Stream: Exploring MLLMs as Multiplexers for Multi-Stream Understanding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02482)
*Peiwen Sun,Xudong Lu,Huadai Liu,Yang Bo,Dongming Wu,Huankang Guan,Minghong Cai,Jinpeng Chen,Xintong Guo,Shuhan Li,Rui Liu,Xiangyu Yue*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出X-Stream，首个多流视频流理解基准，包含4,220个QA对和932个视频，覆盖多窗口/多视角/多设备场景。实验发现当前最先进的多模态大模型在多流并发任务中仅达到约50%准确率，暴露了现有模型在多流推理上的严重不足。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有视频理解基准局限于单流范式，无法评估在线跨流推理能力，而现实应用（如体育直播、自动驾驶、多屏协作）天然需要连续多流交互。

Method: 构建4,220个QA对、932个视频的基准，包含11个子任务，覆盖多窗口、多视角和多设备场景；采用双重验证流程防止模型过度依赖单一流；引入信号复用理论将多模态大语言模型概念化为朴素复用器进行系统评估。

Result: 最先进的多模态大模型在多流并发任务中仅达到约50%的得分，且主动推理能力极差。

Conclusion: X-Stream揭示了当前复用方案的权衡，为下一代多流智能体提供了评估协议和实证指导。

Abstract: While video streaming understanding has made significant strides, real-world applications, such as live sports broadcasting, autonomous driving, and multi-screen collaboration, inherently demand continuous, multi-stream interactions. However, existing benchmarks are confined to single-stream paradigms, leaving a critical gap in evaluating online, cross-stream reasoning. To bridge this, we introduce X-Stream, the first benchmark dedicated to multi-stream streaming understanding. Comprising 4,220 rigorously curated QA pairs across 932 videos, X-Stream evaluates 11 subtasks across multi-window, multi-view, and multi-device scenarios. Crucially, our dataset is constructed using a novel dual-verification pipeline that prevents over-reliance on a single stream. Furthermore, we pioneer the conceptualization of multi-modal large language models (MLLMs) as naive multiplexers, systematically evaluating their performance through the lens of Signal Multiplexing Theory. Our extensive online inference experiments reveal a stark reality: state-of-the-art MLLMs struggle significantly with concurrent streams, achieving only about 50% score and exhibiting poor proactive ability. Ultimately, X-Stream exposes the trade-off of current multiplexing schemes, providing both a practical evaluation protocol and empirical guidance for next-generation multi-stream agents.

</details>


### [286] [MORPHOS: Autoregressive 4D Generation with Temporal Structured Latents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02491)
*Minkyung Kwon,Jinhyeok Choi,Youngjin Shin,Jaeyeong Kim,JongMin Lee,Seungryong Kim*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: MORPHOS提出了一种自回归框架，通过Temporal Structured Latents（T-SLAT）统一4D表示，从视频中生成动态3D资产（网格、3D高斯、辐射场），利用因果注意力确保时序一致性和拓扑变化处理，在多项基准测试中达到SOTA效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法受限于单一表示、难以建模拓扑变化或长视频时序一致性差，缺乏统一处理多种3D表示的动态生成框架。

Method: 提出T-SLAT统一4D表示联合编码几何与外观及时序信息；基于因果注意力的自回归框架逐帧生成；提出时序-结构增强缓解自回归误差累积。

Result: 在多个基准测试中，外观生成达到SOTA，几何生成具有竞争力；在各种表示上泛化能力优越，长时生成鲁棒性强。

Conclusion: MORPHOS成功实现了从视频到多种动态3D表示的统一自回归生成，有效解决了拓扑变化和长时序一致性问题。

Abstract: We present MORPHOS, a novel autoregressive framework that generates dynamic 3D assets from videos across diverse representations, including meshes, 3D Gaussians, and radiance fields. Existing methods are typically limited to a single representation, struggle to model topological changes, or fail to maintain temporal consistency over long videos. To address these limitations, we introduce the Temporal Structured Latents (T-SLAT), a unified 4D representation that jointly encodes geometry and appearance along the temporal dimension. Leveraging T-SLAT, MORPHOS autoregressively generates dynamic 3D assets via causal attention, conditioning each frame on its preceding history to ensure temporal consistency while handling evolving topologies. We also propose a temporal-structural augmentation to mitigate error accumulation in autoregressive generation. MORPHOS achieves state-of-the-art performance in appearance and competitive results in geometry across multiple benchmarks, demonstrating superior generalization across various representations and robustness in long-horizon generation.

</details>


### [287] [GloResNet: A lightweight 3D CNN with global topological features for preterm brain injury prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02498)
*Boyu Yuan,Jiamiao Lu,Weichuan Zhang,Benqing Wu,Tuo Wang,Changshan Wang,Changming Sun,Liang Guo*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出GloResNet，一种轻量级3D CNN框架，基于ResNet-10并在MedicalNet上预训练，用于从T2加权MRI预测早产儿脑损伤，在dHCP数据集上5折交叉验证达75.18%平均准确率（峰值81.82%），特异性0.81，灵敏度0.76。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 早产儿脑损伤是重要的临床问题，现有方法缺乏非侵入性、自动化的筛查工具，且医学影像数据稀缺限制了深度学习模型的应用。

Method: 提出了GloResNet框架：1）基于ResNet-10的轻量级3D CNN；2）在MedicalNet上预训练缓解数据不足；3）全局流形映射策略，将3D体素重采样至128x128x128并做逐样本z-score归一化；4）训练中集成mixup、类别加权和测试时增强。

Result: 在5折交叉验证中，GloResNet平均准确率75.18%（峰值81.82%），特异性0.81，灵敏度0.76。

Conclusion: 拓扑感知的轻量级CNN能有效预测新生儿脑损伤，为临床提供非侵入性筛查工具。

Abstract: This study introduces an automated deep learning framework for predicting brain injury (BI) in preterm infants from T2-weighted MRI (dHCP dataset). We propose GloResNet, a lightweight 3D CNN based on ResNet-10, pretrained on MedicalNet to address data scarcity. A global manifold mapping strategy first resamples each 3D volume to 128x128x128 and then applies subject-wise z-score intensity normalization, thereby preserving global topology while standardizing appearance. Training integrates mixup, class weighting, and test-time augmentation for robustness. In 5-fold cross-validation, GloResNet achieved 75.18% average accuracy (peak 81.82%), with specificity 0.81 and sensitivity 0.76. Results demonstrate that a topology-aware lightweight CNN has the capability to effectively predict neonatal BI, offering a non-invasive screening tool. The source code of this paper can be obtained from the GitHub repository: https://github.com/ICL-SUST/GloResNet-Preterm-Brain

</details>


### [288] [Question-Aware Evidence Ledgers for Video Relational Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02506)
*Yilin Ou,Mengshi Qi,Huadong Ma*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一个基于GPT-5.5的测试时推理流水线，通过问题感知的证据分类账和保守门控机制，在VRR-QA视频关系推理挑战中达到92.95%的准确率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: VRR-QA任务中的视频关系推理需要处理隐式空间关系、事件边界、目标身份和对话上下文等复杂因素，单一显著帧不足以回答，现有方法难以有效整合多模态证据。

Method: 构建强GPT-5.5视频QA求解器作为基础，设计多路问题感知的证据分类账（路由分类账），针对计数、空间、端点、视角和对话推理等不同问题类型分别显式提取目标、计数单元、参考帧及时空范围。外部工具（开放词汇检测、深度线索、成对裁剪、ASR、场景图）仅作为证据源。采用保守门控机制，仅当独立证据唯一支持不同选项时才更新答案。

Result: 在挑战测试集上达到92.95%总体准确率和93.79%宏平均准确率。

Conclusion: 证据门控流水线有效整合多源证据进行视频关系推理，保守策略避免了错误证据的干扰，显著提升了推理准确率。

Abstract: The VRR-QA challenge evaluates visual relational reasoning in videos, where answers often depend on implicit spatial relations, event boundaries, target identity, and dialogue context rather than a single salient frame. We present a test-time reasoning pipeline built around a strong GPT-5.5 video QA solver and a set of question-aware evidence ledgers. The initial solver answers each question from a uniform video representation, while routed ledgers are prompted to make the required targets, count units, reference frames, and temporal or spatial scope explicit for counting, spatial, endpoint, viewpoint, and dialogue reasoning. External tools such as open-vocabulary detection, depth cues, pair crops, ASR, and scene-graph ledgers are used only as evidence sources. A conservative gate keeps the current answer unless independent evidence uniquely supports a different option. The final evidence-gated pipeline achieves 92.95% overall accuracy and 93.79% macro accuracy on the challenge test split.

</details>


### [289] [Not All Points Are Equal: Uncertainty-Aware 4D LiDAR Scene Synthesis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02510)
*Xiang Xu,Alan Liang,Youquan Liu,Xian Sun,Linfeng Li,Lingdong Kong,Ziwei Liu,Qingshan Liu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: U4D提出了一种利用空间不确定性引导LiDAR场景生成的框架，采用"从难到易"的生成策略，在nuScenes和SemanticKITTI上取得了SOTA性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有生成框架对所有空间区域采用统一的建模能力，忽略了单次扫描中不同区域（如远距离表面、遮挡边界、小尺度物体）的感知难度差异巨大。

Method: 1) 通过预训练分割器的Shannon熵计算逐点不确定性图；2) 无条件扩散阶段合成高熵区域（困难区域）；3) 条件补全阶段利用已生成结构作为先验填充剩余区域；4) MoST模块动态平衡空间细节与时间连续性。

Result: 在nuScenes和SemanticKITTI数据集上，场景保真度、时间一致性和下游任务性能均达到SOTA。

Conclusion: 显式利用空间不确定性指导生成过程，采用"从难到易"的调度策略能有效提升LiDAR场景生成的保真度与连贯性。

Abstract: Constructing faithful 4D worlds from LiDAR-acquired sequences is crucial for embodied AI, yet current generative frameworks apply uniform modeling capacity across all spatial regions. This ignores that perceptual difficulty varies dramatically within a single scan: distant surfaces, occluded boundaries, and small-scale objects carry far higher uncertainty than well-observed structures. We present U4D, a new framework that explicitly leverages spatial uncertainty to guide LiDAR scene generation in a "hard-to-easy" schedule. U4D derives per-point uncertainty maps via Shannon Entropy from a pretrained segmentor, then applies an unconditional diffusion stage to synthesize high-entropy areas with precise geometry, followed by a conditional completion stage that fills in the remaining regions using these structures as priors. A MoST (Mixture of Spatio-Temporal) block further maintains cross-frame coherence by dynamically balancing spatial detail and temporal continuity. Extensive experiments on nuScenes and SemanticKITTI demonstrate state-of-the-art scene fidelity, temporal consistency, and downstream performance.

</details>


### [290] [ToolFG: Towards Well-Grounded Fine-Grained Image Classification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02518)
*Yu Xue,Haoxuan Qu,Zhuoling Li,Yihang Lou,Yan Bai,Hossein Rahmani,Jun Liu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: ToolFG是一个将外部工具集成到多模态大语言模型中的细粒度图像分类框架，通过MCTS引导的工具使用知识蒸馏和模型-工具协同进化机制，让MLLM能自主调用工具获取可靠视觉线索来区分相似类别。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 细粒度图像分类中高度相似的类别难以区分，现有方法缺乏可靠且可验证的视觉线索获取方式，因此需要让MLLM能够自主使用外部工具来主动与图像交互并收集可靠证据。

Method: 1) MCTS引导的工具使用知识蒸馏机制：从高级专有MLLM中挖掘工具使用和FGIC相关知识用于模型训练；2) 模型-工具协同进化机制：联合优化工具集和模型的使用策略，使两者相互适应并专门化于FGIC任务。

Result: 大量实验证明了ToolFG框架在细粒度图像分类任务上的有效性。

Conclusion: ToolFG是首个将工具集成到MLLM中的细粒度图像分类框架，通过让模型自主使用外部工具获取可靠视觉线索，显著提升了分类的可靠性和准确性。

Abstract: Fine-grained image classification (FGIC) has broad applications and has attracted significant research attention.
