In this paper, we explore a novel paradigm for solving FGIC by proposing \textbf{ToolFG}, the first tool-integrated MLLM-based framework tailored to FGIC. ToolFG enables MLLMs to autonomously and flexibly use external tools during the reasoning process, actively interact with images, and collect verifiable visual cues for distinguishing highly similar categories in a more \textit{reliable} and \textit{well-grounded} manner. To equip the model with such tool-use ability, we design a novel \textbf{MCTS-guided tool-use knowledge distillation mechanism}, which effectively mines tool-use- and FGIC-relevant knowledge from advanced proprietary MLLMs for model training. Furthermore, we propose a \textbf{model-tool co-evolution mechanism} that jointly refines the toolset and the model's tool-use policy, driving them toward a mutually adapted and FGIC-specialized state. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our framework.

</details>


### [291] [Improving Combined Detection and Classification of TEM Defects via Mask-Conditioned Latent Diffusion Augmentation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02532)
*Ni Li,Nuohao Liu,Ryan Jacobs,Ajay Annamareddy,Maciej P. Polak,Kevin Field,Izabela Szlufarska,Dane Morgan*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出一种基于掩码条件潜在扩散模型（LDM）的生成式数据增强方法，用于合成透射电子显微镜（TEM）图像及多类缺陷掩码，以缓解标注数据稀缺问题。通过将合成数据与少量真实数据（10、50、100张标注图像）结合训练Mask R-CNN模型，结果显示整体性能有小幅提升（F1调和平均最高提升0.02），但检测与分类的具体改善程度依赖于训练/测试数据划分。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 透射电子显微镜（TEM）图像中微观缺陷的分析，特别是辐照金属合金，常因高质量标注数据稀缺而受限。现有数据增强方法难以生成具有可控、自动标注多类缺陷掩码的真实图像。

Method: 采用掩码条件潜在扩散模型（LDM）生成合成TEM图像与对应的多类缺陷掩码对。无需人工标注，通过从实验掩码分布中采样来生成数据。将生成的合成数据与不同规模（10、50、100张）的真实标注数据集结合，训练Mask R-CNN模型进行缺陷检测与分类。

Result: 生成式数据增强使模型整体性能有小幅提升，F1检测与分类调和平均最高提升0.02。但检测与分类的相对贡献取决于具体的训练/测试数据划分。

Conclusion: 结果表明，针对性的生成模型有潜力在数据稀缺的显微镜图像量化任务中提升深度学习性能。

Abstract: Analyzing microstructural defects in transmission electron microscopy (TEM) images, particularly in irradiated metal alloys, is often limited by the availability of high-quality, labeled data. To address this, we introduce a generative data augmentation approach using a mask-conditioned latent diffusion model (LDM) for synthesizing realistic TEM images with controllable, automatically labeled multi-class defect masks. Without requiring manual annotations for generation, our method enables the creation of synthetic image-mask pairs by sampling distributions learned from experimental masks. These generated data were used to augment small experimental datasets of varying sizes (10, 50, and 100 labeled experimental images) to train a Mask Regional Convolutional Neural Network (R-CNN) model for defect detection and classification. Our results show that generative augmentation yields small overall model performance improvements, with up to a 0.02 gain in the harmonic mean of detection and classification F1 scores. However, we also find that the relative contributions to detection and classification improvement depend on the specific train/test data split. These findings highlight the potential of targeted generative models to enhance deep learning performance in data-scarce microscopy-based image quantification tasks.

</details>


### [292] [LL-Bench: Rethinking Low-Level Vision Evaluation in the Era of Large-Scale Generative Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02535)
*Lu Liu,Huiyu Duan,Chenxin Zhu,Jintong Lu,Haoyun Jiang,Liu Yang,Qiang Hu,Guangtao Zhai,Xiaoyun Zhang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了LL-Bench——一个评估大规模生成模型在低级视觉任务上能力的综合基准，包含2,469张真实退化图像、28,919张恢复图像及15万+成对人类偏好标注。基于此基准，系统诊断了生成模型与传统方法的性能边界和失败模式，并发现现有质量评估指标与人类偏好存在显著差异。进一步提出LL-Score，一个基于多模态大语言模型的评估器，同时捕捉恢复质量和幻觉存在，在评估和作为奖励模型方面均优于现有指标。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大规模生成模型在图像生成和编辑任务上表现优异，但在需要像素级控制的低级视觉任务（如图像恢复）上的能力尚未得到充分研究。现有基准和评估指标在这一领域的系统性评估存在空白。

Method: 构建LL-Bench基准：包含16种退化任务的2,469张真实图像，10个生成模型和21个传统模型产生的28,919张恢复图像，并标注了152,020对人工偏好和28,334个质量分数。在此基础上提出LL-Score多模态大语言模型评估器，同时评估恢复质量和幻觉存在性。

Result: LL-Bench揭示了大规模生成模型在低级视觉任务中的性能边界和独特失败模式，发现现有评估指标与人类偏好显著不一致。LL-Score在质量评估上优于现有指标，并能作为有效的奖励模型用于训练生成模型。

Conclusion: 大规模生成模型在低级视觉任务上表现与传统方法存在差异且有独特失败模式；LL-Score作为对齐人类偏好的评估器和奖励模型具有显著潜力。

Abstract: Large-scale generative models have demonstrated remarkable capabilities across image generation and editing tasks. However, their performance in low-level vision tasks, which require pixel-wise control, remains insufficiently studied. To address this gap, we introduce \textbf{LL-Bench}, a comprehensive \textbf{Benchmark} for evaluating the capabilities of large-scale generative models on \textbf{L}ow-\textbf{L}evel vision tasks. The benchmark comprises 2,469 real-world degraded images covering 16 low-level degradation tasks, and 28,919 restored images produced by 10 state-of-the-art large-scale generative models and 21 conventional restoration models, which are annotated with 152,020 expert-level pairwise human preferences and 28,334 quality scores. Built upon LL-Bench, we present a systematic diagnosis that reveals the performance boundaries and unique failure modes of large-scale generative models across diverse low-level vision tasks, compared with conventional representative restoration approaches. Moreover, we investigate the effectiveness of current quality evaluation metrics on LL-Bench, which exhibit significant discrepancy with human ratings. To better align restored-image quality assessment with human preferences, we further propose \textbf{LL-Score}, an MLLM-based evaluator that captures both restoration quality and hallucination existence. Extensive experiments demonstrate that LL-score not only outperforms existing image quality assessment metrics, but also serves as a promising reward model for training generative models on low-level vision tasks.

</details>


### [293] [LongLive-RAG: A General Retrieval-Augmented Framework for Long Video Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02553)
*Qixin Hu,Shuai Yang,Wei Huang,Song Han,Yukang Chen*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出LongLive-RAG，将自回归视频扩散中的长视频生成建模为检索增强生成问题。通过将历史生成的特征作为可搜索的动态记忆库，并用查询嵌入检索相关历史特征，同时引入窗口时序Delta损失来抑制冗余局部相似性，从而减少滑动窗口注意力带来的误差累积问题，显著提升长视频生成质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有自回归视频扩散方法在生成长视频时使用滑动窗口注意力，导致误差累积和身份漂移问题——一旦活跃窗口出现外观错误，后续生成只能基于退化轨迹继续恶化，形成不可逆的生成路径。

Method: 1) 将长视频生成建模为RAG问题，把已生成的特征视为动态可搜索的历史记忆库；2) 在每个新块生成时，用查询嵌入检索相关历史特征作为非局部上下文；3) 提出Window Temporal Delta Loss，使嵌入能够捕获有意义的时序变化，抑制冗余的局部相似性。

Result: 在多个自回归视频扩散骨干网络和不同生成长度上，LongLive-RAG提升了长视频生成质量，并取得了最佳的VBench-Long平均排名。

Conclusion: LongLive-RAG是首个将自生成特征历史作为内容可寻址检索记忆的开环自回归长视频生成方法，为长视频生成中的误差累积问题提供了新的解决思路。

Abstract: Autoregressive (AR) video diffusion enables variable-length synthesis, but long-horizon generation often suffers from accumulated errors and identity drift. For efficiency, existing methods commonly adopt sliding-window attention during generation. This creates an irreversible generation trajectory: once the active window accumulates appearance errors, subsequent generations can only condition on this degraded trajectory and drift further away. We address this limitation by formulating long video generation as a retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) problem. Rather than relying solely on the recent window, we treat previously generated latents as a dynamic, searchable history. We propose LongLive-RAG, a general retrieval framework for AR video generation. At each new block, LongLive-RAG uses a query embedding to retrieve relevant historical latents. This lightweight retrieval step adds only a small overhead relative to generation and lets the generator condition on non-local context instead of only the recent window. To make retrieval more discriminative, we introduce the Window Temporal Delta Loss that suppresses redundant local similarity and encourages embeddings to capture meaningful temporal changes. Together, these components help reduce error accumulation caused by sliding-window attention. Experiments across multiple AR backbones and generation lengths show improved long-video quality and the best average VBench-Long rank. To our knowledge, among open-ended AR long video generation methods, LongLive-RAG is the first to formulate self-generated latent history as content-addressable retrieval memory. Code is available at https://github.com/qixinhu11/LongLive-RAG.

</details>


### [294] [VLMs are Good Teachers for Video Reasoning via Adaptive Test-Time Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02564)
*Junhao Cheng,Liang Hou,Tianxiong Zhong,Xin Tao,Pengfei Wan,Kun Gai,Jing Liao*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出将VLM从"求解器"角色转变为"教师"角色，通过提取任务规则构建可微分奖励函数，在测试时在线优化VGM的LoRA模块，显著提升视频推理能力（平均提升16.7个点），优于VLM-as-Solver和Best-of-N等方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有VGM虽视觉质量优秀但难以理解和遵循任务规则，导致推理逻辑失败；而VLM作为求解器表现不佳，但具备强大的感知能力。作者希望利用VLM的感知优势来引导VGM推理，而非直接求解问题。

Method: 将VLM作为"教师"，提取任务特定规则构建可微分奖励函数，通过测试时在线优化轻量级LoRA模块来引导VGM推理器，实现自适应测试时优化，扩展VGM的推理能力边界。

Result: 在VBVR-Bench和RULER-Bench上平均提升16.7个点，远超VLM-as-Solver（+0.4点）和Best-of-N（+2.2点）方法，且测试时成本相当。

Conclusion: 将VLM作为测试时教师是一种有前景的范式，能够实现可泛化的视频推理能力。

Abstract: The recent "Reasoning with Video" paradigm utilizes Video Generation Models (VGMs) to generate temporally coherent visual trajectories to complete reasoning tasks. Although state-of-the-art VGMs excel at visual quality, they often struggle to understand and follow task-specific rules, leading to logical failures across diverse reasoning scenarios. Existing efforts try to utilize Vision-Language Models (VLMs) as problem pre-solvers to produce or refine textual guidance for the VGM. However, textual descriptions fail to capture intricate spatiotemporal details, and VGMs often struggle to faithfully execute fine-grained or long-tail instructions even with a valid plan. While VLMs struggle as solvers, they possess strong perception capabilities to evaluate process-constraint satisfaction and final-goal achievement. Leveraging this strength, we introduce a paradigm shift that transitions the role of VLMs to "teachers". Specifically, a VLM teacher extracts task-specific rules to formulate differentiable rewards, guiding a VGM Reasoner via test-time online optimization of a lightweight LoRA module. This strategy enables adaptive test-time optimization and extends the reasoning capabilities beyond the VGM's intrinsic boundaries. Evaluations on symbolic (VBVR-Bench) and general-purpose (RULER-Bench) video reasoning benchmarks show that the proposed method yields a 16.7-point average performance gain, outperforming the VLM-as-Solver paradigm (+0.4 points) and Best-of-N scaling (+2.2 points) by a large margin at comparable test-time cost. These findings reveal that integrating VLMs as test-time teachers offers a promising paradigm for achieving generalizable video reasoning. Project Page: https://VLM-as-Teacher.github.io/

</details>


### [295] [Policy-based Foveated Imaging and Perception](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02565)
*Howard Xiao,Jan Ackermann,Boyang Deng,Gordon Wetzstein*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种实时的、任务感知的注视点成像系统，利用双流传感器架构，在图像采集阶段动态分配有限像素带宽至任务相关区域，同时保持低分辨率全局上下文，在严格像素预算下显著优于现有基线方法，并在200百万像素双流传感器上进行了实际验证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 超高分辨率图像传感器能捕捉精细空间细节，但在实际带宽、延迟和功耗约束下，获取和处理全分辨率所有像素往往不可行。现有方法采用空间或时间下采样策略，但会不可逆地在评估任务相关性之前丢弃信息。

Method: 利用新兴的双流传感器架构，将注视点采集建模为传感器注意力策略学习问题：过去观测指导未来测量动作，形成感知-采集闭环。动态分配有限像素带宽至任务相关兴趣区域，同时保持低分辨率全局上下文。

Result: 通过多项感知任务的广泛仿真，在严格像素预算下实现了高任务性能，显著优于同带宽基线方法；并在200百万像素双流传感器上采集真实视频，验证了实际可行性。

Conclusion: 任务驱动的采集时注视点成像在实际场景中具备可行性，为超高分辨率传感器在带宽受限条件下的高效感知提供了新范式。

Abstract: Ultra-high-resolution image sensors offer the potential to capture fine spatial details critical for many visual perception tasks, but acquiring and processing all pixels at full resolution is often infeasible under realistic bandwidth, latency, and power constraints. Existing approaches address this challenge through acquisition strategies such as spatial or temporal downsampling, which irrevocably discard information before task relevance can be assessed. In this work, we introduce a real-time, predictive, and task-aware foveated imaging system that operates directly at image acquisition time. Leveraging emerging dual-stream sensor architectures, our method dynamically allocates limited pixel bandwidth to task-relevant regions of interest while maintaining a low-resolution global context. We formulate foveated acquisition as a sensor attention policy-learning problem, in which past observations guide actions that determine future measurements, closing the perception-acquisition loop. Through extensive simulation across multiple perception tasks, we demonstrate that our approach achieves high task performance under strict pixel budgets and significantly outperforms relevant baselines operating at the same bandwidth. We further validate our system on a 200-megapixel dual-stream sensor, capturing real-world videos under realistic bandwidth and latency constraints, demonstrating the practical feasibility of task-driven, acquisition-time foveated imaging.

</details>


### [296] [VISReg: Variance-Invariance-Sketching Regularization for JEPA training](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02572)
*Haiyu Wu,Randall Balestriero,Morgan Levine*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: VISReg提出用Sliced-Wasserstein sketching替代VICReg中的协方差正则化，在保持方差项的同时实现嵌入全分布形状对齐，解决了协方差仅捕捉二阶统计量和 sketching方法梯度消失的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: VICReg的协方差正则化仅捕捉二阶统计量（去相关），无法约束完整分布形状；SIGReg等sketching方法虽能对齐各向同性高斯，但缺乏灵活性且在坍缩时梯度消失。需要一种既能保持灵活性又能提供完整分布约束的方法。

Method: VISReg（Variance-Invariance-Sketching Regularization）：保留VICReg的方差项（控制尺度），将协方差项替换为基于Sliced-Wasserstein距离的sketching目标（约束完整分布形状），实现尺度和形状的解耦。

Result: VISReg计算复杂度线性，在低质量数据集上优于现有正则化方法，对长尾和低秩场景鲁棒。ImageNet-1K预训练后OOD SOTA；ImageNet-22K预训练后OOD性能匹配DINOv2（后者使用10倍数据LVD-142M）。

Conclusion: 通过将尺度控制与形状约束解耦，VISReg结合了VICReg的灵活性和sketching方法的分布严谨性，在坍缩时仍保持稳健梯度，是一种高效且可扩展的自监督正则化方案。

Abstract: Self-supervised learning methods prevent embedding collapse via modeling heuristics or explicit regularization of the embedding space. Among the latter, VICReg decomposes regularization into variance and covariance objectives, offering flexibility and interpretability. However, covariance captures only second-order statistics -- encouraging decorrelation but failing to enforce the full distributional shape needed for stable training. Sketching-based methods such as SIGReg address this by aligning embeddings to an isotropic Gaussian, but lack flexibility and suffer from vanishing gradients under collapse. We propose Variance-Invariance-Sketching Regularization (VISReg), which replaces covariance with a Sliced-Wasserstein-based sketching objective that enforces full distributional shape, while retaining a variance term for scale control. By decoupling scale and shape, VISReg combines VICReg's flexibility with the distributional rigor of sketching methods, providing robust gradients even under collapse. We show that VISReg scales linearly, outperforms existing regularization on low-quality datasets, and is resilient to long-tailed and low-rank regimes. Pre-trained on ImageNet-1K, VISReg achieves state-of-the-art performance on out-of-distribution datasets. Pre-trained on ImageNet-22K, it matches DINOv2's OOD performance despite the latter using 10x more data (LVD-142M). Project and code: https://haiyuwu.github.io/visreg.

</details>


### [297] [HumanNOVA: Photorealistic, Universal and Rapid 3D Human Avatar Modeling from a Single Image](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02573)
*Hezhen Hu,Wangbo Zhao,Lanqing Guo,Hanwen Jiang,Jonathan C. Liu,Zhiwen Fan,Kai Wang,Zhangyang Wang,Georgios Pavlakos*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: HumanNOVA是一个从单张RGB图像生成逼真3D人体化身的前馈式快速模型，通过构建大规模数据生成管线（利用100k现成资产与多视角捕捉数据）和token条件化建模框架，实现秒级推理且无需测试时优化，在多项基准上表现优异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法在实现3D人体化身的照片级真实感与泛化能力时面临挑战，主要瓶颈在于缺乏多样化、高质量的大规模3D人体数据。

Method: 构建可扩展的数据生成管线：1）利用现有绑定资产并配以日常生活多样化姿态；2）利用多相机人体捕捉数据通过拟合生成更多训练视角。模型采用前馈式token条件化化身建模框架，将输入图像和估计的SMPL网格编码为紧凑token表示，通过交叉注意力融合构建基于三平面的3D化身。

Result: 在多个基准上，定量和定性结果均优于现有方法，对多样化输入图像条件表现出鲁棒性，推理时间不到一秒。

Conclusion: HumanNOVA通过大规模数据生成与高效架构设计，实现了通用、快速且照片级真实的单图3D人体化身生成，无需测试时优化。

Abstract: In this paper, we present HumanNOVA, a photorealistic, universal, and rapid model for generating 3D human avatars from a single RGB image. Achieving both photorealism and generalization is challenging due to the scarcity of diverse, high-quality 3D human data. To address this, we build a scalable data generation pipeline that follows two strategies. The first one is to leverage existing rigged assets and animate them with extensive poses from daily life. The second strategy is to utilize existing multi-camera captures of humans and employ fitting to generate more diverse views for training. These two strategies enable us to scale up to 100k assets, significantly enhancing both the quantity and the diversity of data for robust model training. In terms of the architecture, HumanNOVA adopts a feed-forward, token-conditioned avatar modeling framework that allows fast inference in less than one second and requires no test-time optimization. Given an input image and an estimated simplified human mesh (SMPL) without detailed geometry or appearance, the model first encodes both inputs into compact token representations. These tokens then act as conditioning signals and are fused through cross-attention to construct a triplane-based 3D avatar representation. Extensive experiments on multiple benchmarks demonstrate the superiority of our approach, both quantitatively and qualitatively, as well as its robustness under diverse input image conditions. Project page at https://HumanNOVA.github.io .

</details>


### [298] [From Zero to Hero: Training-Free Custom Concept Spawning in World Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02575)
*Kiymet Akdemir,Pinar Yanardag*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出SPAWN方法，一种无需训练的概念生成技术，通过在自回归世界模型中交换锚定帧与外部概念潜变量，实现用户可控的视觉概念注入与传播。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有自回归世界模型只能基于文本提示或单张参考帧生成环境，用户无法控制可见区域之外的场景内容，严重限制了游戏、交互叙事和模拟等应用中的场景可控性。

Method: SPAWN利用图像到视频骨干网络的结构特性：上下文记忆的第一个槽位固定为参考帧（锚定帧）。通过将锚定帧短暂替换为外部概念潜变量（注入窗口），再恢复原始锚定，使概念通过模型自身记忆机制自然传播到后续生成片段中。

Result: SPAWN支持从精细实体（角色、道具）到大规模元素（建筑、地标）的概念注入，接受图像或文本描述作为输入。实验表明方法能保持一致的照明、尺度、透视和身份特征，实现时间相干性。

Conclusion: 可控概念生成在现有自回归世界模型中是可行的，且无需额外训练，为游戏、叙事和仿真应用提供了实用的场景编辑能力。

Abstract: Autoregressive world models have emerged as a powerful paradigm for interactive video generation, allowing users to navigate dynamically generated environments through actions. These models are typically conditioned on a text prompt and/or a single reference frame, from which the entire world is generated. Yet the moment the user navigates beyond what is visible in that frame, the unseen regions are populated by the base model's priors, with no mechanism for the user to specify what should appear and where. This is a fundamental limitation for applications such as gaming, interactive storytelling, and simulation, where controllable scene composition is essential. We refer to this missing capability as concept spawning; introducing a user-specified visual concept into a world model, analogous to spawning in a game engine. We introduce SPAWN (Swapping Pinned Anchor with Windowed iNjection), a training-free method for concept spawning. SPAWN exploits a structural property of image-to-video backbones: the first slot of the context memory is pinned to the reference frame and acts as a foundational anchor for every generated chunk. By swapping this anchor with an external concept latent over a short injection window and letting the original anchor return, we cause the concept to propagate naturally through the rollout via the model's own memory. SPAWN supports concepts from fine-grained entities such as characters and props to large-scale elements such as buildings and landmarks, and accepts either a concept image or a text description as input. Experiments show that SPAWN integrates concepts with consistent lighting, scale, and perspective while preserving identity and temporal coherence, demonstrating that controllable concept spawning is achievable in existing autoregressive world models without any training.

</details>


### [299] [Thinking in Blender: Staged Executable Inverse Graphics with Vision-Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02580)
*Guangzhao He,Rundong Luo,Wei-Chiu Ma,Hadar Averbuch-Elor*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出SEIG框架，利用预训练视觉语言模型（VLMs）直接从单张图像逆向重建为可编辑的Blender 3D场景，通过逐步细化几何、材质、构图和光照等场景因素，无需依赖专门的2D/3D基础模型或可微渲染。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 逆向图形学是一个长期存在且高度欠约束的问题，传统方法依赖专用模型或多视图监督。作者希望探索预训练VLMs是否可以直接从单张图像执行可执行的逆向图形学，生成可编辑的3D场景。

Method: 提出SEIG（Staged Executable Inverse Graphics）框架，采用智能体化方法，在可执行的Blender代码空间中逐步细化几何、材质、构图和光照等场景因素，实现从单张图像到3D场景的分阶段重建。

Result: 在多样化场景上的实验表明，分阶段重建显著提升了重建保真度（像素级、感知级和语义级指标），验证了任务分解对于通用VLMs执行逆向图形学的重要性。

Conclusion: SEIG框架证明了通用VLMs能够执行单图像逆向图形学，且分阶段策略是关键。重建出的可编辑Blender场景支持渲染、重光照和操作等多种下游应用。

Abstract: Inverse graphics is a longstanding and highly underconstrained problem that seeks to reconstruct images as editable 3D scenes which can be rendered, relit, and manipulated. In this work, we investigate whether pretrained vision-language models (VLMs) can perform executable inverse graphics directly from a single image by reconstructing a scene as an editable Blender program, without relying on specialized 2D or 3D foundation models, differentiable rendering, or multi-view supervision. We introduce Staged Executable Inverse Graphics (SEIG), an agentic framework that reconstructs a 3D scene from a single image by progressively refining scene factors including geometry, materials, composition, and lighting directly in executable Blender code space. We evaluate our framework across diverse scenes using a range of reconstruction metrics spanning pixel-level, perceptual, and semantic fidelity. Our experiments show that staged reconstruction substantially improves reconstruction fidelity, highlighting the importance of task decomposition for executable inverse graphics with general-purpose VLMs. Finally, we showcase various downstream applications enabled by the reconstructed editable Blender scenes.

</details>


<div id='cs.CL'></div>

# cs.CL [[Back]](#toc)

### [300] [DraDDP: A Multimodal Multi-Party Dialogue Discourse Parsing Dataset](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00012)
*Shannan Liu,Peifeng Li,Yaxin Fan,Qiaoming Zhu*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文构建了首个公开的英文多模态多轮对话语篇解析数据集DraDDP（基于美剧），并建立了多模态基准，实验证明多模态信息有助于捕捉对话结构和关系类型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有对话语篇解析研究大多局限于文本模态或两方对话，无法满足多模态和多方的实际场景需求。

Method: 基于美国电视剧构建了包含495个对话片段、6,374条话语和9.1小时并行视频内容的数据集DraDDP，并在此基础上建立多模态基准评估。

Result: 实验结果表明多模态信息在捕捉对话结构和关系类型方面具有价值。

Conclusion: 多模态信息对多方对话语篇解析具有积极作用，数据集和代码将公开以推动后续研究。

Abstract: Multi-party dialogue discourse parsing aims to identify dependency structures and relation types between utterances in conversations. Previous studies are mostly limited to textual modality or two-party dialogue, failing to meet the multimodal and multi-party settings. In this paper, we construct the first publicly available English multimodal dataset DraDDP for multi-party dialogue discourse parsing, based on American TV dramas. DraDDP contains 495 dialogue segments with 6,374 utterances and 9.1 hours of parallel video content, covering rich multi-party interaction scenarios. Moreover, we establish comprehensive benchmarks by evaluating this task on DraDDP and conducting in-depth analysis on the impact of different modalities. Experimental results demonstrate the value of multimodal information in capturing dialogue structures and relation types. We will publicly release the dataset, annotation guidelines, and code to promote future research in multimodal dialogue understanding.

</details>


### [301] [Toward Robust In-Context Learning: Leveraging Out-of-distribution Proxies for Target Inaccessible Demonstration Retrieval](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00014)
*Hao Xu,Rite Bo,Fausto Giunchiglia,Yingji Li,Rui Song*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出DOPA框架，利用OOD代理近似不可访问的目标域，结合马氏距离全局多样性约束，提升LLM在分布外场景的鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM在严重分布偏移下性能下降，且目标域不可访问时难以评估未知分布，影响示范样例质量。

Method: 引入OOD代理近似目标域指导检索，并采用基于马氏距离的全局多样性约束确保检索样例多样性。

Result: 在多个LLM和任务上验证了DOPA有效增强了OOD场景下的鲁棒性。

Conclusion: DOPA框架通过代理近似和多样性约束，有效解决了目标域不可见时的示范检索难题。

Abstract: Although studies have demonstrated that Large Language Models (LLMs) can perform well on Out-of-Distribution (OOD) tasks, their advantage tends to diminish as the distribution shift becomes more severe. Consequently, researchers aim to retrieve distributionally similar and informative demonstrations from the available source domain to boost the inference capabilities of LLMs. However, in practical scenarios where the target domain is inaccessible, evaluating the unknown distribution is challenging, which indirectly impacts the quality of the selected demonstrations. To address this problem, we propose \textbf{DOPA}, a demonstration search framework that incorporates an OOD proxy to approximate the inaccessible target domain and guide the retrieval process. Building on proxy-based evaluation, DOPA further introduces a Mahalanobis distance-based global diversity constraint to ensure sufficient diversity among the retrieved demonstrations. Experimental results on multiple LLMs and tasks demonstrate that DOPA effectively enhances robustness in OOD settings\footnote{https://github.com/bort64/ood\_code}.

</details>


### [302] [AEyeDE: An Attention-Based Attribution Framework for AI-Generated Text Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00016)
*Aria Nourbakhsh,Adelaide Danilov,Christoph Schommer,Salima Lamsiyah*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出AEyeDE方法，利用代理Transformer模型的注意力归因矩阵作为判别信号，通过轻量级CNN学习表征来检测AI生成文本，在多种场景下表现良好且具有可解释性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现代语言模型已接近人类水平流畅度，基于表面统计或似然信号的检测器容易被规避，需要更鲁棒且可解释的检测方法。

Method: 使用白盒代理Transformer模型提取人类和AI生成文本的注意力归因矩阵，再训练轻量级CNN从这些归因图中学习判别表示。

Result: 在编码器-解码器翻译设置中一致优于纯文本基线；在解码器-only设置中，生成器特定检测表现强劲，标准基准上具有竞争力，且对跨数据集迁移和拼写扰动具有鲁棒性。

Conclusion: 注意力归因图提供了互补且可解释的信号用于AI生成文本检测，人类与AI文本在注意力局部结构的相对频率上存在一致差异。

Abstract: Detecting AI-generated text is becoming increasingly challenging as modern language models approach human-level fluency and can evade detectors that rely on surface statistics or likelihood-based signals. We propose \textsc{AEyeDE}, an attribution-driven approach to human-AI authorship detection that leverages model attention as a discriminative signal. Specifically, we extract attention-based attribution matrices for both human- and AI-generated text using a \emph{proxy} Transformer model with white-box access and train a lightweight Convolutional Neural Network to learn representations from these attribution maps. Across encoder-decoder translation settings, our method consistently outperforms a text-only baseline. In decoder-only settings, it performs strongly in generator-specific detection, remains competitive on standard benchmarks, and shows robustness under cross-dataset transfer and alternative-spelling perturbations. We further show that attention maps exhibit recurring local structures whose relative frequencies differ consistently between human- and AI-generated text across datasets and proxy models. These findings suggest that attention-based attribution maps provide a complementary and interpretable signal for AI-generated text detection. We will make the code publicly available to support future research.

</details>


### [303] [CSRP: Chain-of-Thought Reasoning for Chinese Text Correction via Reinforcement Learning with Efficiency-Aware Rewards](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00020)
*Wei Tian,Yuhao Zhou,Man Lan*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出CSRP三阶段框架（持续预训练+思维链SFT+策略优化），在中文语法纠错任务上达SOTA（F0.5=50.99），有效缓解过纠正问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 通用LLM缺乏中文语法领域先验知识，且MLE训练的SFT会导致系统性过纠正，需要专门优化精确度的纠错框架。

Method: 三阶段流水线：1) 590万平衡样本的持续预训练注入领域知识；2) 思维链SFT引入显式错误推理；3) 分组相对策略优化+效率感知奖励函数惩罚不必要编辑。

Result: NACGEC基准：F0.5=50.99, 精确率=57.17，SOTA；CSCD拼写纠错F1=59.61，超GPT-4达5.20点；RL阶段相比SFT基线有8%相对提升。

Conclusion: 显式优化编辑效率对高质量语法纠错至关重要，RL对齐增益与大规模持续预训练贡献正交，验证了框架各阶段的有效性。

Abstract: Large Language Model (LLM) based Chinese Grammatical Error Correction (CGEC) systems face two critical challenges: general-purpose models lack specialized linguistic priors for subtle grammatical distinctions, and Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) with Maximum Likelihood Estimation fails to optimize for precision-focused metrics, leading to systematic over-correction. We propose CSRP, a three-stage framework that progressively builds correction capability through Continual Pre-training (CPT) on 5.9M balanced samples to internalize domain knowledge, Chain-of-Thought SFT with explicit error reasoning for diagnostic transparency, and Group Relative Policy Optimization with a novel Efficiency-Aware Reward that explicitly penalizes unnecessary edits. On the NACGEC benchmark, CSRP achieves state-of-the-art performance with 50.99 $F_{0.5}$ and 57.17 precision, substantially outperforming previous best results while effectively mitigating the over-correction bias inherent in MLE-trained models. Our method also advances CSCD spelling correction to 59.61 F1, surpassing GPT-4 by 5.20 points. Comprehensive ablation studies demonstrate that the RL alignment stage contributes a 8\% relative gain over the SFT baseline, and that this gain is orthogonal to the contribution of large-scale CPT, validating that explicit optimization for edit efficiency is essential for high-quality grammatical error correction. Our code is available at https://github.com/TW-NLP/ChineseErrorCorrector.

</details>


### [304] [SENSE: Semantic Embedding Navigation with Soft-gated Evaluation for Retrieval-based Speculative Decoding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00021)
*Shaowen Chen,Zhicheng Liao,Hongwei Wang*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出SENSE方法，通过语义嵌入和软门控评估改进检索式推测解码，在LLaMA和Qwen系列上实现最高4.09平均接受长度和3.26倍加速。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有检索式推测解码（RSD）因依赖表层词汇匹配（刚性词汇依赖），检索和验证过程对表面形式变化脆弱，限制了其潜力。

Method: 1) 将检索锚定在目标模型的隐藏状态上，建立鲁棒的语义对齐；2) 设计软门控评估模块，验证语义等价性而非表面形式；3) 将现有方法解构为原子原语，构建统一框架进行细粒度组件级比较。

Result: 在LLaMA和Qwen系列模型上，SENSE实现最高4.09平均接受长度和3.26倍加速，优于多个基线，且不损害生成质量。

Conclusion: 基于语义嵌入的检索和软门控语义验证能有效克服刚性词汇依赖问题，显著提升推测解码性能。

Abstract: Speculative Decoding (SD) accelerates Large Language Model (LLM) inference by employing a lightweight draft model to propose candidate tokens, which are verified in parallel by the target model, without compromising generation quality. While Retrieval-based Speculative Decoding (RSD) is favored for its plug-and-play versatility, its potential is impeded by rigid lexical dependencies, rendering both retrieval and verification brittle to surface-level variations. To address this, we propose SENSE (Semantic Embedding Navigation with Soft-gated Evaluation). By anchoring retrieval on the hidden states of the target model, SENSE establishes robust semantic alignment, which empowers the Soft-gated Evaluation module to validate semantic equivalence rather than surface forms. To ensure rigorous benchmarking, we deconstruct existing methods into atomic primitives within a unified framework, facilitating granular, component-level comparison. Extensive experiments across diverse domains demonstrate that SENSE outperforms multiple baselines on the LLaMA and Qwen families, attaining up to 4.09 mean acceptance length and 3.26x speedup, while preserving generation quality. Our code will be released upon publication.

</details>


### [305] [lmfaoooo at SemEval-2026 Task 1: Humor Is an Audience. Preference Modeling for Constrained Humor Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00022)
*Alexey Tikhonov,Alexey Ivanov*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出“先生成大量候选，再通过偏好模型择优”的幽默生成策略，利用人类成对偏好判断训练模型，在SemEval-2026 MWAHAHA任务中取得英/中第一、西语第二的成绩，并开源了2.5K人工偏好数据及中间产物。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 幽默生成面临三大挑战：1) 生成流畅新颖的笑话本身就难；2) “好笑”高度依赖受众、上下文和文化背景；3) 标注一致性差，监督信号噪声大。因此需要一种能学习人类偏好而非绝对幽默分数的生成与筛选方法。

Method: 采用“generate-many -> select-best”两阶段策略。先生成阶段：通过多步提示、模型集成和多样性解码生成大量候选。后选择阶段：利用从人类成对比较中学到的偏好模型（而非绝对评分）对候选进行排序择优。为此收集了2.5K人类成对判断数据，并构建了可解释的偏好学习流程。

Result: 在MWAHAHA任务中，系统在英文和中文子任务中排名第一，西班牙语子任务中排名第二。偏好模型在三个数据集上一致优于基线，并表现出更强的跨域迁移能力。

Conclusion: 学习人类成对偏好比直接学习绝对幽默分数更有效，且该方法具有良好的跨语言和跨域迁移能力。开源的数据和中间产物有助于后续研究。

Abstract: Humor generation remains difficult not only because producing fluent, novel jokes is hard, but because "funny" is audience-dependent and supervision is noisy -- preferences vary with audience, context, and culture, and annotator agreement is often low. In this paper, we describe our system for the SemEval-2026 Task-1 (MWAHAHA), which focuses on humor generation under explicit constraints. The task evaluates submitted systems via human preference judgments in 1-on-1 arena-style comparisons.
  We adopt a "generate-many -> select-best" strategy. First, we generate a diverse pool of candidates per instance using multi-step prompting, model ensembling, and diversity-oriented decoding. Second, we select outputs using a preference model that approximates a "reader" by learning from human comparisons rather than absolute funniness scores. To support this approach, we release 2.5K human pairwise judgments collected through the Humor Arena prototype. We further propose an interpretable pipeline that converts labeled comparisons into a preference model. Across three preference datasets, our models consistently outperform baselines and show stronger cross-domain transfer. Finally, we apply the learned preference model to rank candidates for the MWAHAHA setting and release intermediate artifacts (candidate pools and rankings) to facilitate follow-up work.
  Our system ranked 1st in the English and Chinese subtasks of MWAHAHA and 2nd in the Spanish subtask.

</details>


### [306] [TrustLDM: Benchmarking Trustworthiness in Language Diffusion Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00023)
*Yichuan Mo,Yukun Jiang,Yanbo Shi,Mingjie Li,Michael Backes,Yang Zhang,Yisen Wang*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了TrustLDM，一个针对语言扩散模型（LDMs）的全面可信度基准测试，评估其在安全、隐私和公平性方面的表现。实验发现，LDMs在仅提供用户提示时表现良好，但加入恶意后文后对齐行为显著下降。研究还发现，解码顺序和生成长度会影响评估结果，并提出TrustLDM-Auto框架自动识别脆弱配置，揭示所有模型和维度均存在可信度缺陷。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 语言扩散模型（LDMs）发展迅速，其灵活的解码策略带来了快速解码的优势，但也可能引入新的可信度挑战。目前缺乏专门针对LDMs的可信度评估体系，因此需要系统性地理解和评估其风险。

Method: 构建TrustLDM基准测试，涵盖安全、隐私和公平性多个维度，对多种LDM架构进行静态后文分类评估。同时提出TrustLDM-Auto自动评估框架，利用LDM解码灵活性系统性地识别脆弱配置。

Result: LDMs在仅使用用户提示时表现出较强的可信度，但加入恶意后文后对齐行为明显下降。较长的上下文并不一定带来更强的影响，解码顺序和生成长度均影响评估结果。TrustLDM-Auto揭示了所有模型和维度均存在显著的可信度弱点。

Conclusion: 本文的工作有助于社区构建更可信赖的语言扩散模型，代码已开源。

Abstract: The rapid development of Language Diffusion Models (LDMs) challenges the dominant position of auto-regressive competitors in language processing. However, their flexible, any-order decoding strategies not only enable fast decoding speed but also potentially bring new trustworthiness challenges. To better understand the risks behind their pipelines, we introduce a comprehensive trustworthiness benchmark tailored to LDMs (TrustLDM), evaluating safety, privacy, and fairness across different LDM architectures with multiple categories of static post contexts. Our empirical results show that although LDMs generally exhibit strong trustworthiness with only the user prompts, their alignment behavior degrades noticeably when the malicious post contexts are attached to the masked responses. We further observe that longer contexts do not necessarily induce stronger effects, and both decoding order and generation length affect the evaluation outcomes. Finally, we propose TrustLDM-Auto, an automatic evaluation framework that leverages LDM decoding flexibility to systematically identify vulnerable configurations, revealing substantial trustworthiness weaknesses across all evaluated models and dimensions. Our work may potentially help the community build more trustworthy LDMs. Our code is available at https://github.com/PKU-ML/TrustLDM.

</details>


### [307] [ART: Attention Run-time Termination for Efficient Large Language Model Decoding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00024)
*Chen Qiu,Guozhong Li,Panos Kalnis*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: ART是一个轻量级运行时机制，在核执行期间跟踪累积的注意力输出，一旦后续贡献变得可忽略就终止KV块访问，从而在不显著影响准确性的情况下提高LLM长文本解码的生成吞吐量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 长文本解码中，LLM受限于获取KV缓存所需的内存带宽。现有方法在解码前仅进行键剪枝，忽略了注意力输出依赖于键和值的联合关系，且纳入值会带来不可接受的额外开销。

Method: 提出注意力运行时终止（ART），在核执行期间跟踪累积的注意力输出，当后续贡献变得可忽略时，终止后续KV块的访问。ART与现有基于键的KV缓存管理方法正交，可无缝集成。

Result: 在LongBench基准测试上，ART在大批量时比最先进基线方法生成吞吐量提高20%，同时保持相当的准确性。

Conclusion: ART通过运行时终止机制有效缓解了长文本解码中的内存带宽瓶颈，且能兼容现有KV缓存管理方法。

Abstract: Long-context decoding in Large Language Models (LLMs) is severely constrained by the memory bandwidth required to fetch the extensive Key-Value (KV) cache. Most existing KV management methods rely on key-only pruning before decoding, despite the evidence that attention outputs depend jointly on keys and values, as incorporating values in their methods incurs prohibitive additional overhead. In this paper, we propose Attention Run-time Termination (ART), a lightweight run-time mechanism that tracks accumulated attention outputs during kernel execution and terminates subsequent KV block accesses once further contributions become negligible. This design makes ART orthogonal to existing key-based KV cache management methods, enabling seamless integration with them. Experiments on LongBench benchmarks show that ART achieves 20% higher generation throughput in large batch size than state-of-the-art baseline while maintaining comparable accuracy.

</details>


### [308] [Cognitive-Linguistic Indicators of Depression in Online Communities: Analysed by DistilBERT and Holographic Reduced Representation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00026)
*Brian Van Steen*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本研究结合认知语言学特征与Transformer嵌入（DistilBERT + HRR），在Reddit抑郁症检测任务中实现宏F1达0.94，显著优于传统TF-IDF基线（0.80）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索将Beck认知理论指导的语言学特征（如第一人称代词密度、绝对化词汇、负面情绪）与深度Transformer嵌入结合，是否能提升自动化抑郁症检测的性能。

Method: 从Reddit帖子中提取认知扭曲特征，构建两种分类管线：(1) TF-IDF嵌入+朴素贝叶斯基线；(2) 混合模型：DistilBERT句子嵌入与Holographic Reduced Representation (HRR)编码的认知语言学特征拼接，最终使用逻辑回归分类。

Result: 混合DistilBERT-HRR模型宏F1达0.94（基线0.80）；5折交叉验证F1从0.83提升至0.92，AUC从0.958提升至0.981。

Conclusion: 将认知语言学特征与Transformer嵌入相结合能显著提升抑郁症检测的准确性，验证了理论驱动的特征工程与深度学习表示融合的有效性。

Abstract: This paper investigates whether combining cognitively grounded linguistic features with transformer-based embeddings improves automated detection of depression in online text. Using Beck's Cognitive Theory of Depression, the study extracts cognitive distortions as measurable features, including first-person pronoun density, absolutist words, and negative emotion in Reddit posts from depression-related and control communities. Using a subset of the Kaggle Reddit Suicide and Depression Detection dataset, two classification pipelines are compared, a TF-IDF embedding with Naive Bayes as a baseline, and a hybrid model that concatenates DistilBERT sentence embeddings with Holographic Reduced Representation (HRR) vectors encoding the cognitive-linguistic features, followed by Logistic Regression. The hybrid DistilBERT HRR model achieves a macro F1 score of 0.94 versus 0.80 for the TD-IDF baseline, with 5-fold cross validation F1 improving from 0.83 to 0.92, and AUC from 0.958 to 0.981.

</details>


### [309] [A Multi-Domain Red Teaming Framework for Safety, Robustness, and Fairness Evaluation of Medical Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00027)
*Andrei Marian Feier,Veysel Kocaman,Yigit Gul,Ahmet Korkmaz,Alexander Thomas,Aleksei Zakharov,Jay Gil,Mehmet Butgul,David Talby*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 该研究开发了一个多领域红队框架，评估了11个LLM在690个临床场景下的表现，发现平均准确率掩盖了关键的安全风险，尤其是在公平性任务和极端失败案例中，并提出了混合评估方法的重要性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基准无法捕捉LLM在临床实践中常见的对抗性或伦理复杂条件下的行为，亟需更全面的安全评估方法。

Method: 开发多领域红队框架，涵盖9个领域150+子类共690个临床场景，采用对抗变换、七维度评分、LLM辅助评分与人工验证相结合的评估方式。

Result: 模型平均得分范围0.791-0.984，高分系统在个别安全关键场景出现完全失败；公平性任务在人口统计学修改后错误率上升10-20%；人工评审发现了自动化评估遗漏的临床相关失败。

Conclusion: 性能方差和最坏情况失败比平均准确率更能反映临床可靠性，结合自动化与临床医生监督的混合评估是可信安全评估的必要条件。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed across healthcare, yet existing benchmarks fail to capture model behavior under adversarial or ethically complex conditions common in clinical practice. We developed a multi-domain red teaming framework evaluating eleven contemporary LLMs across 690 clinically grounded scenarios spanning nine domains and over 150 subcategories. Scenarios incorporated adversarial transformations, and responses were assessed using a seven-dimension rubric with LLM-assisted scoring and human-in-the-loop validation. Results revealed substantial performance variance, with mean scores ranging from 0.791 to 0.984. Critically, several high-performing systems produced complete failures in individual safety-critical scenarios, demonstrating that aggregate accuracy masks clinically meaningful risk. The highest-performing systems (X-BAI, GPT-5, Claude Opus 4.1) achieved scores above 0.97 with low variance, while performance varied significantly across domains. Equity-related tasks showed 10-20% error amplification with demographic modifications, and human reviewers identified clinically relevant failures missed by automated evaluation. Our findings demonstrate that performance variance and worst-case failures provide more clinically meaningful reliability indicators than mean accuracy alone, and that hybrid evaluation approaches combining automation with clinician oversight are essential for credible safety assessment.

</details>


### [310] [TCAR-Gen: Temporal Graph Retrieval with Evidence Fusion for Knowledge-Grounded Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00029)
*Sidra Nasir,Muhammad Noman Zahid,Rizwan Ahmed Khan*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出TCAR-Gen框架，通过图神经网络、时间融合和链树推理提升历史刑事案件问答中的时序推理和多证据融合能力，在Recall@5上达到0.3738，优于多种基线方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有RAG系统在处理历史刑事案件复杂问题时，存在时序推理能力不足和多证据源无法连贯融合的问题。

Method: 结合查询条件图神经网络、时序证据融合和链树推理，构建TCAR-Gen框架进行证据驱动的答案生成。

Result: 在Victorian Crime Diaries基准上Recall@5达0.3738，超越多个基线；消融实验证实上下文图、时序惩罚和查询条件等组件关键。

Conclusion: 显式时序建模与多分支证据融合对知识密集型场景下的忠实推理问答至关重要。

Abstract: Retrieval-augmented generation systems struggle with temporal reasoning and evidence fusion when answering complex questions over historical criminal case narratives. Existing approaches either retrieve independently of query semantics or fail to integrate multiple evidence sources coherently. We propose Temporal Context Augmented Retrieval Generation (TCAR-Gen), a framework that combines query-conditioned graph neural networks, temporal evidence fusion, and chain-of-trees reasoning to ground answer generation in retrieved evidence. On the Victorian Crime Diaries benchmark, TCAR-Gen achieves 0.3738 Recall@5, outperforming Vanilla RAG, Temporal RAG, GraphRAG-C, and GraphRAG-T across seven query types including multi-hop reasoning and counterfactual questions. Ablation studies reveal that the context graph, temporal penalty mechanism, and query conditioning are critical components. Cross-model evaluation across five language model (GPT-OSS 20B to TinyLlama 1.1B) demonstrates that TCAR-Gen maintains robust retrieval coverage at smaller model scales, though generation quality degrades substantially with reduced model capacity. Our work shows that explicit temporal modelling and multi-branch evidence fusion are essential for faithful, reasoning-intensive question answering over knowledge-grounded corpora.

</details>


### [311] [LLMs for Cardiovascular Risk Prediction from Structured Clinical Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00031)
*Jeba Maliha,Md Rafiul Kabir*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种混合框架，将结构化临床数据与LLM生成的自然语言叙述相结合用于冠心病预测。传统机器学习（随机森林）在准确率上最优，但LLM方法在隐私保护方面具有优势，可避免暴露敏感数值数据。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 冠心病是全球主要死因之一，需要可靠的预测系统支持早期诊断。传统ML模型在结构化数据上表现良好，但LLM能解释自然语言中的医学信息，且可能提供更好的隐私保护。

Method: 使用1190名患者、11个临床属性的公开数据集。将结构化变量转为可解释特征表示并生成合成临床叙述，通过反向提取验证一致性（平均保真度94.61%）。对比四种传统ML模型与LLM（GPT、Gemini）在零样本和少样本设置下的分类性能。

Result: 随机森林达到最高准确率。LLM虽准确率不如RF，但可直接处理自然语言患者描述，避免暴露敏感数值数据（如化验值、血压、诊断代码），在真实临床场景中仍有价值。

Conclusion: 结构化数据与LLM生成叙述相结合可为混合临床预测系统开辟新方向，兼顾预测性能与数据隐私保护。

Abstract: Coronary artery disease (CAD) remains one of the leading causes of death globally, highlighting the need for reliable predictive systems to support early diagnosis and risk assessment. While traditional machine learning models perform well on structured clinical data, large language models (LLMs) present new possibilities to interpret medical information expressed in natural language. In this work, we develop a hybrid framework that bridges structured clinical data and natural-language representations for CAD prediction. Using a publicly available dataset of 1,190 patient records with 11 clinical attributes, structured variables are converted into interpretable feature representations and synthetic clinical narratives using LLMs. A validation pipeline performs reverse extraction of clinical variables and computes a consistency score with the original records, achieving an average fidelity of 94.61%. We then evaluate four conventional machine learning models and compare their performance with LLM-based classification under zero-shot and few-shot prompting settings. We use two LLMs here, GPT and Gemini. Experimental results show that Random Forest achieves the highest accuracy. Despite this advantage, LLM-based classification remains beneficial in real-world clinical settings. This is because LLMs operate directly on natural language patient descriptions, meaning that sensitive numerical patient data such as exact lab values, blood pressure readings, and diagnostic codes are kept private. Findings suggest that combining structured clinical data with LLM-generated narratives can enable new directions for hybrid clinical prediction systems.

</details>


### [312] [Graph-Augmented Retrieval for Cross-Entity Financial Sentiment Analysis: A Comparative Study](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00062)
*Rajan Bastakoti,Sagar Bhetwal,Nirajan Acharya,Gaurav Kumar Gupta*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种两跳图检索增强生成(Graph-RAG)架构，在跨实体金融情感分析任务中，相比传统向量RAG，实体召回率提升6.4%，复杂多实体查询的答案相关性提升11.7%，且延迟仅增加22.6%，方差降低80%。同时通过消融实验发现图遍历强度阈值与答案质量呈倒U型关系，最优阈值为0.5。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统基于向量的RAG系统无法有效捕捉金融市场中结构化的多实体关系，限制了其在跨实体金融情感分析中的表现。

Method: 构建了一个覆盖10只科技大盘股、59个股票实体的情感加权知识图谱（基于255篇新闻文章），在密集检索基础上增加强度过滤的图遍历（INFLUENCES边），形成两跳Graph-RAG架构。通过语义相似度、实体召回率、RAGAS指标、延迟基准和消融实验进行对比评估。

Result: Graph-RAG在实体召回率上显著提升6.4%（p<0.001），复杂多实体查询答案相关性提升11.7%（关联性问题+16.1%），答案质量几乎无损失（语义相似度delta=+0.001），平均延迟增加22.6%但方差降低80%。最优图遍历强度阈值tau=0.5。

Conclusion: 图增强检索存在精度-覆盖率的权衡关系，两跳Graph-RAG在不牺牲答案质量的前提下显著改善了多实体金融分析中的关系推理能力，为构建金融领域RAG系统提供了可操作的架构指导。

Abstract: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) has become foundational for grounding large language models in domain-specific corpora, yet conventional vector-based RAG systems are fundamentally limited in their ability to capture the structured, multi-entity relationships that underpin financial market analysis. This paper presents a comprehensive comparative study of a novel two-hop Graph-RAG architecture versus a standard vector-only baseline for cross-entity financial sentiment analysis. Our system constructs a sentiment-weighted knowledge graph of 59 equity entities from 255 news articles covering 10 major technology stocks, then augments dense retrieval with intensity-filtered graph traversal over INFLUENCES edges to surface relational evidence inaccessible to vector search alone.
  We evaluate both architectures on 100 grounded queries (30 Direct, 70 Relational) using semantic similarity, entity recall, RAGAS metrics, latency benchmarks, and ablation studies. Graph-RAG achieves a statistically significant improvement in entity recall (+6.4%, p < 0.001, Wilcoxon signed-rank) and delivers substantially more relevant answers for complex multi-entity queries (+11.7% Answer Relevancy), with gains concentrating in relational question types (+16.1%). Critically, these improvements come at no measurable cost to answer quality (delta = +0.001 semantic similarity, Cohen's d = 0.078), with a modest 22.6% increase in mean latency offset by an 80% reduction in latency variance.
  An ablation study on the graph traversal intensity threshold reveals an inverted-U relationship with answer quality, identifying tau = 0.5 as optimal over the production default of tau = 0.7. These findings characterize a precision-for-coverage trade-off inherent to graph-augmented retrieval and provide actionable architectural guidance for practitioners building RAG systems for multi-entity financial analysis.

</details>


### [313] [DLLM-JEPA: Joint Embedding Predictive Architectures for Masked Diffusion Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00091)
*Sangdae Nam*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: DLLM-JEPA将JEPA与掩码扩散语言模型结合，消除了LLM-JEPA需要显式多视图数据和两次梯度前向传播的代价，训练FLOPs降低33%，在多个任务上取得显著提升，并展现出"双重优势"特性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM-JEPA虽然将JEPA引入自回归语言模型，但存在两个关键缺陷：(1)需要显式的多视图数据（如文本-代码对），获取成本高；(2)每次训练需两次携带梯度的前向传播，计算开销大。作者旨在同时消除这两项成本。

Method: 提出DLLM-JEPA，将JEPA与掩码扩散语言模型配对。利用扩散模型的双向注意力机制，通过不同的掩码率从同一输入中生成两个语义不同的视图，无需显式数据对；同时只需一次梯度前向传播，相比LLM-JEPA降低33%训练FLOPs。

Result: 在LLaDA-8B和Dream-7B上，GSM8K分别提升+18.7pp和+11.4pp；Spider、NL-RX-SYNTH、Django等任务均有一致正向提升。LLaDA-8B在Wide-t配置下同时提升GSM8K（+1.8pp）、降低Wikitext损失、保持MMLU精度，展现了"双重优势"特性。

Conclusion: DLLM-JEPA有效解决了LLM-JEPA的两大成本问题，在多项任务上超越扩散模型微调基线。层探分析揭示了"几何-功能漂移解耦"机制：微调后的骨干网络虽离预训练权重更远，但在Wikitext上遗忘更少，该现象集中在中间Transformer层，且在Dream-7B上同样存在，说明具有通用性。

Abstract: Joint Embedding Predictive Architectures (JEPAs) have reshaped self-supervised representation learning in vision. The recent LLM-JEPA ported JEPA to autoregressive language models but inherited two steep costs from the causal-attention substrate: it demands explicit multi-view data (e.g., text-code pairs), and it requires two gradient-carrying forward passes per step. We introduce DLLM-JEPA, which pairs JEPA with masked-diffusion language models to eliminate both costs at once. The bidirectional attention of diffusion models yields two semantically distinct views of the same input via different masking rates -- no explicit pairs needed -- and supports a single gradient-carrying forward pass, cutting training FLOPs by 33% relative to LLM-JEPA. DLLM-JEPA improves over diffusion-only fine-tuning in every (task, architecture) combination we evaluate: up to +18.7 pp on LLaDA-8B GSM8K and +11.4 pp on Dream-7B GSM8K, with consistent positive gains on Spider, NL-RX-SYNTH, and Django. Beyond accuracy, DLLM-JEPA exhibits a dual-win property: on LLaDA-8B with the Wide-t configuration, it simultaneously raises GSM8K accuracy (67.1 vs. 65.2, +1.8 pp), drives held-out Wikitext loss below the pre-trained base, and preserves MMLU accuracy at base level across three fine-tuning seeds -- whereas an L2-to-base parameter anchor matches baseline accuracy with no task gain. Layer-wise probing reveals the mechanism: a geometric-functional drift dissociation in which the fine-tuned backbone moves further from the pre-trained weights than the baseline yet forgets less on held-out Wikitext, with the amplification concentrated in middle transformer layers. The pattern appears on Dream-7B as well, indicating the phenomenon is not specific to a single backbone.

</details>


### [314] [Agreement Metrics for LLM-as-Judge Evaluation: What to Report and Why](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00093)
*Delip Rao,Chris Callison-Burch*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文批判了当前LLM-as-judge评估中指标冗余、选择随意且缺乏透明度的现象。指出在二元标准下，多数常用指标（Pearson r、Spearman ρ、Kendall τ_b、φ系数、MCC）完全等价，只有Cohen's κ能提供额外信息。同时分析了弃权处理的三种方式及其影响，并提出了一套标准化的报告清单。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM作为裁判的验证研究中，指标选择与判断尺度、弃权处理、平局处理等问题纠缠不清，且这些选择极少被明确说明。作者希望厘清这些混淆，揭示指标间的冗余关系，并提供清晰的报告规范。

Method: 对24篇近期LLM-as-judge论文进行调研，从形式化角度分析不同统计指标在二元标准下的数学关系（等价性/差异性），以及弃权处理的三种方式对指标的影响。

Result: 1) 二元标准下，Pearson r、Spearman ρ、Kendall τ_b、φ系数、MCC全部退化为同一个数值；2) Cohen's κ与φ共享分子但归一化方式不同，两者差值度量裁判正类率偏离人类正类率的程度；3) 三种弃权处理方式（忽略、映射为失败、独立类别）不可互换，会破坏二元等价关系；4) 多裁判场景（Fleiss' κ、Krippendorff's α）存在类似的等价关系。

Conclusion: 研究提出了一个标准化报告清单，要求明确说明判断尺度、弃权/平局处理方式、覆盖率、混淆矩阵以及聚合层级，以提高LLM裁判评估的透明度和可重复性。

Abstract: Validating an LLM judge against human annotations usually means reporting several agreement statistics: accuracy, precision, recall, $F_1$, Cohen's $κ$, and one or more rank correlations. A survey of 24 recent LLM-as-judge papers finds metric choice entangled with the judgment scale, tie handling, invalid outputs, and abstention handling, and those choices rarely stated. For binary criteria -- the common case in rubric-based evaluation, where each criterion is graded MET or UNMET -- most of the reported numbers are redundant: Pearson's $r$, Spearman's $ρ$, Kendall's $τ_b$, the phi coefficient $φ$, and the Matthews Correlation Coefficient all reduce to a single number on non-degenerate binary data, so reporting several of them only creates an illusion of corroborating evidence. Cohen's $κ$ is the one agreement coefficient that adds information: it shares $φ$'s numerator but normalizes differently, and the gap between them measures how far the judge's positive-label rate has drifted from the human's. We then trace what changes when a judge may abstain with a CANNOT_ASSESS verdict: the three common ways of handling abstentions are not interchangeable preprocessing choices but answer different questions, and they break the binary equivalences. The same equivalences reappear, up to a negligible finite-sample correction, for multi-judge ensembles scored with Fleiss' $κ$ or Krippendorff's $α$. We close with a reporting checklist that names the judgment scale, the abstention and tie handling mode, coverage, the confusion matrix, and the aggregation level alongside any scalar agreement coefficient.

</details>


### [315] [Enhancing BiGRU with a KAN Block for Legal Document Classification and Summarization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00116)
*Ahmed Faizul Haque Dhrubo,Souvik Pramanik,Most. Aysha Siddika Sumona,Shahnewaz Siddique,Mohammad Ashrafuzzaman Khan,Mohammad Abdul Qayum,Mohsin Sajjad*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于KAN和BiGRU的混合架构，用于低资源多语言法律文档的分类与摘要任务，在孟加拉语、英语及转写孟加拉语数据集上，分类准确率达67.96%，摘要ROUGE-L F1为0.31，消融实验表明KAN模块提升了约10%的分类性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 法律文档处理面临领域语言复杂、多语言混合、上下文长依赖及类别不平衡等挑战，尤其在低资源场景下缺乏有效解决方案。

Method: 分类任务采用BiGRU+KAN模块；摘要任务采用注意力GRU+KAN模型头；数据集包含孟加拉语、英语和转写孟加拉语的法律文本。

Result: 分类准确率67.96%，F1 0.65；摘要ROUGE-1/2/L F1分别为0.38/0.23/0.31；消融实验显示KAN使分类准确率从57.34%提升至67.96%。

Conclusion: KAN模块显著提升了BiGRU在法律文档分类上的性能，所提方法在低资源多语言场景下有较好表现，但仍需进一步改进。

Abstract: This study introduces a novel architecture of KAN-based BiGRU model for the task of classification and summarization of legal documents in a low-resource multilingual setup. In order to tackle problems associated with domain language, the usage of different languages, long dependencies within context, and class imbalance, we employ the dataset composed of legal documents from Bangladesh and taken from Manupatra, which include Bengali, English, and transliterated Bengali languages. Our classification task involves BiGRU model, along with Kolmogorov-Arnold Network (KAN) module, while the summarization part utilizes attention-based GRU, combined with a KAN model head. Classification model yields 67.96% of accuracy and 0.65 F1 score; while ROUGE-1, ROUGE-2, and ROUGE-L measures for summarization yield 0.38, 0.23, and 0.31 F1 scores, correspondingly. Ablation study shows that the use of KAN increases classification accuracy from 57.34% to 67.96%. Moreover, our proposed technique is compared to several baselines, including classical ML algorithms and pretrained language models.

</details>


### [316] [RealityTest: How People Probe AI Identity and Whether Models Disclose It](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00168)
*Anna Gausen,Sarenne Wallbridge,Bessie O'Dell,Christopher Summerfield,Hannah Rose Kirk*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出RealityTest基准，首次大规模多模态多语言评估AI系统是否在对话中披露其AI身份。基于49国约750名参与者的真实人类数据，构建了3152个身份探测查询。测试17种文本和6种语音模型发现，仅31%的人会直接询问身份，而一次抑制指令就能将披露率降至30%以下。问题措辞和对话背景比模型本身更影响披露行为。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有AI身份披露评估存在三大局限：仅限英语、基于机器生成问题、仅限文本。这导致评估结果无法反映真实部署场景中AI系统的表现，存在安全隐患。

Method: 从49个国家约750名参与者收集真实人类对AI身份的提问数据，构建包含3152个查询的多模态多语言数据集（文本+语音），覆盖5种语言。基于此数据集对17个文本模型和6个语音模型进行系统测试。

Result: 1）仅31%的人在模糊场景下会直接询问身份；2）人类提出的问题远比机器生成的多样化；3）不同模型间披露行为差异显著；4）单次抑制指令即可将披露率降至30%以下；5）问题措辞和对话背景比模型身份对披露行为的影响更大。

Conclusion: 基于狭窄或合成查询集的安全评估可能错误描述模型在真实部署场景中的行为。构建多样化、基于人类数据的评估数据对准确评测AI系统安全性至关重要。

Abstract: AI systems are increasingly deployed in conversational settings where users may be uncertain whether they are speaking with a human or an AI. Despite mounting regulatory attention to this known safety risk, existing evaluations of AI disclosure are typically English-only, based on machine-generated questions, and restricted to text. We present RealityTest to comprehensively test whether AI systems disclose their identity when asked. The benchmark is the first large-scale multimodal and multilingual evaluation, grounded in human data on how people actually encounter and question AI identity in the real-world. Alongside the benchmark, we release the underlying dataset of 3,152 identity-probing queries collected from ~750 participants across 49 countries and five languages, in text and speech scenarios. We find that only 31% of people ask about identity directly in ambiguous scenarios, and that the questions people ask are far more diverse than machine-generated queries. We test 17 text and 6 speech models, and find substantial variation in disclosure behaviour. However, a single suppression instruction reduces disclosure rates to below 30%, even in the best-performing models. Validating our investment in diverse, human-grounded evaluation data, we find that how the question is phrased and the context of the conversation matter more for disclosure than which model is being tested. Safety evaluations built on narrow or synthetic query sets risk mischaracterising how models behave in realistic deployment settings.

</details>


### [317] [BOUTEF: A Multilingual Corpus for FakeNews in North Africa -- Language as a Weapon](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00193)
*Kamel Smaili,Yassine Toughrai,Amina Laggoun,David Langlois*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文构建了面向阿尔及利亚和突尼斯的多语言假新闻语料库BOUTEF，包含假叙事、真叙事和用户评论三个组件，覆盖多种语言和方言变体。通过定性与定量分析，发现假新闻依赖情绪化叙事、耸人听闻的框架和混合语言实践来增强传播力，而辟谣内容则更注重事实和验证导向。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 社交媒体上假新闻的快速传播已成为重大挑战，尤其是在多语言和资源匮乏的北非地区。现有研究缺乏针对该地区的大规模、多语种假新闻数据集，因此作者构建BOUTEF语料库来填补这一空白。

Method: 构建了包含假新闻、真实新闻和用户评论的三组件语料库，覆盖MSA、阿尔及利亚/突尼斯方言、Arabizi、法语、英语及代码转换语言。采用定量（统计分析主题分布、情感模式、参与度动态）和定性方法进行综合实证分析。

Result: 假新闻依赖情绪化叙事和耸人听闻框架；辟谣内容更侧重事实验证；主题类别与消息真实性之间存在显著关联；用户参与度与假新闻可见度强相关；阿尔及利亚和突尼斯既有共享动态也有国情差异；非正式语言实践在错误信息传播中发挥重要作用。

Conclusion: 通过提供大规模、标注完善且公开可用的数据集，推进了假新闻检测、低资源语言处理以及复杂语言环境中信息紊乱研究的进展。

Abstract: The rapid spread of fake news on social media has become a major challenge, particularly in multilingual and under-resourced contexts such as North Africa. In this paper, we introduce BOUTEF, a large-scale multilingual corpus designed to study the propagation, characteristics, and impact of fake news in Algeria and Tunisia. The corpus integrates three complementary components: fake narratives, genuine narratives, and associated user-generated comments, along with verified debunking information. It covers a wide range of languages and linguistic varieties, including MSA, Algerian and Tunisian dialects, Arabizi, French, English, and code-switched language. Building on this resource, we conduct a comprehensive empirical analysis combining quantitative and qualitative approaches. We examine thematic distributions, linguistic and rhetorical strategies, sentiment patterns, and social engagement dynamics. Statistical analyses reveal significant associations between thematic categories and message veracity, as well as strong correlations between user engagement and the visibility of fake content. Our findings show that fake news relies heavily on emotionally charged narratives, sensational framing, and hybrid linguistic practices that enhance virality and audience engagement. In contrast, debunking content adopts a more factual and verification-oriented style. Furthermore, a comparative analysis between Algeria and Tunisia highlights both shared dynamics and country-specific characteristics shaped by sociopolitical contexts. The results emphasize the role of informal language practices in the diffusion and reception of misinformation. By providing a rich, annotated, and publicly available dataset, this work contributes to advancing research on fake news detection, low-resource language processing, and the understanding of information disorders in complex linguistic environments.

</details>


### [318] [DeSQ: Decomposition-based SPARQL Query Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00203)
*Papa Abdou Karim Karou Diallo,Aditya Sharma,Neshat Elhami Fard,Amal Zouaq*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出DeSQ框架，通过将复杂问题分解为原子约束，生成SPARQL片段并组装为完整查询，在5个基准测试中的4个上达到SOTA，同时消除了对实时知识图谱端点的依赖，并支持细粒度错误分析。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有KBQA方法存在两类缺陷：形式化查询生成方法脆弱且可解释性差，直接答案检索方法计算成本高且易产生幻觉。为结合两者优势并克服各自缺点，提出DeSQ框架。

Method: DeSQ包含三个阶段：(1) 将复杂问题分解为原子约束（ACs）；(2) 生成结构化输出，包括每个AC对应的SPARQL片段（使用标准化变量和URI占位符）以及URI接地块；(3) 将这些片段组装成完整的SPARQL查询。

Result: 在五个主要基准测试中的四个上超越了现有最先进方法，并展现出对词汇变化的强大鲁棒性。

Conclusion: DeSQ框架不仅提升了性能，还通过消除对实时KB端点的需求简化了评估过程，其结构化输出支持细粒度错误分析，有助于进行更精准的改进干预。

Abstract: Dominant approaches to Knowledge Base Question Answering (KBQA) fall into two categories. First is the generation of a formal query that suffers from brittleness and limited explainability, and the second is direct answer retrieval through KB exploration that is computationally costly and prone to hallucination. To combine the strengths of both paradigms while mitigating their respective weaknesses, we introduce DeSQ (Decomposition-based SPARQL Query Generation), a KB-agnostic framework that operates in three stages. First, it decomposes complex questions into Atomic Constraints (ACs) that mirror the relational structure of the underlying KB. Second, it generates a two-part structured output: (a) Mapping of each AC to its corresponding SPARQL Fragment, using standardized variable and URIs placeholders, and (b) URIs Grounding block describing each placeholder. Third, it assembles these fragments into a complete SPARQL query. DeSQ surpasses state-of-the-art approaches on four out of five major benchmarks and demonstrates superior robustness to lexical variation. Beyond performance gains, our framework greatly simplifies evaluation by eliminating the need for a live KB endpoint, and its structured output enables fine-grained error analysis, allowing more targeted interventions for improvement.

</details>


### [319] [Effects of Varying LLM Access on Essay Writing Behavior](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00250)
*Julia Christenson,Karin de Langis,Shirley Anugrah Hayati,Dongyeop Kang*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本研究通过24名大学生的写作实验发现，限制性使用LLM（最多3次提示，每次回应不超过100字）比无限制使用更能保持学生的作者身份认同感，同时不影响写作质量；无限制组虽然写作时间更长，但感知到的创意表达和所有权显著降低。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究不同水平的LLM辅助如何影响大学教学中的写作表现、参与度和作者身份感知，以制定既能利用AI辅助又不损害学生学习成果的整合策略。

Method: 24名大学生被随机分配到三组：无LLM访问组、有限访问组（最多3次提示，回应不超过100字）、无限访问组，完成一篇短论文写作，比较写作质量、行为模式和作者身份感知。

Result: 三组间论文整体质量无统计显著差异；但有限访问组62.5%愿意将论文作为独立作业提交（无限组仅25%），更注重策略性、修订导向的提示使用；无限组写作时间更长，产出更接近LLM输出，创意表达感知降低。

Conclusion: 限制（而非禁止）LLM访问可能在保留AI辅助的脚手架作用的同时，维持学生的作者身份自信，建议采用适度约束的使用策略而非完全禁止或完全开放。

Abstract: Investigating the degree to which large language models (LLMs) affect teaching and learning in universities can help identify strategies for integrating LLMs in a way that supports, rather than undermines, student learning outcomes. This study examined how varying levels of LLM assistance affect writing performance, engagement, and perceived authorship. We report a pilot study in which 24 college students were randomly assigned to write a short essay with no LLM access, limited access (<=3 prompts, responses capped at 100 words), or unlimited access. Overall essay quality was statistically indistinguishable across groups. Yet writing behavior and perceived authorship diverged sharply: students with limited access reported higher ownership (62.5% would submit the essay as independent work, vs. 25% in the unlimited group), stronger organizational gains, and more strategic, revision-focused prompting. The unlimited group spent more time writing, produced essays more similar to LLM output, and reported reduced creative expression. Our findings suggest that constraining, rather than banning, LLM access may preserve authorship confidence while retaining the scaffolding benefits of AI assistance.

</details>


### [320] [Parameter Alignment Mitigates Catastrophic Forgetting in Multilingual Expert Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00284)
*Sanchit Ahuja,Terra Blevins*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文针对多语言持续预训练中的灾难性遗忘问题，提出五种层感知参数对齐策略（硬冻结、软正则化、事后权重回退、模型融合），在32种语言基准上验证了这些策略能有效减少遗忘，并给出了不同策略对下游任务的适用性指导。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多语言持续预训练中，朴素微调会导致灾难性遗忘，损害已获取的语言能力和通用知识，现有基于语言族群的训练方式无法彻底解决这一问题。

Method: 提出五种层感知参数对齐策略：硬冻结层、软正则化、事后权重回退、模型融合，并与无正则化的持续预训练基线进行系统比较。

Result: 参数对齐显著减少遗忘；层冻结和正则化最保护理解能力，事后回退在翻译上增益最强。

Conclusion: 参数对齐策略能在最小化语言获取成本的前提下有效缓解遗忘，研究绘制了语言获取-遗忘前沿曲线，并为不同任务提供了策略部署指南。

Abstract: While continual pretraining~(CPT) is a practical way to extend large language models to new languages, naïve finetuning on targeted data erodes existing capabilities through catastrophic forgetting. Organizing training around language families reduces cross-language interference but cannot alone prevent forgetting of the general knowledge needed for downstream tasks. We link this forgetting to parameter drift in multilingual CPT and present a suite of five layer-aware parameter alignment strategies: hard layer freezing, soft regularization, post-hoc weight reversion, and model merging. We systematically compare our alignment strategies against two unregularized CPT baselines on benchmarks spanning 32 training languages from five language families, plus held-out languages, across four evaluation axes: perplexity, reading comprehension, physical reasoning, and translation. Parameter alignment substantially reduces forgetting at minimal cost to language acquisition: layer freezing and regularization best preserve comprehension, whereas post-hoc reversion yields the strongest translation gains. Together, these results map the acquisition--forgetting frontier for family-expert CPT and offer practical deployment guidelines pairing each strategy to the tasks it best serves.

</details>


### [321] [Model-Based Quality Assessment for Massively Multilingual Parallel Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00285)
*Abdelaziz M. A. Ibrahim,Zihao Li,Jörg Tiedemann,Shaoxiong Ji*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文研究了大规模多语言平行语料中的两个问题：非平行句对和低质量翻译。通过将评估分解为平行性评估（多语言嵌入）和质量估计（无参考评估器），发现没有模型在所有翻译方向上普遍可靠，并提出应将其视为方向感知的路由和校准问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大规模多语言平行语料中普遍存在非平行句对和低质量翻译两个问题，亟需有效的自动化评估方法。

Method: 将评估分解为两个独立组件：1）基于多语言嵌入的平行性评估（在FLORES-200和BOUQuET上对4个嵌入模型进行基准测试，覆盖6,654个方向）；2）无参考质量估计（在FLORES-200专业翻译上评估9个评估器，覆盖41,412个方向）。

Result: 没有模型在所有翻译方向上普遍可靠；简单集成会稀释强模型信号；目标语言覆盖范围与高质量估计分数显著相关。

Conclusion: 多语言平行数据评估应被视为方向感知的路由和校准问题，不存在适用于所有语言的通用指标。

Abstract: Large-scale multilingual bitext often contains two distinct problems: non-parallel sentence pairs and low-quality translations. We decompose model-based assessment for such data into two independent components: parallelism assessment with multilingual embeddings and reference-free quality estimation (QE). For parallelism, we benchmark four embedding models on FLORES-200 and BOUQuET retrieval tasks, covering 6,654 source--target directions in our target language-pair inventory. For QE, we evaluate nine reference-free evaluators on professional FLORES-200 translations across 41,412 ordered source--target directions. Results show that no model is universally reliable across translation directions. Naive QE ensembles dilute strong model signals, while documented target-language coverage is strongly associated with higher QE scores. Overall, these findings suggest that multilingual parallel-data assessment is best approached as a direction-aware routing and calibration problem, where no single universal metric is expected to suffice across all languages.

</details>


### [322] [Uncovering Temporal Framing in the News](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00294)
*Tarek Mahmoud,Veronika Solopova,Premtim Sahitaj,Ariana Sahitaj,Max Upravitelev,Mervat Abassy,Hana Fatima Shaikh,Neda Foroutan,Vera Schmitt,Preslav Nakov*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文研究新闻语篇中的时间框架（temporal framing），即利用时间相关语言进行说服而非单纯报告时间。作者提出八种时间框架分类体系，基于多语言新闻语料库（458篇英德文章，2K+时间框架句，3K+标注），并通过监督微调和零样本分类进行检测实验，结果表明监督模型显著优于零样本方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究多关注时间语言在时间线上的定位功能，而忽略了其在新闻语篇中作为修辞策略、影响解读与说服力的作用。作者旨在系统定义并识别"时间框架"这一现象。

Method: 1) 基于以往时间性与框架理论提出八类时间框架分类体系；2) 通过专家标注构建多语言（英、德）新闻语料库；3) 分析框架频率、共现模式及词汇线索；4) 采用监督微调与零样本分类两种方法进行时间框架检测实验。

Result: 构建了包含458篇英德新闻文章、超过2K个时间框架句和约3K个标注的数据集；实验表明时间框架在句子级别可学习，监督模型大幅优于零样本方法。

Conclusion: 时间框架是可学习的语言学现象，监督方法效果显著，已公开语料库以促进后续研究。

Abstract: Temporal language does more than place events on a timeline. In news discourse, references to the past, present, and future can function as rhetorical devices that shape interpretation and persuasion. Here, we study temporal framing, defined as the persuasive use of time-related language to structure meaning rather than to report chronology. We propose a taxonomy of eight temporal frames grounded in prior work on temporality and framing, and we realize it through expert annotation of a multilingual news corpus. The resulting dataset includes 458 English and German news articles, with over 2K temporally framed sentences and approximately 3K temporal framing annotations identified from a corpus of more than 20K sentences. We analyze frame prevalence, co-occurrence patterns, and lexical cues, and evaluate temporal framing detection using supervised fine-tuning and zero-shot classification. Our experiments show that temporal framing is learnable at the sentence level, with supervised models substantially outperforming zero-shot approaches. We publicly release the corpus to support future research on temporal framing: https://mbzuai-nlp.github.io/temporal-framing/.

</details>


### [323] [Masking Stale Observations Helps Search Agents -- Until It Doesn't: A Regime Map and Its Mechanism](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00408)
*Haoxiang Zhang,Qixin Xu,Zhuofeng Li,Lei Zhang,Pengcheng Jiang,Yu Zhang,Julian McAuley*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文系统研究了在长程搜索智能体中屏蔽过时观测（observation masking）对上下文效率的影响，发现其准确率增益呈现不对称倒U型曲线：弱检索器下效果平稳，强检索器搭配中等规模模型时达到峰值，模型饱和时急剧下降。机制上，该方法实现了token与turn的权衡，既可能将失败转为成功，也可能移除有用证据。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 长程搜索智能体在多轮工具调用中积累大量检索内容，上下文预算效率日益重要。屏蔽过时观测是一种最小干预方案，但其何时有效、为何有效尚不明确，需要系统研究。

Method: 作者在4B到284B参数的多种智能体骨干上，结合三种不同检索器，在离线与在线两种智能体搜索基准上进行系统实验，分析观测屏蔽策略的效果模式及其背后的机制。

Result: 观测屏蔽的准确率增益呈现不对称倒U型曲线：弱检索器下效果平坦，强检索器配中等容量模型时增益最大，模型饱和时效果急剧崩溃。该模式由检索器召回率与模型隐式过滤能力的交互决定，而非单一因素。机制上，屏蔽实现了token与turn的权衡：移除模型已不再注意的观测和智能体极少重新打开的页面，增加的turn在能转化失败为成功时有效，但屏蔽有用证据时则失败。

Conclusion: 应将上下文管理重新定位为一种依赖于特定机制状态（regime-dependent）的干预手段，并提供了一个用于分析智能体深度搜索中上下文使用的整体视角。

Abstract: Long-horizon search agents accumulate large amounts of retrieved content across many tool calls, making context-budget efficiency increasingly important. A minimal intervention is to mask stale observations from the context as the trajectory progresses, but it remains unclear when this form of context management helps and why. We study observation masking through a systematic sweep over various agent backbones (4B to 284B parameters) and three retrievers on offline and live-web agentic search benchmarks. We find that the accuracy gain from masking follows an asymmetric inverted-U shape when plotted against the model's accuracy without context management: a plateau under weak retrievers, a peak when a strong retriever meets a mid-capacity model, and a sharp collapse when the model is saturated. This pattern reflects the interaction between retriever recall and the model's implicit filtering capacity, rather than either factor in isolation. Mechanistically, masking implements a token-for-turn trade-off: it removes observations the model has largely stopped attending to and pages the agent rarely re-opens. The added turns help when they convert failures into successes, but they fail when masking removes evidence the model would otherwise have used. We therefore reframe context management as a regime-dependent intervention and provide a holistic perspective for analyzing context use in agentic deep search. We release our scaffold and trajectories here (https://github.com/i-DeepSearch/observation-masking) to support future research.

</details>


### [324] [Bridging Reasoning Trajectories in On-Policy Distillation via Near-Future Guidance](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00305)
*Yuxuan Jiang,Francis Ferraro*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: OPD（同策略蒸馏）虽在轨迹上采样，但仅使用token级学习信号，导致约30%的高损失token是表面形式不匹配而非真正的推理分歧，且真正的分歧难以通过孤立的token监督修复。本文提出TOPD（轨迹感知同策略蒸馏），利用近未来轨迹信息识别真正的分歧状态并跨多token分配指导，在多个推理基准上取得显著提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有OPD方法存在"轨迹采样但token学习"的机制缺陷：高损失token中约30%落入低散度区间（表面形式差异而非真正的推理分叉），且真正分歧的token也难以通过孤立的token级监督修复，因为推理失败常表现为短视分布漂移。

Method: 提出TOPD（Trajectory-aware OPD），利用近未来轨迹信息识别真正的分歧状态，并跨多个未来token分配指导信号，从而替代原有的孤立token级反向KL修正。

Result: 抑制非分歧高损失token将标准OPD从47.8%提升至48.2%；TOPD进一步提升至52.2%。在AIME24上从60.0%提升至63.3%，AIME25上从46.7%提升至53.3%。

Conclusion: 轨迹感知的指导机制优于孤立的token级修正，TOPD通过利用近未来轨迹信息有效修复推理过程中的分布漂移，显著改善了LLM的推理能力。

Abstract: On-Policy Distillation (OPD) improves large language model reasoning by training a student model on trajectories sampled from its own policy under teacher supervision. Although OPD operates on trajectories, its learning signal remains token-level: it identifies deviations through high-loss tokens and repairs them through local reverse-KL correction. We show that this "trajectory-sampled but token-learned" mechanism cannot reliably bridge student trajectories toward teacher trajectories. About 30% of high-loss tokens fall into the low-divergence regime, indicating that many are surface-form mismatches rather than real reasoning forks. Moreover, even truly divergent tokens are difficult to repair with isolated token-level supervision, since reasoning failures often unfold as short-horizon distributional drift. We propose Trajectory-aware OPD (TOPD), which uses near-future trajectory information to identify real divergent states and distribute guidance across multiple future tokens. Experiments show that suppressing non-divergent high-loss tokens improves standard OPD from 47.8% to 48.2% average accuracy, while TOPD further improves performance to 52.2%, with gains on AIME24 from 60.0% to 63.3% and AIME25 from 46.7% to 53.3%.

</details>


### [325] [DiscourseFlip: An Oblique Discourse-Level Opinion Manipulation Attack against Black-box Retrieval-Augmented Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01212)
*Yuyang Gong,Miaokun Chen,Jiawei Liu,Zhuo Chen,Guoxiu He,Wei Lu,XiaoFeng Wang,Xiaozhong Liu*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种针对RAG系统的新威胁模型——话语级意见操纵（Discourse-Level Opinion Manipulation），并设计了DiscourseFlip攻击方法，通过在语义查询网络中动态分配有限投毒预算，实现跨多主题查询空间的意见偏移。实验表明该方法在覆盖率和有效性上显著优于现有基线，且能规避用户检测，而现有防御措施对此类攻击效果有限。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有RAG攻击大多聚焦于单个查询或狭窄主题的局部查询集，实际影响范围有限，且在真实场景中隐蔽性不足。作者旨在揭示一种更广泛、更隐蔽的话语级意见操纵威胁。

Method: 提出DiscourseFlip攻击方法：一种基于智能体（agent）和图引导（graph-guided）的攻击方式，在黑盒设定下动态分配有限投毒预算，以最大化整个语义查询网络上的话语级意见偏差。

Result: 大量实验表明，DiscourseFlip能够在上下文化的查询网络上持续引发目标意见偏移，在覆盖率和有效性上显著超越现有基线；用户研究证实其有效且隐蔽；现有缓解策略对此类攻击效果不佳。

Conclusion: 话语级意见操纵是RAG系统面临的新安全威胁，现有防御手段不足，亟需更鲁棒、更自适应的防御机制来应对这一漏洞。

Abstract: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) systems are widely deployed and increasingly influential, but their reliance on external corpora exposes new security risks from poisoned retrieval content. Existing RAG attacks are largely focusing on individual queries or narrow topic-local query sets, which limits their practical reach and offers limited camouflage in real-world settings. In this paper, we introduce discourse-level opinion manipulation, a new threat model in which coordinated influence across a semantic query network induces opinion shifts over a holistic, multi-topic query space. We formalize this threat in a black-box setting and propose DiscourseFlip, an agentic, graph-guided attack that dynamically allocates a limited poisoning budget to maximize discourse-level opinion deviation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that DiscourseFlip consistently induces targeted opinion shifts across the contextualized query network and significantly outperforms existing baselines in terms of coverage and effectiveness. User studies further confirm that DiscourseFlip is effective while remaining well camouflaged from user detection. Moreover, systematic analyses show that existing mitigation strategies are ineffective against discourse-level manipulation, underscoring the urgent need for more robust and adaptive defenses to address discourse-level vulnerabilities.

</details>


### [326] [Which Institutional Frameworks Do Chatbots Assume? Auditing Jurisdictional Defaults in Multilingual LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00333)
*Zhizhi Wang,Harini Suresh*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 研究发现，当提示中未明确指定司法管辖区时，LLM会默认将输入语言作为管辖信号：中文输入更常输出中国法律框架，英文输入更常输出美国框架。这种现象被定义为"制度框架错选风险"。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多语言用户可能用自己最熟悉的语言提问，而非问题所涉国家的语言。当提示未指定国家或地区时，LLM是否将输入语言默认为管辖信号？这可能导致用户获得错误司法框架下的回答。

Method: 选取7个中美开发的LLM，使用60个法律行政类提示（英文和中文），在三种系统提示条件下进行评估，共2510条手动标注回复。分析模型在管辖未明确时选择的法律框架。

Result: 中文输入更常产生中国特定答案，英文输入更常产生美国特定、比较性或通用答案。需要单一答案时，英文输入74.5%采用美国框架，中文输入53.3%采用中国框架，该模式在所有7个模型中一致出现。

Conclusion: LLM不应仅依据输入语言路由制度建议；当用户未提供位置信息时，应主动询问或明确说明答案的管辖范围，以避免制度框架错选风险。

Abstract: LLMs increasingly answer questions about taxes, labor protections, healthcare, education, pensions, and administrative procedures, where usefulness often depends on the applicable jurisdiction. Multilingual users may write in their most comfortable language rather than one associated with the country or region whose rules apply. We ask whether deployed LLMs use input language as a default jurisdictional signal when prompts omit any country or region. Prior multilingual audits show that prompt language can shift cultural, political, or normative outputs; we examine which legal-administrative framework models supply when jurisdiction is underspecified. We evaluate seven LLMs developed in the United States or China on 60 underspecified legal-administrative prompts in English and Mandarin Chinese under three system-prompt conditions, yielding 2,520 manually annotated responses. Across models and conditions, Chinese input more often produces China-specific answers, while English input more often produces U.S.-specific, comparative, or generic answers. Prompts requiring a single answer further increase jurisdiction selection: pooled across models, 74.5% of English-input responses adopt a U.S. framework, while 53.3% of Chinese-input responses adopt a China framework. This directional pattern appears in all seven models. We describe this deployment-level pattern as institutional-framework misselection risk: a fluent answer may rely on a legal-administrative context the user did not intend, especially when their preferred language differs from the relevant jurisdiction. LLM interfaces should not route institutional advice by input language alone; when location is absent, they should request it or state the jurisdictional scope of the answer.

</details>


### [327] [Isolating LLM Lexical Bias: A Curation-Free Triangulated Metric for Preference-Stage Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00334)
*Xiaoyang Ming,Jose Hernandez,Thomas Stephan Juzek*

Main category: cs.CL
