Across seven models, the strongest reaches only 0.31 decision F1, and outcome quality is sharply decoupled from process quality. Difficulty concentrates in management decisions and later stages, where models recover discharge diagnoses far more reliably than management actions (0.51 vs. 0.17 F1) and continue to issue redundant queries as cases progress. ClinEnv makes this information-acquisition gap, invisible to outcome-only evaluation, directly measurable.

</details>


### [661] [Pramana: Fine-Tuning Large Language Models for Epistemic Reasoning through Navya-Nyaya](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04937)
*Sharath Sathish*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出Pramana方法，通过对Llama 3.2-3B和DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Llama-8B模型微调，融入2500年历史的Navya-Nyaya印度逻辑框架（包含6阶段推理：怀疑分析、证据识别、五段论、反事实验证、谬误检测、确证），解决大语言模型在系统性推理中的证据缺失问题。实验表明模型在推理内容内化上表现良好（100%语义正确率），尽管格式遵循率仅40%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大语言模型在需要可追溯证据的推理任务中表现脆弱（如引入无关上下文后性能下降65%），缺乏将结论锚定于可溯源证据的认知能力，这限制了其在需严格论证的场景中的可靠性。

Method: 采用Navya-Nyaya逻辑框架（包含SAMSHAYA怀疑分析、PRAMANA证据识别、PANCHA AVAYAVA五段论、TARKA反事实验证、HETVABHASA谬误检测、NIRNAYA确证六个阶段），对Llama 3.2-3B和DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Llama-8B在55个Nyaya结构化逻辑问题上进行微调，分阶段训练并控制格式提示与温度参数。

Result: 第一阶段在保留评估上达到100%语义正确率，但严格格式遵循率仅40%；消融实验揭示格式提示和温度参数对性能有关键影响，最优配置因阶段而异。

Conclusion: Pramana方法证明将结构化认知方法论（如Navya-Nyaya逻辑）融入LLM微调能有效提升推理能力的内化程度，即使格式遵循不完美，模型也能习得推理内容。研究开源了全部模型、数据集和训练基础设施以促进后续研究。

Abstract: Large language models produce fluent text but struggle with systematic reasoning, often hallucinating confident but unfounded claims. When Apple researchers added irrelevant context to mathematical problems, LLM performance degraded by 65% Apple Machine Learning Research, exposing brittle pattern-matching beneath apparent reasoning. This epistemic gap, the inability to ground claims in traceable evidence, limits AI reliability in domains requiring justification. We introduce Pramana, a novel approach that teaches LLMs explicit epistemological methodology by fine-tuning on Navya-Nyaya logic, a 2,500-year-old Indian reasoning framework. Unlike generic chain-of-thought prompting, Navya-Nyaya enforces structured 6-phase reasoning: SAMSHAYA (doubt analysis), PRAMANA (evidence source identification), PANCHA AVAYAVA (5-member syllogism with universal rules), TARKA (counterfactual verification), HETVABHASA (fallacy detection), and NIRNAYA (ascertainment distinguishing knowledge from hypothesis). This integration of logic and epistemology provides cognitive scaffolding absent from standard reasoning approaches. We fine-tune Llama 3.2-3B and DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Llama-8B on 55 Nyaya-structured logical problems (constraint satisfaction, Boolean SAT, multi-step deduction). Stage 1 achieves 100% semantic correctness on held-out evaluation despite only 40% strict format adherence revealing that models internalize reasoning content even when structural enforcement is imperfect. Ablation studies show format prompting and temperature critically affect performance, with optimal configurations differing by stage. We release all models, datasets, and training infrastructure on Hugging Face to enable further research on epistemic frameworks for AI reasoning.

</details>


<div id='cs.GT'></div>

# cs.GT [[Back]](#toc)

### [662] [The Representation-Rationalizability Tradeoff in Reward Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00291)
*Jing Dong,Yaoliang Yu,Pascal Pourpart*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文证明RLHF中的奖励函数存在表示-聚合权衡：更强的嵌入表示φ会减少表示误差，但会暴露更多无法被标量一致排序的比较，从而增加聚合误差。该权衡在DPO中同样成立，且端到端训练无法保证收敛到最优平衡点。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: RLHF中来自不同标注者的成对偏好判断可能存在Condorcet循环，导致无法用单一标量奖励函数对所有比较一致排序。现有社会选择理论分析通常假设固定有限的备选集，但现代RLHF使用可学习的嵌入表示φ动态决定哪些响应被视为可区分的备选项，这引入了新的权衡问题。

Method: 论文从理论上证明，基于φ构建的奖励函数的超额交叉熵损失可精确分解为两项：(1) 表示项——更强的φ可减小该项；(2) 聚合项——更强的φ会暴露更多无法被标量一致排序的比较，从而增大该项。该分解在DPO中同样成立。

Result: 实验上，通过合成数据和真实偏好数据集验证了表示-聚合权衡的存在：过于简单的φ表示不足，过于复杂的φ则面临严重的聚合不一致问题，端到端联合训练无法保证自动收敛到最优平衡点。

Conclusion: RLHF的奖励学习存在内在的表示-聚合权衡，不能简单地通过增强表示或端到端训练来解决，需要在表示容量和聚合一致性之间谨慎平衡。

Abstract: In RLHF, each training example contains a prompt $x$ and two candidate responses $y,y'$, and annotators provide pairwise preferences between these responses. The learning problem is to convert these heterogeneous pairwise judgments into a single scalar reward $r(x,y)$ that measures response quality for each prompt. Classical social choice implies an impossibility because heterogeneous annotator samples can induce pooled preferences with Condorcet cycles, so no scalar reward can evaluate all compared response pairs consistently. A growing literature analyzes RLHF as a social-choice problem, but usually assumes a fixed finite set of alternatives, i.e., a pre-enumerated finite set of candidate responses for each prompt. Modern pipelines instead score responses through a learned representation $φ(x,y)$ before a scalar head, so $φ$ determines which responses are treated as distinguishable alternatives and which comparisons are visible to the reward model. Once this embedding is part of the problem, the impossibility results from social choice theory become a tradeoff. We show that the excess cross-entropy loss of any reward built on $φ$ decomposes exactly into a representational term, which a richer $φ$ shrinks, and an aggregation term, which a richer $φ$ enlarges by exposing more comparisons that no scalar can rank consistently. The same results extend to direct preference optimization (DPO), and jointly training the embedding and the reward cannot guarantee to recover the sweet spot of this tradeoff. Experiments on synthetic data and real preference datasets corroborate our results.

</details>


### [663] [From Talking Words to Sharing Thoughts: Scalable Multi-LLM Aggregation via Structured Message Passing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00405)
*Niloufar Mehrabi,Sayed Pedram Haeri Boroujeni,Abolfazl Razi*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于二分因子图的消息传递框架，在语义层集成多个领域特化LLM的预测，无需额外LLM推理调用，实现97%的token使用减少和6倍API调用降低，同时性能优于多智能体基线方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于迭代重新提示或跨模型精调的多LLM集成方法计算成本高、延迟大，且朴素聚合会导致锚点损坏（弱模型噪声降低强模型性能），亟需一种高效、鲁棒的集成方案。

Method: 将多个LLM视为变量节点，引入检查节点评估其一致性，构建二分因子图；设计类纠错系统的消息传递协议进行迭代共识求解；引入非对称阻尼机制保护高可靠性的锚点节点不被多数投票覆盖。

Result: 在MMLU、MMLU-Pro、GPQA、MedMCQA四个基准上，token使用减少97%，API调用减少6倍，推理时间从几分钟降至毫秒级，性能持续优于多智能体基线。

Conclusion: 基于图的信念传播是一种鲁棒、高速、可扩展的多LLM集成替代方案，有望成为当前多智能体系统的高效替代。

Abstract: The emergence of specialized, domain-tuned Large Language Models (LLMs) has demonstrated that smaller models can achieve expert-level performance in specific tasks, while struggling in out-of-domain settings. Current ensemble methods to combine their complementary expertise primarily rely on iterative re-prompting or cross-model refinement. These approaches suffer from high computational costs and latency because they require repeated LLM inference calls. Furthermore, naive aggregation often leads to anchor corruption, in which noise propagated from weaker models degrades the performance of the most accurate expert. To address these challenges, we propose a framework that integrates model predictions at the semantic layer using a bipartite factor graph. In this architecture, individual LLMs are represented as variable nodes, while a set of check nodes assess their consistency based on diverse epistemic criteria. We develop a message-passing protocol inspired by error-recovery systems to resolve disagreements iteratively. Furthermore, we introduce an asymmetric damping mechanism that protects high-reliability anchor nodes from being overridden by the ensemble majority. Unlike existing methods, our approach operates on output distributions and requires no additional LLM calls during the refinement phase. Evaluating on four benchmarks, including MMLU, MMLU-Pro, GPQA, and MedMCQA, our method demonstrates a 97% reduction in token usage and up to a 6X decrease in API calls, reducing inference time from several minutes to mere milliseconds while consistently outperforming leading multi-agent baselines. These results suggest that graph-based belief propagation is a robust, high-speed, and scalable alternative to the current multi-agent LLM systems. The full pipeline and code will be made public.

</details>


### [664] [Algorithms and Complexity of Influence Maximization on Directed Acyclic Graphs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00585)
*Panfeng Liu,Biaoshuai Tao*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文研究了独立级联(IC)和线性阈值(LT)模型下的影响力最大化问题。在有向无环图(DAG)上，LT模型下该问题仍是APX-难的；但在出树状图上，IC和LT模型等价且可通过动态规划精确求解；在入树状图上，LT模型可多项式求解，IC模型是NP-难的，但本文提出了一个完全多项式时间近似方案(FPTAS)。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索影响力最大化问题在更受限图结构（DAG和树状结构）上的计算极限，明确哪些结构下问题仍困难、哪些结构下可解。

Method: 在DAG上证明LT模型下APX-难；在出树状图上证明IC与LT等价并设计动态规划精确算法；在入树状图上为IC模型设计FPTAS。

Result: DAG上LT模型仍APX-难；出树状图可精确求解；入树状图LT可多项式解、IC有FPTAS。

Conclusion: 去环不足以保证PTAS，需进一步限制为树状结构才可解，且不同方向树结构下IC与LT模型计算复杂度存在显著差异。

Abstract: This paper investigates the influence maximization problem under the Independent Cascade(IC) and Linear Threshold (LT) models. While this problem is known to be APX-hard on general graphs, we explore its computational limits by focusing on Directed Acyclic Graphs (DAGs) and more restricted tree structures. Our primary result demonstrates that influence maximization remains APX-hard on DAGs under the LT model, suggesting that the absence of cycles is insufficient to achieve a polynomial-time approximation scheme (PTAS). In contrast, we show that the problem becomes tractable when the topology is further restricted to out-arborescences and in-arborescences. Specifically, for out-arborescences, we show that the IC model and the LT model are equivalent, and we develop exact polynomial-time algorithms based on dynamic programming that leverage the unique path properties of these structures. For in-arborescences, it is known that the problem is polynomial-time solvable under the LT model, and it is NP-hard under the IC model. We complement these results by presenting a fully polynomial-time approximation scheme (FPTAS) for the IC model.

</details>


### [665] [Hardness of Approximate Hylland-Zeckhauser Equilibria](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00951)
*Mark Braverman,Jingyi Liu,Eric Xue,Chenghan Zhou*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文研究了在单位需求玩家中利用竞争均衡实现近似Hylland-Zeckhauser均衡的计算复杂度，证明了在特定猜想下该问题属于PPAD-hard，并引入了一种自然约束下的无条件PPAD-hard结果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究近似Hylland-Zeckhauser均衡的计算硬度，为市场均衡问题的鲁棒性计算复杂性研究提供理论依据，同时为证明"PCP for PPAD猜想"提供额外动机。

Method: 通过将(ε,δ)-广义电路问题归约到近似HZ均衡问题，证明在PCP for PPAD猜想下近似HZ均衡是PPAD-hard的；此外引入自然约束（禁止玩家持有零效用的正价商品），无条件证明了受限下的PPAD-hardness。

Result: 在PCP for PPAD猜想下，近似HZ均衡是PPAD-hard的；同时，存在常数ε使得受限ε-HZ均衡无条件属于PPAD-hard。

Conclusion: 该结果不仅揭示了近似市场均衡问题的计算困难本质，也为推动PCP for PPAD猜想的证明提供了新的应用场景和理论动力。

Abstract: In this paper, we investigate the computational hardness of finding fractional allocations to unit-demand players using competitive equilibria from equal incomes (CEEI), where we allow a small constant error in players' response to market prices (also known as an approximate Hylland-Zeckhauser equilibrium). We show that assuming the $\mathbf{(\varepsilon,δ)}$-Generalized Circuits problem is PPAD-hard (the "PCP for PPAD" conjecture), finding an approximate HZ equilibrium is also PPAD-hard. This result provides additional motivation for trying to prove the PCP for PPAD conjecture as a tool for obtaining robust computational hardness results about markets. Further, we introduce a natural restriction on approximate HZ equilibria, where players' bundles may still only be approximately optimal given the prices, but may not contain positive-price items for which the player has zero utility. We show unconditionally that there exists a constant $ε$ such that finding a restricted $ε$-HZ equilibrium is PPAD-hard.

</details>


### [666] [Repeated Descent: A Framework for Online Budget-Feasible Auctions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01142)
*Andreas Charalampopoulos,Dimitris Fotakis,Thanos Tolias*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文研究预算可行的在线拍卖问题，提出基于自适应线性定价的确定框架RED，在秘书问题到达和子模估值下实现1046竞争比，并结合随机子采样首次对非单调子模估值实现常数竞争比，同时给出XOS估值的下界。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在预算约束下，雇主需要雇佣n个有私人服务成本的代理人以最大化公共子模价值函数。现有在线定价机制竞争比过高（Charalampopoulos等人的结果），且缺乏对非单调子模估值的常数竞争比机制。

Method: 提出Repeated Descent (RED) 确定性框架，基于自适应线性定价。通过自适应调整定价水平，并平衡每个定价水平与考虑的代理人数量来确保预算可行性。结合随机子采样处理非单调子模估值。

Result: RED框架实现1046竞争比（相比此前结果提升数个数量级）；结合随机子采样首次对非单调子模估值实现常数竞争比；同时证明XOS估值下竞争比的下界为Ω(log n/(log log n)^2)。

Conclusion: RED框架显著改进了在线预算可行拍卖的竞争比，并首次处理非单调子模估值；下界结果揭示了问题本质难度。

Abstract: We study budget feasible procurement auctions, in which $n$ agents, each with a privately held service cost, offer their services to an employer. The employer seeks to maximize a public submodular valuation function over the set of hired agents, while facing a hard budget constraint. We consider an online posted-price setting, in which agents arrive in a uniformly random order (a.k.a. \emph{secretary arrivals}) and the employer must make irrevocable take-it-or-leave-it offers upon their arrival. The employer does not get any feedback about the agent service costs other than whether they accept the offer or not.
  We introduce Repeated Descent (a.k.a. \RED), a deterministic framework based on adaptive linear posted pricing. \RED enforces budget feasibility by adaptively adjusting its pricing and balancing each pricing level with the number of agents considered in it. Using \RED as the main building block, we obtain a $1046$-competitive posted-price mechanism for online budget feasible auctions with secretary agent arrivals and submodular valuations, thus improving on the previously best known ratio of (Charalampopoulos et al., EC 2025) by several orders of magnitude. Combining \RED with random subsampling, we obtain the first constant-competitive posted-price budget feasible mechanism for non-monotone submodular valuations. On the negative side, we show that every online budget feasible mechanism with XOS valuations has a competitive ratio of $Ω\!\left(\tfrac{\log n}{(\log\log n)^2}\right)$.

</details>


### [667] [Domination-Avoiding Learning Agents Cannot Collude](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01275)
*Noam Nisan,Emmanuel Zerah*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文研究了算法代理在市场价格竞争中的合谋现象。Calvano等人之前证明Q-learning代理会自动合谋，Fish等人证明商业LLM也会合谋。本文正式证明外部遗憾最小化代理也会合谋，同时提出"支配避免代理"这一类广义代理，它们保证不会合谋，包括均值基代理、内部遗憾最小化代理等。更一般地，这类代理在多轮博弈中几乎不会采用纯支配策略。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索算法代理在市场价格竞争中是否会自发形成合谋行为，特别是验证外部遗憾最小化代理是否也会合谋，并寻找一类保证不会合谋的代理。

Method: 通过形式化证明，定义"支配避免代理"这一广义代理类别，证明其不会合谋。该类别包含均值基代理、内部遗憾最小化代理、可变学习率的多权重代理及其上下文变体。

Result: 证明外部遗憾最小化代理也会在市场价格竞争中自发合谋；识别出"支配避免代理"这一类代理，在博弈中几乎不会采用被反复剔除的纯支配策略，从而保证不会合谋。

Conclusion: 存在一类保证不会在市场价格竞争中合谋的代理（支配避免代理），但外部遗憾最小化代理不在此列，它们仍可能合谋。

Abstract: An influential paper of Calvano et al. empirically demonstrated that Q-learning agents spontaneously collude when placed as sellers that compete on prices in a natural market model. More recent results of Fish et al. empirically demonstrated that similar collusion happens with commercial LLMs. We formally prove that such collusion can also happen with external-regret-minimizing agents. We identify a very general class of agents, which we term Domination-Avoiding agents, that provably do not collude in such markets. This class contains all Mean-Based agents and all internal-regret-minimizing agents, as well as others such as Multiplicative-Weight agents with variable learning rate and contextual variants thereof. More generally we show that, in any game, this class of agents is guaranteed to jointly learn to almost never play strategies that are eliminated by repeated elimination of purely dominated strategies.

</details>


### [668] [Distributed Algorithm for Robust Wardrop Equilibrium in Uncertain Aggregative Congestion Games](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01594)
*Huan Peng,Guanpu Chen,Giuseppe Belgioioso,Karl Henrik Johansson*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文研究了一类具有不确定耦合约束的聚合拥塞博弈，提出了一种分布式算法来寻找最坏情况下的鲁棒广义Wardrop均衡（RGWE），并通过奇异摄动理论和LaSalle不变性原理保证了算法收敛性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有聚合拥塞博弈研究通常假设耦合约束是确定性的，但实际场景（如电动汽车充电控制）中存在不确定性，亟需设计鲁棒的分布式求解方法。

Method: 利用鲁棒优化理论将含不确定性的聚合拥塞博弈转化为确定性的增广问题；结合投影原始-对偶方案与动态跟踪技术，设计全分布式算法；通过奇异摄动理论和LaSalle不变性原理证明收敛性。

Result: 算法在理论上收敛到RGWE；揭示了RGWE与鲁棒广义纳什均衡之间的关系；电动汽车充电控制仿真验证了理论结果。

Conclusion: 成功将鲁棒优化与分布式博弈论结合，为含不确定耦合约束的聚合博弈提供了可求解的分布式均衡算法。

Abstract: This paper considers a class of aggregative congestion games with uncertain coupling constraints, and devises a distributed algorithm to seek the robust generalized Wardrop equilibrium (RGWE) under worst-case uncertainty. Utilizing robust optimization theory, we reformulate the original aggregative congestion game with uncertainty into a tractable and deterministic augmented problem. Building upon this reformulation, we design a fully distributed algorithm to seek the RGWE by integrating a projected primal-dual scheme and a dynamic tracking technique. The convergence of the proposed algorithm is rigorously guaranteed via singular perturbation theory and LaSalle's invariance principle. Furthermore, we explicitly characterize the relationship between the obtained RGWE and the robust generalized Nash equilibrium, as the latter captures full strategic interactions. Finally, numerical simulations on the charging control of plug-in electric vehicles corroborate our theoretical findings.

</details>


### [669] [A Framework for Graph-Conditioned Hierarchical Shapley Attribution in Patent Valuation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01632)
*Joy Bose*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文提出PatentXAI框架，利用Shapley值和知识图谱中的马尔可夫毯来估算单个专利在产品利润中的公平贡献，解决了多专利产品中单专利经济价值的长期难题，在大规模实验中展示了高效性和准确性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 一个包含数万项专利的产品中，估算单一专利的经济贡献是知识产权经济学中长期未解决的难题，传统方法缺乏系统性和可解释性。

Method: 将专利估值建模为可解释AI问题，使用Shapley值衡量专利的公平利润份额；通过知识图谱中的马尔可夫毯限制专利联盟规模以保证计算可行性；采用分层利润分配：宏观组件间使用精确Shapley值，组件内使用中心性加权Shapley值。

Result: n=100时中位马尔可夫毯大小为n的32.9%，90分位为55.2%，每专利运行时间10毫秒；n=12时与精确真值差异0.088，n=100时与高样本蒙特卡洛参考差异0.062±0.003；密集组件实验中差异降至0.039。

Conclusion: PatentXAI在计算上高效且准确，为专利估值提供了可解释的解决方案；但基于真实数据估计特征函数v(S)仍是主要开放性挑战，论文给出了使用公开数据集进行实证验证的路线图。

Abstract: Estimating the economic contribution of a single patent inside a product that embodies tens of thousands of patents is a long-standing unsolved problem in intellectual property economics. We propose PatentXAI, a framework that treats patent valuation as a problem of explainable AI: given a characteristic function v(S) encoding the revenue achievable by patent subset S, a patent's Shapley value measures its fair share of product profit in a way that satisfies efficiency, symmetry, dummy, and additivity. To make computation tractable we restrict each patent's coalition to its Markov Blanket inside a knowledge graph, grounded in the C-SVE conditional independence theorem (Li et al., 2020). Scaling experiments from n=12 to n=100 patents using Pareto-distributed coverage graphs report median Markov Blanket size of 32.9 percent of n at n=100, with 90th-percentile blanket size of 55.2 percent of n, and runtime of 10 milliseconds per patent. Difference against exact ground truth at n=12 is 0.088; difference against a high-sample Monte Carlo reference at n=100 is 0.062 plus or minus 0.003. A dense-component experiment shows that when 80 percent of patents share one component, the blanket correctly expands to cover that dense cluster, and the difference versus reference falls to 0.039 because the pooled computation becomes more accurate on homogeneous portfolios. Profit allocation proceeds hierarchically: exact Shapley distributes total profit among macro-components, then centrality-weighted Shapley distributes each component budget among covering patents. Estimating v(S) from real data is the primary open problem; we distinguish this from the computational contribution and outline a concrete roadmap for empirical validation using public ETSI, USPTO, and Lens.org datasets.

</details>


### [670] [A Sheaf Framework for Strategic Multi-Agent Systems: From Consensus to Nash Equilibria](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01663)
*Manuel Hernández,Eduardo Sánchez-Soto*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文提出了一个统一范畴框架，将事件演算、SCEL类集群形成和博弈论奖励结构整合到时间-空间历史的Grothendieck topos中，通过引入“博弈层”（game sheaf）概念证明了纳什均衡对应于导出最佳响应对应层的全局截面，并用免疫“堡垒防御”案例验证了框架的表达力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有层论和拓扑斯框架擅长处理几何共识、知识对齐和因果规划，但缺乏对价值、奖励和战略选择的显式建模，亟需一个统一的形式化基础来支持异构自主智能体在动态对抗环境中的协调。

Method: 将事件演算、SCEL类集群形成和博弈论奖励结构整合到一个时间-空间历史的Grothendieck topos中；引入“博弈层”（game sheaf），其茎（stalks）包含效用函数和策略分布，限制映射编码并行传输和最优响应动态；证明纳什均衡对应于导出最佳响应对应层的全局截面，上同调障碍分类策略一致性的失败。

Result: 证明了纳什均衡与全局截面之间的对应关系，上同调障碍可分类策略一致性失败，并通过免疫“堡垒防御”案例展示了框架的表达力。

Conclusion: 该框架为可验证、自主且经济理性的多智能体系统提供了严格的数学基础，能够同时处理几何约束、逻辑一致性、时间推理和战略优化。

Abstract: The coordination of heterogeneous autonomous agents in dynamic, adversarial environments requires simultaneous satisfaction of geometric constraints, logical consistency, temporal reasoning, and strategic optimization. Existing sheaf- and topos-theoretic frameworks provide powerful tools for geometric consensus, knowledge alignment, and causal planning, but lack explicit models for value, reward, and strategic choice. This report presents a unified categorical framework that integrates event calculus, SCEL-like ensemble formation, and game-theoretic reward structures into a single Grothendieck topos of time-space histories. We introduce the notion of a \emph{game sheaf} whose stalks contain utility functions and policy distributions, and restriction maps encode both parallel transport and best-response dynamics. We prove that Nash equilibria correspond to global sections of a derived best-response correspondence sheaf, while cohomological obstructions classify failures of strategic consistency. A detailed case study of an immunological ``bastion defense'' scenario -- heterogeneous agents forming attack/defense ensembles under resource constraints -- demonstrates the framework's expressiveness. This synthesis provides a rigorous foundation for verifiable, autonomic, and economically rational multi-agent systems.

</details>


### [671] [The Price of Decentralization in Block Building](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01874)
*Burak Öz,Fei Wu,Luis Correia,Sen Yang,Bruno Mazorra,Stefanos Leonardos*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文通过随机覆盖博弈模型研究去中心化区块构建中的建造者选址问题，证明该博弈是精确势博弈且存在纯纳什均衡，给出渐近紧的2倍无政府价格界和效用集中度界，并通过仿真揭示福利损失在中间状态最显著，及地理集中与效用集中可能不一致。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 去中心化区块构建机制虽用多个建造者取代单一提议者，但其抗审查和公平访问收益不仅取决于建造者数量，还取决于其地理位置能否提供及时的交易覆盖。研究者希望通过模型分析建造者选址、用户交易覆盖与奖励集中度之间的张力。

Method: 将去中心化区块构建建模为随机覆盖博弈：建造者选择区域，信息源在区块构建轮次中发出交易，延迟决定交易是否在截止前被接收。理论分析包括势博弈证明、无政府价格界和效用集中度界的推导；并辅以更丰富环境下的仿真验证。

Result: （1）建造者区域博弈是精确势博弈，存在纯纳什均衡；（2）渐近紧的2倍Price of Anarchy界；（3）最低效用建造者至少获得最高效用建造者一半的收益，HHI指数最多比平均基准高12.5%；（4）仿真发现福利损失在边缘源可达且有价值但自利激励仍偏向高价值源的中间状态最明显；（5）地理集中与效用集中可能不一致。

Conclusion: 研究结果对协议设计有指导意义，讨论了位置-市场建模和替代奖励分配规则等未来方向。

Abstract: Decentralized block building mechanisms replace the monopoly of a single proposer with multiple builders. However, their censorship-resistance and fair-access benefits depend not only on the number of builders, but also on whether builders are geographically positioned to provide timely transaction coverage. We study this tension between builder location choice, user transaction coverage, and reward concentration by modeling decentralized block building as a stochastic coverage game. Builders choose regions, information sources emit transactions over a block construction round, and latency determines whether each transaction is received before the deadline.
  We show that the builder region game is an exact potential game and therefore admits a pure Nash equilibrium. We prove an asymptotically tight factor-2 Price of Anarchy bound, quantifying the price of decentralization from uncoordinated builder placement, and derive tight bounds on builder utility concentration, showing that the lowest-utility builder earns at least half of the highest-utility builder's payoff, and the utility-share HHI is at most 12.5% above the egalitarian benchmark. We complement the theory with simulations, studying the builder region game under richer latency and source environments. We find that welfare losses are most pronounced in intermediate regimes where peripheral sources are reachable and valuable, but selfish incentives still favor regions with strong access to high-value sources. We also find that geographic and utility concentration need not align: planner allocations can improve coverage by assigning builders to lower-payoff peripheral regions, while equilibrium outcomes can be more geographically concentrated but more utility-balanced. We connect our findings to protocol design and discuss future directions on location-market modeling and alternative reward-sharing rules.

</details>


### [672] [Improved Amenability Bounds for Local Coordination Games](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01963)
*Ron Peretz,Dean Kraizberg*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文研究有限社交网络上的局部纯协调博弈，在二元无偏设置下改进了Hutchcroft等人的结论，通过引入互信息博弈的Shapley值，证明了平均分歧小于ε时图是(O(ε log(1/ε)), r)-可均的，给出了局部协调与图可均性之间更尖锐的定量逆关系。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在Hutchcroft等人工作的基础上，进一步探索局部协调博弈的低无效率与底层图结构的定量关系，旨在改进可均性参数上的平方根损失。

Method: 针对二元无偏设置，引入与玩家局部输出相关的互信息博弈，利用该博弈的Shapley值作为分析工具，推导出平均分歧与图可均性参数之间的定量关系。

Result: 证明若平均分歧不超过ε，则图是(O(ε log(1/ε)), r)-可均的，相比之前结果改进了损失量级。

Conclusion: 得到了局部协调与图可均性之间更尖锐的定量逆关系，为理解网络结构与协调博弈效率的关联提供了更精细的理论刻画。

Abstract: We study local pure coordination games on finite social networks, continuing the framework of Hutchcroft, Rospuskova, and Tamuz. They showed that low inefficiency in local coordination forces the underlying graph to be amenable, with a square-root loss in the amenability parameter. We improve this loss in the binary unbiased setting. Using Shapley values of a mutual-information game associated with the players' local outputs, we prove that if the average disagreement is at most $\varepsilon$, then the graph is $(O(\varepsilon\log(1/\varepsilon)),r)$-amenable. This gives a sharper quantitative converse between local coordination and graph amenability.

</details>


### [673] [Private Learning in Bilateral Trade](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02050)
*Simone Di Gregorio,Federico Fusco,Stefano Leonardi,Chris Schwiegelshohn*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文研究了双边贸易中的学习机制问题，重点在差分隐私约束下，从采样数据中学习最优机制（最大化利润或经济效率）。研究表明，对于一般分布，差分隐私与近最优性不可兼得；但在σ-平滑分布假设下，可分别以$\tildeΘ(\frac{1}{σ\varepsilonα^2})$和$\tildeΘ(\frac{1}{\varepsilonα}+\frac{1}{α^2})$的样本复杂度实现近最优的利润和经济效率，且这些界在精度参数α上是紧的。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 双边贸易是经济学中最基本的交互之一，但现有学习算法对输入数据集高度敏感。作者希望通过差分隐私的视角研究该问题，确保每个数据点对学习到的机制影响有限，从而提升模型的鲁棒性与隐私保护能力。

Method: 采用PAC学习框架，要求算法以高概率输出一个与最优机制相差不超过α（加法误差）的ε-差分隐私机制。首先证明一般分布下隐私与近最优性不可兼得；然后引入σ-平滑分布假设，在该假设下分别针对利润和经济效率（贸易增益）设计多项式时间的隐私机制，并分析样本复杂度上界。

Result: - 一般分布下，差分隐私与近最优性不可兼得。
- 在σ-平滑分布下：
  - 利润最大化：使用$\tildeΘ(\frac{1}{σ\varepsilonα^2})$样本，可实现α-最优且ε-差分隐私。
  - 经济效率（贸易增益）：使用$\tildeΘ(\frac{1}{\varepsilonα}+\frac{1}{α^2})$样本，可实现相同目标。
- 上述样本复杂度在α上是紧的（即使不考虑差分隐私，也需要至少$\frac{1}{α^2}$样本）。

Conclusion: 在平滑分布假设下，差分隐私与双边贸易中的近最优机制学习可以同时实现，且样本复杂度接近最优。该工作为隐私保护的机制设计提供了理论基础，并揭示了平滑性在克服隐私-效用权衡中的关键作用。

Abstract: Bilateral trade models one of the most fundamental economic interactions: the intermediation between two strategic agents, a seller and a buyer, willing to trade a good. We consider the learning version of the problem, where the goal is to learn a mechanism from a sampled dataset of agents' valuations to maximize either profit or economic efficiency. While known learning algorithms are characterized by high sensitivity to the input dataset, we specifically study this problem through the lens of differential privacy, ensuring that each data point does not significantly affect the probability of learning any specific mechanism.
  For our results, we adopt the PAC-learning framework: with high probability, the learning algorithm should output a mechanism that is at most an additive $α$ away from optimal, in a $\varepsilon$-differentially private way. As a first result, we show that differential privacy and (near)-optimality are not achievable for general distributions. Surprisingly, assuming that the distribution underlying the agents' valuations is $σ$-smooth, we recover nearly optimal sample-complexity bounds for both economic efficiency and profit.
  For profit, we show how to construct in polynomial time an $α$-optimal and $\varepsilon$-differentially private mechanism using $\tildeΘ(\frac{1}{σ\varepsilonα^2})$ samples. For efficiency, measured by the gain from trade, we achieve the same result using $\tildeΘ(\frac{1}{\varepsilonα}+\frac{1}{α^2})$ samples. Notably, these bounds are essentially tight in the precision parameter $α$, since achieving $α$-optimality (ignoring differential privacy) requires at least $\frac{1}{α^2}$ samples.

</details>


### [674] [Testing Decision Makers without Counterfactuals](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02095)
*Yakov Babichenko*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文研究在强盗环境中，外部观察者能否仅基于决策、建议和结果数据，识别出决策者和建议者中谁更了解信息。研究发现，对于同步选择，存在有效的评分测试；对于序贯选择，则不存在。此外，识别更知情者与最大化社会福利之间存在冲突，无法同时实现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 核心问题是：在不确定环境下，当存在两个信息不对称的智能体（决策者和建议者）时，外部观察者能否根据观测到的行为数据（选择、建议和结果）识别出谁更知情。

Method: 聚焦于评分测试（scoring tests）这类方法，即对每个观测分配一个分数，根据平均分数选择智能体。分别分析了同步选择（simultaneous）和序贯选择（sequential）两种场景下的测试有效性。

Result: 同步选择场景下存在能成功识别更知情者的评分测试；序贯选择场景下则不存在。此外，在二元臂环境中，评分测试无法同时实现识别更知情者和达到超过最优福利一半的社会福利。

Conclusion: 识别更知情智能体与最大化社会福利之间存在根本性张力——激励智能体通过测试会扭曲其决策，导致福利损失。

Abstract: A decision-maker (DM) repeatedly makes choices under uncertainty in a bandit environment, where only the realization of the chosen arm is observed. Another competing agent, the adviser (AD), repeatedly provides recommendations, but the realizations of these recommendations are unobserved unless they coincide with the DM's choice. Both agents possess partial information about the arms' realizations. The central question we focus on is whether, in the long run, an outside observer can identify which agent is more informed based solely on the observed decisions, recommendations, and arm realizations.
  A test selects one of the agents based on the observed data. We focus primarily on the class of scoring tests, which assign a numerical score to each observation and select the agent according to the average score. We study strategic agents whose objective is to be selected by the test. For simultaneous arm choices, we show that there exists a scoring test that successfully identifies the more-informed agent. For sequential arm choices, however, no such scoring test exists.
  Finally, we explore the tension between identifying the more-informed agent and maximizing welfare. A DM whose objective is to pass the test may not necessarily make welfare-maximizing decisions. In a binary-arm environment, we show that no scoring test can simultaneously identify the more informed agent and achieve more than half of the welfare attained by welfare-maximizing decisions.

</details>


### [675] [Conditional Graph Diffusion for Negotiation Support: Overcoming Discrete Infeasibility and Preference Elicitation Gaps](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02209)
*Moirangthem Tiken Singh*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 提出条件图扩散（CGD）框架，在连续双边效用空间中生成谈判建议，通过推理时规范引导梯度实现高个体理性、低安全差距和公平性，无需重新训练。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统双边谈判支持系统在离散分配空间上搜索，面临结构不可行性（无离散结果满足个体理性），且无法利用自然语言对话中的偏好信号。

Method: 提出CGD框架：GATv2编码器捕获双边偏好结构，交叉注意力融合策略嵌入与对话表示，去噪扩散概率模型生成连续建议，推理时施加规范引导梯度（个体理性、安全邻近性、公平性）。

Result: 个体理性率≥0.997，安全差距≤0.009，对称差距≤0.15；相比纳什议价解，安全差距降低70倍，福利成本最大仅3%。

Conclusion: CGD框架有效克服离散搜索的结构不可行性，利用对话信号，并通过推理时引导实现规范遵从与福利最大化的解耦。

Abstract: Traditional bilateral negotiation support systems search over discrete allocation spaces. This approach encounters structural infeasibility when no discrete outcome satisfies individual rationality. It fails to incorporate preference signals embedded in natural language dialogue. This study introduces the Conditional Graph Diffusion (CGD) framework to generate recommendations in a continuous bilateral utility space. A GATv2 encoder captures comparative bilateral preference structure through dynamic attention. A cross-attention mechanism fuses strategic embeddings with transformer-based dialogue representations into a unified conditioning context for a denoising diffusion probabilistic model. An analytically derived normative guidance gradient applies at inference time. It injects per-step monotonic corrections at each reverse diffusion step, steering generation toward individual rationality, security proximity, and equitability without retraining. Evaluation across synthetic, CaSiNo, and Deal or No Deal corpora confirms accumulated corrections achieve an individual rationality rate of at least 0.997, a security gap of at most 0.009, and a symmetry gap within 0.15. Relative to the Nash Bargaining Solution, CGD reduces security gaps by up to 70-fold at a maximum welfare cost of 3%. An ablation study demonstrates naive constraint minimization without a learned generative prior fails normative compliance across heterogeneous corpora. A controlled misrepresentation experiment establishes the architectural capacity of cross-attention fusion to exploit dialogue signals. An inference-time welfare guidance mechanism decouples normative compliance from welfare maximization, recovering Pareto efficiency on CaSiNo without retraining while preserving individual rationality.

</details>


### [676] [Optimizing the Envy Cycle Elimination Algorithm](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02233)
*Karen Frilya Celine,Warut Suksompong*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 该论文研究了在不可分割商品公平分配中，通过改进嫉妒循环消除(ECE)算法的启发式策略来提升社会福利保障，发现联合选择商品和接收代理的启发式能显著降低最坏情况下的功利主义福利损失，而仅优化单一维度则效果有限。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在公平分配不可分割商品时，EF1是一个广泛使用的公平概念。ECE算法虽然总能产生EF1分配，但在选择下一个商品和接收代理方面有相当大的自由度。论文旨在探索如何利用这种灵活性来提高社会福利保障。

Method: 研究分析了多种自然启发式策略：联合选择商品和接收代理以最大化效用的启发式，以及仅优化其中一个维度的启发式。通过理论最坏情况分析和实证平均情况分析来评估这些策略的性能。

Result: 联合选择商品和接收代理的启发式能显著降低最坏情况下的功利主义福利损失；而仅优化单一维度（仅选择商品或仅选择代理）则无法带来类似的改进效果。

Conclusion: 在保持EF1公平性约束下，通过精心设计的启发式策略可以显著提升分配效率，其中联合优化两个决策维度是关键。理论结果通过平均情况分析得到了验证。

Abstract: In the fair allocation of indivisible goods, a widely used notion of fairness is envy-freeness up to one good (EF1). A classical way to compute an EF1 allocation is the envy cycle elimination (ECE) algorithm, which iteratively assigns a good to an unenvied agent and, after each assignment, resolves any resulting envy cycle. Although the ECE algorithm always produces an EF1 allocation, it leaves considerable freedom in choosing both the next good to allocate and the agent to receive it. We investigate natural heuristics that exploit this flexibility to improve welfare guarantees. For example, we show that if the heuristic jointly selects the good and the receiving agent maximizing the utility, the worst-case utilitarian welfare loss is significantly lower than that of the vanilla algorithm. By contrast, restricting the heuristic to select only one of these two dimensions does not yield comparable improvements. We also complement our theoretical results with empirical average-case analysis.

</details>


### [677] [Welfare-Optimal Classification with Accuracy Auctions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02435)
*Bana Sadi,Eden Saig,Nir Rosenfeld*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种结合真实拍卖机制的机器学习算法，用于优化社会福利而非单纯追求预测准确度，该算法能有效处理用户对准确性的异质性估值，并通过实验验证了其有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统预测算法以最大化准确率为目标，但这并不能保证最大化用户实际获得的收益。因为不同用户从正确预测中获得的收益存在异质性（即估值不同），且用户有动机虚报自己的估值，因此需要同时解决估值真实披露和福利优化的问题。

Method: 提出一种新型学习算法，将真实拍卖机制（truthful auction）嵌入到预测模型的训练过程中，通过设计合理的分配规则和定价机制，激励用户诚实报告他们对预测准确性的估值，同时以社会福利（用户从正确预测中获得的平均收益）为优化目标进行学习。

Result: 证明了该算法能够高效计算分配和价格，并且付费用户数量与样本量无关（这一结果令人惊讶）。在真实和合成数据上的实验展示了算法的效果，并探索了社会福利与准确率之间的关系。

Conclusion: 优化社会福利而非单纯追求准确率是可行且有意义的，通过引入拍卖机制可以在保证用户真实报告估值的同时实现社会福利最大化，且在付费用户数量上有良好的理论保证。

Abstract: Prediction algorithms are increasingly used to inform decisions about humans, but maximizing accuracy$\rule[0.25em]{1em}{0.4pt}$the standard learning objective$\rule[0.25em]{1em}{0.4pt}$does not necessarily maximize user benefits. Instead, we propose optimizing social welfare, defined as the average gain users receive from correct predictions. Welfare enables to express, and therefore account for, heterogeneity in how much users benefit from accuracy. But since these valuations are private and users can gain from overreporting them, learning must simultaneously elicit truthful values and optimize welfare with respect to them. To this end, we propose a novel learning algorithm that incorporates a truthful auction. We show how to compute allocations and prices efficiently, and bound the number of paying users$\rule[0.25em]{1em}{0.4pt}$ which surprisingly is independent of the sample size. We conclude with experiments on real and synthetic data that demonstrate our algorithm and explore the connections between welfare and accuracy.

</details>


### [678] [Pluralistic Leaderboards](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02547)
*Nika Haghtalab,Ariel D. Procaccia,Han Shao,Serena Lutong Wang,Kunhe Yang*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文指出现有的 Bradley-Terry 模型在 LLM 排行榜中无法处理用户偏好的异质性，并提出了一种基于社会选择理论的多元排行榜机制，通过局部稳定性（local stability）保证排名对不同用户群体的鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前基于 Bradley-Terry 模型的 LLM 排行榜将用户反馈聚合为单一全局质量分数，忽略了用户在不同任务和使用场景中的异质性偏好，导致部分用户群体的观点被扭曲或忽视。

Method: 借鉴社会选择理论中的局部稳定性概念，设计了一种仅需每位用户提供 Õ(k) 次成对比较的排行榜机制，保证前 k 名之外的模型不会被超过 O(1/k) 比例的用户集体认为优于前 k 名集合。

Result: 基于 LMArena 数据，实验表明标准 Bradley-Terry 聚合在实践中会违反局部稳定性，而提出的方法能提供显著更强的稳定性保障。

Conclusion: 多元排行榜机制能更公平地反映异质性用户偏好，为解决 LLM 评估中的群体偏差问题提供了可行路径。

Abstract: Recent leaderboard-based evaluations of large language models aggregate user feedback by fitting a Bradley--Terry model to pairwise comparisons, producing a single global ranking based on a latent quality score. While appealing for its simplicity, this approach is incompatible with heterogeneous preferences: when LLMs are used across diverse tasks and use cases, users who favor fundamentally different model behaviors can be systematically misrepresented when collapsed into a single quality score. To address this issue, we study \emph{pluralistic leaderboards} that aim to remain \emph{stable} with respect to heterogeneous user populations. Drawing on ideas from social choice theory, we adapt the notion of \emph{local stability}, which requires that no model outside the top-$k$ positions is collectively preferred to the top-$k$ set by more than $O(1/k)$ fraction of users. Building on techniques from the social choice literature, we design an alternative leaderboard mechanism that satisfies local stability while eliciting only $\widetilde{O}(k)$ pairwise comparisons per user, where $k$ is the size of the prefix for which stability is guaranteed. Using data from LMArena, we show that standard Bradley--Terry aggregation can violate local stability in practice, whereas our method provides substantially stronger stability guarantees.

</details>


<div id='cs.NE'></div>

# cs.NE [[Back]](#toc)

### [679] [Rare Events, Real Signals: Functional Ensembles as Units of Computation in Deep Spiking Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00073)
*Aditi Aravind,Konstantinos Ladakis,Mario Alexios Savaglio,Stelios M. Smirnakis,Maria Papadopouli*

Main category: cs.NE

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种受神经科学启发的功能连接分析框架，用于研究深度脉冲神经网络（SNN）中内部表征的形成。通过定义第一阶功能连接（1FC）群组并分析其响应特性，发现1FC群体呈现类ReLU的输入-输出关系，信息编码集中在罕见的高协同活动模式中，且功能连接结构受学习塑造，为理解SNN信息流提供了新视角。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 借鉴系统神经科学和功能连接的概念，探索深度脉冲神经网络（SNN）中内部表征如何跨分层处理系统涌现，并验证生物皮层中观察到的功能连接原则是否在人工SNN中得以保留。

Method: 基于训练好的SNN架构，利用神经元之间统计显著的成对相关性，从上一层的神经元中定义第一阶功能连接（1FC）群组；然后在不同条件下追踪其推理过程中的响应特性。

Result: 1FC群体展现出类似ReLU的稳健输入-输出关系，增益随群体规模系统性地缩放；可靠类别编码仅在高1FC协同放电事件中涌现，而这类事件发生频率较低；随机噪声和对抗扰动会破坏响应轮廓（尤其在前中期层）；功能连接结构受学习塑造，参数打乱后结构被破坏。

Conclusion: 1FC群体可作为输入编码和信息传递的功能性意义单元，为设计针对信息流节点的细粒度诊断提供了潜在应用方向。

Abstract: We investigate how internal representations emerge across hierarchical processing systems by introducing a neuroscience-inspired framework for analyzing deep spiking neural networks (SNN) through the lens of functional connectivity. Drawing on concepts from systems neuroscience and information theory, we form the first-order functionally-connected (1FC) group of a neuron based on its statistically significant pairwise correlations with neurons from the previous layer of a trained SNN architecture. We then track its response properties during inference under various conditions. Our analysis shows that several principles of functional connectivity previously observed in biological cortex are preserved in spiking ResNet architectures. These 1FC ensembles display interesting properties: their aggregate cofiring reliably predicts downstream neuronal responses through a robust, ReLU-like input-output relationship, whose gain scales systematically with ensemble size. Reliable encoding of the presented class emerges only during high 1FC cofiring events, which themselves occur infrequently, indicating that informative representations are concentrated in rare but highly coordinated activity patterns. Under uniform random noise or adversarial perturbations, these response profiles are disrupted, particularly in early and intermediate layers. This enables a targeted high-resolution interrogation at specific nodes and pathways. We showed that the functional connectivity structure is shaped by learning and this structure breaks under weight permutation. These establish 1FC ensembles as a functionally meaningful substrate for input encoding and information transfer, with potential implications in designing targeted fine-grained diagnostics on the information flow.

</details>


### [680] [Evolving to the Aesthetics of a Vision-Language Model](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00112)
*Stephen James Krol,Jon McCormack*

Main category: cs.NE

TL;DR: 探索了两种使用视觉语言模型（VLM）评估进化系统美学适应度的方法：CLIP-IQA直接评分法和基于Glicko排名的成对比较法，并在生成字体设计案例中与艺术家排名进行了对比分析。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 进化系统在创意领域表现优异，但设计能有效捕捉抽象输出美学的适应度函数仍是一个未解决问题。

Method: 方法一：使用CLIP-IQA对每个设计预测美学分数；方法二：通过VLM进行成对比较，利用Glicko评分系统估算种群排名。在自定义生成系统中进行了案例研究。

Result: 将两种方法的排名结果与艺术家的美学排名及其他美学评估技术进行了比较，并记录了艺术家使用这些方法进化设计的体验。

Conclusion: 批判性地分析了两种方法的优缺点，为利用VLM进行进化系统中的美学评估提供了实践见解。

Abstract: Evolutionary systems have demonstrated remarkable results in creative domains, with recent applications in generative typography, design, and music. However, an open problem remains in designing fitness functions that effectively capture the desired aesthetics of abstract outputs. In this work, we explore two methods for evaluating the aesthetics of a population using Vision-Language Models (VLMs). The first method uses CLIP-IQA to predict an aesthetic score for each design. The second method instead pits candidates against each other, with winners determined by a VLM using a custom prompt specified by the user. The outcomes of these pairwise comparisons are then used to estimate a population ranking via the Glicko rating system. We present these methods in the context of a case study using a custom generative system and compare the resulting rankings with an artist's aesthetic ranking and those produced by other aesthetic evaluation techniques. Additionally, we document the artist's experience using these approaches to evolve designs, critically analysing the strengths and weaknesses of both methods.

</details>


### [681] [Dynamics and Representation Structure of Local Approximations to Gradient-Based Learning in Linear Recurrent Neural Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00243)
*Ezekiel Williams,Alexandre Payeur,Guillaume Lajoie*

Main category: cs.NE

TL;DR: 本文通过动力系统理论分析，比较了受空间和时间局部性约束的RNN学习算法（RFLO和tBPTT）与标准BPTT在学习动态上的差异，发现RFLO的解被限制为初始参数的低秩扰动，揭示了局部性约束如何塑造学习动态。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 生物和神经形态RNN受局部性约束，无法直接使用BPTT中的非局部项。现有算法（如RFLO和tBPTT）通过不同程度地忽略非局部项来满足约束，但这些算法的学习动态及其与BPTT的比较尚不明确。

Method: 应用动力系统理论于数据对齐的线性RNN（其动态可分解为正交模式），比较了RFLO、BPTT和一步tBPTT的稳态解、稳定性和收敛速率。

Result: 发现RFLO与BPTT和一步tBPTT的定性行为存在显著差异；RFLO学到的解被限制为初始参数的低秩扰动，该结论在数据对齐设置之外也成立。

Conclusion: 研究为局部性约束如何塑造学习动态提供了分析性见解，对神经科学学习模型和RNN的替代优化方法具有启示意义。

Abstract: Biological and neuromorphic recurrent neural networks (RNNs) are subject to spatial and temporal locality constraints on the information that can plausibly be used during learning. A common strategy to satisfy these constraints is to modify gradient descent by neglecting non-local terms to varying degrees, as in random feedback local online (RFLO) learning and truncated backpropagation through time (tBPTT). However, the learning dynamics of these algorithms, and how they compare with BPTT, remain poorly understood. We apply dynamical systems theory to data-aligned linear RNNs -- whose dynamics can be separated into orthogonal modes -- to compare stationary solutions, stability properties, and convergence rates, finding qualitatively distinct behaviour for RFLO versus BPTT and one-step tBPTT. We further observe that the solutions learned by RFLO are restricted to low-rank perturbations of initial parameters, a result which holds beyond the data-aligned setting. Our work provides analytical insight into how locality constraints shape learning dynamics, with implications for neuroscientific models of learning and alternative optimization approaches for RNNs.

</details>


### [682] [Meta-Black-Box Optimization with Ensemble Surrogate Modeling for Robustness-Accuracy Trade-off within SAEA](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00862)
*Xiao Jin,Yongxiong Wang,Haobo Liu,Yudong Du,Yukun Du*

Main category: cs.NE

TL;DR: 本文提出AdaE-SAEA，一种自适应集成代理辅助进化算法，用于昂贵多目标优化。它通过元黑箱优化框架统一控制代理建模（bagging/boosting自适应平衡鲁棒性与准确性）和填充准则，利用强化学习训练元策略，在合成和实际问题上优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有SAEA依赖刚性手动设计组件，泛化性差；MetaBBO多控制单一组件，缺乏对SAEA多组件的统一控制；代理建模中鲁棒性与准确性的权衡很少被明确考虑。

Method: 将SAEA嵌入MetaBBO框架作为底层优化器，通过强化学习训练元策略联合控制填充准则和集成代理建模。代理建模采用bagging和boosting模块自适应平衡鲁棒性与准确性，填充准则由元策略自适应选择。采用并行采样和集中训练提升训练效率和迁移性。

Result: 在合成和实际问题上优于SOTA基线及MetaBBO方法，验证了TabPFN作为基代理模型的有效性。

Conclusion: 首次在SAEA中统一控制代理建模和填充准则，并显式处理鲁棒性-准确性权衡。

Abstract: Surrogate-assisted evolutionary algorithms (SAEAs) have been widely used for expensive black-box optimization problems. However, their reliance on rigid and manually designed components limits their flexibility and generalization across tasks. Meta-black-box optimization (MetaBBO) provides a promising paradigm for adaptively configuring algorithmic components. Nevertheless, existing MetaBBO methods usually control only a single component, and few studies have investigated the unified control of multi-component optimizers such as SAEAs. Moreover, the robustness-accuracy trade-off in surrogate modeling, which is crucial for stable early-stage exploration and accurate late-stage exploitation, has rarely been explicitly considered. To address these issues, we propose AdaE-SAEA, an adaptive ensemble surrogate-assisted evolutionary algorithm for expensive multi-objective optimization. AdaE-SAEA embeds SAEA as the low-level optimizer within the MetaBBO framework and jointly controls the infill criterion and ensemble-based surrogate modeling. Specifically, bagging and boosting are designed as surrogate modeling modules to adaptively balance robustness and accuracy across different search phases, while the meta-policy simultaneously selects the infill criterion to enable adaptive sampling decisions. The meta-policy is trained through reinforcement learning with parallel sampling and centralized training, improving both training efficiency and transferability. Experiments on synthetic and real-world problems demonstrate that AdaE-SAEA outperforms state-of-the-art baselines and MetaBBO-based methods. We further verify the effectiveness of TabPFN as the base surrogate model for ensemble learning. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first work to unify the control of surrogate modeling and infill criteria in SAEAs while explicitly addressing the robustness--accuracy trade-off.

</details>


### [683] [Spiking and Event-driven Neuromorphic Mamba Models for Efficient Speech Recognition](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01135)
*Tauseef Ahmed,Tao Sun,Jeronimo Castrillon,Kanishkan Vadivel,Guangzhi Tang*

Main category: cs.NE

TL;DR: 本文提出了事件驱动和脉冲神经网络两种方案来提升SpeechMamba模型在自动语音识别中的激活稀疏性，在保持低精度损失的前提下实现了60%-70%以上的稀疏度，并通过模拟器进一步优化了计算效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 深度学习驱动的ASR在边缘设备上面临计算和能耗瓶颈，现有神经形态计算研究缺乏对ASR任务中不同神经形态策略硬件收益的系统评估。

Method: 提出事件驱动SpeechMamba（采用FATReLU激活函数实现>60%激活稀疏性）和脉冲SpeechMamba（实现>70%稀疏性且参数减少30%），并开发周期精确的事件驱动模拟器用于算法-硬件协同探索。

Result: 事件驱动SpeechMamba在LibriSpeech上实现>60%激活稀疏性且精度下降<1%；脉冲SpeechMamba实现>70%稀疏性且参数减少30%；模拟器识别计算瓶颈并带来>10%额外效率提升。

Conclusion: 神经形态计算策略能有效提升ASR模型在资源受限设备上的效率，事件驱动与脉冲神经网络各有优势，协同优化可进一步提升性能。

Abstract: Deep learning has greatly advanced automatic speech recognition (ASR), enabling widespread deployment on edge devices such as smartphones and smart home systems. However, the computational and energy demands of deep neural networks pose significant challenges for such resource-constrained deployments, introducing latency and limiting real-time interaction. Neuromorphic computing offers a promising solution by introducing activation sparsity through spiking neural networks (SNNs) and event-driven neural networks, converting dense operations into sparse computations. However, a study that evaluates the hardware benefits of different neuromorphic strategies remains lacking for ASR. This paper explores spiking and event-driven neuromorphic neural networks to improve activation sparsity in the state-of-the-art SpeechMamba model for ASR. We introduce an event-driven SpeechMamba with FATReLU activation, achieving over 60% activation sparsity with less than 1% accuracy degradation on LibriSpeech. We also propose a spiking SpeechMamba that attains over 70% sparsity while using 30% fewer parameters than comparable SNNs. Finally, we develop a cycle-accurate event-driven simulator enabling flexible algorithm-hardware co-exploration, which helps us identify computational bottlenecks and yields over 10% additional efficiency improvements.

</details>


### [684] [Simultaneous Model-Based Evolution of Constants and Expression Structure in GP-GOMEA for Symbolic Regression](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02236)
*Johannes Koch,Tanja Alderliesten,Peter A. N. Bosman*

Main category: cs.NE

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种将实值GOMEA与GP-GOMEA融合的方法，在进化过程中同时优化符号回归中的表达式结构和实值常量，实验证明该方法优于传统的常量优化策略。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: GP-GOMEA在符号回归中表现优异，但其使用临时随机常量而不进行专门的常量优化，可能限制模型精度。现有研究表明，离散与连续变量同时联合优化效果更好，因此本文旨在将常量优化融入表达式结构进化过程。

Method: 将实值GOMEA与GP-GOMEA合并，在进化过程中同时优化表达式结构和实值常量，实现离散-连续混合变量的同步联合优化。

Result: 提出的联合优化方法在多数测试场景中表现最佳，优于单独使用线性缩放、重启、进化后常量调优等传统常量处理方式。

Conclusion: 验证了在进化过程中同步优化常量的重要性，为符号回归中的常量处理提供了更优的集成方案。

Abstract: Genetic programming (GP) approaches are among the state-of-the-art for symbolic regression, the task of constructing symbolic expressions that fit well with data. To find highly accurate symbolic expressions, both the expression structure and any contained real-valued constants, are important. GP-GOMEA, a modern model-based evolutionary algorithm, is one of the leading algorithms for finding accurate, yet compact expressions. Yet, GP-GOMEA does not perform dedicated constant optimization, but rather uses ephemeral random constants. Hence, the accuracy of GP-GOMEA may well still be improved upon by the incorporation of a constant optimization mechanism. Existing research into mixed discrete-continuous optimization with EAs has shown that a simultaneous and well-integrated approach to optimizing both discrete and continuous parts, leads to the best results on a variety of problems, especially when there are interactions between these parts. In this paper, we therefore propose a novel approach where constants in expressions are optimized at the same time as the expression structure by merging the real-valued variant of GOMEA with GP-GOMEA. The proposed approach is compared to other forms of handling constants in GP-GOMEA, and in the context of other commonly used techniques such as linear scaling, restarts, and constant tuning after GP optimization. Our results indicate that our novel approach generally performs best and confirms the importance of simultaneous constant optimization during evolution.

</details>


<div id='cs.IR'></div>

# cs.IR [[Back]](#toc)

### [685] [Multimodal Music Recommendation System using LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00125)
*Srikar Prabhas Kandagatla,Sreehitha R. Narayana,Chandana Magapu,Swetha Mohan,Shamanth Kuthpadi,Hongjie Chen,Ryan A. Rossi,Franck Dernoncourt,Nesreen Ahmed*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 本文提出一个多模态音乐推荐框架，在LastFM-1K数据集上融合音频、歌词、语义元数据和收听完成率三种信号，扩展E4SRec框架并测试多种骨干网络和LLM，实验表明内容特征相比纯ID基线在Recall和NDCG上最高提升95%和79%，但多模态融合并非总是正向增益。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有音乐推荐系统主要依赖协同交互历史，忽视了歌曲的语义和声学内容。虽然已有工作尝试结合文本、多模态或语义信号，但缺乏一个统一的基于LLM的序列推理框架来联合建模所有这三种信号并基于实际歌曲内容进行推荐。

Method: 在LastFM-1K数据集上引入三种互补信号：(1) 音频和歌词嵌入；(2) LLM生成的语义元数据（MGPHot标注模式）；(3) 收听完成率。采用E4SRec框架进行扩展，融入多模态特征，测试多种item ID编码骨干（SASRec、BERT4Rec、GRU4Rec）和LLM骨干（LLaMa-2-13B、Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct、LLaMa-3-70B），在零样本和微调设置下进行评估。

Result: 集成内容特征相比纯ID基线在Recall上最高提升95%，在NDCG上最高提升79%。但实验发现朴素多模态融合并不总是带来累加性提升，表明跨模态集成仍存在挑战。

Conclusion: 多模态内容特征能显著提升音乐推荐性能，但跨模态融合并非简单叠加即可获益，需要更精细的设计。同时，本文发布了一个大规模多模态音乐推荐基准数据集。

Abstract: Music recommendation systems typically treat songs as opaque tokens, relying on collaborative interaction histories which overlooks semantic or acoustic content. Prior work has explored LLM-augmented, multimodal, and text-enhanced approaches to sequential recommendation, and while some methods partially combine semantic, acoustic, or engagement signals, none jointly model all three within a unified LLM-based sequential reasoning framework that grounds recommendations in actual song content. In this work, we propose a multimodal framework for session-based music recommendation that enriches the LastFM-1K dataset with three complementary signals: (1) audio and lyric embeddings extracted using pretrained music and text representation models, (2) LLM-generated semantic metadata using the MGPHot annotation schema, and (3) listening completion ratios. We adopt the E4SRec framework by extending it with multimodal features and different item ID encoder backbones, including SASRec, BERT4Rec, and GRU4Rec. We further extend the LLM backbone option with LLaMa-2-13B, Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct, and LLaMa-3-70B in both zero-shot and fine-tuned settings. Our experiments show that integrating content-based features improves over ID-only baselines up to 95% in terms of Recall and 79% in terms of NDCG. Moreover, our experiments show that naive multimodal fusion does not always yield additive improvements, highlighting challenges in cross-modal integration. We release a large-scale multimodal benchmark for music recommendation.

</details>


### [686] [Beyond Text and Tables: Vision-Language Model Integration in ComProScanner for Extracting Materials Data from Scientific Figures with High Accuracy](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00065)
*Aritra Roy,Enrico Grisan,Chiara Gattinoni,John Buckeridge*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 本文扩展了ComProScanner框架，引入基于视觉语言模型（VLM）的图表提取能力，使其能够从科学文献的文本、表格和图片中自动提取材料成分-性能数据，成为首个全自动化多模态材料文献挖掘平台。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的大语言模型文献挖掘框架仅限于文本和表格内容，忽略了大量以科学图表形式呈现的定量性能数据，因此需要扩展框架以支持图表数据的自动提取。

Method: 在ComProScanner框架中新增FigureExtractor工具（基于标题关键词过滤图表）和GraphExtractorTool代理（将图表传递给可配置的VLM以提取成分-性能对），并引入基于范围的值误差阈值参数以提供更物理意义的评估。

Result: 在50篇压电陶瓷文章上测试，Gemini-3-Flash-Preview表现最佳，成分准确率0.97，归一化F1分数0.97，且是四种模型中成本效益最高的。

Conclusion: VLM集成的ComProScanner是首个针对材料科学、全自动化、多模态的文献挖掘平台，能够从文本、表格和图表中统一提取结构化成分-性能数据。

Abstract: Automated extraction of materials composition-property data from scientific literature has advanced considerably with the development of large language model-based pipelines; however, existing frameworks remain limited to textual and tabular content, overlooking the substantial proportion of quantitative property data reported exclusively in scientific figures. Here, we extend ComProScanner, a fully end-to-end multi-agent framework for automated composition-property database construction, with a native vision-language model (VLM) based figure extraction capability. The extension introduces a FigureExtractor utility for caption-keyword-based figure filtering across all supported publishers, and a GraphExtractorTool agent that passes extracted figures to a configurable VLM to recover composition-property pairs from scientific charts and plots. Four VLMs are selected for evaluation on the basis of the LMArena Diagram leaderboard with an input cost criterion of less than \$1.50 per million tokens. Benchmarking on 50 piezoelectric ceramic articles from the established $d_{33}$ test corpus demonstrates that Gemini-3-Flash-Preview achieves the highest performance with a composition accuracy of 0.97 and a normalised F1 score of 0.97, whilst remaining the most cost-effective model among the four evaluated. We additionally introduce a range-based value error threshold parameter into the evaluation framework, providing a more physically meaningful assessment of numeric property values extracted from figures than exact value matching. These contributions establish VLM-integrated ComProScanner as the first materials-specific, fully automated, multimodal literature mining platform capable of extracting structured composition-property data from text, tables, and figures within a single unified pipeline.

</details>


### [687] [SpikeHash: Learning Binary Codes with Spiking Neural Networks for Cross-Modal Hashing Retrieval](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00740)
*Yukuan Zhang,Jiarui Zhao,Shangqing Nie,Shengsheng Wang*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: SpikeHash是一种基于脉冲神经网络（SNN）的跨模态哈希检索框架，通过脉冲状态演化、定向脉冲交互和竞争性脉冲读出机制，替代传统连续哈希映射，在保持检索精度的同时显著降低参数量、计算量和能耗。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有跨模态哈希方法通常在连续特征空间中学习语义，并通过最后的符号操作生成二进制码，导致训练优化与离散哈希检索之间的耦合较弱。作者希望设计一种更自然、更紧密耦合的哈希学习框架。

Method: SpikeHash包含三个核心模块：1) 将图像和文本特征转换为多时间步的脉冲序列；2) 在共享汉明空间中，两个脉冲序列共同驱动共享哈希状态的时间演化；3) 通过定向脉冲调制进行跨模态交互，并使每个哈希位由配对脉冲通道之间的时间竞争产生（正-负脉冲哈希读出头）。

Result: 在三个基准数据集上取得了具有竞争力的检索准确率，同时显著减少了哈希学习阶段的参数量、操作次数和估计能耗。

Conclusion: SpikeHash证明了脉冲神经网络可以作为传统连续哈希映射的紧凑替代方案，为低功耗跨模态检索提供了新思路。

Abstract: Cross-modal hashing retrieval encodes heterogeneous data into compact binary codes for efficient Hamming-space search. Existing methods usually learn cross-modal semantics in continuous feature spaces and generate binary codes through a final sign operation, which weakly couples training optimization with discrete hash retrieval. We propose SpikeHash, a unified spiking framework that formulates cross-modal hashing as spike-state evolution, directional spike interaction, and competitive spike readout. Specifically, SpikeHash converts image and text features into multi-timestep spike sequences. In a shared Hamming space, the two spike sequences jointly drive the temporal evolution of a shared hash state. Cross-modal interaction is further performed through directional spike modulation, enabling each modality to influence the firing dynamics of the other. Crucially, SpikeHash replaces the conventional continuous hash head with a positive-negative spiking hash readout, where each hash bit is produced by temporal competition between paired spike channels. Experimental results show that SpikeHash achieves competitive retrieval accuracy on three benchmark datasets while reducing the parameter size, operation count, and estimated energy of the hash learning stage, suggesting a compact spiking alternative to conventional continuous hash mapping. The project page is available at https://shuqiao-111.github.io/.

</details>


### [688] [SentimentLens: Reconciling Sentiment and Ratings via Dual-Modality in the Hospitality Sector](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00084)
*Dineth Jayakody,Pasindu Thenahandi,Sampath Jayarathna*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 本文提出SentimentLens系统，基于方面级情感分析技术，从海量非结构化酒店评论中提取结构化知识，支持区域、酒店和类别层面的多层级分析，并通过实际数据集验证其有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在线旅游平台产生大量用户生成的酒店评论，但将非结构化文本反馈转化为结构化、可操作洞察仍然具有挑战性。

Method: SentimentLens系统集成了方面术语提取、方面情感分类、语义类别分配和多层级分析模块，并采用重要性-绩效分析和熵分析进行跨模态调和。

Result: 系统在超过10,000条真实酒店评论数据集上展示了旅行者情感在不同区域、服务类别和酒店原型间的差异，并识别出潜在运营冲突和结构性服务质量问题。

Conclusion: SentimentLens有效将大规模非结构化评论转化为可操作情报，支持酒店管理和旅游政策的基于数据决策，且具有跨目的地和领域的通用性。

Abstract: Online travel platforms generate vast volumes of user-generated hotel reviews, offering rich opportunities to understand traveler experiences at scale. However, transforming unstructured textual feedback into structured, actionable insights remains a challenging task. This paper presents SentimentLens, a scalable analysis system based on Aspect-Based Sentiment Analysis that performs knowledge extraction from unstructured hotel reviews and organizes them into interpretable service categories. SentimentLens integrates aspect term extraction, aspect sentiment classification, semantic category assignment, and multi-level analytical modules to support region-level, hotel-level, and category-level evaluation. The system is designed to operate across different geographic contexts and hospitality settings. To demonstrate its practical utility, we apply SentimentLens to a large real-world dataset of over 10,000 publicly available hotel reviews. Through extensive analysis, the framework reveals how traveler sentiment varies across regions, service categories, and hotel archetypes. We further implement a cross-modal reconciliation of textual sentiment and numerical ratings to identify latent operational conflicts, structural inconsistencies in service quality, and high-impact improvement opportunities using importance--performance and entropy-based analyses. The results show that SentimentLens effectively transforms large-scale unstructured reviews into actionable intelligence, supporting data-driven decision-making for hospitality management and tourism policy. While demonstrated using a national case study, the proposed system is generalizable to other destinations and review-driven service domains.

</details>


### [689] [Synthetic Data from Cross-Domain Events for Large-Scale Recommendation Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00282)
*Xiangyu Wang,Yawen He,Shivendra Pratap Singh,Han Huang,Mengtong Hu,Sharath Ciddu,Yi-Hsuan Hsieh,Erik Groving,Yi Ding,Jieming Di,Tony Wang,Min Yun,Xiaoyu Chen,Ling Leng,Rob Malkin*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: SCALR是一个用于推荐系统的跨域合成数据生成框架，通过将源域用户交互事件转化为目标域的合成交互数据，实现模型无关的数据增强，在线A/B测试中取得了显著提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大规模推荐系统面临数据稀疏和隐式反馈噪声的挑战，传统跨域知识蒸馏方法依赖特定模型结构，缺乏通用性。

Method: SCALR采用两阶段模块化设计：①事件翻译阶段，基于源域观察到的用户交互，估计用户与目标域物品交互的概率，生成合成事件；②下游模型训练阶段，以模型无关的方式用合成事件增强目标域训练数据。

Result: 在工业推荐平台的在线A/B测试中取得了统计显著的改进。

Conclusion: 本文是首批明确将跨域事件转移视为合成数据生成问题的研究工作之一，为推荐系统的跨域学习提供了新的范式。

Abstract: Large-scale recommendation systems operate across diverse domains, yet they face the challenges of data sparsity and noisy implicit feedback. Traditional approaches mitigate this via model-specific knowledge distillation from source domains to a target domain. Inspired by the transformative success of synthetic data generation in large language models (LLMs), we introduce Synthetic Cross-domain Augmentation and Learning for Recommendation (SCALR), a framework that generates synthetic user-item interaction events for a target recommendation domain by leveraging observed events from a source domain. SCALR decomposes cross-domain learning into two modular stages. First, it translates observed user events in source domains by framing event generation as estimating the likelihood that a user would interact with a target-domain item, conditioned on their observed interactions in a source domain. Second, downstream models train on these synthetic events as cross-domain learning objectives, where the synthetic events augment the target domain's training data in a model-agnostic manner. Our approach yields statistically significant improvements in online A/B tests on an industrial recommendation platform. To the best of our knowledge, this is among the first works to explicitly frame cross-domain event transfer as synthetic data generation for recommendation systems.

</details>


### [690] [LLMs Need Encoders for Semantic IDs Too](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00324)
*Xiangyi Chen,Zelun Wang,Xinyi Li,Yi-Ping Hsu,Jaewon Yang,Jiajing Xu*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 本文提出PrefixMem，一种轻量级语义ID编码器，通过前缀n-gram记忆表为LLM提供结构化的前缀条件化表示，显著提升生成式推荐中深层SID准确率（最高46%）和检索召回率（最高22%），证实SID token与其他非语言模态一样需要专用编码器。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前生成式推荐系统直接将语义ID（SID）token加入LLM词汇表，依赖训练从头学习其上下文依赖含义，忽略了SID层级token的含义依赖于其前缀上下文的特性，导致模型难以有效捕获这一结构化信息。

Method: 提出PrefixMem，一种基于前缀n-gram记忆表的轻量级SID编码器。该编码器可为LLM在SID token位置提供结构化的、前缀条件化的表示，可像视觉编码器一样独立预训练后接入任意LLM进行联合训练。

Result: 在Pinterest的大规模数据上，跨多个LLM家族评估表明：深层SID准确率相对提升最高46%，完整SID检索召回率相对提升最高22%。在贪心解码失败的困难样本上，准确率相对提升高达77%。

Conclusion: SID token正如其他非语言模态一样，受益于专用编码器。PrefixMem通过提供结构化前缀条件化表示，有效解决了LLM直接建模SID层级结构的困难。

Abstract: Multimodal LLMs use dedicated encoders to bridge non-language modalities (vision encoders for images, depth models for audio codec tokens) because raw token embeddings alone cannot capture modality-specific structure. We argue that Semantic IDs (SIDs), the hierarchical codes used in generative recommendation, constitute another such modality: a SID level token's meaning depends on its prefix context, yet current systems simply add SID tokens to the vocabulary and rely on training to learn these context-dependent meanings from scratch. We propose PrefixMem, a lightweight SID encoder based on prefix n-gram memory tables that provides the LLM with structured, prefix-conditioned representations at SID token positions. Like vision encoders in multimodal LLMs, PrefixMem can be pre-trained independently and then attached to any LLM for joint training. We evaluate on large-scale data from Pinterest across multiple LLM families and show that PrefixMem improves deepest-level SID accuracy by up to 46% relative and full-SID retrieval recall by up to 22% relative at matched training compute. The encoder's benefit concentrates on hard examples where greedy decoding fails, with up to 77% relative accuracy gains, confirming that SID tokens benefit from a dedicated encoder just as other non-language modalities do.

</details>


### [691] [UniPinRec: Unifying Generative Retrieval and Ranking at Pinterest Scale](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00422)
*Hanyu Li,Yi-Ping Hsu,Aditya Mantha,Prabhat Agarwal,Laksh Bhasin,Jialu Wang,Hongtao Lin,Bella Huang,Yaxin Li,Xinyi Li,Chuxi Wang,Kousik Rajesh,Hooshmand Shokri Razaghi,Shunyao Li,Zongyue Qin,Jaewon Yang,James Li,Dhruvil Deven Badani,Jiajing Xu,Charles Rosenberg*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: UniPinRec 在 Pinterest 实现了检索与排序的全栈统一：共享输入格式、单一 Transformer 模型、统一训练阶段，并复用 KV 缓存降低计算量。上线后线上互动提升约 1%，延迟降低 11.1%，QPS 提升 63.6%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有推荐系统中检索和排序阶段虽都使用大型 Transformer 编码相同用户行为数据，却分别训练、部署，导致参数、计算和服务成本重复。先前工作仅统一模型架构，未统一输入格式、训练流程和服务栈。

Method: (1) Masked Action Modeling (MAM)：消除交叉编码，无需加倍上下文长度即可实现权重共享；(2) Blended Training：将动作序列与 feed 展示曝光数据混合，同时满足检索和排序目标；(3) Cross-stage KV Cache Sharing：检索阶段计算的用户历史 KV 缓存直接用于排序阶段，减少总 FLOPs。

Result: 在 Pinterest 核心场景部署后，线上互动提升约 +1%，端到端服务延迟降低 11.1%，QPS 提升 63.6%。

Conclusion: 这是首个在生产推荐系统中实现检索与排序全栈统一（输入、模型、训练、服务）的工作，证明了统一方案在性能和效率上的可行性。

Abstract: Modern recommendation systems predominantly train retrieval and ranking as separate models despite both increasingly relying on large transformers encoding the same user behavior data, duplicating parameters, compute, and serving cost. Prior work unifies the model architecture but not the full pipeline: input formats, training procedures, and serving stacks remain fragmented across stages. We present UniPinRec, which achieves full-stack unification of retrieval and ranking at Pinterest: one input format, one model, one training stage, deployed within existing serving infrastructure. A shared transformer encodes the user action sequence into candidate-independent representations that branch into retrieval (ANN dot-product) and ranking (cross-attention) via task-specific heads. Three ideas make this work: (1) Masked Action Modeling (MAM) eliminates interleaving, enabling weight sharing without doubling context length; (2) Blended training examples pair action sequences with feedview impression slates to satisfy both objectives jointly; (3) Cross-stage KV cache sharing reuses user-history computation from retrieval for ranking, reducing total FLOPs versus serving two independent models. Deployed in the Pinterest core surfaces, UniPinRec delivers approximately +1% online engagement lift while cutting end-to-end serving latency by 11.1% and lifting QPS by 63.6%. To our knowledge, this is the first full-stack unification of retrieval and ranking, covering inputs, model, training and serving, deployed in a production recommendation system.

</details>


### [692] [Trustworthy Recommendation in the Era of Large Language Models: Opportunities and Challenges](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00540)
*Bohao Wang,Yu Cui,Zhenxiang Xu,Jujia Zhao,Chenxiao Fan,Jizhi Zhang,Weiqin Yang,Shengjia Zhang,Sirui Chen,Yang Zhang,Xiaoyan Zhao,Wenjie Wang,Chongming Gao,Fuli Feng,Xiangnan He,Jiawei Chen*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 本文系统综述了大语言模型（LLM）赋能下的可信推荐系统，涵盖200多篇研究，识别出13个机遇和18个挑战，构建了新的分类体系，并指出了未来研究方向。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 推荐系统正经历两大范式转变：目标从追求准确度转向可信赖性（鲁棒性、公平性、隐私保护等），技术上LLM被广泛集成。这引发了一个关键问题：LLM的融入如何重塑可信推荐的面貌？本文旨在系统综述这一交叉领域。

Method: 系统综述200多篇近期研究，从六个可信赖维度（鲁棒性、公平性、隐私保护等）系统识别LLM带来的13个机遇和18个挑战，构建新的分类体系，并综述常用数据集和评估指标。

Result: LLM的引入是一把双刃剑：一方面其先进机制和友好界面增强了可信赖性；另一方面引入了新风险，如新型偏见和幻觉引发的问题。研究系统梳理了机遇与挑战，并形成了分类体系。

Conclusion: 指出了关键开放挑战和未来研究方向，为LLM赋能的可信推荐系统研究提供了系统性参考和展望。

Abstract: The field of recommender systems (RS) is currently undergoing two profound paradigm shifts. From the perspective of objectives, the goal has shifted beyond mere recommendation accuracy to comprehensive trustworthiness, encompassing multiple dimensions such as robustness, fairness, and privacy preservation. From a technical perspective, Large Language Models (LLMs) have been extensively integrated into RS, reshaping the foundations of recommendation through richer semantic understanding, stronger intent reasoning, and more flexible user interactions. The convergence of these two shifts prompts a timely and pivotal question: how does the integration of LLMs reshape the landscape of trustworthy recommendation? In this work, we present a systematic review of trustworthy LLM-empowered recommendation. By comprehensively analyzing over 200 recent studies, we reveal that the introduction of LLMs acts as a double-edged sword. While their advanced mechanisms and user-friendly interfaces offer unprecedented opportunities to enhance trustworthiness, they simultaneously introduce new risks, such as novel forms of bias and hallucination-induced issues. To characterize this dual impact, we systematically identify 13 opportunities and 18 challenges across six fundamental dimensions of trustworthiness, and accordingly organize the existing literature into a novel taxonomy. We also provide a comprehensive review of commonly used datasets and evaluation metrics to facilitate empirical validation. Finally, we identify critical open challenges and outline future directions, hoping to inspire future research on this emerging topic.

</details>


### [693] [Critic-R: Improving Agentic Search using Instruction-tuned Retrievers with Natural Language Introspective Feedback](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00590)
*Md Zarif Ul Alam,Alireza Salemi,Hamed Zamani*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 提出Critic-R框架，通过引入批评者模型评估智能体推理轨迹，在推理和训练阶段优化检索器，无需人工标注即可提升检索质量和答案准确率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有智能体搜索系统在优化检索器时面临挑战，通常需要大量协同训练或黄金标准标注，限制了实际应用。需要一种无需人工标注即可有效改进检索质量的方法。

Method: 提出Critic-R框架，包含两个机制：(1) Critic-R-Zero：推理时通过批评者模型评估推理轨迹，迭代优化查询和检索指令；(2) Critic-Embed：利用成功/失败的优化轨迹作为自动监督信号，优化检索模型。

Result: 在HotpotQA、2WikiMultihopQA、MuSiQue和Bamboogle数据集上，Critic-R显著提升了检索质量和下游答案准确率。

Conclusion: Critic-R通过显式闭环反馈机制，在不依赖人工标注的情况下有效优化了智能体搜索系统的检索性能，具有良好的实际应用潜力。

Abstract: Agentic search systems iteratively interact with retrieval models to answer complex queries. Despite substantial progress, optimizing retrievers for agentic search remains challenging, often requiring heavy co-training or gold-standard annotations that limit real-world applicability. We propose Critic-R, a framework that explicitly closes the feedback loop between the reasoning agent and the retrieval model during both inference and training. Critic-R introduces a critic model that evaluates the agent's introspective reasoning trace after consuming retrieved evidence to determine whether the retrieved context sufficiently supports the next reasoning step. Critic-R has two complementary mechanisms: Critic-R-Zero, an inference-time query refinement loop that iteratively rewrites queries and retrieval instructions, and Critic-Embed, an optimization approach for retrieval models that leverages successful and failed refinement trajectories as automatic supervision without requiring manual relevance annotation. We evaluate Critic-R on HotpotQA, 2WikiMultihopQA, MuSiQue, and Bamboogle. Results show that Critic-R significantly improves both retrieval quality and downstream answer accuracy.

</details>


### [694] [MemGraphRAG: Memory-based Multi-Agent System for Graph Retrieval-Augmented Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00610)
*Chuanjie Wu,Zhishang Xiang,Yunbo Tang,Zerui Chen,Qinggang Zhang,Jinsong Su*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: MemGraphRAG提出了一种基于记忆的多智能体系统来构建高质量知识图谱，通过共享记忆提供全局上下文，解决传统GraphRAG在碎片化语料中构建的图存在主题不一致、逻辑冲突和结构碎片化的问题，并设计了记忆感知的分层检索算法，在多个基准上达到SOTA效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的GraphRAG方法依赖孤立的片段级提取来构建知识图谱，缺乏对整体语料的全局视角，导致构建的图存在主题不一致、逻辑冲突和结构碎片化问题，从而降低了检索性能。

Method: 提出MemGraphRAG框架，包含两个核心组件：(1) 基于记忆的多智能体系统，多个智能体通过共享内存协作，在整个提取过程中提供统一的全局上下文，动态解决逻辑冲突并维持结构连通性；(2) 记忆感知的分层检索算法，针对所构建的图结构进行定制化检索。

Result: 在多个基准数据集上的实验表明，MemGraphRAG在性能上超越了当前最先进的基线模型，且效率相当。

Conclusion: 通过引入记忆机制实现全局视角的图构建，有效解决了现有GraphRAG方法的碎片化问题，为大规模非结构化语料上的复杂推理提供了更可靠的检索增强生成方案。

Abstract: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) has become an essential method for mitigating hallucinations in Large Language Models (LLMs) by leveraging external knowledge. Although effective for simple queries, traditional RAG struggles with large-scale, unstructured corpora where information is highly fragmented. Graph-based RAG (GraphRAG) incorporates knowledge graphs to capture structural relationships, enabling more comprehensive retrieval for complex reasoning. However, existing GraphRAG methods rely on isolated, fragment-level extraction for graph construction, lacking a global perspective on the whole corpus. As a result, these methods frequently lead to thematically inconsistent, logically conflicting, and structurally fragmented graphs that degrade retrieval performance. In this paper, we propose MemGraphRAG, a novel framework that introduces a memory-based multi-agent system to ensure high-quality graph construction. Specifically, MemGraphRAG employs a collaborative society of agents supported by shared memory, which provides a unified global context throughout the extraction process. This mechanism allows agents to dynamically resolve logical conflicts and maintain structural connectivity throughout the corpus. Furthermore, we propose a memory-aware hierarchical retrieval algorithm tailored for the constructed graph. Extensive experiments on multiple benchmarks demonstrate that MemGraphRAG outperforms the state-of-the-art baseline models with comparable efficiency. Our code is available at https://github.com/XMUDeepLIT/MemGraphRAG.

</details>


### [695] [SkillPager: Query-Adaptive Intra-Skill Navigation via Semantic Node Retrieval](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00822)
*Zicai Cui,Zihan Guo,Weiwen Liu,Weinan Zhang*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: SkillPager 提出两阶段框架，通过离线解析Markdown技能文档为类型化语义节点、在线利用MMR进行查询条件节点选择，在保持78.89%上下文充分性的同时减少47.04%的token消耗。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 基于技能的LLM代理依赖长程序文档，但全文档提示浪费token且稀释关键执行信息，现有方法缺乏在已知文档内部进行高效检索的针对性研究。

Method: 两阶段框架：离线阶段将Markdown技能文档解析为类型化语义节点；在线阶段利用最大边际相关性（MMR）进行全局、查询条件的节点选择。

Result: 在395个技能和1975个查询的基准测试中，SkillPager达到78.89%的LLM判定上下文充分性（全文档基线为82.23%），但token减少47.04%；相比原始固定长度分块节省28.81% token；超越最强图基线12.16%。

Conclusion: 类型化语义粒度是效率提升的关键驱动因素，而非检索算法本身；支持内容应保留在候选池中自适应选择而非静态移除；类型化文档内检索是技能型代理特有的访问问题。

Abstract: Skill-based LLM agents increasingly rely on long procedural documents, but full-document prompting wastes tokens and dilutes information critical to execution. We study this setting as intra-skill retrieval, where the goal is to select a minimal, execution-sufficient context from a known skill document given a query. We present SkillPager, a two-stage framework that parses each Markdown skill into typed semantic nodes offline and leverages Maximal Marginal Relevance (MMR) to perform global, query-conditioned node selection online. On a benchmark of 395 skills and 1,975 queries, SkillPager achieves 78.89% LLM-judged context sufficiency, compared to 82.23% for the exhaustive full-document baseline, while reducing prompt tokens by 47.04%. A granularity ablation shows that applying the same retrieval algorithm to raw fixed-length chunks reaches a comparable 81.77% sufficiency but increases token cost by 28.81%, demonstrating that efficiency gains are driven by typed semantic granularity rather than the retrieval algorithm alone. Among graph-based baselines, SkillPager outperforms the strongest baseline by a margin of 12.16%. Further ablations show that supporting content is most effective when retained in the candidate pool and selected adaptively rather than removed by static heuristics. These results identify typed intra-document retrieval as a distinct access problem for skill-based agents.

</details>


### [696] [Test-Time Training for Zero-Resource Dense Retrieval Reranking](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01070)
*Shiyan Liu,Yichen Li*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: DART是一种测试时自适应重排序方法，通过在推理阶段对稠密检索的评分矩阵进行少量梯度更新，利用伪正负样本实现零资源场景下的性能提升，在BEIR基准上平均NDCG@10提升2.1%，额外延迟低于10ms。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的密集检索方法在零资源场景下缺乏有效的重排序手段：交叉编码器重排序质量高但需要监督训练且延迟高，无监督BM25重排序则经常降低密集检索的性能。作者希望解决这一两难困境。

Method: DART在测试时通过少量梯度更新自适应调整双线性评分矩阵W。利用每个查询的top-ranked文档作为伪正例、bottom-ranked文档作为伪负例提供噪声监督信号，引入置信度加权边际损失和跨查询动量缓冲器来预热自适应过程。

Result: 在六个BEIR基准上，DART相比密集检索基线平均每个数据集相对NDCG@10提升+2.1%，每个查询额外延迟低于10ms，展示了零样本性能增强和跨域泛化能力。

Conclusion: DART有效解决了密集检索中重排序的两难困境，在不依赖监督训练的情况下实现了高质量重排序，且延迟极低，具有强大的零样本和跨域泛化能力。

Abstract: Dense retrievers excel at first-stage candidate generation but lack effective reranking in zero-resource settings. Existing approaches face a fundamental dilemma: cross-encoders deliver strong reranking quality but require costly supervised training and incur high latency, while unsupervised BM25 reranking consistently degrades dense retrieval performance on most of BEIR benchmarks. We propose DART (Dense Adaptive Reranking at Test-time), which resolves this dilemma by adapting the scoring function at inference time. For each query, the top-ranked documents serve as pseudo-positive examples and the bottom-ranked as pseudo-negative examples, providing noisy but readily available supervision to adapt a bilinear scoring matrix $W$ via a small number of gradient updates. We further introduce a confidence-weighted margin loss and a cross-query momentum buffer that warm-starts adaptation across queries. On six BEIR benchmarks, DART achieves a mean per-dataset relative NDCG@10 gain of +2.1% over the dense retrieval baseline with under 10ms additional latency per query, demonstrating a powerful capability for zero-shot performance enhancement and cross-domain generalization.

</details>


### [697] [Quantizing Intent: Cross-Domain Semantic IDs from Organic Activity for Industrial Ranking](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01396)
*Julie Choi,Haoran Ye,Zhiwei Ding,Bo Long,Benjamin Zelditch,Arpita Vats*

Main category: cs.IR
