Deploy monitoring early: the first thing it finds is the most important thing to fix.

</details>


<div id='cs.MM'></div>

# cs.MM [[Back]](#toc)

### [731] [When Jokes Cross the Line: Analyzing Regular Humor and Dark Humor in YouTube Shorts](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00046)
*Sydney Johns,Sanjeev Parthasarathy,Shantnu Bhalla,Vaibhav Garg*

Main category: cs.MM

TL;DR: 本文构建了TwistedHumor数据集（1,211个YouTube Shorts及33,041条评论），通过多视角分析研究了短视频中幽默与伤害的灰色地带，发现黑暗幽默常围绕批评、应对、尴尬和身份表达等主题聚类，且观众对普通幽默反应更积极，对黑暗幽默反应更混合甚至更 toxic，LLM在Stand-up comedy上表现优于短笑话。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 短视频平台（如YouTube Shorts）中部分内容处于"允许但可能产生负面影响的灰色地带"，现有研究缺乏对此类内容的系统分析与数据集支撑。

Method: 构建TwistedHumor数据集（含幽默存在性、类型、伤害性、主题、修辞手法等标注），基于LLooM进行概念归纳分析，结合多视角分析（视频描述、评论情感、LLM评估）。

Result: 黑暗幽默聚类于批评、应对、尴尬、身份表达等主题；普通幽默关联更积极情感，黑暗幽默引发更混合/中性/更toxic的反应；LLM在Stand-up comedy上优于短笑话。

Conclusion: TwistedHumor不仅是新基准，更是对短视频中幽默与伤害灰色地带的实证研究，强调了上下文感知内容审核与多模态评估的必要性。

Abstract: Video platforms such as YouTube have reshaped how users engage with entertainment and information, emphasizing brief, highly engaging content such as Shorts. Within this ecosystem, certain content occupies a gray area where it remains allowed but may still have unintended negative effects on some audiences. To study this problem, we introduce TwistedHumor, a dataset of 1,211 YouTube Shorts paired with 33,041 related comments, with hand annotations for humor presence, humor type, harm, topic, rhetorical devices, and stand up context. Beyond dataset creation, we present a multi view analysis of how humor and harm appear in short form social media. Using LLooM based concept induction over video descriptions, we find that dark humor frequently clusters around themes of critique, coping, awkwardness, and identity expression rather than appearing as a single uniform category. We further analyze audience response through linked comments and show that regular humor is associated with more positive sentiment, while dark humor receives more mixed, neutral, and sometimes more toxic reactions. Finally, we evaluate large language models against human annotations and find that they perform better on stand up comedy compared to shorter jokes. Together, these results position TwistedHumor not only as a new benchmark, but as an empirical study of the gray area between humor and harm in short form video, highlighting the need for context aware moderation and more robust multimodal evaluation.

</details>


### [732] [TimeLogic Challenge @ CVPR 2026: Strong MLLMs Meet Evidence-Seeking Agents for Temporal-Logic Video Question Answering](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01631)
*Zhaoyang Xu,Xusheng He,Wei Liu,Zhenyang Li,Jianlong Wu*

Main category: cs.MM

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种无需训练的、基于主动探索的证据搜寻智能体，结合Gemini 3.1 Pro和时间推理策略，在TimeLogic测试集上达到77.13 AvgAcc，用于解决时序逻辑视频问答问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有视觉语言模型通常对固定均匀采样的帧进行单次处理，难以捕捉局部化的动作边界或分散的跨事件证据，不适合时序逻辑推理任务。

Method: 采用"思考-行动-观察"循环，使用多粒度采样工具包，每次观察都附带绝对时间戳；通过轻量级分类器将问题路由到不同时序类别，每类有定制策略、迭代深度和提示，采样预算自适应语料特征和剪辑长度。

Result: 在官方TimeLogic测试集上取得了77.13 AvgAcc。

Conclusion: 将时序逻辑VideoQA建模为主动探索问题，结合多粒度采样和类别路由策略，可以显著提升模型在时序关系推理上的表现，且无需额外训练。

Abstract: Temporal-logic video question answering requires a model to reason about when actions occur relative to one another, such as before, after, until, since, overlap, and multi-event chains, rather than merely what is present in a video. Standard vision-language models typically answer such questions in a single pass over a fixed, uniformly sampled set of frames, which is poorly matched to evidence that is often localized to narrow action boundaries or dispersed across several distant events. We present an evidence-seeking agent that treats temporal-logic VideoQA as active exploration. The agent follows a Think-Act-Observe loop driven by a multi-granular sampling toolkit, where every observation is interleaved with its absolute timestamp so that temporal relations reduce to numerical comparisons on a shared time axis. Its behavior is shaped by benchmark structure: a lightweight classifier routes each question to a temporal category, each with a tailored policy, iteration depth, and prompt, while sampling budgets adapt to corpus characteristics and clip length. The resulting training-free system couples Gemini 3.1 Pro with a temporal-reasoning policy and achieves 77.13 AvgAcc on the official TimeLogic test set.

</details>


<div id='cs.LG'></div>

# cs.LG [[Back]](#toc)

### [733] [BitsMoE: Efficient Spectral Energy-Guided Bit Allocation for MoE LLM Quantization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00079)
*Jiayu Zhao,Zihan Teng,Minhao Fan,Tianrui Ma,Wentao Ren,Song Chen,Weichen Liu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: BitsMoE提出了一种基于谱能引导的比特分配框架，用于MoE大模型的超低比特量化。通过SVD分解、共享基础保留、专家特定因子量化以及整数线性规划优化，在2比特量化下相比GPTQ实现12.3倍量化加速、27.83个百分点准确率提升和1.76倍解码加速。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有MoE大模型部署时内存占用巨大，而现有压缩方法在超低比特场景下表现不佳：剪枝不可逆地移除模型容量，粗粒度量化无法根据专家和权重方向的重要性分配比特。

Method: BitsMoE包含三个关键步骤：(1) 通过SVD将每个MoE层分解为共享基向量和专家特定谱因子；(2) 共享基向量不量化以保留跨专家公共结构，专家特定因子作为细粒度量化单元；(3) 将谱级混合精度量化建模为激活感知重建代理问题，通过求解整数线性规划在固定比特预算下最小化估计重建损失。

Result: 在Qwen3-30B-A3B-Base上2比特量化时，BitsMoE比GPTQ加速12.3倍，平均准确率提升27.83个百分点，解码速度提升1.76倍。代码和模型已开源。

Conclusion: BitsMoE通过谱能引导的比特分配策略，显著降低了MoE大模型在超低比特量化下的下游任务精度损失，兼顾了压缩率、速度和精度。

Abstract: Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) large language models reduce per-token computation through sparse expert activation, but their deployment remains memory-intensive because all expert weights must be kept resident in memory. Existing MoE compression methods struggle in the ultra-low-bit regime: pruning irreversibly removes model capacity, while coarse-grained quantization fails to allocate bits according to heterogeneous expert and weight-direction importance. We propose BitsMoE, a spectral-energy-guided bit-allocation framework for MoE LLM quantization. BitsMoE decomposes each MoE layer by SVD into a shared basis and expert-specific spectral factors, retaining the shared basis without quantization to preserve common cross-expert structure and using the expert-specific factors as fine-grained quantization units. To determine the bit-width of each unit, BitsMoE formulates spectrum-wise mixed-precision quantization as an activation-aware reconstruction surrogate and solves an integer linear program that minimizes estimated reconstruction loss under a fixed bit budget. Experiments across multiple MoE LLMs show that BitsMoE substantially reduces downstream task accuracy degradation in ultra-low-bit regimes. Under 2-bit quantization on Qwen3-30B-A3B-Base, BitsMoE accelerates quantization by 12.3$\times$, improves average accuracy by 27.83 percentage points, and increases decoding speed by 1.76$\times$ over GPTQ. Our model and code are publicly available at https://github.com/zjiayu064/BitsMoE.

</details>


### [734] [DAStatFormer: A Hybrid Multibranch Transformer with Statistical Feature Integration for DAS-Based Pattern Recognitions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00081)
*Michel Dione,Jerry Lonlac,Hélène Louis,Anthony Fleury,Stephane Lecoeuche*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出DAStatFormer混合多分支Transformer，通过提取时域、波形和频谱域的24个ANOVA筛选统计特征（而非原始信号），结合门控Transformer网络，在Φ-OTDR基准和真实DAS数据集上实现高达99.4%的准确率，参数和推理成本显著低于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: DAS系统数据维度高、时空模式复杂，现有深度学习方法（CNN、RNN、Transformer变体）要么无法捕捉长程依赖，要么处理原始DAS矩阵计算成本过高，难以满足可扩展实时监测需求。

Method: 提出DAStatFormer，包含：(1) 从每个通道的时域、波形和频谱域提取24个ANOVA筛选的统计特征，大幅降低数据量；(2) 每个域通过专用的逐步骤和逐通道注意力分支处理；(3) 自适应门控机制融合多域特征。

Result: 在Φ-OTDR基准和真实场景DAS数据集上，DAStatFormer达到99.4%准确率及近乎完美的实际性能，参数数量和推理成本显著低于DASFormer、DeepViT等模型。

Conclusion: DAStatFormer通过统计特征替代原始信号，在保持高判别力的同时大幅降低计算开销，证明了其适用于可扩展、实时的DAS监测系统。

Abstract: Distributed Acoustic Sensing (DAS) enables large-scale monitoring through optical fibers, but its high dimensionality and complex spatio-temporal patterns make event classification demanding. Existing deep learning approaches-CNNs, recurrent models, and Transformer variants-either fail to capture long-range dependencies or require processing raw DAS matrices at prohibitive cost. We propose DAStatFormer, a hybrid multibranch Transformer that combines compact multidomain statistical features with Gated Transformer Networks. Instead of raw signals, we extract 24 ANOVA-selected attributes per channel from the temporal, waveform, and spectral domains, reducing data size by orders of magnitude while preserving discriminative information. Each domain is processed via dedicated step-wise and channel-wise attention branches, fused by an adaptive gating mechanism. Experiments on the open $Φ$-OTDR benchmark and a real-scenario DAS dataset show that DAS-tatFormer achieves up to 99.4% accuracy and near-perfect real-world performance, while using significantly fewer parameters and lower inference cost than models such as DASFormer and DeepViT. These results demonstrate its suitability for scalable, real-time DAS-based monitoring. We release our code at https://github.com/MichelD-git/DAStatFormer

</details>


### [735] [Hoeffding Concept Bottleneck Models with Applications to Overhead Images](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00082)
*Clément Bénard,Manon Arfib,Christophe Labreuche,Victor Quétu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出Hoeffding概念瓶颈模型(HCBM)，使用梯度提升树的Hoeffding函数分解替代传统线性聚合，实现非线性、稀疏的概念聚合，提升可解释性并防止信息泄露，在分类和目标检测任务中均优于标准CBM。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有概念瓶颈模型(CBM)使用线性方式聚合概念分数，导致需要大量概念才能取得良好效果，这会削弱可解释性并引发信息泄露问题；且现实中概念与输出标签之间的关系往往是非线性的。

Method: 基于Hoeffding函数分解的梯度提升树，对概念分数进行非线性和稀疏聚合，并利用素蕴含式生成紧凑预测。

Result: HCBM对概念间信息泄露具有鲁棒性，在大量实验中优于标准线性CBM；可扩展到目标检测任务，在航拍图像等挑战场景中表现优异。

Conclusion: 非线性、稀疏的概念聚合方法比传统线性CBM更具优势，兼顾了可解释性和预测性能，适用场景更广。

Abstract: Explainability of deep learning algorithms is critical for computer-vision applications with high-stake decisions. Concept bottleneck models (CBM) have recently shown promising performance to provide explainable and accurate predictions for classification problems, based on a bottleneck of high-level concepts. Existing CBM methods rely on a linear aggregation of the concept scores to compute predictions. However, a large number of concepts is often used in this linear approach, which undermines explainability and favors information leakage. In general, the underlying relation between concepts and output logits is not linear. Therefore, we introduce Hoeffding Concept Bottleneck Models (HCBM), which build on the Hoeffding functional decomposition of gradient-boosted trees to provide non-linear and sparse aggregations of concept scores, and generate compact predictions using prime implicants. HCBM are proved to be robust to interconcept leakage, and outperform standard linear CBM in practice, as shown in extensive experiments. Beyond classification, HCBM can be adapted to object detection, and we focus on a challenging case with overhead images to show the high performance of HCBM in these settings.

</details>


### [736] [From Demonstrations to Rewards: Test-Time Prompt Optimization for VLM Reward Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00083)
*Christian Gumbsch,Leonardo Barcellona,Lennard Schünemann,Platon Karageorgis,Andrii Zadaianchuk,Zehao Wang,Sergey Zakharov,Fabien Despinoy,Rahaf Aljundi,Efstratios Gavves*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: Demo2Reward提出了一种测试时自适应技术，利用少量专家示范（3-10条轨迹）优化VLMs的奖励模型语言指令，减少假阳性预测，无需额外训练即可提升策略学习性能，在模拟和真实机器人任务中均优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 强化学习依赖准确奖励函数，但真实场景中奖励函数常需手工设计或难以获取。现有基于VLMs的零样本奖励模型存在假阳性问题，严重损害下游策略学习。

Method: 提出Demo2Reward，一种测试时自适应方法，利用少量专家示范（3-10条轨迹）优化奖励模型的语言指令，减少假阳性同时保留真阳性，无需在策略学习阶段进行额外模型训练或计算。

Result: 在多种模拟机器人任务和策略骨干上，Demo2Reward一致优于现有的零样本和少样本VLM奖励模型，并在真实机器人场景中有效实现无需手动设计奖励函数的策略学习。

Conclusion: 通过少量示范优化指令而非重新训练模型，能够有效提升VLM奖励模型的准确性和策略学习效果，具有较好的跨场景迁移能力。

Abstract: Reinforcement learning relies on accurate reward functions, which are often hand-crafted or even unavailable in real-world applications, such as robotics. Recent work has explored the zero-shot reasoning capabilities of pre-trained Vision-Language Models (VLMs) as reward models. However, without careful prompt engineering, these approaches tend to produce suboptimal rewards, where false positive predictions can severely degrade downstream policy learning. In robotics, limited datasets comprising expert demonstrations are often collected to bootstrap policy learning. This scenario provides an opportunity to optimize a reward model prior policy training. We propose Demo2Reward a test-time adaptation technique to optimize the language instruction of a reward model based on a few demonstrations (3-10 trajectories) to reduce false positives while preserving true positives. Crucially, this requires no additional model training or computation resources during policy learning. We show that Demo2Reward consistently outperforms existing zero- and few-shot VLM reward models across a range of simulated robotic tasks and policy backbones. Finally, we demonstrate that Demo2Reward effectively transfers to a real-world robotic learning scenario, enabling policy learning without manually engineering a reward function.

</details>


### [737] [A Shared Valence Axis Across Modern LLMs and Human EEG: The Saturation Regularity](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00129)
*Yousef A. Radwan,Xuhui Liu,Kilichbek Haydarov,Yuqian Fu,Mohamed Elhoseiny*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究大型语言模型（LLMs）能否作为理解人脑情感价（emotional valence）神经表征的透镜。作者首先利用仅9个情感句子从LLMs中构建了一个一维价态方向（V-axis），并在零样本迁移和跨模型一致性上验证其有效性。随后在123名被试观看情感视频的EEG数据上，证明该V-axis能映射到人脑神经活动，且36个未接触V-axis的EEG情感分类器在其内部表征中自发发现了相同的方向。然而，25种对齐策略（如知识蒸馏、表征相似性等）并未提升解码性能，反而有16种显著降低了准确率。作者将此现象形式化为“饱和规律”（saturation regularity）：一旦任务标签驱动脑解码网络到达目标方向，额外监督主要扭曲已饱和的盆地，而承载信息的类内残差获得的有效梯度很少。基于此，作者提出利用残差多样性集成的方法，在FACED数据集上平衡准确率提升10.5%，在SEED-V上得到复现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索现代LLMs的内部特征能否与人类大脑的神经表征对齐，特别是情感价（valence）这一维度。已有研究表明LLMs的特征与人类认知存在对齐，但能否直接映射到脑电图（EEG）等神经信号上尚不清楚。

Method: 1) 从LLMs中构建V-axis：使用9个情感句子从14种LLMs中提取一维价态方向。2) 验证V-axis：在情感基准上进行零样本迁移测试，并检验跨模型的一致性。3) 映射到人脑：在123名被试的EEG数据上，通过线性投影跟踪V-axis位置。4) 发现自发对齐：分析36个EEG情感分类器内部表征，发现它们自发学习了与V-axis一致的方向。5) 测试对齐策略：尝试25种监督对齐方法（知识蒸馏、表征相似性、对比学习和拓扑损失等）。6) 提出饱和规律：形式化描述任务标签驱动后的监督饱和现象。7) 利用残差多样性：通过集成残差多样性的方法提升性能。

Result: 1) LLMs构建的V-axis在情感基准上零样本迁移有效，且跨14种LLMs具有一致性。2) V-axis能映射到EEG神经活动，EEG分类器内部表征自发对齐V-axis。3) 25种对齐策略中，16种显著降低准确率，无策略提升性能，验证了饱和规律。4) 基于残差多样性的集成方法在FACED上提升平衡准确率10.5%，在SEED-V上复现。

Conclusion: LLMs内部的情感价态表征与人类大脑神经活动存在对齐，但当前的对齐策略无法进一步提升解码性能，因为任务标签已驱动网络饱和。未来的改进应聚焦于任务标签无法触及的残差子空间，如利用残差多样性集成。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have emerged as powerful representation learners whose internal features increasingly align with human cognition. We study whether modern LLMs can serve as a lens for understanding neural representations in the human brain, focusing on emotional valence in EEG.
  We first build a one-dimensional valence direction, the V-axis, from modern LLMs using only nine emotion-evocative sentences. We validate it through zero-shot transfer to sentiment benchmarks and cross-model consistency across fourteen LLMs. We then show that this LLM-derived direction maps onto human neural activity. On a public EEG cohort of 123 subjects watching affective videos, a single linear projection on EEG features tracks the V-axis position of each stimulus. Moreover, 36 EEG emotion classifiers trained without exposure to the V-axis spontaneously rediscover the same direction in their internal representations, suggesting that the same valence structure emerges in both language models and human electrophysiology.
  Yet this convergence does not provide an effective training signal. We test twenty-five alignment strategies, including knowledge distillation, representational similarity, contrastive, and topographic losses; none improve decoding, and sixteen significantly reduce accuracy. We formalize this result as the saturation regularity: once task labels alone drive a brain-decoding network onto the target direction, additional supervision mainly distorts an already-saturated basin, while the load-bearing within-class residual receives little useful gradient.
  This regularity also indicates where improvement should come from: the residual subspace unreachable by supervision. Motivated by this insight, we ensemble across residual diversity rather than supervising the basin, improving balanced accuracy by 10.5% over the prior best on FACED, with the same effect replicated on SEED-V.

</details>


### [738] [Automatically Differentiable Nonlinear Tensor Networks (ADNTNs) for Exponential Compression of Deep Neural Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00130)
*Andrzej Cichocki,Michal Wietczak*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出自动可微非线性张量网络（ADNTNs），一种通过反向模式自动微分端到端训练紧凑核心张量的结构化权重生成器。在AlexNet和VGG-16上实现了每层约2000倍到77000倍的压缩比，且精度常与密集基线持平甚至更优。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统低秩适应和张量分解仅使用单一低秩矩阵更新，表达能力有限。作者希望设计一种更强大的结构化权重生成框架，通过层次化小核心、非线性激活和横向混合张量构建大权重张量，实现极高压缩比同时保持或提升模型精度。

Method: ADNTN将权重生成视为一个可微分张量网络，核心张量通过反向模式自动微分端到端训练。重点研究了三种架构：树张量网络（TTN）、带边界解缠器的增强TTN（aTTN）和多尺度纠缠重整化拟设（MERA）。支持非线性激活、任务感知目标、批处理及硬件感知执行调度。

Result: 在AlexNet和VGG-16层上的模拟显示，每层压缩比约为2000倍到77000倍，精度通常匹配密集基线，在多个VGG-16案例中甚至有所提升。

Conclusion: ADNTNs是一条有前景的、数学结构清晰且硬件感知的神经网络小型化路径，但优化、收缩调度和部署内核需要协同设计才能充分发挥潜力。结果是鼓舞人心的而非最终的。

Abstract: We study Automatically Differentiable Nonlinear Tensor Networks (ADNTNs), a family of structured weight generators whose compact core tensors are trained end-to-end by reverse-mode automatic differentiation (AD). The approach can be viewed as a natural extension of low-rank adaptation and tensor factorisation: instead of using one low-rank matrix update, an ADNTN builds a large weight tensor through a hierarchy of small cores, nonlinear activations, and optional lateral mixing tensors. The paper focuses on three architectures: Tree Tensor Networks (TTNs), augmented TTNs (aTTNs) with boundary disentanglers, and Multi-scale Entanglement Renormalisation Ansatze (MERA).
  The formulation supports nonlinear activations, task-aware objectives, batching, and hardware-aware execution schedules. At the same time, the paper keeps a clear distinction between \emph{differentiating} a contraction program and making contraction free: AD does not remove the cost of large intermediates, poor contraction orders, or exact contraction of general loopy tensor networks.
  Extensive simulations on AlexNet and VGG-16 layers show per-layer compression ratios from roughly $2000\times$ to $77000\times$ in the studied settings, with accuracy often matching the dense baseline and, in several VGG-16 cases, improving it. These results are encouraging rather than final: they suggest that ADNTNs are a promising, mathematically structured, and hardware-aware route toward much smaller neural networks, provided that optimisation, contraction schedules, and deployment kernels are designed together.

</details>


### [739] [Foundation-Preserving Adaptation via Generalized Rayleigh-Quotient Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00132)
*Dongjun Kim,Adrian de Wynter,Huancheng Chen,Heasung Kim,Haris Vikalo*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: FoLoRA是一种遗忘感知的优化框架，通过广义瑞利商对更新方向按任务效用/遗忘惩罚进行评分，并利用方向门控Adam更新，在保持预训练能力的同时提升下游任务性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 微调基础模型时会导致预训练获得的非目标能力退化，现有遗忘感知方法通过特殊初始化或固定约束寻求更安全的更新，但未能动态调节适配与保留之间的权衡。

Method: 提出FoLoRA框架：1) 基于一阶保持条件定义遗忘惩罚（在预训练代理激活上）和任务效用（在下游任务激活上）；2) 通过广义瑞利商对更新方向按单位遗忘惩罚的任务效用进行评分；3) 利用得到的谱坐标系实现方向门控Adam更新，在训练中衰减低效用-惩罚比的方向；4) 通过从预训练模型采样而非依赖单一代理数据集来构建预训练代理校准数据。

Result: 在数学、代码和指令遵循的适配实验中，FoLoRA在保持预训练能力与适配下游任务之间取得了最佳平衡，在提升目标任务性能的同时最好地保持了非目标能力。

Conclusion: FoLoRA通过动态调节更新方向的任务效用与遗忘惩罚之比，有效解决了微调中的灾难性遗忘问题，实现了更强的保留-适配平衡。

Abstract: While finetuning effectively adapts foundation models to specialized downstream tasks, it can degrade nontarget capabilities acquired during pretraining. Existing forgetting aware methods typically seek safer updates through specialized initialization or fixed constraints, but do not regulate the adaptation preservation trade-off during training. We propose Foundation Preserving LoRA (FoLoRA), a forgetting aware optimization framework. Guided by a first order preservation condition, FoLoRA defines a forgetting penalty over pretraining-proxy activations and a task utility over downstream task activations. It then scores update directions by task utility per unit forgetting penalty via a generalized Rayleigh quotient. The resulting spectral coordinate system enables direction wise gated Adam updates, attenuating low utility to penalty directions during training. To estimate the forgetting penalty, FoLoRA constructs pretraining proxy calibration data by sampling from the pretrained model rather than relying on a single proxy dataset. Experiments on math, code, and instruction following adaptation show that FoLoRA achieves the strongest preservation adaptation balance over baselines, improving target task performance with best aggregate preservation of non target capabilities.

</details>


### [740] [World Models: A Comprehensive Survey of Architectures, Methodologies, Reasoning Paradigms, and Applications](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00133)
*Arif Hassan Zidan,Yi Pan,Hanqi Jiang,Ruiyu Yan,Wei Ruan,Zihao Wu,Lifeng Chen,Weihang You,Xinliang Li,Bowen Chen,Huawen Hu,Peilong Wang,Sizhuang Liu,Jing Zhang,Siyuan Li,Zhengliang Liu,Yu Bao,Lin Zhao,Lichao Sun,Dajiang Zhu,Xiang Li,Jinglei Lv,Quanzheng Li,Wei Liu,Tianming Liu,Wei Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 这篇综述论文系统梳理了世界模型领域的研究进展，从架构、方法论家族、推理策略和应用领域四个维度构建了多轴分类法，涵盖了从PlaNet、Dreamer系列到MuZero、Sora、Cosmos和Genie等里程碑系统，并探讨了链式思维推理与世界模型想象的近期融合趋势。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 该领域缺乏统一的框架来整合多样的架构选择、训练方法、推理机制和应用场景，作者旨在填补这一空白，为世界模型研究提供系统性的分类和组织体系。

Method: 提出四维度多轴分类法：(i)架构，(ii)方法论家族（包括状态空间/循环方法、Transformer、扩散生成器、物理信息网络、语言增强多模态系统），(iii)推理策略（想象规划、潜在策略学习、反事实推理、不确定性规划），(iv)应用领域（机器人、自动驾驶、视频预测等多领域）。

Result: 梳理了从早期认知科学基础到PlaNet、Dreamer家族、MuZero、Sora、Cosmos、Genie等里程碑系统的发展脉络，揭示了各维度的交互关系，以及链式思维推理与世界模型想象的最新融合。

Conclusion: 指出当前面临复合预测误差、仿真到现实迁移、评估碎片化等持续挑战，未来方向包括统一多模态世界模型、基础规模交互式模拟器，以及在安全关键领域的可靠部署。

Abstract: World models, internal simulators that learn the structure and dynamics of an environment, have emerged as a central paradigm in the pursuit of artificial general intelligence, enabling agents to predict, plan, and reason within learned representations. Despite rapid progress across reinforcement learning, robotics, autonomous driving, and video generation, the field lacks a unified framework integrating its diverse architectural choices, training methods, reasoning mechanisms, and application settings. This survey addresses that gap with a multi-axis taxonomy organized along four dimensions: (i) architecture, encompassing representation format, dynamics formulation, input modality, learning paradigm, and downstream application; (ii) methodological family, including state-space and recurrent approaches, transformer-based models, diffusion-based generators, physics-informed networks, and language-augmented multimodal systems; (iii) reasoning strategy, covering imagination-based planning, latent policy learning, counterfactual reasoning, and planning under uncertainty; and (iv) application domain, spanning robotics, autonomous driving, video prediction, multimodal agents, reinforcement learning, scientific modeling, medical imaging, educational measurement, and business and finance. Tracing the field from early cognitive-science foundations to milestone systems such as PlaNet, the Dreamer family, MuZero, Sora, Cosmos, and Genie, we examine how these dimensions interact and highlight the recent convergence of chain-of-thought reasoning with world-model imagination. We review evaluation protocols and benchmarks, identify persistent challenges such as compounding prediction errors, sim-to-real transfer, and fragmented evaluation, and outline future directions toward unified multimodal world models, foundation-scale interactive simulators, and safe deployment in safety-critical domains.

</details>


### [741] [On Effectiveness and Efficiency of Agentic Tool-calling and RL Training](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00135)
*Tong Liu,Cheng Qian,Matej Cief,Yuan He,Daniele Dan,Nikolaos Aletras,Gabriella Kazai*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文系统分析了工具调用在有效性和效率两个维度上的问题：有效性方面揭示了评估流程对实现细节的敏感性，效率方面识别了强化学习中的计算浪费并提出了加速方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 工具调用是现代LLM智能体的核心能力，但现有评估方法缺乏标准化，导致排名不可靠；同时强化学习训练工具调用存在计算效率低下的问题。

Method: 1) 系统分析工具调用评估流程中多种实现选择（随机种子、系统提示、多轮模板、历史携带方式）对结果的影响；2) 识别RL训练中的两类计算浪费来源；3) 提出两种加速RL训练的技术。

Result: 评估结果对看似微小的实现选择高度敏感，尤其在多轮场景下；RL训练存在大量无学习信号的rollout和高优化成本；提出的加速技术在不降低性能的前提下实现显著的训练加速。

Conclusion: 工具调用评估亟需标准化，否则排行榜结果不可靠；通过优化RL训练流程可以大幅提升效率，且不影响模型性能。

Abstract: Tool-calling is a central component of modern large language model (LLM) agents, equipping them with skills beyond their parametric knowledge. This paper studies tool-calling along two complementary axes: effectiveness, i.e., how this capability is measured, and efficiency, i.e., how it is learned. On effectiveness, we systematically analyze tool-calling evaluation pipelines and show that results can be highly sensitive to seemingly minor, often undocumented implementation choices including the random seed, system prompt, multi-turn template construction, and how prior interaction/reasoning history is carried forward. These choices can lead to substantial differences in reported performance, especially in multi-turn settings where without rigorous standardization, leaderboard rankings are unreliable. On efficiency, we examine standard reinforcement learning (RL) for tool-calling and identify two sources of computational waste: (i) during rollouts, many prompts produce no learning signal, and (ii) during policy updates, optimization incurs high computational cost. Guided by these findings, we introduce two techniques that accelerate RL-based tool-calling training, achieving substantial wall-clock speedup without degrading performance.

</details>


### [742] [Generative AI and Digital Ecosystem Resilience: A Proactive Lifecycle-Based Survey](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00136)
*Jonghyun Chung,Rishabh Chaddha,Sanket Badhe,Debanshu Das,Nathan Huang,Amanpreet Kaur*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文综述了基于生命周期的主动检测新兴虚假叙事方法，结合C5交互模型（情境、原因、内容、放大循环、后果），整合机器学习与社会科学技术，以应对生成式AI加速的对抗性合成内容威胁。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 生成式AI的快速发展使得传统被动检测方法难以应对日益泛滥的对抗性合成内容，亟需转向主动检测范式来识别新兴的虚假叙事。

Method: 采用C5交互模型（Context, Causes, Content, Cycle of Amplification, Consequences）作为统一分析框架，综合协调非真实行为（CIB）分析、流行病学建模、Hawkes过程、高维嵌入空间异常检测、多层图无监督协调检测以及智能体AI系统等多种技术方法。

Result: 系统梳理了不同阶段（叙事创建、播种、传播）的主动检测技术，区分了合成放大模式与真实基线流量模式。

Conclusion: 指出了GenAI带来的挑战（快速变化威胁追踪、多级分布漂移），并提出了面向异常聚类检测和构建预期性、韧性系统的未来研究议程。

Abstract: The proliferation of adversarial synthetic content, accelerated by Generative AI (GenAI) is rendering traditional reactive detection methods ineffective. This survey synthesizes emerging research to demonstrate a paradigm shift toward the proactive detection of emerging inauthentic narratives. In this survey, we adopt a unified, lifecycle-based taxonomy to combine socio-technical lifecycle models of adversarial campaigns with advanced computational methodologies for emerging inauthentic narrative detection. By structuring the analysis around the C5 Interaction Model (Context, Causes, Content, Cycle of Amplification, Consequences), we integrate different research streams from machine learning and social science. To differentiate spread patterns of synthetic amplification from authentic baseline traffic, this paper surveys state-of-the-art techniques for modeling the creation, seeding, and propagation of fresh narratives, including the analysis of Coordinated Inauthentic Behavior (CIB), epidemiological modeling, and Hawkes process. This survey also provides a systematic review of proactive detection methods for adversarial threats at different stages in the C5 interaction model, specifically, anomaly detection in high-dimensional embedding spaces, unsupervised coordination detection on multi-layer graphs, and agentic AI systems. Finally, this survey addresses challenges posed by GenAI, including the difficulty of tracking rapidly changing threats and multi-level distributional drift, and it outlines a future research agenda focused on detecting anomalous clusters and building anticipatory and resilient systems. This survey provides a comprehensive, lifecycle-based review of methods for the proactive detection of emerging synthetic threats for more resilient information ecosystems.

</details>


### [743] [Geometric Erasure by Contrastive Velocity Matching in Rectified Flows](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00140)
*Jonas Henry Grebe,Tobias Braun,Anna Rohrbach,Marcus Rohrbach*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出GEM框架，通过将生成流网络的轨迹信号转化为教师引导的流匹配设置，实现针对Rectified Flow模型的高效概念擦除，在抑制有害内容生成的同时保持良性生成质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多模态生成模型快速发展带来有害内容合成、深度伪造和版权侵权风险，而现有概念擦除研究主要针对U-Net扩散模型，未能跟上向Rectified Flow Transformer架构转变的步伐。

Method: 建立生成流网络中基于轨迹的遗忘与经典教师引导擦除之间的桥梁，将轨迹信号转化为教师引导的流匹配设置；教师提供互补的吸引和排斥信号，组合成统一的几何引导目标，实现对不需要概念的目标性抑制。

Result: GEM框架能有效抑制不需要概念的生成，同时保持良性内容的生成质量。

Conclusion: GEM为Rectified Flow模型提供了一种简单且高效的概念擦除方案，统一了轨迹遗忘和教师引导两种范式的优势。

Abstract: While the rapid adoption of multimodal generative models offers immense potential, it has also increased the risks of harmful content synthesis, deepfakes, and copyright infringements. To address these challenges, concept erasure has emerged as a prospective safeguard. However, as the field gradually transitions from U-Net-based diffusion models to Rectified Flow Transformers, erasure research has struggled to keep pace. In this work, we introduce GEM, a simple but highly effective erasure framework for Rectified Flow models. As part of our contribution, we establish a principled bridge between trajectory-based unlearning grounded in Generative Flow Networks and classic teacher-guided erasure: we translate trajectory-based signals into a teacher-guided flow-matching setup that unifies the strengths of both paradigms. Concretely, a teacher provides complementary attraction and repulsion signals that we combine into a single geometric guidance objective, yielding targeted suppression of unwanted concepts while preserving benign generation.

</details>


### [744] [Adaptive data selection improves wearable prediction under low baseline performance](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00141)
*Ali Kargarandehkordi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文评估了可穿戴健康系统中自适应感知策略在不同个体间的效果差异，发现该策略对基线性能低的参与者提升显著（AUROC提升高达0.7），而对基线好的参与者增益有限甚至为负，建议根据基线性能选择性部署自适应感知。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管自适应感知策略被越来越多地用于可穿戴健康系统以在有限数据预算下提升预测性能，但其在不同个体间的收益差异尚不清楚。

Method: 在纵向可穿戴数据集中，跨多种感知模态（心率、活动、生态瞬时评估）评估自适应选择训练时间窗口的效果，与随机采样对比，使用AUROC和F1分数量化性能提升。

Result: 自适应策略对基线性能低的参与者AUROC提升显著（高达0.7），对基线好的参与者增益有限或为负；自适应增益与基线性能呈强负相关（Pearson r=-0.67, Spearman ρ=-0.62）；多数参与者在AUROC上受益（60-80%），但F1提升较小且不一致。

Conclusion: 自适应感知并非普遍有效，其最大价值体现在表现不佳的场景中，应基于基线性能选择性部署以提高可穿戴健康监测的效率。

Abstract: Adaptive sensing strategies that selectively sample data are increasingly used in wearable health systems to improve prediction performance under limited data budgets, yet their benefits across individuals remain poorly understood. Here, we evaluate adaptive selection of time windows for model training under fixed measurement budgets across multiple sensing modalities, including heart rate, activity, and ecological momentary assessment (EMA), in a longitudinal wearable dataset. We quantify performance gains relative to random sampling using both area under the receiver operating characteristic curve (AUROC) and F1 score. Adaptive strategies yield substantial improvements in AUROC for participants with low baseline performance (with gains up to 0.7), while offering limited or negative gains for participants with strong baselines. Across modalities, adaptive gain is strongly inversely correlated with baseline performance (Pearson r = -0.67; Spearman p = -0.62). At the participant level, most individuals benefit in AUROC (60-80% across modalities), although improvements in F1 are smaller and less consistent. These findings show that adaptive sensing is not uniformly beneficial, but instead provides the greatest value in underperforming settings. Our results support selective deployment strategies that tailor adaptive sensing based on baseline performance to improve efficiency in wearable health monitoring.

</details>


### [745] [BudgetDraft: Acceptance-Aware Multi-View Training for Sparse-KV Speculative Decoding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00144)
*Liang He,Jingbo Wen,Qishi Zhan,Yixiong Chen,Kangning Cui,Qizhen Lan,Xilu Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: BudgetDraft提出多视角稀疏训练方法，通过让草稿模型在训练时接触多种KV缓存预算，使其学会与全缓存教师模型对齐，解决了中长上下文推理中稀疏/全缓存不匹配导致的接受率下降问题，在4K-16K上下文长度下实现2.10-6.55倍端到端加速。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在资源受限场景下，推测解码使用稀疏KV缓存的草稿模型以控制GPU内存和延迟，但中长上下文推理（4K-16K）中，稀疏与全缓存之间的不匹配导致接受率随上下文增长快速下降。

Method: 提出BudgetDraft多视角稀疏训练方法：(1)训练时让草稿模型暴露于多种采样的KV预算下；(2)将每个稀疏视角与共享的全缓存教师目标对齐；(3)结合全缓存分支的接受率感知损失与稀疏缓存分支的多视角损失，训练出单一的对预算鲁棒的草稿模型。

Result: 在PG-19、LongBench和LWM上，在4K、8K、16K上下文长度下分别实现最高6.55倍、4.46倍、2.10倍的端到端加速，且保持推理流水线的内存友好性。

Conclusion: BudgetDraft通过多视角训练有效解决了稀疏/全缓存不匹配问题，使稀疏草稿模型在中长上下文场景下保持高接受率，实现显著加速且无需额外推理组件。

Abstract: Speculative decoding speeds up autoregressive decoding by using a drafter to propose multiple tokens that a verifier validates in parallel. In resource-constrained deployments, the drafter uses a sparse KV cache to limit peak GPU memory and end-to-end latency under a fixed KV budget, while the verifier keeps a full KV cache. Mid-to-long context inference (4K--16K context length) is common in real applications. However, naive sparse/full speculative decoding suffers from the sparse/full mismatch as context length grows, causing the acceptance rate to drop quickly. We propose BudgetDraft, a multi-view sparse training method for sparse drafting in mid-to-long inference. The drafter is exposed to multiple sampled KV budgets during training and learns to align each sparse view with one shared full-cache teacher target. BudgetDraft combines an acceptance-aware loss on a full-cache branch with a multi-view loss on a sparse-cache branch, producing a single budget-robust drafter that recovers acceptance across sparsity levels without extra inference-time components. Experimental results on PG-19, LongBench, and LWM show that BudgetDraft achieves up to 6.55x, 4.46x, and 2.10x end-to-end speedup vs AR at 4K, 8K, and 16K context lengths, while keeping the inference pipeline memory-friendly.

</details>


### [746] [RAFT: Data Refinement and Adaptive Distillation for Domain Fine-Tuning with Alleviated Forgetting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00147)
*Yuduo Li,Xiaofeng Shi,Qian Kou,Longbin Yu,Hua Zhou*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出RAFT框架，通过数据精炼和自适应蒸馏解决领域微调中的灾难性遗忘问题，在提升领域性能的同时缓解通用能力下降。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 领域SFT虽然能提升领域内性能，但往往导致模型通用能力下降。作者识别出两个关键问题：监督兼容性差距（领域目标与模型自然响应在风格和推理格式上不匹配）和轨迹保持差距（teacher-forcing SFT优化固定目标token，未约束模型在自身生成前缀上的行为），从而未能保留模型原始行为。

Method: RAFT是一个两阶段框架。第一阶段通过自条件重写、语义过滤和答案融合构建模型兼容的监督数据。第二阶段执行答案条件化的策略蒸馏，让原始指令调优模型在学生生成轨迹上提供软目标，并融合答案作为有用上下文。此外引入top-K温度蒸馏和EMA自适应损失平衡来稳定领域-通用权衡。

Result: 在三个指令调优主干模型和五个领域上，RAFT相比标准SFT平均领域准确率提升23.2%，同时在MS-Bench和IFEval上分别相对提升18.2%和10.2%，有效恢复了SFT导致的通用能力退化。

Conclusion: 将数据精炼与轨迹级保留相结合，为缓解遗忘的领域微调提供了有效方案。

Abstract: Domain-specific supervised fine-tuning (SFT) often improves in-domain performance at the cost of degrading a model's general capabilities. We view this degradation through two practical gaps in domain SFT: a supervision-compatibility gap, where domain targets differ in style and reasoning format from the original model's natural responses, and a trajectory-preservation gap, where teacher-forced SFT optimizes fixed target tokens without constraining the model's behavior on its own generated prefixes. This process fails to preserve the model's original behavior. We propose RAFT (Data Refinement and Adaptive Distillation for Domain Fine-Tuning with Alleviated Forgetting), a two-stage framework that addresses both factors. First, RAFT constructs model-compatible supervision through self-conditioned rewriting, semantic filtering, and answer fusion. Second, RAFT performs Answer-Conditioned On-Policy Distillation, where the original instruction-tuned model provides soft targets on student-generated trajectories while being conditioned on the fused answer as helpful context. We further introduce top-K temperature distillation and EMA-based adaptive loss balancing to stabilize the domain-general trade-off. Across three instruction-tuned backbones and five domains, RAFT improves average domain accuracy by 23.2% over standard SFT, while recovering part of the SFT-induced degradation on MS-Bench and IFEval, with relative improvements of 18.2% and 10.2%, respectively. These results show that coupling data refinement with trajectory-level preservation provides an effective recipe for domain fine-tuning with alleviated forgetting.

</details>


### [747] [Emergence of Exploration in Policy Gradient Reinforcement Learning via Retrying](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00151)
*Soichiro Nishimori,Paavo Parmas,Sotetsu Koyamada,Tadashi Kozuno,Toshinori Kitamura,Shin Ishii,Yutaka Matsuo*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出ReMax目标函数，通过最大化M个样本的期望最大回报来激励随机探索，并推导出策略梯度形式，开发了RePPO算法，在MinAtar和Craftax基准上验证了其无需显式探索奖励即可促进探索的效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在强化学习中，探索是有益的仅因为智能体重复遇到相似状态。作者希望形式化这一直觉，设计一种无需显式探索奖励项即可自发产生随机探索的优化目标。

Method: 提出ReMax目标（最大化M个样本的期望最大回报）；推导ReMax的策略梯度公式；开发RePPO算法，将离散重试次数M推广为连续参数m>0，实现探索的精细控制。

Result: 在MinAtar和Craftax基准上，RePPO无需任何显式探索奖励即可有效促进探索行为。

Conclusion: ReMax目标及其对应的RePPO算法为强化学习中的探索提供了一种新的视角，将探索内嵌于优化目标本身，无需外部奖励工程。

Abstract: In reinforcement learning (RL), agents benefit from exploration only because they repeatedly encounter similar states: trying different actions can improve performance or reduce uncertainty; without such retries, a greedy policy is optimal. We formalize this intuition with ReMax, an objective that evaluates a policy by the expected maximum return over $M$ samples, where $M$ is a positive integer, while accounting for return uncertainty. Optimizing this objective induces stochastic exploration as an emergent property, without explicit bonus terms. For efficient policy optimization, we derive a new policy-gradient formulation for ReMax and introduce ReMax PPO (RePPO), a PPO variant that optimizes ReMax while generalizing the discrete retry count $M$ to a continuous parameter $m > 0$, enabling fine-grained control of exploration. Empirically, RePPO promotes exploration, without any explicit exploration bonuses, on the MinAtar and Craftax benchmarks.

</details>


### [748] [ChurnNet: A Optimized Modern AI for Churn Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00169)
*Syed Saad Saif,Giulio Maggiore,Paolo Russo,Damiano Distante*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文比较传统机器学习（随机森林、XGBoost、SVM）与统一多任务时间序列模型在客户流失预测中的表现，发现传统方法在预测性能、数据效率和计算资源需求上更优，且该结论在多个数据集和标签方法上一致。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 竞争加剧及产品同质化导致客户流失成本降低，准确预测客户流失有助于制定个性化营销策略并减少客户流失，因此需要评估不同预测方法的效果。

Method: 将随机森林、XGBoost、SVM等传统机器学习方法与统一多任务时间序列模型进行对比，在多个数据集和多种流失标签技术下进行二分类时间序列预测任务评估。

Result: 传统机器学习方法在预测性能、数据效率和计算资源需求方面均优于统一多任务时间序列模型，该结论具有跨数据集和跨标签方法的一致性。

Conclusion: 对于客户流失预测这一二分类时间序列任务，复杂的时间序列模型并非必要，传统机器学习方法在实践中更具性价比和实用性。

Abstract: Increased competition and the growing similarity of products and services offered by retailers have lowered the barriers for customers to switch to competitors. Accurate churn prediction can be a valuable tool for driving effective personalized marketing campaigns and helping to reduce customer attrition. This study evaluates the performance of traditional machine learning techniques, namely, Random Forests, XGBoost, and Support Vector Machines, and compares them with the Unified Multi-Task Time Series Model for churn prediction, a binary time-series classification task. Despite the strong capacity of the latter to model complex temporal dynamics and inter-variable relationships, our results indicate that for churn prediction, conventional methods can still outperform it in terms of predictive performance, data efficiency, and computational resource requirements for training and deployment. These findings are consistent across multiple datasets and various churn labeling techniques.

</details>


### [749] [Beyond Augmentation: Score-Guided Pathological Prior for EEG-based Depression Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00180)
*Xiaojing Chen,Jingqi Cheng,Xu Zhao,Wan Jiang,Jingjing Wu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出"Beyond Augmentation: Score-Guided Classification (SGC)"框架，在不生成合成样本的情况下，利用无监督生成网络建模EEG样本的异常分数作为病理先验，融合深度特征引导分类边界，并设计跨通道空间适配模块解决硬件异构问题，在零数据增强条件下实现了出色的抑郁症检测性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 针对深度学习在EEG抑郁症检测中面临的"小样本困境"，传统数据增强方法计算开销大且引入合成噪声模糊分类边界，作者挑战"数据量优先"的传统观念，探索不依赖数据增强的解决方案。

Method: 1) Score-Guided Classification (SGC): 利用无监督生成网络（扩散模型）对每个样本的结构和统计异常程度进行建模，生成"病理先验"分数，经鲁棒归一化后与深度特征显式融合，引导分类器决策边界。2) Cross-Channel Spatial Adaptation: 通过空间映射机制解决多中心数据集中通道不匹配的硬件异构问题。

Result: 在Mumtaz2016和MODMA数据集上的实验表明，该方法在"零数据增强"设置下和"零样本合成成本"下，有效性和泛化能力均表现优异。

Conclusion: SGC框架挑战了传统"数据量优先"范式，证明在不合成伪样本的情况下，利用异常分数作为病理先验来引导分类，可以高效解决小样本EEG抑郁症检测问题，为少样本学习提供新思路。

Abstract: Deep learning-based Major Depressive Disorder (MDD) detection using Electroencephalography (EEG) is fundamentally constrained by the "small-sample dilemma." Prevailing generative data augmentation methods not only incur heavy computational overhead but also risk introducing synthetic noise, thereby blurring classification boundaries. To challenge the traditional "data quantity first" convention, we propose a novel framework "Beyond Augmentation": Score-Guided Classification (SGC). SGC does not synthesize pseudo-samples; instead, it utilizes an unsupervised generative network architecture to model the structural and statistical anomaly degrees of samples, serving as the core "Pathological Prior". This prior, after robust normalization, is explicitly fused with deep feature representations, thereby precisely guiding the classifier's decision boundary. Furthermore, to dynamically adapt to varying channel configurations, we propose a Cross-Channel Spatial Adaptation module, utilizing a spatial mapping mechanism to effectively resolve the hardware heterogeneity of mismatched channels in multi-center datasets. Extensive experiments on the Mumtaz2016 and high-density MODMA datasets demonstrate the effectiveness and exceptional generalizability of our method under the challenging "zero data augmentation" setting and at "zero sample synthesis cost".
  Keywords: Electroencephalography (EEG), Depression Detection, Anomaly Score, Diffusion Models, Few-Shot Learning

</details>


### [750] [Fairness in two-player zero-sum games with bandit feedback](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01159)
*S Akash,Pratik Gajane*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了带公平约束的两玩家零和博弈（TPZSG）的bandit反馈学习问题。通过重参数化技巧将公平策略分解，并转化为标准零和博弈，证明了公平博弈的解结构。主要成果是一个Explore-Then-Commit算法Fair-ETC-TPZSG，实现了$\widetilde{O}(T^{2/3})$的遗憾界，并在均衡存在主导动作时提升至实例依赖的$\widetilde{O}(1/\widetilde\Delta(\alpha)^{2})$。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有实例依赖结果关注纯纳什均衡，但公平约束通常产生混合均衡，学习难度更大。本文旨在解决带公平约束的TPZSG在bandit反馈下的学习问题。

Method: 提出重参数化方法：将公平策略分解为$p = (α/m)\mathbf{1} + (1-α)\widetilde{p}$，代入收益函数得到公平支付矩阵$\widetilde{A} := (1-α)A + α\mathbf{1} c^{\top}$，从而将公平博弈等价转化为标准零和博弈，并设计了Explore-Then-Commit算法Fair-ETC-TPZSG。

Result: 证明了公平minimax值、公平纳什均衡、公平遗憾的存在性及对偶表示；公平代价不超过$α(1-1/m)$，并当无约束均衡已是全支撑时消失。主要结果为$\widetilde{O}(T^{2/3})$遗憾界，且当公平均衡存在主导动作时提升至实例依赖的$\widetilde{O}(1/\widetildeΔ(\alpha)^{2})$。

Conclusion: 通过重参数化将公平博弈归约为标准零和博弈，简化了理论分析；所提算法能有效处理混合均衡，遗憾界优于朴素方法。

Abstract: We study two-player zero-sum games (TPZSGs) with bandit feedback under fairness constraints requiring every action to be played with probability at least $α/m$. Existing instance-dependent results target $\textit{pure}$ Nash equilibria, while fairness generically produces $\textit{mixed}$ equilibria, a harder learning target. Our key technical tool is a reparametrization: every fair strategy decomposes as $p = (α/m)\mathbf{1} + (1-α)\widetilde{p}$ with $\widetilde{p} \in Δ_m$, and substituting into the payoff form yields $p^{\top}Aq = \widetilde{p}^{\top}\widetilde{A} q$ for a fair payoff matrix $\widetilde{A} := (1-α)A + α\mathbf{1} c^{\top}$, where $c_j = \tfrac{1}{m}\sum_i A(i,j)$ is the column-mean vector. The fair game on $A$ is then equivalent to a standard zero-sum game on $\widetilde{A}$, so equilibrium existence, KKT structure, and LP basis stability reduce to classical results applied to $\widetilde{A}$. We derive the fair minimax value, fair Nash equilibrium, fair regret, and a clean dual representation showing the price of fairness is at most $α(1-1/m)$ and vanishes whenever the unconstrained equilibrium already has full support. Our main result is an $\widetilde{O}(T^{2/3})$ regret bound for an Explore-Then-Commit algorithm, $\texttt{Fair-ETC-TPZSG}$, applicable to general mixed fair equilibria, together with a discussion of why naive action elimination does not readily improve it. When the fair equilibrium has a single dominant action, equivalently when $\widetilde{p}^{\star}$ is a vertex of $Δ_m$, the bound sharpens to instance-dependent $\widetilde{O}(1/\widetildeΔ(α)^{2})$, where $\widetildeΔ(α)$ is the LP-margin gap.

</details>


### [751] [Agentic Transformers Provably Learn to Search via Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00183)
*Tong Yang,Yu Huang,Yingbin Liang,Yuejie Chi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文通过构建一个两注意力头的Transformer模型，证明了在随机k叉树环境中，策略梯度强化学习能够从零开始涌现出随机深度优先搜索（DFS）能力，且无需专家示范。模型展现出深度泛化能力（仅训练深度1-2即可推广到更深树）以及带折扣的排名DFS策略（优先搜索高概率分支）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 缺乏对Transformer策略如何通过强化学习训练动态获得搜索能力的理论理解，尤其是在树搜索这类需要探索、记忆失败和回溯的决策任务中。

Method: 构造了一个两注意力头的Transformer：一个头追踪历史动作，另一个头检测失败并触发回溯。在随机k叉树环境中，采用深度课程学习（depth-wise curriculum）进行策略梯度训练，分析其训练动态。

Result: 1) DFS机制从稀疏强化反馈中分阶段涌现；2) 模型在深度1-2树上训练后能泛化到更深的全树；3) 在不平衡目标分布下，折扣回报导致排名DFS策略，优先搜索高概率分支。

Conclusion: 提出了Transformer基搜索的机制性标准形式：注意力头通过RL训练专门化并协作，从上下文中提取决策相关轨迹并转化为自主动作选择。

Abstract: Tree search is a central abstraction behind many language-agent reasoning and decision-making tasks: agents must explore actions, remember failures, and backtrack toward promising alternatives. Yet, we lack a theoretical understanding of how transformer-based policies acquire such search capabilities from the training dynamics of reinforcement learning (RL). We study this question in a stochastic $k$-ary tree environment, where an agentic transformer observes only its trajectory history through interaction and receives a terminal reward for reaching a hidden leaf goal node. We first construct a two-head transformer that implements randomized depth-first search (DFS): one head tracks previous actions, while the other detects failure outcomes and triggers backtracking. We then analyze the training dynamics of policy gradient under a depth-wise curriculum, showing that this same DFS mechanism emerges in stages from sparse reinforcement feedback without expert demonstrations. The resulting policy exhibits depth generalization: after training only on depth-$1$ and depth-$2$ trees, it succeeds on deeper full trees. We further show that, under imbalanced goal distributions, discounting the return leads to a ranked DFS policy that prioritizes higher-probability branches. Overall, our results identify a mechanistic normal form for transformer-based search, in which attention heads specialize and cooperate to extract decision-relevant traces from context and convert them into agentic action selection via RL training.

</details>


### [752] [Truthful AI Advisors: A Pre-Specified Benchmark for Large Language Model Honesty Under Preference Misalignment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01456)
*Hamidreza Hasani Balyani,Seyed Pouyan Mousavi Davoudi,Alireza Amiri-Margavi,Amin Gholami Davodi,Arshia Gharagozlou*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文通过Crawford-Sobel廉价谈话模型基准测试，发现GPT-4o、Claude Sonnet 4.5等四个指令调优大语言模型在利益冲突下过度诚实：信息揭示量比战略最优均衡高出1.8-4.2倍，表现为近乎完全揭示而非理论预测的粗分划，且帧提示（诚实vs利益最大化）影响微弱。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 评估大语言模型在作为推荐系统、销售助手等非对齐顾问时，当诚实与自身利益冲突时是否会保持真实，这是核心的对齐评估问题。

Method: 将Crawford-Sobel廉价谈话模型转化为LLM诚实性基准测试：发送者观察状态ω∈[0,1]，偏好接收者行动接近ω+b，发送一条无成本消息给理想行动为ω的接收者。设计包含5个偏置水平、3个提示框架、固定低温设置、每状态200次调用，共12,000次发送者调用。在GPT-4o、Claude Sonnet 4.5、Gemini 2.5 Flash-Lite、Llama-3.3-70B上运行完整实验。

Result: 所有四个模型的信息揭示量比最优信息均衡高出1.8-4.2倍：归一化互信息保持在0.78-0.94，而理论最优仅0.18-0.53。信息量随偏置增加而下降，但从未接近战略最优；模型表现为近乎完全揭示加上线性夸张偏移。收益最大化vs诚实提示框架影响可忽略。消融实验表明，当接收者读取发送者所述数字时才能恢复该发现，嵌入编码解码器会将相同数据误读为近乎胡言乱语。

Conclusion: 大语言模型作为顾问时表现出系统性的过度诚实行为，即使在利益冲突下也难以抑制信息揭示，这既是好消息（诚实性强）也是潜在问题（缺乏战略性信息控制能力）。

Abstract: Large language models are increasingly deployed as advisors whose objective is not aligned with the user's: recommenders optimize for engagement, sales assistants for purchases, negotiation agents for concessions. Whether such advisors stay truthful when honesty conflicts with their own payoff is a core alignment-evaluation question. We turn the canonical Crawford-Sobel cheap-talk model into a pre-specified benchmark for LLM honesty under preference misalignment. Cheap-talk theory predicts neither full revelation nor silence but coarse monotone partitions, with fewer informative intervals as preference conflict grows. A sender observes a state omega in [0,1], wants the receiver's action near omega+b, and sends one costless message to a receiver whose ideal action is omega. The design uses 5 bias levels, 3 prompt frames, a fixed low-temperature setting, and 200 states per cell: 12,000 sender calls. For the positive-bias grid b in {0.01,0.04,0.08,0.12} the exact most-informative partition sizes are 7,4,3,2, with oracle normalized mutual information 0.5294, 0.3268, 0.2205, 0.1829. Running the full design on four instruction-tuned models (GPT-4o, Claude Sonnet 4.5, Gemini 2.5 Flash-Lite, Llama-3.3-70B), we find all four over-reveal relative to the most-informative equilibrium by 1.8 to 4.2x: normalized mutual information stays at 0.78-0.94 where the oracle prescribes 0.18-0.53. Informativeness declines with bias as predicted but never approaches the strategic optimum; rather than coarse partitions, models show near-full revelation with a constant upward offset tracking their bias (linear exaggeration). Payoff-maximizing versus honesty framing has negligible effect. A decoder ablation shows the finding is recoverable only when the receiver reads the sender's stated number: an embedding-only decoder mis-reads the same data as near-babbling.

</details>


### [753] [AI-Guided Design and Optimization of Graphite-Based Anodes via Iterative Experimental Feedback](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00187)
*Qian Du,Mark M. Sullivan,James E. Saal,Florian Huber*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种迭代式AI引导工作流，通过多目标逆设计优化石墨基负极开发，从噪声大、不完整的工业数据出发，逐步提升配方可行性和工艺稳健性，最终实现100%电池制造成功率，并将高容量电池比例从28.4%提升至84.8%，容量保持率从42.1%提升至97.3%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 工业电池电极制造过程中存在数据质量差（噪声大、不完整）、配方可行性和工艺稳健性不足的问题，传统方法难以高效优化负极材料开发流程。

Method: 基于Citrine平台实施AI/ML引导的多目标逆设计，通过迭代添加可行性标签和边界条件失败案例，逐步优化代理模型，实现从噪声数据到可制造配方的快速收敛。

Result: 制造可靠性从频繁失败提升至100%成功；高容量（≥350 mAh g⁻¹）电池比例从28.4%提升至84.8%；容量保持率从42.1%提升至97.3%。

Conclusion: 结构化的反馈驱动AI工作流能够将不完美的工业数据转化为可操作的指导，实现更快、更可重复的电池电极制造优化。

Abstract: This study presents an iterative AI-guided workflow that accelerates graphite-based anode development by improving both formulation feasibility and process robustness. Sequential learning via AI/ML-guided multiobjective inverse design for anode optimization was implemented using the Citrine Platform. Starting from a noisy, incomplete dataset, the Citrine Platform was used to generate early surrogate models, which despite low predictive certainty highlighted missing process constraints. By iteratively adding feasibility labels and boundary condition failures, the workflow rapidly converged toward manufacturable, higher-performing formulations. Fabrication reliability improved from frequent process failures to 100% successful cell production, while the fraction of cells delivering $\geq$ 350 mAh g$^{-1}$ increased from 28.4% to 84.8%, with capacity retention rising from 42.1% to 97.3%. These results demonstrate that structured, feedback-driven AI workflows can transform imperfect industrial data into actionable guidance, enabling faster, more reproducible optimization of battery electrode manufacturing.

</details>


### [754] [Learning to Construct Practical Agentic Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00189)
*Aditya Kumar,Zhihan Lei,Jerry Yan,Joshua W. Momo,Lauhitya Reddy,Rafael Enrique Cabrera Jimenez,Cassandra A. Cohen,Arthur Kajiyama,William W. Cohen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种用于设计和优化实用型智能体系统（agentic systems）的框架，通过定义“伪工具”（pseudo-tools）在受限上下文中递归调用LLM来强制模块化。实验表明，手工构建的固定工作流比动态规划工作流更便宜、更准确；所提出的学习方法优于手工设计的智能体；多目标优化方法能联合优化成本与响应质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究专注于自动化设计智能体系统以提升质量，但实际生产系统更关注简洁性、可控性和推理成本的可预测性，两者之间存在脱节。本文旨在弥合这一差距，提出兼顾实用性和性能的智能体系统设计与优化方法。

Method: 1) 提出一种智能体框架，通过定义"伪工具"（在受限上下文上递归调用LLM）强制模块化。2) 手工设计固定工作流与动态规划工作流对比。3) 提出针对伪工具和固定工作流的学习方法。4) 利用框架模块化特性，采用多目标优化方法联合优化成本和响应质量，融合多个学习系统的结果。

Result: 手工构建的固定工作流通常比动态规划工作流更便宜且更准确。所提出的学习方法整体上优于手工设计的智能体。多目标优化方法能够有效平衡成本与响应质量。

Conclusion: 本文展示了在智能体系统设计中，通过模块化框架和面向实用性的优化方法（固定工作流、学习优化、多目标优化），可以在保持实际生产系统所需简洁性、可控性和成本可预测性的同时，获得优于动态规划系统或纯手工设计的性能。

Abstract: Automated design and optimization of agentic LLM-based systems leads to sophisticated systems that substantially improve result quality over off-the-shelf agentic patterns. However, studies of fielded agentic systems show that production systems focus much more on issues such as simplicity, controllability, and predictability of inference costs. In this paper we propose principled approaches to designing and optimizing practical agentic systems. We describe an agent framework that enables designers to enforce modularity in agentic systems, by defining "pseudo-tools" that call LLMs recursively on a restricted context. Using this framework we hand-engineer agents for a diverse set of tasks, and show that relative to dynamically-planned workflows, hand-constructed fixed workflows are generally cheaper and more accurate. We then propose novel learning methods for the agentic components required by this framework, namely pseudo-tools and fixed workflows. These learning methods generally outperform hand-engineered agents. We also exploit the modularity of the framework to apply multi-objective optimization methods to jointly optimize cost and response quality and blend the results of multiple learning systems.

</details>


### [755] [BAGEN: Are LLM Agents Budget-Aware?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00198)
*Yuxiang Lin,Zihan Wang,Mengyang Liu,Yuxuan Shan,Longju Bai,Junyao Zhang,Xing Jin,Boshan Chen,Jinyan Su,Xingyao Wang,Jiaxin Pei,Manling Li*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出预算感知智能体（BAGEN）概念，将预算从被动指标转为主动控制信号，通过渐进区间估计预测剩余预算边界，发现前沿模型普遍过度乐观且预算感知能力与性能相关性弱（r=0.35），早期停止可节省28-64%的token，但精确区间校准仍具挑战（覆盖率上限47%）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前智能体在消耗越来越多资源，但预算仅被视为事后成本指标。作者认为预算应作为主动控制信号，让智能体在任务执行过程中实时感知预算约束，避免在不可能成功任务上持续浪费资源。

Method: (1) 将预算定义为内部预算（智能体计算开销）和外部预算（智能体动作开销）；(2) 形式化预算感知为渐进区间估计，每步预测剩余预算的上下界，并在完成可能性低时发出警报；(3) 采用rollout-replay评分协议进行评估。

Result: (1) 强智能体不必然具备强预算感知能力（相关性r=0.35）；(2) 前沿模型普遍过度乐观，在失败轨迹上持续消耗而非提前预警；(3) 预算感知信号可训练，早期停止节省28-64% token；(4) 精确区间校准困难，SFT+RL后覆盖上限仅47%。

Conclusion: 预算感知是一个可训练且有实际价值的信号，但精确的预算区间校准仍是开放挑战，需要进一步研究。

Abstract: While agents are increasingly spending more resources, today agent cost is mostly measured only after execution. A Budget-Aware Agent (BAGEN) should treat budget as an active control signal, rather than a passive cost metric. We first systematically define budget estimation as internal budgets (from agent computation) and external budgets (from agent actions). We then formalize budget-awareness as progressive interval estimation: at each step of a plan, an agent should predict an upper and lower bound on remaining budget, and alert when completion is unlikely. Scoring with a rollout-replay protocol, we find consistent failure patterns on four environments and five frontier agents: (1) strong agents do not necessarily have strong budget-awareness, with correlation r=0.35. (2) frontier models are consistently over-optimistic, continue spending on tasks that are unlikely to succeed, instead of alerting the user early. (3) budget-aware signal is actionable and trainable. Early stop saves 28-64% tokens on failed trajectories, and SFT+RL strengthens early stop and alert behavior. (4) precise interval calibration remains challenging, with interval coverage capping at 47% after SFT+RL. Project page: https://ragen-ai.github.io/bagen/

</details>


### [756] [From Rashomon Theory to PRAXIS: Efficient Decision Tree Rashomon Sets](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00202)
*Zakk Heile,Hayden McTavish,Varun Babbar,Margo Seltzer,Cynthia Rudin*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: PRAXIS是一种近似Rashomon集（多个近优模型构成的集合）的高效算法，可在稀疏决策树等模型类上大幅降低计算资源和时间开销，且能恢复几乎完整的Rashomon集。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准机器学习流程中常存在大量近优模型（Rashomon集），这些集合对不确定性感知和鲁棒决策很重要，但现有计算方案在内存和运行时间上代价过高。

Method: 提出PRAXIS算法，用于高效近似Rashomon集，相比完整计算在运行时和内存使用上实现数量级的提升。

Result: PRAXIS能够常规性地恢复几乎完整的Rashomon集，且计算资源消耗显著降低。

Conclusion: PRAXIS使得研究人员和从业者能够在真实数据集上可扩展地建模Rashomon集，代码已开源。

Abstract: Standard machine learning pipelines often admit many near-optimal models. These "Rashomon sets" pose a range of challenges and opportunities for uncertainty-aware, robust decision making. They allow users to incorporate domain knowledge and preferences that would otherwise be difficult to specify directly in an objective, and they quantify diversity among valid models for a given training dataset and objective function. However, computation of Rashomon sets, even for simple, interpretable model classes such as sparse decision trees, continues to require immense memory and runtime resources. We present PRAXIS, an algorithm to approximate this Rashomon set with orders of magnitude improvement in runtime and memory usage. We validate that PRAXIS regularly recovers almost all of the full Rashomon set. PRAXIS allows researchers and practitioners to scalably model the Rashomon set for real-world datasets. Code for PRAXIS is available at https://github.com/zakk-h/PRAXIS

</details>


### [757] [Quantized Reasoning Models Think They Need to Think Longer, but They Do Not](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00206)
*Sanae Lotfi,Polina Kirichenko,Steven Li,Zechun Liu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 量化后的大语言模型在推理时会出现“过度思考”错误：中间步骤答案正确但最终输出错误，表现为思维链变长且增加“等等”“但是”等犹豫标记。通过简单地对这些标记施加logit惩罚，可缩短12-23%的推理链，同时保持或提升准确率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究未充分理解后训练量化（PTQ）对推理模型的影响，尤其是量化如何改变模型的推理行为与错误模式。

Method: 通过分析量化模型与全精度模型在token级别的KL散度，定位高熵位置；发现这些位置量化模型倾向于采样过度思考标记（如"wait","but","alternatively"）；提出对这些标记施加训练无关的logit惩罚来缓解过度思考。

Result: 激进PTQ降低准确率并延长CoT长度；高达52%的量化模型错误中，中间推理正确但最终输出错误；所提方法在5个模型、3种量化方法、5个基准上减少12-23%的CoT长度，同时保持或提升准确率，过度思考错误减少最高达58%。

Conclusion: 量化模型存在独特的过度思考错误模式，简单的无训练logit惩罚可有效缓解，在推理成本与准确率之间实现更优的帕累托前沿。

Abstract: Post-training quantization (PTQ) is widely used to deploy large language models efficiently, but its effect on reasoning models is not well understood. Across math, coding, and science QA, we find that aggressive PTQ reduces accuracy while increasing chain-of-thought (CoT) length. Surprisingly, we show that in up to 52% of the quantized models' failures, models reach the right answer in intermediate reasoning steps but do not output it as a final answer. To understand why quantization leads to this increase in overthinking errors, we measure the token-level KL divergence between quantized and full-precision output distributions. Positions with high KL divergence correlate strongly with high next-token entropy, and at these positions quantized models disproportionately sample overthinking markers such as "wait", "but", and "alternatively". We show that simply introducing a training-free logit penalty on a curated set of overthinking markers can reduce CoT length by 12--23% while preserving or improving accuracy across 5 models (1.5B-32B parameters), 3 quantization methods, and 5 benchmarks, yielding a favorable Pareto frontier of accuracy against reasoning cost compared to penalizing other token sets. Overthinking errors produced by quantized models are particularly reduced by up to 58%.

</details>


### [758] [LithoGRPO: Fast Inverse Lithography via GRPO Reinforced Flow Matching](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00228)
*Yao Lai,Xuyuan Xiong,Zeyue Xue,Guojin Chen,Jing Wang,Xihui Liu,Rui Zhang,Robert Mullins,Bei Yu,Ping Luo*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了LithoGRPO框架，将流匹配与GRPO强化学习微调相结合，用于半导体制造中的逆光刻技术（ILT）掩模优化，在保持高效生成的同时实现了最优性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统ILT依赖显式物理指标评估掩模，限制了生成模型的应用；现有方法要么是纯生成式要么是基于优化的，难以兼顾效率和物理约束。

Method: 将流匹配范式与GRPO强化学习微调统一融合；提出快速shot-counting算法（加速130倍以上）用于可制造性评估。

Result: 在基于优化和基于学习的方法上均取得最优性能；快速shot-counting算法在保持掩模排序的前提下实现130倍以上加速。

Conclusion: 这是首个统一流匹配和强化学习进行掩模优化的框架，验证了强化学习能够利用ILT中显式定义的物理奖励函数进行复杂约束下的优化。

Abstract: In semiconductor manufacturing, lithography projects circuit layouts onto silicon wafers through an optical mask. As circuit features shrink below the wavelength of light, optical diffraction causes the printed patterns to deviate from their intended layouts. Inverse Lithography Technology (ILT) addresses this challenge by generating optimized masks that enhance the fidelity of pattern transfer onto wafers. While ILT resembles an image synthesis task, its reliance on explicit physical metrics for mask evaluation limits the applicability of existing generative models. We introduce LithoGRPO, an ILT framework that integrates the flow-matching paradigm with GRPO-based reinforcement learning (RL) fine-tuning, enabling efficient exploration of diverse masks for a given target layout. Unlike purely generative or optimization-based approaches, RL in LithoGRPO exploits the explicitly defined, physics-based reward function of ILT, enabling optimization under complex, process-aware constraints. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first framework that unifies flow matching and RL for mask optimization. To improve RL sampling efficiency, we propose a fast shot-counting algorithm for manufacturability evaluation, achieving over 130x speedup while preserving the mask ranking of the traditional shot-count metric. Extensive experiments demonstrate that LithoGRPO achieves state-of-the-art performance over both optimization-based and learning-based methods, while maintaining efficient mask generation.

</details>


### [759] [Accuracy, Stability, and Repeated-Run Reliability of Large Language Models on Deterministic Programming Tasks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00920)
*Yongxi Zhou,Lai Yun Choi,Jiaxi Wen,Wenbo Ye*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文通过编程任务测试发现，LLM的常规单次通过率会高估"无需重试即可覆盖"的稳定性指标（最高达17.8个百分点），且中间性能模型差距最大，表明重复运行稳定性分析是确定性文本生成评估的必要补充。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准代码生成基准强调单次准确率或多次采样下的最终成功，但许多部署场景还需要稳定性——即相同任务描述下多次调用的一致性。现有评估方法忽略了这一维度。

Method: 提出重复运行评估协议，包含运行级准确率、免重试覆盖率和逐问题变异性三个指标。在100道LeetCode风格问题上，对16个模型（5个供应商家族）使用两种提示模板，每个问题执行5次重复运行，共16,000个评估实例。

Result: 运行级通过率与完美稳定率强相关（r=0.985），但通过率始终高于免重试覆盖率，差距最高达17.8个百分点，且会反转性能接近系统的模型排名。提示词效果因模型而异，而非普遍受益。

Conclusion: 重复运行稳定性分析是传统准确率报告的必要补充，对于确定性文本生成任务尤为关键。

Abstract: Run-level pass rate overstates retry-free coverage by up to 17.8 percentage points -- and the gap is largest precisely for mid-performing systems. We investigate this accuracy--stability relationship in large language model (LLM) evaluation for deterministic text-conditioned generation, using programming tasks as a concrete testbed. Standard code-generation benchmarks emphasize single-run accuracy or eventual success under repeated sampling, but many deployment settings also require stability: consistent outcomes across repeated invocations under the same task description. We present a repeated-run evaluation protocol with metrics for run-level accuracy, retry-free coverage, and per-problem variability. On a recency-based benchmark of 100 LeetCode-style problems, we evaluate 16 models from five provider families under two prompt templates with five repeated runs per problem, yielding 16,000 evaluation instances. Although run-level pass rate and perfect stability rate are strongly correlated (r=0.985), pass rate consistently exceeds retry-free coverage -- a gap that reaches 17.8 percentage points and reverses model rankings even among closely matched systems. Prompt effects are model-dependent rather than uniformly beneficial. These results suggest that repeated-run stability analysis is a necessary complement to conventional accuracy reporting for deterministic text-conditioned generation tasks.

</details>


### [760] [A Pre-Training Analogue of Grokking in Language Models: Tracing Delayed Grammatical Generalization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00230)
*Sherin Muckatira,Namrata Shivagunde,Vijeta Deshpande,Anna Rumshisky*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于暴露频率的框架，将LLM预训练中的next-token预测任务转化为可研究"Grokking"（延迟泛化）现象的场景，并通过BLiMP最小对数据集发现，模型在语法现象上存在延迟泛化，且泛化后语法概念向量的可预测性增强、子空间维度升高，注意力集中在少数头部。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Grokking现象此前仅在监督学习的多轮训练中被研究，而LLM预训练采用next-token预测、数据重复有限、无明确训练/验证集划分，现有方法无法直接适用。本文旨在弥合这一差距，提出能捕捉LLM预训练中类似Grokking动态的分析框架。

Method: 基于暴露频率划分数据：对每个BLiMP最小对，提取一个能捕捉语法对比和现象相关上下文的"关键短语"（critical phrase）。根据关键短语是否出现在预训练窗口，将样本分别归入代理训练集（proxy-train）和代理验证集（proxy-validation），从而在无原始标签的情况下模拟训练/验证划分，研究延迟泛化。

Result: 在五种语法现象上观察到延迟泛化现象；泛化后语法概念向量的可预测性增强、占据更高维度的子空间；关键token到相关上下文token的注意力集中在少数头部。

Conclusion: 本文的方法有效揭示了LLM预训练中存在的Grokking-like延迟泛化现象，并为理解其内部机制提供了新的分析视角（概念向量、注意力模式）。

Abstract: Grokking, the phenomenon in which neural networks generalize long after fitting their training data, has been studied in supervised settings on many epochs. LLM pre-training instead involves next-token prediction over an unlabeled corpus, with limited data repetition and no explicit train/validation split. To address this, we propose an exposure-based framework that enables the study of grokking-like dynamics during LLM pre-training. We ground our evaluation in BLiMP minimal pairs, which provide controlled grammatical contrasts. For every BLiMP minimal pair, we identify a critical phrase, the smallest continuous span that captures the grammatical contrast and the phenomenon-relevant context. Examples whose critical phrase appears in the pre-training window are assigned to the proxy-train split; the remaining examples are assigned to the proxy-validation split. Across five grammatical phenomena, we observe delayed generalization. Analyzing pre-training checkpoints before and after generalization shows that grammatical concept vectors become more predictive of grammatical acceptability and occupy a higher-dimensional subspace after generalization. We also find that attention from the critical token to the relevant context token is concentrated in a small number of heads.

</details>


### [761] [FAiT: Frequency-Aware Inverted Transformer for Multivariate Time Series Forecasting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01306)
*Peng He,Yao Liu,Yanglei Gan,Run Lin,Yuxiang Cai,Qiao Liu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: FAiT提出了一种频率感知的倒置Transformer，通过倒置注意力构建高通分支来补偿被低通滤波衰减的高频信号，并引入动态时频调制模块自适应调整频谱子带能量，在多个基准上超越现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有Transformer的自注意力机制本质上是低通滤波器，平滑了高频信号；而现有频域方法使用固定谱基和序列级均匀调制，忽略了真实序列中频谱特征随时间演变的特性，无法捕捉细粒度时间动态。

Method: 1) 倒置注意力：将注意力图解释为可学习的低通算子，并通过反转注意力矩阵构建互补的高通分支恢复衰减的瞬态信号；2) 动态时频调制(DTFM)：生成实例条件权重，自适应重新校准频谱子带的能量，实现细粒度的多尺度模式控制。

Result: 在广泛使用的基准数据集上，FAiT一致优于基于Transformer和频域增强的最先进基线方法，同时保持计算效率。

Conclusion: FAiT通过内在地修正频谱偏差和动态时频调制，有效解决了Transformer在多元时间序列预测中对高频信号平滑的问题，为处理时变频谱特征提供了新思路。

Abstract: While Transformer-based architectures have established themselves as a dominant paradigm in Multivariate Time Series Forecasting (MTSF), their core self-attention mechanism inherently functions as a low-pass filter, systematically smoothing out high-frequency signals vital for sharp local changes. Recent advancements have increasingly incorporated frequency-domain operations to address this bias, however, most existing designs rely on fixed spectral bases and apply sequence-wise (uniform) modulation, implicitly assuming a time-invariant frequency response. This overlooks a key property of real-world series that their spectral characteristics often evolve over time, making uniform modulation insufficient for capturing fine-grained temporal dynamics. To tackle these limitations, we propose FAiT, a Frequency-Aware inverted Transformer. Specifically, FAiT rectifies the spectral bias internally through Inverted Attention, which interprets the attention map as a learnable low-pass operator and constructs a dedicated complementary high-pass branch by inverting the attention matrix to recover attenuated transient signals. Furthermore, FAiT introduces Dynamic Temporal-Frequency Modulation (DTFM), which synthesizes instance-conditioned weights to adaptively re-calibrate the energy of spectral sub-bands, enabling fine-grained control over evolving multi-scale patterns. Extensive experiments on widely used benchmarks demonstrate that FAiT consistently outperforms state-of-the-art Transformer-based and frequency-enhanced baselines, while maintaining computational efficiency.

</details>


### [762] [InfoAtlas: A Foundation Model for Zero-Shot Statistical Dependence Estimate](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00241)
*Zhengyang Hu,Yanzhi Chen,Hanxiang Ren,Qunsong Zeng,Youyi Zheng,Adrian Weller,Kaibin Huang,Yanchao Yang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: InfoAtlas是一种类似基础模型的神经网络架构，通过单次前向传播直接推断互信息，无需迭代优化，在保持与最先进方法相当精度的同时实现100倍加速，并可灵活处理不同维度和样本量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统的神经互信息估计器需要针对每个新数据集进行昂贵的迭代优化，无法满足实时应用需求，因此需要一种无需迭代、可直接推断互信息的方法。

Method: 构建类似基础模型（foundation model）的架构InfoAtlas，在大规模合成数据上预训练，学习识别多样化的依赖结构，从而能够通过单次前向传播直接预测互信息。

Result: InfoAtlas在精度上与最先进的神经估计器相当，推理速度提升100倍，能够通过单一统一模型灵活处理不同维度和样本量，并能有效泛化到复杂的真实世界场景。

Conclusion: 通过将互信息估计重新定义为推理任务，InfoAtlas为实时依赖分析建立了基础。

Abstract: Measuring statistical dependency between high-dimensional random variables is a fundamental task in data science and machine learning. Neural mutual information (MI) estimators offer a promising avenue, but they typically require costly iterative optimization for each new dataset, making them impractical for real-time applications. We present InfoAtlas, a foundation model-like architecture that eliminates this bottleneck by directly inferring MI in a single forward pass. Pretrained on large-scale synthetic data with rich dependence patterns, InfoAtlas learns to identify diverse dependence structures and predict MI directly from the dataset. Comprehensive experiments demonstrate that InfoAtlas matches state-of-the-art neural estimators in accuracy while achieving $100\times$ speedup, can flexibly handle varying dimensions and sample sizes through a single unified model, and generalizes effectively to complex, real-world scenarios. By reformulating MI estimation as an inference task, InfoAtlas establishes a foundation for real-time dependency analysis.

</details>


### [763] [ARCA: Adapter-Residual Credit Assignment When Token Signals Degenerate](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00257)
*Rodney Lafuente-Mercado*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文指出在LoRA参数高效微调下，基于token级输出分布差异的信用分配信号会退化（趋向均匀权重或集中在任务无关位置），并提出ARCA方法，通过适配器隐藏状态残差来分配信用，避免退化问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM-RL的token级信用分配假设策略完全可训练，但实际中常用LoRA等参数高效微调，这种分离隐藏了结构性的失效模式。

Method: 提出Adapter-Residual Credit Assignment (ARCA)，利用适配器隐藏状态残差 ||h_adapted - h_base||₂ 作为token显著性信号，代替基于输出分布差异的信用分配。

Result: 在MATH/Qwen3-1.7B GRPO实验中，ARCA展现出预测的非退化中间区域信用分布，且与同等rank的基线方法竞争力相当。

Conclusion: ARCA通过关注适配器实际改变模型的位置而非输出分布的不确定性，避免了LoRA下信用分配退化的失效模式。

Abstract: Token-level credit assignment for language-model reinforcement learning is usually formulated as if the policy were fully trainable, while practical LLM-RL pipelines often rely on parameter-efficient fine-tuning, especially LoRA. We argue that this separation hides a structural failure mode. Under LoRA, the policy is restricted to a low-rank neighborhood of the reference model, so the per-token output-distribution differences used by common intrinsic credit signals, surprisal, entropy reduction, and policy divergence, can become degenerate after within-trajectory normalization, either approaching uniform weights or concentrating on a small set of task-agnostic positions. We formalize this behavior and propose measuring it directly with concentration diagnostics such as weight Gini and effective-token ratio. We then introduce \emph{Adapter-Residual Credit Assignment} (ARCA), a lightweight alternative that derives token salience from the adapter's own hidden-state residual, $\|h^{\text{adapted}}_t - h^{\text{base}}_t\|_2$. ARCA asks where the adapter actually changes the model, rather than where the output distribution appears uncertain or shifted, and requires no learned reward model, value head, or tree construction. In a compact MATH/Qwen3-1.7B GRPO sweep, ARCA exhibits the predicted non-degenerate middle-regime credit distribution under matched rollout budgets and remains competitive with rank-matched baselines.

</details>


### [764] [When Softmax Fails at the Top: Extreme Value Corrections for InfoNCE](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00262)
*Melihcan Erol,Suat Evren,Oktay Ozel,Alexander Morgan,Jongha Jon Ryu,Lizhong Zheng*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文指出现有对比学习损失函数InfoNCE的softmax形式与归一化嵌入设定存在统计假设上的不匹配，并提出WEINCE方法——通过锚点方向的在线批量统计融合softmax对数与端点短缺校正（无需额外参数），在五个视觉基准上取得稳定的特征提取性能提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: InfoNCE的softmax形式隐含了一个关于最高得分样本如何被选出的统计假设，但该假设与当前对比学习中常用的归一化嵌入设定不一致，导致硬负样本的统计处理不够准确。

Method: 提出WEINCE方法，利用锚点方向的在线批量统计，将标准softmax对数与端点短缺校正（endpoint shortfall correction）进行融合，不引入任何可训练参数。

Result: 在五个视觉基准数据集上，WEINCE在冻结特征评估（frozen-feature evaluation）中一致优于InfoNCE基线。

Conclusion: 对硬负样本进行更符合实际统计假设的处理，能够有效改进对比学习目标函数的设计。

Abstract: InfoNCE is the standard contrastive learning objective, but its softmax form is not only a computational convenience: it also encodes a statistical assumption about how the top-scoring example is selected. Using extreme value theory, we show that this assumption is often misaligned with the normalized embedding setting used in modern contrastive learning. Motivated by this mismatch, we propose \textsc{WEINCE}, a simple modification of InfoNCE that uses anchor-wise online batch statistics to blend the usual softmax logits with an endpoint shortfall correction, adding no trainable parameters. Across five vision benchmarks, \textsc{WEINCE} yields consistent improvements in frozen-feature evaluation. These results show that a more faithful statistical treatment of hard negatives can improve contrastive objectives.

</details>


### [765] [Inner Product Aware Quantization: Provably Fast, Accurate, and Adaptive Algorithms](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00289)
*Nathan White,Krish Singal*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了面向内积保持的量化方法，提出了自适应无偏量化方案，在理论上证明了与自适应随机量化（ASQ）的紧密联系，并开发了更高效的算法，速度提升2-10倍。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有量化方法多关注最小化均方误差，但许多下游应用（如向量检索）需要进行内积运算，需要能近似保持内积的量化方案。

Method: 提出了面向最坏情况和平均情况输入的内积保持目标函数，开发了精确和近似算法，并揭示了与自适应随机量化（ASQ）的理论联系。

Result: 提出的算法在多种工作负载分布下表现优异，相比现有最优方法，标准ASQ算法速度提升2-10倍且保持质量不变。

Conclusion: 本研究使自适应量化技术在实际应用中更高效、更易处理，为内积感知的量化方案提供了理论基础和实用算法。

Abstract: Quantization is a fundamental tool used to compress datasets, neural network weights, and memory usage in a range of computational tasks. Many downstream applications of vector quantization perform inner products with arbitrary inputs. This motivates the study of inner product aware quantization schemes that approximately preserve inner products with unseen vectors -- in contrast to simply minimizing the mean-squared error.
  In this work, we formulate objectives that capture natural desiderata and develop adaptive and unbiased quantization methods that approximately preserve inner products with worst-case and average-case inputs. An analysis of these objectives shows a tight connection with the well-studied notion of Adaptive Stochastic Quantization (ASQ).
  We develop provably fast exact and approximate algorithms for our objectives. Our theoretical results inspire efficient practical algorithms that perform well across a variety of workload distributions. They also lead to practical algorithms for standard ASQ which are 2-10$\times$ faster than prior state-of-the-art methods while maintaining quality. These theoretical and empirical results contribute towards making adaptive quantization techniques more efficient and tractable in practical settings.

</details>


### [766] [Accurate Large-sample Uncertainty Quantification using Stochastic Gradient Markov Chain Monte Carlo](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00293)
*Yu Wang,Jie Ding,Jonathan H. Huggins*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文针对SGD和SGLD算法在大批量或模型误设情况下的调参难题，提出了新的离散时间近似方法（含/不含动量），能精确预测平稳协方差、迭代平均协方差和积分自相关时间，并给出非渐近误差界。实验证明该方法在现有方法失效的场景下仍能提供有效的调参指导。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有SGD/SGLD的调参理论依赖连续时间极限或强统计假设，在大批量或模型误设的实际场景中定量不准确，亟需更精确的离散时间近似来指导调参和不确定性量化。

Method: 提出离散时间近似方法，推导了SGD和SGLD（含/不含动量）的平稳协方差、迭代平均协方差和积分自相关时间的解析表达式，并证明了非渐近误差界。

Result: 数值实验表明，新方法在模型误设、大批量数据、使用β-散度替代对数损失等现有方法失效的场景下，仍能提供准确的调参指导。

Conclusion: 提出的离散时间近似理论为SGD/SGLD的实用调参和不确定性量化提供了更可靠的数学基础，弥合了现有理论与实际应用之间的差距。

Abstract: Tuning algorithms such as stochastic gradient descent (SGD) and stochastic gradient Langevin dynamics (SGLD) for approximate sampling and uncertainty quantification remains challenging, particularly in the practically relevant settings when the batch size is large or the model is misspecified. Existing theory that provides tuning guidance relies on continuous-time limits or strong statistical assumptions, which can become quantitatively inaccurate in these regimes. We address these shortcomings by proposing new discrete-time approximations to SG(L)D with and without momentum, which enables accurate predictions of the stationary covariance, iterate average covariance, and integrated autocorrelation time. Moreover, we prove quantitative, non-asymptotic error bounds showing that these estimates are sufficiently accurate for practical tuning and uncertainty quantification. Numerical experiments demonstrate that our theory yields improved tuning guidance across a range of models and data-generating distributions where existing approaches fail, including when using the $β$-divergence rather than log-loss to obtain statistically robust inferences.

</details>


### [767] [Adaptive Order Policies for Masked Diffusion](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00295)
*Jama Hussein Mohamud,Mohsin Hasan,Mirco Ravanelli,Yoshua Bengio*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出一种学习去掩码顺序的方法，通过轻量级策略网络加权扩散损失，在组合任务和蛋白质序列生成中优于常见启发式方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有掩码扩散模型通常随机或基于启发式选择去掩码顺序，缺乏对最优顺序的学习能力，在顺序敏感任务中表现不佳。

Method: 提出使用轻量级策略网络学习去掩码顺序，通过策略概率加权掩码扩散损失，支持单独训练策略（冻结去噪器）或联合训练策略与去噪器。

Result: 在组合任务和蛋白质序列生成等顺序敏感问题上，所提方法优于常见的随机/启发式顺序选择方法。

Conclusion: 通过学习去掩码顺序可以显著提升掩码扩散模型在顺序敏感任务上的性能，且策略网络与去噪器联合训练能实现相互适应。

Abstract: Masked diffusion models have seen great success in capturing data distributions over discrete sequences in domains such as text and proteins. These models generate data by iteratively unmasking tokens starting from a fully masked sequence, with the unmasking order typically chosen at random or using a heuristic based on denoiser probabilities. In this work, we propose a scheme for learning the unmasking order using an additional lightweight policy network on top of a diffusion model. Our proposed loss reweights terms in the masked diffusion loss according to policy probabilities, and results in a policy that prefers positions where the denoiser is more likely to be correct. We study this loss in two settings: (i) training solely the policy while using a frozen pre-trained denoiser, and (ii) training the policy and denoiser jointly with the weighted loss to allow for mutual adaptation.
