TL;DR: 本文研究了不同Bregman散度（Frobenius、von Neumann、LogDet）在Kronecker近似协方差矩阵时如何分配近似误差，并基于协方差谱与Hessian矩阵的对齐特性，提出了一种子空间感知的Kronecker优化器。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管已有工作将Shampoo类优化器中的Kronecker近似解释为Bregman矩阵散度下的投影，但不同散度在协方差矩阵并非精确Kronecker结构时如何影响近似误差分布尚不清楚。

Method: 通过分析协方差矩阵的谱，证明三种散度以不同方式将Kronecker近似误差分布在协方差谱上，且Kronecker因子由散度加权的残差决定。进而提出子空间感知优化器：在顶部子空间应用基于特征值的预条件，在底部子空间使用自适应各向同性加速常数。

Result: 实验发现顶部协方差特征空间与Hessian矩阵对齐良好，而尾部谱噪声大且不可靠。基于此设计的子空间感知优化器能更好利用谱结构。

Conclusion: Bregman散度的选择本质上是将近似误差分配到协方差谱的不同部分，利用谱对齐特性可以设计更有效的Kronecker优化器。

Abstract: Shampoo-style optimizers approximate gradient covariance matrices using Kronecker-factored structures. Recent work~\cite{lin2026understanding} showed that such approximations can be viewed as projections under Bregman matrix divergences, leading to different Kronecker-factored preconditioners. However, it remains unclear what role the choice of divergence plays when the covariance is not exactly Kronecker-factored. We study this question through the spectrum of the covariance matrix. We show that Frobenius, von Neumann, and LogDet divergences distribute the unavoidable Kronecker approximation error differently across the covariance spectrum. We further show that their Kronecker factors are governed by divergence-weighted residuals rather than the raw approximation error, explaining how these spectral preferences are realized in the resulting preconditioners. Empirically, we observe that the top covariance eigenspace is substantially better aligned with the Hessian matrix, while the tail spectrum is much noisier and unreliable. Motivated by these findings, we propose a subspace-aware Kronecker optimizer that applies eigenvalue-based preconditioning in the top subspace and uses an adaptive isotropic acceleration constant in the bottom subspace.

</details>


### [808] [Escaping the Mode Lottery: Multi-Response Training Improves Language Model Generalization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00544)
*Hasan Amin,Kian Ahrabian,Ming Yin,Rajiv Khanna*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文指出大语言模型微调中常见的"单响应"训练范式（即每个提示仅配一个回答）存在"模态抽奖"问题——忽略了多个合理回答。作者提出多响应训练（MRT），从理论上揭示了提示与回答作为不同统计资源的作用，并分析了响应选择的策略（如Random-K-of-N、基于奖励的选择、子模质量-多样性目标）。实验表明MRT在分布泛化上持续提升，尤其在回答多样性强、提示冗余低的场景下效果显著。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前语言模型微调通常为每个提示只保留一个回答，但许多提示存在多个合理回答。这种"一对一的配对"将多模态条件分布退化为单样本视图，导致"模态抽奖"现象——训练只强调部分模态而忽略其他模态，使得模型泛化能力受损。

Method: 1) 提出多响应训练（MRT）框架，保留每个提示的多个回答；2) 从统计视角将提示和回答视为不同资源——提示减少输入分布不确定性，回答减少条件输出分布不确定性，据此构建方差-预算权衡理论；3) 分析回答选择策略：Random-K-of-N作为无偏基线，基于奖励的选择可能导致模式坍塌，提出子模质量-多样性目标作为高效替代方案；4) 构建多提示-多响应基准数据集进行验证。

Result: 控制仿真验证了方差效应和选择效应的预测，包括奖励-only选择产生与真实目标不一致的梯度这一显著失败模式。在结构化和真实世界数据集上，MRT在分布泛化上持续改进，在回答多样性高、提示冗余低的场景下收益最大。

Conclusion: MRT将回答多样性重新定义为数据分配问题，提供了清晰的指导：当回答获取成本低且多样性高时，保留多个回答不是启发式技巧，而是有统计基础的合理选择。这挑战了当前微调中"一个提示一个回答"的默认做法。

Abstract: Modern language-model fine-tuning typically pairs each prompt with a single response, even though many prompts admit multiple valid completions. This effectively reduces a multi-modal conditional distribution to a one-sample view, a phenomenon we call the "mode lottery," where training emphasizes a subset of plausible modes while leaving others underrepresented. We study multi-response training (MRT), which retains multiple responses per prompt, and develop a principled account of when and why it helps. Our key insight is that prompts and responses are distinct statistical resources: additional prompts reduce uncertainty about the input distribution, while additional responses reduce uncertainty about the conditional output distribution. This yields a variance-budget tradeoff that predicts when retaining multiple responses is worthwhile, shows diminishing returns as prompt-level uncertainty dominates, and explains why large redundant corpora can exhibit an implicit multi-response effect. We further analyze response selection, and show that Random-K-of-N is the unbiased default for distributional fine-tuning, reward-based selection can induce mode collapse, and a submodular quality-diversity objective provides an efficient alternative with theoretical guarantees. Controlled simulations validate the predicted variance and selection effects, including a striking failure mode where reward-only selection produces gradients misaligned with the true objective. Across structured and real-world datasets, including a new multi-prompt, multi-response benchmark, MRT consistently improves distributional generalization, with the largest gains in high response-diversity, low prompt-redundancy regimes. MRT reframes response multiplicity as a data-allocation problem with clear guidance: when responses are cheap and diverse, keeping more than one is not a heuristic, but a statistically grounded choice.

</details>


### [809] [The Assistant as a Privileged Persona: A canonical reference in cross-persona self-recognition](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00545)
*Asvin G*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究Llama-3.1-70B-Instruct模型的跨角色作者身份判断能力，发现模型在判断文本是否由自己生成时，存在以"助手"角色为参照的不对称机制，而非简单的对称熵差。模型实际上执行了一个隐式的贝叶斯似然比检验，以"助手"作为标准替代假设。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索后训练语言模型能否在跨角色（从龙到莎士比亚等不同人格）场景下判断文本的作者身份，理解模型自我识别能力的边界和内在机制。

Method: 在Llama-3.1-70B-Instruct上构建评价者和生成者角色的全矩阵实验，测量作者归属声称率、角色向量距离、熵差等指标，并尝试多种替代角色作为参照进行对比分析。

Result: 在"助手"行上，声称率、向量距离和熵差三者紧密耦合；偏离"助手"行后，对称熵差预测失效，只有以"助手"为参照的非对称熵差有效。尝试其他角色作为参照均无法替代"助手"。

Conclusion: 模型进行跨角色作者判断时，本质上是以"助手"角色为锚点执行隐式贝叶斯似然比检验。每个角色本质上是"助手"的偏移版本，这使"助手"成为唯一普适的参照假设，解释了不对称性的来源。

Abstract: Post-trained language models can recognize their own outputs from a sentence or two out of context. In a companion paper \citep{jack2026twomodes} we showed they can also recognize when they are currently acting on-policy, through the sharp entropy drop of assistant-mode generation. Both signals are tied to the Assistant persona that post-training mainly shapes.
  This paper widens the frame to cross-persona authorship judgement on Llama-3.1-70B-Instruct. We measure a matrix of authorship claim rates over a panel of evaluator and generator personas spanning librarian to dragon to Shakespeare, and make two claims. \emph{First}, on the Assistant's own row of the matrix, the Assistant's claim rate, the persona-vector distance from the Assistant in activation space, and the entropy gap between the Assistant's surprise on a persona's text and the persona's surprise on its own text are all tightly coupled. This extends the entropy signature of \emph{acting} from the companion paper to a retrospective signature of \emph{having acted}. \emph{Second}, this coupling fails off the Assistant's row: the natural symmetric extension of the entropy gap does not predict authorship for distinctive evaluators (pirate, dragon, Shakespeare); what does is asymmetric -- the evaluator's surprise compared to the Assistant's surprise on the same text, not to the generator's. We rule out the alternative that any persona could play this reference role by trying many candidate substitutes; none does. We interpret the asymmetry as the model performing an implicit Bayesian likelihood-ratio test against the Assistant as the canonical alternative hypothesis, with the persona-vector geometry of \citet{chen2025persona} (every persona a delta off the Assistant) ensuring that the Assistant is the only persona universally accessible to that test.

</details>


### [810] [Normalized Relevance Measure as a Unifying Framework to Explain Neural Network Latent Structures](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00557)
*Ping Xiong,Thomas Schnake,Grégoire Montavon,Klaus-Robert Müller,Shinichi Nakajima*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出归一化相关度量（NRM）框架，一种通用的神经网络解释方法，能够为任意架构中任意神经元集合分配可比较的归一化重要性分数，并在计算机视觉任务中验证其有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 仅分析输入域不足以理解神经网络的工作原理，必须检查其内部推理机制。现有解释方法缺乏跨层可比性和数学基础，亟需一种通用的、数学严谨的框架来分析任意层任意神经元集合的重要性。

Method: 提出NRM框架，借鉴概率论中的边际化和条件化操作，基于加法和乘法法则构建神经元相关性的归一化有符号度量，实现跨层可比性，并统一了现有的传播式解释算法。

Result: 在VGG16网络的计算机视觉应用中，跨层联合相关分析揭示了关键信息流模式；NRM框架成功统一了多种现有传播式解释方法，明确了它们实际计算的核心量。

Conclusion: NRM框架提供了通用、数学可解释的神经网络信息传播理解方法，为可解释人工智能奠定了广泛适用的理论基础。

Abstract: To understand how a neural network (NN) functions and makes predictions, it has become increasingly clear that analyzing only the input domain is insufficient -- one must also examine its internal inference mechanisms to capture the complete picture. To explain the internal inference mechanisms of such models, it is essential to analyze the importance of latent representations for a given task. In this paper, we propose the \emph{normalized relevance measure} (NRM) framework -- a novel general explanation procedure that attributes relevance to \emph{arbitrary sets of neurons across layers of arbitrary architectures}. In the NRM framework, relevance of selected neurons is explicitly defined as a normalized signed measure, constructed using simple operations -- marginalization and conditioning based on additive and multiplicative laws -- in analogy to the probability measures. The normalization property further guarantees comparability across layers. The NRM framework subsumes existing propagation-based explanation algorithms by explicitly identifying the underlying quantity being computed. We demonstrate the utility of the framework in computer vision applications, where joint relevance analysis across multiple layers reveals key information flows in VGG16 networks. Overall, the NRM framework provides a general, mathematically grounded approach to understanding how modern NNs propagate information, offering a versatile and broadly applicable foundation for explainable artificial intelligence.

</details>


### [811] [Semi-Supervised Noise Adaptation: Transferring Knowledge from Noise Domain](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00558)
*Yuan Yao,Jin Song,Huixia Li,Tongtong Yuan,Jiaqi Wu,Yu Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出半监督噪声适应（SSNA）问题，利用合成噪声域作为源域来提升目标域泛化能力，并设计了噪声适应框架（NAF），理论和实验均证明其有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 已有研究发现在半监督设置下，由简单分布（如高斯分布）构成的噪声域可作为替代源域，作者基于此发现正式提出SSNA问题，旨在利用合成噪声域提升目标域的泛化性能。

Method: 首先推导了描述噪声域对泛化影响的理论泛化界，然后基于该界提出噪声适应框架（NAF）。

Result: NAF能有效利用噪声域收窄目标域的泛化界，并在实验上取得性能提升。

Conclusion: 合成噪声域可在半监督学习中作为有效的源域，NAF框架能够利用这一特性提升模型泛化能力。

Abstract: Transfer learning aims to facilitate the learning of a target domain by transferring knowledge from a source domain. The source domain typically contains semantically meaningful samples (*e.g.*, images) to facilitate effective knowledge transfer. However, a recent study observes that the noise domain constructed from simple distributions (*e.g.*, Gaussian distributions) can serve as a surrogate source domain in the semi-supervised setting, where only a small proportion of target samples are labeled while most remain unlabeled. Based on this surprising observation, we formulate a novel problem termed *Semi-Supervised Noise Adaptation* (SSNA), which aims to leverage a synthetic noise domain to improve the generalization of the target domain. To address this problem, we first establish a generalization bound characterizing the effect of the noise domain on generalization, based on which we propose a Noise Adaptation Framework (NAF). Extensive experiments demonstrate that NAF effectively leverages the noise domain to tighten the generalization bound of the target domain, leading to improved performance. The codes are available at https://github.com/AIResearch-Group/SSNA.

</details>


### [812] [Richer Representations for Neural Algorithmic Reasoning via Auxiliary Reconstruction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00559)
*Jiafu Huang,Chao Peng,Chenyang Xu,Zhengfeng Yang,Kecheng Cai,Chenhao Zhang,Yi Wang,Yiwei Gong,Wanqin Zhou,Irene Zheng*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出在神经算法推理的编码器中加入重建模块（恢复输入状态）和自监督变体（捕捉特征依赖），以学习更丰富的表示，从而提升现有处理器在标准基准上的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有神经算法推理框架中，编码器多采用简单的MLP，其表示学习能力被忽视，导致编码信息不足以支撑复杂的算法推理。

Method: 1. 在编码器后添加重建模块，通过辅助任务恢复输入状态，迫使编码器保留关键信息；2. 进一步设计自监督变体，鼓励编码器捕捉状态内特征间的依赖关系。

Result: 在标准基准上，该方法提升了现有神经架构的性能；编码器学会了更丰富的表示，增强了处理器的算法推理能力。

Conclusion: 通过改进编码器的表示学习（重建+自监督），可以有效提升神经算法推理的整体性能，表明编码器在算法推理中扮演着重要角色。

Abstract: Neural algorithmic reasoning has emerged as a popular research direction. It aims to train neural networks to mimic the step-by-step behavior of classical rule-based algorithms. More specifically, the execution of such algorithms can be abstracted as a sequence of states, where each state represents the intermediate outcome after an execution step. The training objective is to generate state sequences that replicate the underlying algorithmic process. A common framework for this task adopts an encoder-processor-decoder architecture, where the encoder learns representations of states, the processor simulates algorithmic steps, and the decoder reconstructs output states. While prior work has focused on improving the processor, the role of the encoder in representation learning has received little attention. Most methods rely on simple MLP encoders, raising the question of whether such representations are sufficiently informative for supporting algorithmic reasoning. This paper investigates how to improve encoder representations for neural algorithmic reasoning. We propose a reconstruction module that aims to recover the input state from its encoded representation. This auxiliary reconstruction task encourages the encoder to retain critical information about the input. We demonstrate that incorporating this task during training improves the performance of existing neural architectures on standard benchmarks. Furthermore, we observe that current encoders often underutilize the correlations among features within a state. To address this, we draw inspiration from self-supervised learning and design an enhanced variant of the auxiliary task that encourages the encoder to capture intra-state feature dependencies. Experimental results show that our method enables the encoder to learn richer representations, thereby enhancing the performance of existing processors on algorithmic reasoning tasks.

</details>


### [813] [Interpretable Policy Distillation for Power Grid Topology Control](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00561)
*Aleksandra Dmitruka,Karlis Freivalds*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究如何将深度强化学习(PPO)训练的电网拓扑控制策略，通过压力聚焦蒸馏方法压缩为决策树和随机森林等轻量级替代模型。实验表明，这些树模型在保留甚至超越原PPO性能的同时，大幅降低推理成本，且具备可解释性，但存在确定性动作风险和拓扑泛化问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 深度强化学习在实时电网运行中虽有前景，但大型神经策略评估成本高、难以部署在受限硬件上，且对操作员不透明。作者希望探索能否将PPO代理压缩为紧凑的树模型而不损失性能。

Method: 在Grid2Op标准14节点环境中训练PPO教师模型（稳定性导向奖励，压力聚焦数据收集），然后通过蒸馏方法将策略压缩为决策树和随机森林替代模型。

Result: 在留存验证集上，两种树模型在平均奖励和存续时长上均超越PPO教师，且推理成本极低。决策树与PPO argmax动作高度一致，特征重要性分析显示PPO依赖线路负载信号，而蒸馏树主要由母线拓扑变量驱动。

Conclusion: 压力聚焦蒸馏可将黑箱神经控制器转化为轻量、可审计的规则类替代模型，适合实时部署，同时揭示了确定性动作和拓扑泛化方面的潜在风险。

Abstract: Deep reinforcement learning (RL) offers a promising route to real-time power grid operation, yet large neural policies are costly to evaluate, hard to deploy on constrained hardware, and opaque to operators. We ask whether a Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) agent for grid topology control can be compressed into compact tree-based surrogates without losing operational performance. A PPO teacher is trained on Grid2Op's standard 14-bus environment with a stability-oriented reward, using stress-focused data collection on critical, high-loading states. The policy is then distilled into a decision tree and a random forest. Across held-out validation episodes, both surrogates exceed the teacher in mean reward and survival length at a fraction of the inference cost. The decision tree shows high exact-action agreement with the PPO argmax and near-complete agreement within its top-ranked actions, while remaining small enough to be inspected directly. Feature-importance analysis reveals a representational shift: the PPO policy relies mainly on line-loading signals, while the distilled tree is driven primarily by bus-topology variables. These results suggest that stress-focused distillation can convert a black-box neural controller into a lightweight, auditable rule-like surrogate suited for real-time deployment, while also surfacing risks tied to deterministic actions and topology-specific generalization.

</details>


### [814] [A Practical Upper Bound on Selection Bias Effects in Medical Prediction Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00563)
*Kara Liu,Maggie Wang,Russ B. Altman*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种在部分观测选择机制和目标分布的情况下，估计模型在目标人群上最差性能上界的方法，帮助评估选择偏差对模型泛化能力的影响。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现实数据中普遍存在选择偏差，导致模型在目标人群上泛化能力差，尤其在医疗等高风险场景中可能造成严重危害。现有方法需要不切实际地完全获取目标分布或选择机制信息，因此亟需一种在部分观测条件下评估模型泛化能力的方法。

Method: 提出了一种新颖的上界估计方法，在仅部分观测选择机制和目标人群数据的现实设定下，估计模型在目标人群上的最差性能上界。

Result: 通过全合成数据、基于All of Us研究计划的半合成数据以及MIMIC-IV中的真实选择偏差实验，验证了该方法的有效性和实用价值。

Conclusion: 该方法为在难以直接处理的设定下估计选择偏差的影响提供了原则性且实用的工具，有助于在医疗等领域构建更安全、泛化性更强的模型。

Abstract: Selection bias is a common and often unavoidable aspect of real-world data that challenges the generalizability of machine learning models. When models trained on biased data are deployed in the broader target population, poor model generalization may lead to real harm, particularly in high-risk settings such as healthcare. This risk highlights the need for practitioners to reliably assess model generalizability prior to deployment. However, existing methods for predicting model performance rely on unrealistic access to the target distribution or knowledge of the selection mechanism causing bias. To address these limitations, we propose a novel upper bound on the worst-case model performance on the target population under the realistic setting where the selection mechanism and the target population data are only partially observed. We demonstrate the validity and practical utility of our method through experiments on fully synthetic data, semi-synthetic data derived from the All of Us Research Program, and real-world selection bias in MIMIC-IV. Our work offers a principled and practical tool to estimate the impact of selection bias in an otherwise intractable setting, thereby enabling practitioners to build safer and more generalizable models in healthcare and beyond.

</details>


### [815] [Same Payload, Different Channel: Measuring Trust Asymmetry in Tool-Using Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00566)
*Mohammed Sameer Syed,Rozhin Yasaei*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出 Safety Asymmetry Score (SAS) 度量，发现语言模型在处理恶意内容时存在严重的通道依赖不对称性：恶意指令通过工具描述传递时对 agent 原生模型危害更大，而通过用户消息传递时对通用模型危害更大；机制研究表明安全相关表征在模型中层至深层以非线性方式编码。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究未系统考察语言模型在充当 agent 角色时，恶意攻击内容从不同渠道（用户消息、工具元数据、工具输出）传入是否会导致模型安全防御效果的差异，存在未被探索的安全盲区。

Method: 提出 Safety Asymmetry Score (SAS) 指标，构造配对载荷（保持恶意文本相同，仅改变传递渠道），在 6 个生产级 LLM 和三种攻击家族上评估；对 Llama 3.3 70B 进行机制层面的因果分析。

Result: 发现一致的不对称性：agent 原生模型在工具描述渠道下的脆弱性显著高于用户消息渠道，通用模型则相反；工具输出渠道与工具描述渠道呈现不对称性反转；机制分析表明安全相关表征在中深层以非线性方式编码，线性探针无法检测。

Conclusion: 当前使用工具的模型存在系统性、通道依赖的安全盲区，模型隐式地将工具元数据视为可信指令、将工具结果视为普通数据，导致安全防御在不同攻击入口处严重失衡。

Abstract: As language models take on agentic roles that span calling external APIs, reading tool outputs, and acting on instructions embedded in third-party content, their attack surface expands well beyond what users type. Whether a model treats a malicious instruction the same way regardless of where it arrives has not been systematically studied. We introduce the Safety Asymmetry Score (SAS), which measures how much a model's susceptibility to adversarial content shifts depending on whether that content arrives in the user message, tool metadata, or tool output, using matched payload pairs that keep the malicious text identical and vary only the context of delivery. Evaluated across 6 production LLMs and three attack families, we find a consistent and informative asymmetry: agent-native models are substantially more vulnerable when adversarial content arrives via tool descriptions than via user messages, while general-purpose models show the reverse. This asymmetry further inverts when the same content is delivered through tool outputs rather than descriptions, suggesting models implicitly treat tool metadata as trusted instructions and tool results as ordinary data. A mechanistic study on Llama 3.3 70B reveals that the safety-relevant representation is causally present at mid-to-late network depths but non-linearly encoded, explaining why linear probes fail to detect it. These findings expose a systematic, channel-dependent blind spot in how current tool-using models handle adversarial content.

</details>


### [816] [On the Recoverability of Causal Relations from Bulk Gene Expression Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00568)
*Gongxu Luo,Boyang Sun,Kun Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了从批量基因表达数据（聚合数据）中恢复因果关系的问题。作者形式化了两种一致性概念（函数形式一致性和条件独立性一致性），证明了因果关系的可恢复性仅在线性聚合（如均值/求和）与仿射结构方程同时满足时才成立。通过对四个批量数据和四个单细胞数据集的实证分析，发现基因间的调控函数偏离线性，因此对批量数据中因果关系的可恢复性持谨慎态度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 批量基因表达数据在单细胞时代仍被广泛使用，但聚合过程会丢失信息。作者试图回答一个关键问题：在什么条件下，从聚合的批量数据中恢复基因间的因果关系是可能的？

Method: 作者形式化了两种一致性概念（函数形式一致性和条件独立性一致性），推导出可恢复性的充要条件，并通过四个批量数据和四个单细胞数据集进行实证分析，评估基因调控函数的线性程度。

Result: 因果关系的可恢复性仅在线性聚合（如求和/均值）与仿射结构方程同时满足时才成立。实证分析表明，无论是批量数据还是单细胞数据，基因间调控函数均偏离线性，因此线性假设缺乏实证支持。

Conclusion: 在没有强额外假设的情况下，从聚合的批量基因表达数据中恢复因果关系需要谨慎对待。

Abstract: Bulk gene expression profiling, which aggregates pooled RNA across cells within a biological sample, remains important in the single-cell era because it is typically less noisy, more sensitive, and more cost-effective than single-cell assays. Accordingly, a growing body of computational methods seeks to recover causal relations among genes from bulk expression data. However, aggregation is a lossy, non-invertible coarsening of the underlying cellular system, and it remains unclear whether and under what conditions causal relations are recoverable from aggregated bulk gene expression data. To answer this, we formalize recoverability under aggregation through two notions of consistency: functional-form consistency and conditional-independence consistency. We then derive necessary and sufficient conditions for recoverability, showing that these properties are preserved only under linear aggregations (e.g., sum/mean) coupled with affine structural equations. To assess the practical plausibility of these conditions, analyses of four bulk and four single-cell gene expression datasets further reveal that the estimated pairwise regulatory functions among genes deviate from linearity in both data types, providing limited empirical support for the linearity assumptions required for recoverability. Together, these results caution against recovering causal relations from aggregated bulk expression data without strong additional assumptions.

</details>


### [817] [On the Difficulty of Learning a Meta-network for Training Data Selection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00571)
*Zilin Du,Junqi Zhao,Boyang Albert Li*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了元学习在训练数据选择（MTS）中的应用，发现梯度信噪比低和缺乏有效特征是主要障碍，提出增大批大小和提取信息特征的方法，实验显示平均提升5.49%和2.89%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 合成数据与真实数据存在分布不匹配，虽然可以通过元学习自动学习数据权重（MTS），但实践中效果不佳，需要探明其根本原因并提出改进方案。

Method: 对MTS进行数学分析，揭示数据权重动态与质量差异的关系；提出增大批大小以改善梯度信噪比；设计能够捕捉训练数据在分布中位置和训练动态的信息特征。

Result: 在四个基准测试上，相比无选择训练平均提升5.49%，相比最强基线平均提升2.89%。

Conclusion: MTS性能不佳源于梯度信噪比低和特征信息不足，增大批大小和引入信息特征能有效提升数据选择效果。

Abstract: Synthetic data are increasingly used to train neural networks, yet distributional mismatch with real data limits their effectiveness when used indiscriminately. A common strategy is to learn data weights via bi-level optimization, which we refer to as Meta-learning for Training-data Selection (MTS). Interestingly, in practice, MTS often performs below expectation. We identify two obstacles in properly training MTS: a poor gradient signal-to-noise ratio (GSNR), which causes optimization difficulties, and lack of informative features that correlates with data quality. We present a mathematical analysis of MTS, which reveals the dynamics of normalized data weights and the relation between disparate data quality and poor GSNR. The analysis suggests a a simple yet effective solution: increasing the batch size. Further, we propose a set of informative features that capture the positions of training data in their distributions and training dynamics. Experiments across four benchmarks show consistent improvements, achieving average gains of 5.49% over training without selection and 2.89% over the strongest baseline.

</details>


### [818] [Spatiotemporal Multi-Task Graph Transformer for Trip-Level Transit Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00572)
*Oluwaleke Yusuf,Adil Rasheed,Frank Lindseth*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出SMT-GraphFormer，一种将公交线路的乘客量预测建模为序列到序列学习问题的时空多任务图Transformer。通过在挪威特隆赫姆的真实公交数据上验证，模型在上下车人数预测上显著优于传统方法，验证了显式引入行程级顺序偏差和多任务依赖的价值。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有公交乘客量预测方法大多基于固定的时间、空间或站点级建模，难以捕捉行程内部的演化模式和网络上下文信息，且缺乏对上下车人数之间依赖关系的显式建模。

Method: 提出SMT-GraphFormer框架：1）将线路的站点序列和行程级上下文作为输入，将预测建模为序列到序列学习；2）使用图嵌入捕获多关系站点相似性；3）上下文编码器处理天气和时间信息；4）多门控专家混合模块生成任务特定的解码表示，分别预测上车和下车人数；5）将延误和停留时间作为编码器侧的辅助任务。

Result: 在挪威特隆赫姆公交数据上，SMT-GraphFormer在上下车人数预测上优于站点级基线模型，下车人数预测R²提升0.24，且在延误和停留时间预测上也有一致改进。

Conclusion: 显式引入行程级顺序偏差和任务间依赖可有效捕捉公交系统中复杂的时空动态，基于Transformer的序列建模架构比现成的表格模型更适合公交数据特性，为数字孪生环境中的场景分析提供了与预测时域无关的基础。

Abstract: Passenger count data from public transit systems reveals urban mobility patterns and is essential for planning, operation, and optimisation. However, non-linear spatiotemporal interdependencies across stops and lines make modelling and prediction challenging. Existing approaches often rely on fixed temporal, spatial, or stop-level formulations, limiting their ability to capture within-trip evolution and network context. This study proposes SMT-GraphFormer, a spatiotemporal multi-task graph transformer that frames trip-level transit prediction as sequence-to-sequence modelling. Given a line's stop sequence and trip-level context, the model predicts successive boarding and alighting counts, with delay and dwell time treated as encoder-side surrogate tasks. Key components include graph embeddings for multi-relational stop similarity, a context encoder for weather and temporal information, and a multi-gate mixture-of-experts module that produces task-specific decoder representations for boarding and alighting predictions. Evaluation on public bus transit data from Trondheim, Norway, shows that SMT-GraphFormer outperforms stop-level tabular benchmarks, with ablation studies examining each component's contribution. The sequential formulation yields substantial gains on alighting prediction ($+$0.24 in $R^2$) and consistent improvements on boarding, delay, and dwell, confirming the value of explicit trip-level sequential bias and inter-target dependencies. These findings demonstrate the potential of transformer-based sequence modelling for capturing complex spatiotemporal dynamics in public transit and underscore the value of architectures tailored to transit data rather than off-the-shelf tabular models. The proposed framework provides a horizon-agnostic basis for scenario analysis in digital twin environments, supporting informed decision-making by planners and transit operators.

</details>


### [819] [LASER: Loss-Aware Singular-value Decomposition and Rank Allocation for Efficient Low-Precision Vision-Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00573)
*Haiyu Wang,Yutong Wang,Leshu Li,Yihui Ren,Sai Qian Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: LASER提出了一种基于损失感知的SVD低秩压缩框架，结合Kronecker-Fisher信息、跨层秩分配和FFN混合压缩方案，在低精度推理下实现2.3倍以上解码加速并保持高精度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有低秩分解方法存在三个问题：1）优化局部矩阵重构误差而非模型性能；2）使用均匀或启发式秩分配；3）主要关注注意力投影而忽视前馈网络。因此需要一种全局损失感知的低秩压缩方法。

Method: 1）基于模型损失二阶近似的曲率加权SVD目标函数；2）利用Kronecker分解Fisher信息矩阵指导分解方向；3）基于校准梯度的损失感知跨层秩分配策略；4）针对FFN层提出SVD与量化结合的混合压缩方案。

Result: 在低精度推理场景下，LASER相比此前工作实现2.3倍以上的解码加速，同时保持强大的模型精度。

Conclusion: 通过将压缩目标与模型损失直接关联，并引入跨层自适应秩分配及FFN混合压缩，LASER有效提升了VLM的低精度推理效率，为资源受限设备上的部署提供了可行方案。

Abstract: Vision-language models (VLMs) deliver strong multimodal reasoning capabilities, but their large computational cost and high parameter counts make deployment challenging on resource-constrained devices. Low-rank decomposition has emerged as a promising compression technique, yet existing methods often optimize local matrix reconstruction error, rely on uniform or heuristic rank allocation, and focus mainly on attention projections while leaving feed-forward networks underexplored. In this paper, we propose~\textit{LASER} (\textbf{L}oss-\textbf{A}ware \textbf{S}ingular-value d\textbf{E}composition and \textbf{R}ank allocation), a low-rank compression framework for efficient low-precision VLM inference. LASER derives a curvature-weighted SVD objective from a second-order approximation of the model loss and uses Kronecker-factored Fisher information to guide decomposition toward downstream performance rather than reconstruction alone. We further introduce a loss-aware cross-layer rank allocation strategy based on calibration gradients, enabling more effective parameter budgeting across layers. Finally, we extend low-rank compression to FFN layers through a hybrid scheme that combines SVD with quantization. The evaluation results show that LASER achieves more than $2.3\times$ decoding speedup over previous work while preserving strong accuracy under low-precision inference.

</details>


### [820] [Looped Transformers with Layer Normalization Provably Learn the Power Method](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00605)
*Lyumin Wu,Chenyang Zhang,Yuan Cao*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文通过主成分预测任务，理论证明了带层归一化的循环线性Transformer在梯度下降下会收敛到实现幂迭代法的解，揭示了层归一化对算法隐式偏置的关键作用。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Transformer虽在各类任务中取得巨大成功，但其学习算法过程的机制尚不清晰，尤其缺乏层归一化对训练动力学影响的理论理解。

Method: 以主成分预测为测试平台，理论分析了带层归一化的循环线性Transformer在梯度下降下的训练动力学，证明其收敛到实现幂迭代法的解。

Result: 循环Transformer+LN收敛到实现幂迭代法的解；无LN的Transformer即使有逐层指导也无法精确学习幂迭代法，导致性能差距。

Conclusion: 首次从理论上分析了带层归一化的循环及单层Transformer的训练动力学，揭示了LN在Transformer中实现"算法隐式偏置"的关键角色。

Abstract: Transformers have achieved remarkable success across a wide range of applications, and a growing body of work suggests that part of their strength comes from their ability to learn and execute algorithmic procedures. However, our understanding of how transformers learn such algorithms remains limited, especially in the presence of layer normalization (LN). In this work, we study principal component prediction as a concrete testbed for understanding the training dynamics of transformers with LN. We prove that a looped linear transformer with LN, trained by gradient descent, converges to a solution that implements the power method, with each self-attention layer performing one power iteration. Notably, the model is trained only for principal component prediction, rather than being explicitly supervised to implement the power method. Our finding thus reveals an "algorithmic implicit bias" of looped transformers with LN: principal-component prediction can in principle be achieved by many mechanisms, yet gradient descent selects one that realizes the power method. We further provide a concrete comparison between transformers with and without LN: even with layerwise guidance from power iterations, a transformer without LN cannot exactly learn the power method, whereas the corresponding transformer with LN can, leading to a provable performance gap in principal component prediction. Our results provide, to our knowledge, the first theoretical analysis of the training dynamics of looped and single-layer transformers with LN, and shed light on the role of LN in transformer models.

</details>


### [821] [CARE-RL: Capability-Aware Reinforcement Learning for Mitigating Cross-Domain Conflicts](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00609)
*Rui Zhang,Xinle Wu,Yao Lu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出CARE-RL框架，通过协议感知的奖励生成（PA-GRM）和能力感知的优化（DACSP），解决了多领域强化学习中非可验证任务奖励不可靠和跨领域能力冲突的问题，在数学、对话和指令跟随基准上优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有RL方法在可验证奖励的任务上取得了进展，但扩展到多领域RL时存在两个关键挑战：非可验证任务的奖励不可靠，以及不同领域之间的能力干扰（capability interference）。

Method: 1) PA-GRM：为不可验证任务构建提示级别的评估协议和模式，生成基于轨迹的奖励，实现自适应且可比较的评估；2) DACSP：从先前RL阶段提取历史能力方向，通过放缩一致成分、抑制冲突成分、保留正交更新来调节后续更新。

Result: 在Qwen2.5-7B和Qwen3-4B上分别取得Total Avg 47.9和50.7，持续优于标准多领域RL基线。

Conclusion: CARE-RL通过协议感知奖励生成和能力感知优化，有效缓解了多领域RL中的跨领域冲突，为多领域强化学习训练提供了可行的解决方案。

Abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) with verifiable rewards has achieved strong progress in reasoning-oriented LLMs, but extending it to multi-domain RL remains challenging due to reward unreliability in non-verifiable tasks and capability interference across domains. We propose CARE-RL to combine protocol-aware reward generation with capability-aware optimization for mitigating cross-domain conflicts. For non-verifiable tasks, the Protocol-Aware Generative Reward Model (PA-GRM) constructs prompt-level evaluation protocols and schemas before producing trace-conditioned rewards, enabling task-adaptive yet comparable evaluation of open-ended responses. For multi-domain optimization, Direction-Aware Capability Subspace Projection (DACSP) extracts historical capability directions from previous RL stages and modulates later updates by amplifying aligned components, suppressing conflicting components, and preserving orthogonal updates. Experiments across math, chat, and instruction-following benchmarks show that CARE-RL consistently outperforms standard multi-domain RL baselines, achieving Total Avg scores of 47.9 and 50.7 on Qwen2.5-7B and Qwen3-4B, respectively.

</details>


### [822] [How Neural Losses Shape VAE Latents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00635)
*Giorgio Strano,Luca Cerovaz,Michele Mancusi,Tommaso Mencattini,Emanuele Rodolà*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文揭示了VAE中重构损失的选择（点式 vs. 神经感知/对抗损失）会重塑率-失真问题，改变潜在表征的信息内容和几何结构，且这些变化难以从重构结果中直接观察。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现代VAE常使用感知损失和对抗损失替代点式重构损失，但其对潜在空间动态的影响尚不明确。作者希望理解重构损失选择如何改变率-失真权衡以及潜在表征的特性。

Method: 理论证明与实验验证相结合。证明神经重构损失减少了潜在表征的信息量；实验展示这类损失使潜在空间更各向同性、不确定性分布更均匀，产生不同的后验方差轮廓。

Result: 1）神经重构损失（感知/对抗）减少了存储在潜在表征中的信息量；2）系统的改变潜在空间的几何结构——表征更各向同性，不确定性在潜在维度上分布更均匀。

Conclusion: 率-失真权衡不足以全面理解VAE行为，需要更机械性的方法来探究失真度量选择如何重塑优化问题。

Abstract: Modern VAEs are rarely trained with the pointwise likelihood implied by the standard $β$-VAE objective. In practice, pointwise reconstruction is often combined with perceptual and adversarial losses, despite a lack of understanding of how this changes the latent dynamics of the model. We show that the choice of reconstruction loss reshapes the rate-distortion problem itself, altering both the information content and the geometry of the learned latent space in ways that may be invisible from reconstructions alone. First, we prove and verify empirically that augmenting pointwise reconstruction with neural terms, such as perceptual and adversarial objectives, reduces the amount of information stored in the latent representations. Second, we show that neural reconstruction losses systematically change the geometry of the latent space: they make representations more isotropic and distribute uncertainty more evenly across latent dimensions, producing different posterior variance profiles. These findings highlight how the rate-distortion tradeoff is not a comprehensive lens to understand the behavior of VAEs, and we propose a more mechanistic approach to investigate how the choice of a distortion metric reshapes the optimization problem.

</details>


### [823] [MESA: Improving MoE Safety Alignment via Decentralized Expertise](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00651)
*Yitong Sun,Yao Huang,Teng Li,Ranjie Duan,Yichi Zhang,Xingjun Ma,Hui Xue,Xingxing Wei*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出MESA框架，针对MoE架构大语言模型的安全稀疏性问题，通过最优传输理论实现专家能力的去中心化安全对齐，在不损害模型实用性的前提下增强鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: MoE架构存在安全稀疏性（Safety Sparsity）——安全能力集中在少量专家中，易受对抗性绕过攻击；同时传统对齐方法均匀调整所有参数，忽略功能差异，导致性能下降。

Method: 基于最优传输（Optimal Transport）理论，MESA包含两个机制：(1) Expert Capacity Reallocation：利用传输成本矩阵将安全职责分配给最经济的专家；(2) Dynamic Routing Refinement：约束路由器精确激活这些去中心化的安全模块。

Result: 在多种有害基准测试中展现出鲁棒的防御性能，同时保持了模型的 helpfulness（有用性）。

Conclusion: MESA通过去中心化安全对齐策略，有效解决了MoE模型的安全稀疏性问题，实现了安全性与实用性的良好平衡。

Abstract: Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) architectures scale Large Language Models (LLMs) efficiently, enabling greater capacity with reduced computational cost by dynamically routing inputs to relevant experts, yet introduce a critical vulnerability: Safety Sparsity, where safety capabilities concentrate in few experts, making them susceptible to adversarial bypassing. Meanwhile, conventional alignment methods uniformly adapt all parameters, ignoring their functional differences and inadvertently degrading performances. To address these challenges, we propose MESA (MoE Safety Alignment), a targeted alignment framework for MoE-based LLMs that strategically decentralizes safety responsibility to maximize coverage while minimizing interference with utility. Based on Optimal Transport (OT) theory, MESA operates through two mechanisms: (1) Expert Capacity Reallocation uses a transport cost matrix to distribute safety duties to the most cost-effective experts, and (2) Dynamic Routing Refinement constrains the router to precisely activate these decentralized modules. Experiments show that MESA achieves robust defensive performance against varied harmful benchmarks while preserving helpfulness. Code is available at https://github.com/lorraine021/MESA.

</details>


### [824] [Demystifying the Optimal Fair Classifier in Multi-Class Classification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00656)
*Li Zhang,Yuyuan Li,XiaoHua Feng,Jiaming Zhang,Fengyuan Yu,Chaochao Chen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了多分类任务中公平性约束下的最优准确率-公平性前沿问题，提出了两种（训练中干预和后处理微调）可收敛到帕累托最优的算法，实验证明了其优越性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有公平性缓解技术多针对二分类场景，扩展到多分类任务时既不直接也低效。多分类中的最优准确率-公平性前沿刻画及实用算法设计是尚未解决的基本挑战。

Method: 首先建立公平约束下最优分类器的概率解析形式；基于此提出两种属性不可知算法——训练中干预（基于约简方法）和后处理微调（基于插件估计），理论证明二者均收敛到准确率-公平性的帕累托最优前沿。

Result: 在多个数据集上的实验表明，所提方法在平衡准确率和公平性方面优于现有方法。

Conclusion: 本文为多分类公平性任务提供了理论基础（最优前沿刻画）和实用算法（两种可实现帕累托最优的方法），填补了从二分类到多分类公平性扩展的空白。

Abstract: Ensuring fair and equitable treatment across diverse groups, particularly in multi-class classification tasks, poses a significant challenge due to the persistent biases inherent in machine learning models. Most existing bias mitigation techniques are tailored to binary settings, and the presence of multi-dimensional outputs and complex fairness mechanisms makes their extension to multi-class scenarios neither straightforward nor effective. In this paper, we investigate two fundamental, unresolved challenges in fair classification: (i) characterizing the optimal accuracy-fairness frontier in multi-class settings, and (ii) designing practical algorithms that attain this optimum in different training phases. To tackle these challenges, we first specify an analytically tractable probabilistic formulation of the optimal classifier under fairness constraints. Building upon this, we propose two attribute-blind algorithms to enforce fairness requirements in practice: an in-processing approach for fairness intervention during training via the reduction approach, and a post-processing approach for fine-tuning output probabilities with plug-in estimation. Theoretical analysis reveals that both methods converge to the optimal accuracy-fairness Pareto frontier. Experiments conducted on multiple datasets demonstrate the superior performance of our methods in balancing accuracy and fairness.

</details>


### [825] [The Paradox of Outcome Optimization: A Causal Information-Theoretic Bound on Reasoning Shortcuts in LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00674)
*Zihan Chen,Yiming Zhang,Wenxiang Geng,Zenghui Ding,Yining Sun*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了"奖励诱导流形坍缩"现象：基于结果强化学习的LLM在分布内基准上表现优异，但在分布外任务中推理能力脆弱。通过结构因果模型与信息瓶颈理论建立框架，证明结果奖励驱动模型偏向捷径解，而过程奖励模型作为拓扑滤波器可强制步骤级互信息约束，从而避免捷径流形。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解释LLM在结果奖励强化学习后，为何分布内表现优异但分布外推理脆弱的矛盾现象，并为过程监督的有效性提供数学基础。

Method: 结合结构因果模型与信息瓶颈原则建立理论框架；定义推理为高复杂度因果过程，捷径学习为低复杂度虚假相关；基于SGD隐含归纳偏好推导模型偏向捷径的条件（马尔可夫筛选）；提出语义覆盖度量η代替样本量的新泛化界；证明过程奖励模型作为拓扑滤波器，通过步骤级互信息约束排除低复杂度捷径流形。

Result: 推导了基于语义覆盖度量η的泛化界；证明了同质分布上单纯扩大数据量无法修正推理缺陷；数学上论证了过程监督的作用不仅是信用分配，更是拓扑过滤。

Conclusion: 过程奖励模型通过强制步骤级互信息约束，从拓扑上阻断低复杂度捷径流形，从而解决奖励诱导流形坍缩问题；同质数据扩展无法替代过程监督。

Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) aligned via outcome-based Reinforcement Learning (RL) frequently exhibit a critical failure mode: they achieve high performance on in-distribution benchmarks while demonstrating brittle reasoning capabilities on out-of-distribution (OOD) tasks. We term this phenomenon Reward-Induced Manifold Collapse. We establish a theoretical framework bridging Structural Causal Models (SCM) and the Information Bottleneck (IB) principle to explain this paradox. We define reasoning as a high-complexity causal process and shortcut learning as the exploitation of low-complexity spurious correlations. Under the implicit inductive bias of Stochastic Gradient Descent (SGD), models optimized for outcome rewards are biased toward shortcut solutions whenever the training distribution allows for a ``Markovian Screening'' of the true causal mechanism. We derive a new generalization bound based on Semantic Coverage Measure ($η$) rather than sample size, showing why data scaling on homogeneous distributions may fail to correct reasoning flaws. We also show that Process Reward Models (PRMs) function as Topological Filters, enforcing step-wise mutual information constraints that render the low-complexity shortcut manifold inadmissible. These results provide a mathematical grounding for the role of process supervision beyond simple credit assignment.

</details>


### [826] [Mapping the evolution of small reservoirs in Brazil from 1984 to 2025 using deep learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00675)
*Kylen Solvik,Luis Gustavo Carvalho,Marcia N. Macedo*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文利用深度学习模型分析1984-2025年Landsat卫星影像，首次绘制了巴西全国小型水库（<1 km²）的年度地图。研究发现，40年间巴西小型水库数量从26.4万增至99.6万，总面积从3510 km²扩至8550 km²，揭示了农业活动中小型水坝建设的巨大规模和被忽视的环境影响。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 巴西水资源研究长期忽视农业用水（牲畜饮水、小型水电、灌溉、水产养殖）导致的小型溪流水坝及其水库。小型水库难以被遥感检测和区分（人工vs自然），现有区域和全球数据集普遍遗漏它们。

Method: 训练深度学习计算机视觉模型（语义分割），利用Landsat 5-9卫星数据，对巴西境内<1 km²、溪流补给的地表水水库进行精准分割，生成1984-2025年年度水库地图。

Result: 检测到的水库数量从263,913个增长至996,245个（近4倍），总面积从3,510 km²增至8,550 km²。这是首个覆盖全国、跨40年的小型水库年度数据集。

Conclusion: 公开的年度地图揭示了巴西小型溪流水坝的广泛分布和累积影响，为淡水生态系统和水资源管理提供了可操作的科学依据。

Abstract: Water research in Brazil largely overlooks the widespread damming of small streams for agricultural uses such as watering cattle, farm-scale hydropower, irrigation, and aquaculture. These ubiquitous dams and their reservoirs can alter water temperature, stream connectivity, aquatic habitats, greenhouse gas emissions, and evaporative water losses. Mapping small reservoirs is challenging because it requires reliably detecting small water bodies and distinguishing artificial reservoirs from natural lakes. As a result, most regional and global datasets exclude them. To address this gap, we trained a deep learning computer vision model to accurately segment small ($< 1 km^2$), stream-fed, surface water reservoirs in Brazil leveraging data from Landsat 5-9. Applying our model from 1984 to 2025, we created annual reservoir maps for the entire country to evaluate how their count, size, and distribution have changed over time. The number of detected reservoirs grew nearly fourfold from 263,913 to 996,245, while their total surface area increased from 3510 $km^2$ to 8550 $km^2$. To our knowledge, this is the first country-wide annual dataset representing the evolution of small reservoirs over four decades. The publicly available annual maps highlight the extent and cumulative impacts of the small stream impoundments across Brazil, providing actionable insights for managing freshwater ecosystems and water resources.

</details>


### [827] [Limits of Resolution Equivariance in Fourier Neural Operators](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00677)
*Alex Colagrande,Paul Caillon,Eva Feillet,Alexandre Allauzen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文质疑FNO在跨分辨率泛化上的假设，发现直接在高分辨率上推理并不总是优于低分辨率推理+上采样，并揭示了频域能量集中现象及非线性混叠是阻碍零样本分辨率等变的关键因素。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 检验FNO能否真正实现跨空间分辨率泛化（粗网格训练、细网格部署）这一常见假设。

Method: 对比两种推理策略：直接在高分辨率S上运行FNO vs 在低分辨率s上运行再通过傅里叶零填充上采样到S；分析逐层频谱能量分布。

Result: 直接细网格推理并不总是更好，甚至不如低网格+上采样的基线；在傅里叶截断下，中间表示能量集中在低频，高频输出主要由后期的非线性/解码器阶段产生。

Conclusion: 提出跨分辨率评估的简单强基线，指出非线性混叠是阻碍零样本分辨率等变的主要障碍。

Abstract: Fourier Neural Operators are often assumed to generalize across spatial resolutions, enabling training on a coarse grid and deployment on a finer grid. We test this assumption by contrasting two inference-time choices when moving from training resolution $s$ to test resolution $S>s$: running FNO directly at $S$, or running at $s$ and upsampling the prediction to $S$ via Fourier zero-padding. On Darcy flow, we observe that direct fine-grid inference is not reliably beneficial and can be worse than the low-grid-plus-upsampling baseline. We further analyze layerwise spectra and find that, under Fourier truncation, intermediate representations increasingly concentrate energy in low frequencies, with high-frequency output produced mainly by late nonlinear/decoder stages. This offers a mechanistic explanation for why FNO can perform well while retaining few modes, yet remain sensitive under resolution shifts. Our findings highlight a simple but strong baseline for cross-resolution evaluation and point to nonlinear aliasing as a key obstacle to zero-shot resolution equivariance.

</details>


### [828] [Prior-Guided Multi-Omic Transformers for Single-Cell Gene Regulatory Network Inference](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00685)
*Tianyang Xu,Tianci Liu,Niraj Rayamajhi,Ryan Patrick,Kranthi Varala,Ying Li,Jing Gao*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: EpiAwareNet是一个基于Transformer的多组学框架，通过轻量级生物先验指导，从配对单细胞转录组和染色质可及性数据重建基因调控网络（GRN）。它采用两阶段结构：第一阶段用基因-峰值交叉注意力模块学习联合表示，实现数据驱动的可及性信号聚合；第二阶段引入bulk来源的GRN先验作为弱监督信号，提升预测可靠性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 从配对单细胞转录组和染色质可及性数据重建GRN具有重要价值，但面临两大挑战：scATAC数据极度稀疏，且现有方法依赖固定的峰值-基因连接和弱监督信号，导致重建效果有限。

Method: 提出EpiAwareNet，一种先验引导的多组学Transformer框架。Stage 1：利用基因-峰值交叉注意力模块学习联合表示，实现数据驱动的可及性信号聚合；Stage 2：引入bulk来源的GRN先验作为带噪正边，在标签稀缺条件下提供弱监督，增强对先验噪声的鲁棒性。

Result: 在实验中，EpiAwareNet在GRN重建任务上优于单组学和多组学基线方法，生成的GRN具有更高的生物学合理性，例如更好地恢复已知调控相互作用。

Conclusion: 轻量级的bulk数据生物先验结合自适应跨模态表示学习，能有效指导单细胞GRN推断，为解决单细胞多组学数据稀疏性和标签稀缺问题提供了新思路。

Abstract: Gene regulatory networks (GRNs) capture transcription factor-target interactions and are central to understanding cell-state regulation and disease. Reconstructing GRNs from paired single-cell transcriptomic and chromatin accessibility data is promising but challenging: scATAC is extremely sparse, and most methods rely on fixed peak-to-gene links and weak supervision. We present EpiAwareNet, a prior-guided multi-omic Transformer framework that reconstructs GRNs from paired single-cell data using only lightweight biological priors. In Stage 1, EpiAwareNet learns joint gene-peak representations with a gene-peak cross-attention module, enabling data-driven, gene-specific aggregation of accessibility signals rather than hard-coded peak-to-gene assignments. In Stage 2, EpiAwareNet incorporates a bulk-derived GRN prior as noisy positive edges to provide weak supervision under label scarcity, refining regulatory scores while remaining robust to prior noise. In our experiments, EpiAwareNet improves GRN reconstruction over representative single- and multi-omic baselines and yields GRNs with greater biological plausibility, such as improved recovery of known regulatory interactions, suggesting that lightweight biological priors from bulk data can effectively guide single-cell GRN inference when combined with adaptive cross-modal representation learning. Code and data will be available at https://github.com/tianyang-x/EpiAwareNet_pub.

</details>


### [829] [Dialectics of Alignment: Harnessing Unsafe Knowledge for Dynamic Safety Routing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00686)
*Maryam Hashemzadeh,Jerry Huang,Minseon Kim,Marc-Alexandre Côté,Sarath Chandar*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出SafeMoE框架，通过混合专家（MoE）架构将有风险的知识隔离到领域特定的LoRA专家中，再通过轻量级门控网络动态编排这些专家，在保持信息丰富性的同时提升安全性，相比传统对齐方法安全响应率提升超20%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM对齐范式通过过滤不安全数据或训练模型直接拒答来实现安全，但这导致模型过度谨慎，对敏感但良性的查询也给出无信息的笼统拒绝，限制了模型的知识范围和生成能力。

Method: 提出SafeMoE框架：1）将不安全知识隔离到领域特定的LoRA专家中（仅在不安全语料上训练）；2）训练轻量级门控网络（使用少量高质量安全-信息型响应）；3）推理时门控网络动态编排不安全专家，既利用其深层领域知识又强制遵守安全约束。

Result: 在严格安全基准测试上，SafeMoE安全响应率相对提升超20%（绝对提升超15%），且生成更信息丰富的响应；路由机制在未见领域和安全任务上展现出强大的零样本泛化能力。

Conclusion: 真正的安全不是屏蔽不安全知识，而是对其进行受控整合，这为对齐范式提供了一种根本性转变。

Abstract: The prevailing paradigm in large language model (LLM) alignment operates via erasure, filtering unsafe data or training models to strictly refuse harmful prompts. While effective at reducing immediate toxicity, this approach fundamentally constricts the model's epistemological scope, resulting in over-cautious systems that output uninformative blanket refusals to sensitive yet benign queries. In this work, we challenge the orthodoxy that unsafe data must be discarded. We propose a dialectical approach to alignment, positing that unsafe data encodes rich, domain specific knowledge critical for nuanced, safe, and informative generation. To operationalize this, we introduce SafeMoE, a Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) framework that isolates unsafe knowledge into domain-specific Low-Rank Adapters (LoRA experts) trained exclusively on harmful corpora. To synthesize safety from these unsafe primitives, we train a lightweight gating network using a minimal, highly curated set of safe-informative responses. During inference, this router dynamically orchestrates the unsafe experts, effectively steering the generation trajectory to harness their deep domain knowledge while strictly enforcing safety constraints. Extensive empirical evaluations across stringent safety benchmarks demonstrate that SafeMoE is not only safer, achieving over a 20% relative improvement in safe response rate (more than a 15% absolute gain), but also produces more informative responses when safety and harmfulness are of paramount concern. Furthermore, the routing mechanism exhibits strong zero-shot generalization to unseen domains and broader safety tasks without domain-specific supervision. Our findings suggest a paradigm shift in alignment: true safety requires not the masking of unsafe knowledge, but its controlled integration.

</details>


### [830] [DistMatch: Adaptive Binning via Distribution Matching for Robust Sequential Conformal Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00690)
*Enver Menadjiev,Jihyeon Seong,Jisu Yeo,Jaesik Choi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: DistMatch是一种基于分箱的顺序共形预测方法，通过KS统计量递归划分残差为近似可交换的叶子节点，避免重加权，实现局部自适应推断，在时序分布偏移下优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 顺序共形预测依赖残差可交换性假设，但实际时间序列中时序依赖和分布偏移常违反该假设；现有重加权方法难以确定最优权重。

Method: 提出DistMatch：基于KS统计量的二叉递归分箱方法，将残差划分为近似可交换的叶子节点；在每个叶子节点内应用带在线更新的分位数回归，实现局部自适应推断。

Result: 大量实验表明DistMatch优于现有顺序共形预测方法。

Conclusion: 通过分箱诱导可交换性代替重加权，结合局部自适应推断，有效提升了顺序共形预测在非平稳时间序列中的鲁棒性和性能。

Abstract: Sequential conformal prediction (CP) provides valid uncertainty quantification under the assumption of residual exchangeability. However, this assumption is often violated in real-world time series due to temporal dependencies and distributional shifts. While recent methods attempt to approximate exchangeability through reweighting, identifying optimal weights remains an open challenge. To address this limitation, we propose DistMatch, a binning-based method that recursively partitions residuals within a binary tree using the Kolmogorov-Smirnov (KS) statistic. We theoretically show that this partitioning induces approximately exchangeable leaves, thereby avoiding the need for reweighting. By applying quantile regression with online updates within each leaf, DistMatch enables locally adaptive inference and improves robustness to distributional shifts. Extensive experiments demonstrate that DistMatch outperforms existing sequential CP methods.

</details>


### [831] [COPF: An Online Framework for Deployment-Stable Counterfactual Fairness in Evolving Graphs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00700)
*Sheng'en Li,Dongmian Zou*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了COPF框架，用于在线链接推荐中对部署稳定的公平性进行监测和控制。COPF通过定义曝光反事实下的群体机会差距、利用显式探索和倾向性评分进行估计，并基于图感知双重稳健估计器进行审计和公平性控制。实验表明，COPF能在对排序效用影响较小的前提下，有效减少曝光反事实群体差异的最坏情况峰值。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在线链接推荐的公平性估计会因推荐策略更新而漂移，导致从历史数据中得出的公平性评估不可靠。现有方法未能有效应对推荐策略变化带来的"表演性"（performative）问题。

Method: COPF框架包含：(i) 定义曝光反事实下的群体机会差距；(ii) 通过显式探索和记录每条候选链接被展示的概率（倾向性）来估计差距；(iii) 使用图感知双重稳健（GA-DR）估计器和残差结果不可区分性（Residual-OI）进行审计和公平性控制。提供了带噪声的传递定理，并实例化了在线多校准审计器与原始-对偶控制器。

Result: 在两个TGB数据流和一个受控合成二分图数据流上的实验表明，COPF能在对排序效用影响较小的前提下，有效降低曝光反事实群体差异的最坏情况峰值。

Conclusion: COPF为在线链接推荐提供了部署稳定的公平性监控与控制的决策层框架，能够应对推荐策略更新带来的公平性漂移问题。

Abstract: Online link recommendation on evolving graphs is performative: by choosing which candidate links to show users, the system changes which links form and what feedback it later observes. Consequently, fairness estimates from logged outcomes can be misleading and may drift after deployment when the recommendation policy is updated. We introduce COPF (Counterfactual Online Performative Fairness), a decision-layer framework for deployment-stable fairness monitoring and control in online link recommendation. COPF (i) defines group-level opportunity gaps over exposure (shown vs. not shown) counterfactuals, (ii) makes them estimable by explicit exploration and by logging the probability (propensity) that each candidate is shown, and (iii) audits and controls fairness using residual outcome indistinguishability (OI) over a configurable auditor family with graph-aware doubly robust (GA-DR) estimators. We provide a noisy transfer theorem showing that Residual-OI on estimated GA-DR residuals implies bounds on exposure-counterfactual group gaps under temporal mixing and bounded local interference, and we instantiate an online multicalibration auditor together with a primal-dual controller. Experiments on two TGB streams and a controlled synthetic bipartite stream show that COPF reduces worst-case spikes in exposure-counterfactual group disparities with modest impact on ranking utility. Our code is available at https://github.com/lsnnnnnnnn/COPF.

</details>


### [832] [Graph Transfer Learning via Shared Latent Geometry: Theory and Applications](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00716)
*Tong Wu,Andrew Campbell,Anna Scaglione*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出一种非对称双路径架构，通过算子-多项式潜在几何实现物理系统的零样本迁移。教师编码器从高保真模拟器中学习算子-多项式特征，学生编码器从稀疏数据中学习相同几何。部署时丢弃教师，冻结的学生编码器可单次前向推理并附带迁移证书。在电力系统估计任务上，实现了对100种未见拓扑的零样本迁移，95%证书通过率，精度媲美牛顿-拉夫逊法，推理时间低于亚毫秒。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有物理信息学习方法在部署时存在高昂物理代价（需反复求解数值优化），而单编码器路径的潜在几何在微调时会退化，且无法提供定量的迁移保证。

Method: 提出非对称双路径架构：教师编码器使用算子-多项式特征表示系统（对谱扰动稳定），学生编码器从稀疏现场数据学习相同潜在几何。通过Wasserstein距离建立迁移条件，给出零样本误差界，并设计有限样本认证协议。

Result: 在电力系统估计任务中，零样本迁移至100种未见拓扑，95%证书通过率，精度与拓扑感知的牛顿-拉夫逊法相当，推理时间低于亚毫秒。

Conclusion: 非对称路径+算子锚定的潜在几何为认证零样本推理与控制奠定了基础。

Abstract: Inference and control in engineered physical systems pay a heavy physics cost at deployment: state estimators, inverse-problem solvers, model-predictive controllers, schedulers, and observers are often not closed-form and must re-solve a numerical optimization per instance, with the operator re-supplied each time. Physics-informed learning moves this cost to training, but uses a single encoder pathway whose latent geometry de-learns under fine-tuning and admits no quantitative transfer guarantee. We propose an asymmetric two-pathway architecture that resolves both issues. A teacher encoder consumes privileged dense states from a high-fidelity simulator and represents the system through operator-polynomial features stable under spectral perturbation; a student encoder learns the same latent geometry from sparse field data and operator descriptors. At deployment the teacher is discarded, and the frozen student runs in a single forward pass with a transfer certificate. The design connects to privileged-information learning, knowledge distillation, and cross-modal distillation, but targets cross-instance transfer rather than fixed-instance prediction: topology and operator may change, while the latent task does not. We establish sufficient and near-necessary transfer conditions via Wasserstein proximity between latent laws, yielding a zero-shot error bound, and develop a finite-sample certification protocol with active expansion when coverage is incomplete. The framework applies wherever a system admits an operator with reportable spectrum. On power-system estimation, it achieves zero-shot transfer to 100 unseen topologies, a 95% certificate pass rate, accuracy competitive with topology-aware Newton--Raphson, and sub-millisecond inference. These results suggest asymmetric pathways plus operator-anchored latent geometry provide a foundation for certified zero-shot inference and control.

</details>


### [833] [Multi-Agent Conformal Prediction with Personalized Statistical Validity](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00717)
*Martin V. Vejling,Christophe A. N. Biscio,Adrien Mazoyer,Petar Popovski,Shashi Raj Pandey*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出个性化联邦加权共形预测（PFWCP），结合局部密度比加权与加权分位数聚合，在保护隐私的同时解决异质性，为每个智能体提供渐近有效的覆盖保证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有联邦共形预测方法在有限局部校准数据、隐私约束和数据异质性下无法同时提供个体级别的有效覆盖保证，已有方法要么只保证平均性能，要么在异质性设置下失效。

Method: PFWCP框架：局部密度比加权（校正异质性）+ 加权分位数聚合（隐私保护），支持单次通信协议，并引入有效样本量表达式调整覆盖方差。

Result: 每个智能体获得渐近有效的边际覆盖和校准条件覆盖保证；实验表明校准质量优于现有联邦共形基线方法。

Conclusion: PFWCP在隐私保护下同时解决异质性与有限数据挑战，为多智能体环境下的不确定性量化提供了理论有保证且实用的解决方案。

Abstract: Uncertainty quantification is essential in high-stakes machine learning tasks. However, one of the principled solutions, conformal prediction, faces challenges under limited local calibration data, privacy constraints, and data heterogeneity. In multi-agent settings, existing works do not simultaneously and satisfactorily address these challenges with guarantees either limited to averages across agents or losing validity in heterogeneous settings. Hence, we propose personalized federated weighted conformal prediction (PFWCP), a framework that combines local density ratio weighting with weighted quantile aggregation to correct for heterogeneity while preserving privacy. The method yields asymptotically valid marginal and calibration-conditional coverage guarantees for each participating agent and supports protocols with one-shot communication. Theoretical analysis presents an adjustment to the coverage variance, governed by an effective sample size expression, which is necessary in the context of weighted conformal prediction, and experiments on synthetic and real datasets show improved calibration quality over state-of-the-art federated conformal baselines.

</details>


### [834] [SORA: Free Second-Order Attacks in Fast Adversarial Training](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00738)
*Mazdak Teymourian,Ramtin Moslemi,Farzan Rahmani,Mohammad Hossein Rohban*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出SORA方法，通过形式化Epsilon过拟合（EO）现象和提出PertAlign指标，实现了自适应步长的对抗训练，有效防止灾难性过拟合（CO），在多种数据集和架构上达到了最先进的鲁棒性和干净准确率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 单步对抗训练变体虽高效但常遭遇灾难性过拟合（CO），即对多步攻击的鲁棒性突然崩溃，现有方法未能充分解释和解决这一失效模式。

Method: 1) 形式化Epsilon过拟合（EO）视角，引入扰动可变性改善鲁棒泛化；2) 提出PertAlign指标，通过测量攻击阶段间的梯度对齐度预测CO；3) 提出SORA，基于损失曲面几何动态调整扰动步长。

Result: SORA一致地防止CO，达到最先进的鲁棒性和干净准确率，且使用单一固定超参数集即可在多个数据集和架构上泛化，效率优越。

Conclusion: 扰动可变性和梯度对齐监测是理解和缓解对抗训练中灾难性过拟合的关键，SORA为快速对抗训练提供了高效且通用的解决方案。

Abstract: Adversarial Training (AT) is a leading defense against adversarial examples but often suffers from Catastrophic Overfitting (CO) in efficient single-step variants, where robustness to multi-step attacks collapses despite high single-step performance. We address this failure mode with two contributions. First, we formalize Epsilon Overfitting (EO), a perspective in which fixed perturbation magnitudes and directions exacerbate CO, and show that introducing perturbation variability significantly improves robust generalization across different architectures and datasets. Second, we propose PertAlign (Perturbation Alignment), a theoretically grounded, computationally negligible metric that predicts CO onset by measuring gradient alignment across attack stages. Leveraging these insights, we introduce SORA, an adaptive step-size AT method that dynamically adjusts perturbations based on loss surface geometry. SORA consistently prevents CO, achieves state-of-the-art robustness and clean accuracy, and generalizes across datasets and architectures using a single fixed set of hyperparameters, which is essential for applicability in fast AT. Extensive experiments on diverse datasets and architectures show that SORA matches or surpasses the robustness of prior methods while delivering higher clean accuracy and superior efficiency. Code is available at https://github.com/SecondOrderAT/SORA.

</details>


### [835] [Score $\times$ Decoder: A Unified View of Unsupervised Inference-Time Scaling for Hallucination Mitigation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00739)
*Yun-Chen Cheng,Che-Yu Lin,Cheng-Lin Yang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 论文研究了在无监督条件下（仅使用基础语言模型），如何通过不同评分函数（困惑度、对比度、幂分布似然、自验证）与解码策略（优化、采样、共识）的组合，来识别和生成正确的模型输出。发现自验证结合虚拟思维前缀效果最好，但评分与解码器需配对选择，没有固定最优的评分。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大语言模型即使答案存在于参数中也会产生幻觉。现有的推理时扩展方法虽能挖掘潜在知识，但最有效的需要监督信号（如训练过的验证器或奖励模型）。本文探索在完全没有监督的情况下，仅凭基础模型本身，哪种内在信号能最好地识别正确输出，以及如何解码。

Method: 构建了一个评分×解码器的网格框架：4种评分（困惑度、对比度、幂分布似然、自验证） × 3种解码家族（优化、采样、共识）。在MATH500数据集上使用基础版和指令微调版Qwen3-1.7B评估每种组合。自验证方法通过训练无关的"虚拟思维前缀"来增强模型自我判断能力。

Result: 自验证评分在多数设置下表现最佳。但没有任何评分具有固定优势——其效果取决于消费它的解码器类型以及模型能力。评分与解码家族必须配对选择。

Conclusion: 在无监督条件下，评分函数与解码策略不能独立选择，而必须联合考虑。不同模型能力（基础 vs 指令微调）下最优组合可能不同。

Abstract: Large language models hallucinate even when the answer lies within their parameters. While inference-time scaling can surface this latent knowledge, the most effective methods require supervision: a trained verifier or reward model. We ask what can be done with only a base language model: which intrinsic signal best identifies correct outputs, and how should it be decoded? We cast this as a score~$\times$~decoder grid pairing four scores (perplexity, contrastive, power-distribution likelihood, and self-verification) with three decoding families (optimization, sampling, consensus), and evaluate every cell on MATH500 with the base and instruction-tuned Qwen3-1.7B. While self-verification, which prompts the model to judge its own answer and is sharpened by a training-free virtual-thinking prefix, works well in most settings, no score has a fixed quality: its value depends on the decoder that consumes it and on model capability. When no supervision is available, the score and the decoding family must be chosen together.

</details>


### [836] [Quantum Tunneling-Aware Machine Learning: Physics-Derived Noise Models for Robust Deployment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00741)
*Uiwon Hwang,Jaeho Hwang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出量子隧穿感知机器学习（QTAML），利用WKB近似导出部署时权重误差的结构化分布（仿射均值偏移、比特级方差层次、逐层依赖），并设计隧道感知补偿（TAC）算法，在无需重训练/标签/推理开销下，以远低于传统ECC的开销恢复95%的干净精度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着晶体管缩放逼近量子力学极限，栅氧化层变薄导致电子通过量子隧穿泄漏，影响AI芯片的权重精度。与数字系统不同，AI推理可容忍此类错误，前提是错误结构被正确建模。现有方法采用通用高斯噪声建模，忽略了隧穿误差的结构化特性，导致过度纠错开销。

Method: (1) 基于WKB近似从第一性原理推导部署时权重误差分布，发现三个结构化特性：仿射均值漂移、由最高有效位主导的每比特方差层次、以及逐层依赖$\|W_\ell\|_\infty$和网络Jacobian；(2) 提出TAC算法，结合闭式均值校正与基于WKB方差分解的最优逐层比特预算分配；(3) 导出闭式饱和比$\rho^*$用于预先预测增益。

Result: 在四种卷积架构（$p_{\text{flip}}=0.10$）和Transformer编码器（$p_{\text{flip}}=0.05$）上，TAC达到95%干净精度，ECC开销比Uniform-MSP基线降低3.4×到33.6×；$\rho^*$可提前预测增益；异构架构上WKB评分优于基于幅度的分配最高达24个百分点。

Conclusion: 将WKB隧穿物理与噪声感知深度学习连接起来，为超越传统缩放极限的硬件-软件协同设计提供了理论指导的原则性路径。

Abstract: Transistor scaling is approaching a quantum-mechanical limit, as thin gate oxides induce electron leakage through quantum tunneling. Unlike conventional digital systems, AI inference can tolerate such errors provided their structure is modeled correctly. In this paper, we introduce quantum tunneling-aware machine learning (QTAML). We derive the deployment-time weight-error distribution from first principles using the Wentzel-Kramers-Brillouin (WKB) approximation and show that it has structure that generic Gaussian noise models miss: an exact affine mean drift, a per-bit variance hierarchy dominated by the most-significant bit, and a per-layer dependence on $\|W_\ell\|_\infty$ and the trained-network Jacobian. We package these three structural properties into a single deployment-time algorithm, Tunneling-Aware Compensation (TAC), that combines closed-form mean correction with an optimal layer-adaptive bit-budget allocation derived from the WKB variance decomposition. Across four convolutional architectures at $p_\mathrm{flip}$=0.10 and a transformer encoder at $p_\mathrm{flip}$=0.05, TAC reaches $95\%$ of clean accuracy with 3.4$\times$ to 33.6$\times$ less ECC overhead than Uniform-MSP, the natural baseline derived from the same physics. The closed-form saturation ratio $ρ^*$ predicts these gains in advance, and on heterogeneous architectures WKB-derived scoring outperforms magnitude-based allocation by up to 24 percentage points at small budgets. The algorithm requires no retraining, no labels, and no inference-time overhead. We also verify the WKB-derived distributional theorems to Monte Carlo precision. These results connect WKB tunneling physics with noise-aware deep learning and suggest a principled path toward hardware--software co-design beyond conventional scaling limits.

</details>


### [837] [A multimodal dataset of photoplethysmography and continuous behavioral responses to ASMR and nature videos](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00752)
*Tushar Das,Daigo Hozaki,Koushlendra Kumar Singh,Hirohito M. Kondo*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了REST-ASMR数据集，包含34名参与者的同步多模态数据（PPG、音视频刺激、主观标注），用于研究ASMR现象。技术验证显示97%响应率、显著的心血管减速效应，且BiLSTM模型在视频级分类上达到100%准确率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: ASMR研究缺乏标准化、开放获取的多模态数据集，限制了该领域的进一步发展。

Method: 构建REST-ASMR多模态数据集，包含PPG信号、时间对齐的音视频刺激和连续主观标注；使用BiLSTM模型预测主观ASMR tingling状态；采用严格的受试者-视频双独立4折交叉验证。

Result: 97%响应率；ASMR特定心血管减速显著；视频级ASMR vs. 自然分类准确率100%；帧级全局平均准确率75.51%，宏F1分数71.86%，自然基线特异性100%。

Conclusion: REST-ASMR为情感计算、多模态研究和个性化放松响应模型提供了密集的时间维度基础。

Abstract: Autonomous Sensory Meridian Response (ASMR) is a somatosensory phenomenon characterized by pleasant tingling sensations and cardiovascular slowing. However, ASMR research has been hindered by a dearth of standardized, open-access multimodal datasets. To address this limitation, we present REST-ASMR (Response to Environmental & Sensory Triggers), a synchronized multimodal dataset designed to capture behavioral reports and physiological dynamics during ASMR, with nature-relaxation videos as control stimuli. The dataset includes high-resolution photoplethysmography (PPG), time-aligned audiovisual stimuli, and continuous subjective annotations from 34 participants. Technical validation showed high stimulus efficacy (97% responder rate), significant stimulus-specific inter-subject agreement (p < 0.05), and a robust PPG-derived ASMR-specific cardiovascular deceleration. Additionally, a Bidirectional Long-Short Term Memory model successfully predicted subjective ASMR tingle states, achieving video-level ASMR vs. Nature classification with perfect accuracy and a frame-level global mean accuracy of 75.51%, macro F1-score of 71.86%, and 100% Nature-baseline specificity, under a strict, leakage-free subject-video double-independent 4-fold cross-validation. REST-ASMR constitutes a dense temporal foundation for affective computing, multimodal research, and the development of personalized models of relaxation-related responses.

</details>


### [838] [RADE: Random Add-Drop Edge as a Regularizer](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00757)
*Danial Saber,Amirali Salehi-Abari*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出RADE（随机增删边）方法，通过同时随机删除和添加边来缓解GNN的过拟合和过压缩问题。RADE在训练时通过随机增强进行正则化，同时保证训练与推理的分布对齐，并在推理时支持长程信息通信。此外，提出基于小批量梯度范数平衡的自适应增删率算法，使方法无需手动调参。实验表明RADE在节点和图分类任务上既有效正则化，又缓解了过压缩问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有GNN训练面临过拟合和长程信息的过压缩两大问题。随机图增强（如删边）能正则化训练但会导致训练-推理分布不匹配，且不能改善过压缩；重连方法能改善过压缩但缺乏正则化能力。缺乏一种同时解决两个问题的方法。

Method: 提出RADE方法，在训练时随机同时删除和添加边，实现数据增强正则化；通过设计保证训练与推理时边的分布对齐，避免分布偏移；在推理时保持完整图结构以支持长程通信。进一步提出基于小批量梯度范数平衡的自适应算法，自动调整删边和添边的概率。

Result: 在节点分类和图分类基准上，RADE有效正则化模型并缓解过压缩问题。消融实验验证了训练-推理对齐、自适应率选择以及随机删边和添边的互补作用。

Conclusion: RADE通过联合随机删除和添加边，同时解决了GNN的过拟合和过压缩问题，并通过训练-推理对齐和自适应超参数机制实现了实用且有效的图数据增强方法。

Abstract: Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) suffer from overfitting and over-squashing of long-range information. Stochastic graph augmentations (e.g., edge deletion) regularize training against overfitting but can introduce train-inference misalignment and do not improve over-squashing. In contrast, rewiring methods improve connectivity to mitigate over-squashing, but are not designed to regularize training. We propose Random Add-Drop Edge (RADE), a stochastic graph augmentation method that jointly drops and adds edges to address both overfitting and over-squashing simultaneously. RADE is provably designed to align training and inference so that random augmentations regularize training without distribution shift, while supporting long-range communication at inference. We further propose and study a mini-batch gradient-norm balancing algorithm that adapts deletion and addition rates during training, rendering RADE hyperparameter-free in practice. Experiments on node- and graph-classification benchmarks show that RADE is a strong regularizer and mitigates over-squashing. Ablations support the roles of train-inference alignment, adaptive rate selection, and the complementary effects of random edge deletion and edge addition.

</details>


### [839] [Distributed GNEP Algorithms without Multiplier Sharing and Applications to Multi-Robot Coordination and Contextual Bandit-Based Active Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00759)
*Shao-An Yin*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种无需交换拉格朗日乘子的全分布式连续时间算法，用于求解具有共享约束的广义纳什均衡问题（GNEP），收敛到一般GNE（而非仅限于变分GNE），并扩展到多机器人协调等应用。第二部分提出了基于上下文赌博机的自适应主动学习策略，以解决标签数据收集困难问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有分布式算法求解GNEP时，智能体需要交换拉格朗日乘子来达成共识并计算变分GNE（v-GNE），这增加了通信负担并损害了隐私保护。同时，主动学习中手工设计的策略通常只在特定类型数据集上表现良好，泛化能力不足。

Method: 1) 提出全分布式连续时间算法，无需交换乘子即可收敛到一般GNE；2) 针对强单调博弈、凸个体约束和线性共享约束进行分析；3) 提出多种离散化方案；4) 在第二部分中，利用上下文赌博机自适应选择最合适的主动学习策略。

Result: 所提出的分布式算法收敛到一般GNE（而非限于v-GNE），平衡点取决于初始化；在多机器人协调与布置任务中验证了有效性。基于上下文赌博机的主动学习方法在公开外部数据集上展示了有效性。

Conclusion: 本文的两部分工作分别解决了分布式GNEP求解中的通信隐私问题，以及主动学习中的策略自适应选择问题，为实际部署提供了更高效、更通用的解决方案。

Abstract: Recent advances in artificial intelligence have expanded the focus from classical optimization to include equilibrium analysis in noncooperative games. Many such games involve shared constraints, leading to Generalized Nash Equilibrium Problems (GNEPs). Existing distributed algorithms typically require agents to exchange Lagrange multipliers to enforce consensus and compute variational-GNEs (v-GNEs).
  This work introduces fully distributed continuous-time algorithms and establishes convergence without requiring multiplier exchange, thereby reducing information exchange per iteration while improving privacy preservation. The analysis focuses on strongly monotone games with convex individual constraints and linear shared constraints. I also propose several discretization schemes for the continuous-time algorithms. The proposed approach converges to general GNEs, rather than being restricted to v-GNEs, with the attained equilibrium depending on the initialization. The effectiveness of the proposed method is demonstrated through applications in multi-robot coordination and placement.
  In the second part, this work includes research conducted in collaboration with Amazon scientists. One of the most challenging problems in real-world machine learning is labeled data collection, which typically requires substantial human effort and cost. Active learning aims to reduce this labeling requirement. Existing handcrafted active learning strategies, however, generally perform well only on specific types of datasets, which are often unknown in advance. In this work, I propose using contextual bandits to adaptively select the most suitable active learning strategy. The effectiveness of the proposed approach is demonstrated on publicly available external datasets.

</details>


### [840] [Confidence-Adaptive SwiGLU for Mixture-of-Experts](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00761)
*Shaohua Li,Xiuchao Sui,Xiaobing Sun,Yuhang Wu,Liangli Zhen,Yong Liu,Rick Siow Mong Goh*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了一种针对MoE模型的置信度感知SwiGLU激活函数（κ-SwiGLU），通过根据路由置信度动态调整门控锐度，在几乎不增加参数的情况下提升了模型性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准SwiGLU在训练过程中门控锐度（门控函数的平滑性和选择性）是固定的，无法根据令牌级别的路由置信度动态调整，限制了MoE模型的表达能力。

Method: 将SiLU门控锐度系数参数化为路由器logit的可学习函数，使每个专家门控单元能在平滑广泛激活和锐利选择性激活之间插值，实现置信度感知的门控锐度调整。

Result: 在8到28层的MoE Transformer模型上，κ-SwiGLU在FineWeb-Edu数据集上提升了平均CORE性能，同时仅增加极少的参数量和微小的计算开销。

Conclusion: 置信度感知的门控锐度是改进MoE MLP的一种有前景的机制，κ-SwiGLU在效率与性能之间取得了良好的平衡。

Abstract: SwiGLU has become a standard gated activation in modern Transformer MLPs, yet its gate sharpness -- the smoothness and selectivity of the gating function -- is typically fixed throughout training. In this work, we propose Confidence-Aware SwiGLU ($κ$-SwiGLU), a variant of SwiGLU for Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) models that adjusts expert gate sharpness according to token-level routing confidence. Specifically, $κ$-SwiGLU parameterizes the SiLU gate sharpness coefficient as a learnable function of the router logit, enabling each expert gate unit to interpolate between smooth, broadly active gating and sharp, selective gating. We evaluate $κ$-SwiGLU on the FineWeb-Edu dataset across MoE Transformer models ranging from 8 to 28 layers. Across these settings, $κ$-SwiGLU improves mean CORE performance while adding negligible parameters and incurring only a small computational overhead, demonstrating that confidence-aware gate sharpness is a promising mechanism for improving MoE MLPs. The code is available at https://github.com/askerlee/kappa-swiglu.

</details>


### [841] [Logit Distillation on Manifolds: Mapping by Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00771)
*Yiru Yang,Junling Wang,Nishant Kumar Singh,Luohong Wu,Haoran Yan*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种结合投影映射和LoRA注入的知识蒸馏方法，在保持学生模型参数不足教师模型1%的情况下，显著提升词错误率表现，且训练可并行进行，优于传统集成学习和专家混合方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 集成多个模型虽能提升性能，但计算成本过高，难以大规模部署，尤其对于大型神经网络。因此需要一种既能利用多模型知识，又保持高效计算的方法。

Method: 提出层与点的投影映射方法，在训练过程中将学生和教师表示映射到对齐的高维嵌入空间；结合LoRA注入技术，使学生模型的可训练参数减少到教师模型的1%以下。

Result: 消融实验表明，该方法相比其他蒸馏方法显著提升了词错误率（WER）。

Conclusion: 该方法解决了集成模型部署的高计算成本问题，同时优于传统知识蒸馏方法，且训练可并行进行，与专家混合方法相比更具效率优势。

Abstract: A simple way to improve the performance of almost any machine learning model is not to train a single but several models with diverse algorithms which will make slightly distinct kinds of predictions and errors on the same data, and thus improve the average predictions and robustness. However, making predictions using a whole ensemble of models is cumbersome and computationally too expensive to allow deployment to a large number of users, especially if the models are large neural nets. In response to this, we introduce a layer and point wise projection mapping, which maps student and teacher representations into an aligned high-dimensional embedding space during training process. The proposed approach combined with LoRA injection reduces the student model trainable parameters to less than 1% of the teacher model, while significantly improving word error rate (WER) compared to other distillation methods, as demonstrated in ablation studies. Unlike a mixture of experts, our method can be trained rapidly and in parallel.

</details>


### [842] [Latent Diffusion Pretraining for Crystal Property Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00776)
*Shrimon Mukherjee,Kishalay Das,Partha Basuchowdhuri,Pawan Goyal,Niloy Ganguly*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出CrysLDNet，一种基于潜在扩散的预训练框架，通过VAE结合扩散模型在潜空间学习晶体结构语义，缓解标注数据稀缺问题，在JARVIS和MP数据集上分别提升4.26%和4.90%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 晶体性质预测中，图神经网络和Transformer模型虽强但数据需求大，而实际标注数据稀缺，现有预训练方法仍有不足，亟需能从未标注数据中有效学习结构语义的方法。

Method: CrysLDNet采用两阶段框架：预训练阶段使用VAE将3D晶体结构编码到平滑潜空间，再在该空间执行扩散过程；微调阶段将预训练好的图编码器迁移到具体性质预测任务。

Result: 在DFT数据集上，CrysLDNet在JARVIS和MP数据集上分别超过从头训练基线4.26%和预训练基线4.90%；在稀疏数据条件下保持鲁棒，并能通过有限实验数据纠正DFT误差。

Conclusion: CrysLDNet验证了潜在扩散预训练在晶体性质预测中的有效性，为数据稀缺场景下的材料设计提供了可行的新范式。

Abstract: Fast and accurate prediction of crystal properties is a central challenge in new materials design. Graph neural networks and Transformer-based models have emerged as powerful tools for this task due to their ability to encode the local structural environment of atoms within a crystal. However, these models are data-hungry, and in practice, labeled data for crystal properties are scarce. Pretraining-finetuning strategies, particularly those based on diffusion models, have shown promise in addressing these limitations. In this work, we introduce a novel latent diffusion based pretraining framework, CrysLDNet, designed to mitigate data scarcity. Our approach integrates a Variational Autoencoder (VAE) with a diffusion model during the pretraining stage. The VAE encoder maps 3D crystal structures into a smooth latent space within which the diffusion process is applied. This latent diffusion pretraining enables the graph encoder to effectively capture structural and chemical semantics from large-scale unlabeled data, which can then be finetuned for specific property prediction tasks. Comprehensive experiments on popular DFT datasets for property prediction reveal that CrysLDNet significantly outperforms both training-from-scratch and pretrained baselines, with improvements of 4.26% and 4.90% on the JARVIS and MP datasets, respectively. Additionally, the learned representations remain robust in sparse-data conditions and are expressive enough to correct DFT errors when finetuned with limited experimental data. Code is available at: https://github.com/shrimonmuke0202/CrysLDNet.git.

</details>


### [843] [Behavior-Invariant Task Representation Learning with Transformer-based World Models for Offline Meta-Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00780)
*Fuyuan Qian,Menglong Zhang,Song Wang,Quanying Liu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出融合信息论任务表征学习与Transformer随机世界模型的离线元强化学习框架，通过提取行为策略不变的任务变量缓解上下文分布偏移，并采用保守值惩罚抑制策略对模型的过度利用，在稀疏奖励和分布外场景下取得更优的稳定性和泛化性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 离线元强化学习面临上下文分布偏移和策略分布偏移两大挑战，尤其在稀疏奖励场景下，智能体容易陷入模式困境，难以实现鲁棒泛化。

Method: 1) 信息论任务表征学习：提取对行为策略不变的任务潜在变量，缓解上下文分布偏移；2) Transformer随机世界模型：作为世界模型框架；3) 保守值惩罚：对基于想象力的轨迹施加保守值惩罚，防止策略过度利用模型误差，同时保持鲁棒适应能力。

Result: 在分布外和稀疏奖励场景下，该方法在稳定性和泛化能力上均优于现有最先进方法。

Conclusion: 通过结合信息论任务表征与保守性约束，有效解决了离线元强化学习中的双重分布偏移问题，实现了更可靠的泛化。

Abstract: Offline meta-reinforcement learning leverages static datasets to enable agents to generalize to unseen environments by combining offline efficiency with meta-learning adaptability, yet it faces key challenges from context and policy distribution shifts. These issues hinder agents from adapting to online environments, and are further exacerbated under sparse-reward settings. As a result, agents often become trapped in an inherent pattern dilemma, failing to achieve robust generalization. In this work, we propose a novel framework that integrates information-theoretic task representation learning with a Transformer-based stochastic world model. Our approach extracts task-defining latent variables that are invariant to behavior policy, thereby effectively mitigating the context distribution shift. To further handle policy shift and model exploitation, we apply a conservative value penalty to imagination-based rollouts, preventing the policy from exploiting model inaccuracies while maintaining robust adaptation.
