### [919] [Target localization, identification and sensing using latent symmetries](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01421)
*David Dukov,Malte Röntgen,Bryn Davies*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文首次利用潜伏对称性构建传感器：通过设计具有隐藏对称性的散射体阵列，利用侵入者打破对称性的程度来识别其半径和位置。在噪声环境下，贝叶斯推理和神经网络方法优于字典法，并在三维开放系统中验证了潜伏对称性的存在。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统传感器设计依赖显式结构，而潜伏对称性作为一种不易被直接观测的对称性，尚未被用于传感任务。作者希望探索这种"隐藏"的对称性是否可以作为感知外部扰动的有效机制。

Method: 以电容矩阵作为三维杂化模型，设计具有潜伏对称性的散射体阵列。通过分析"侵入者"散射体对各潜伏对称性的破坏程度，反推其半径和位置。采用字典法、贝叶斯推断和多层感知机三种方法进行参数估计，比较了它们在噪声下的表现。

Result: 成功利用潜伏对称性被破坏的程度识别了侵入者的半径并定位了其位置。贝叶斯推断和人工神经网络（多层感知机）在有测量噪声时表现优于字典法。这是首次将潜伏对称性应用于传感问题，也是首次在三维开放系统（无法用稀疏图近似）中观察到潜伏对称性。

Conclusion: 潜伏对称性是一种可用的新型传感机制，尤其适用于三维开放系统。基于机器学习或贝叶斯方法的对称性分析在实际噪声环境中具有鲁棒性优势，为传感器设计提供了新范式。

Abstract: We show that an array of scatterers which has been designed to have latent ("hidden") symmetries can be used as a sensor. We use the capacitance matrix as a canonical model for three-dimensional hybridisation and study how the introduction of an "intruder'' scatterer breaks the latent symmetries. By analysing the degree to which each symmetry is broken, we identify the radius of the intruder and localize its position. This can be achieved using a dictionary-based approach, however Bayesian inference or an artificial neural network (multi-layer perceptron) perform better in the presence of measurement noise. To our knowledge, this is the first time latent symmetries have been exploited successfully for sensing problems. It is also the first time latent symmetries have been observed in a three-dimensional open system that cannot be approximated by a sparse graph.

</details>


### [920] [Learning-based Directed Graph Abstraction of Combinatorial Spaces for Order-Preserving Search in Mixed-Combinatorial Nonlinear Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01425)
*Gishnu Madhu,Feng Liu,Souma Chowdhury*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种利用图神经网络（GNN）对混合组合非线性规划（MCNLP）问题的组合空间进行结构化抽象的新方法，通过Edge Field Graph Network（EFGN）学习从无向全连接组合图到有向改进方向图的映射，并将其作为推荐系统集成到现有优化框架中，在三个基准非线性问题上展示了比传统方法更好的优化效果和鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: MCNLP问题在工程设计和规划中广泛存在，传统使用整数或二进制编码表示组合空间的方法会引入虚假关系、增加维度并需要额外的兼容性约束，亟需一种更高效、可扩展的组合空间抽象方法。

Method: 利用Edge Field Graph Network (EFGN)学习从无向全连接组合图到有向改进方向图的映射，实现对组合空间的结构化抽象；将该抽象模型作为推荐系统，集成到仅搜索连续变量、通过推荐系统检索最优组合的优化框架中。

Result: 在三个包含不同数量组合和变量的基准非线性问题上，将所提方法与粒子群优化和遗传算法集成，与使用索引化组合的基线求解器相比，GNN-based推荐器在平均最优值和多次运行的鲁棒性方面均表现更优。

Conclusion: 所提出的方向感知抽象模型相比原始推荐系统提供了更具可扩展性和可解释性的组合检索方式，为求解MCNLP问题提供了新的有效途径。

Abstract: Mixed-combinatorial nonlinear programming (MCNLP) problems arise in many engineering design and planning applications, e.g., due to categorical, component, and geometric design choices, as well as joint task and motion planning. Traditional representations of combinatorial spaces, such as integer or binary encoding, often introduce spurious relations, increase dimensionality, and require additional compatibility constraints. Instead, this paper draws on recent developments in robot planning and vehicle/network routing domains that aim to learn search heuristics over combinatorial spaces using graph neural networks (GNNs). More specifically, this paper presents a first-of-its-kind structured abstraction of the combinatorial space by learning a mapping from an undirected fully connected graph of combinations to a directed graph indicating improvement directions using an Edge Field Graph Network (EFGN). To demonstrate the utility of this new way of abstracting the combinatorial space in solving MCNLPs, we adopt a recent optimization framework that purely searches over the non-combinatorial (e.g., continuous) variables and retrieves the best-suited combination for each candidate design by using the abstraction model, akin to a recommender system. The presented direction-aware abstraction model provides a potentially more scalable and interpretable retrieval of combinations compared to the original recommendation system in that framework. For evaluation, the proposed method is integrated with a well-known particle swarm optimization and genetic algorithm solvers on three benchmark nonlinear problems with varying numbers of combinations and variables. Compared to baseline solvers using indexified combinations, the GNN-based recommender consistently achieves better mean optimum values and robustness across multiple runs.

</details>


### [921] [Leaf Spectral Reflectance Prediction Using Multi-Head Attention Neural Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01432)
*Parastoo Farajpoor,Alireza Pourreza,Mohammadreza Narimani,Ashraf El-Kereamy,Matthew W. Fidelibus*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于多头注意力神经网络的葡萄叶片光谱反射率预测模型，利用16种叶片性状进行训练，相比传统PROSPECT-PRO模型在近红外和短波红外区域表现出更低的误差（R²=0.84, NRMSE=1.52%），强调了物种特异性建模的重要性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统辐射传输模型（如PROSPECT-PRO）基于广义物种关系，无法充分捕捉特定作物（如葡萄）的光谱行为，因此需要开发物种特异性的性状-光谱预测模型。

Method: 使用多头注意力神经网络，基于包含多个品种、生长阶段和年份的葡萄叶片数据集（16种叶片性状），采用分层5折交叉验证进行训练和评估。

Result: 模型平均R²为0.84，NRMSE为1.52%；与PROSPECT-PRO正向模式相比，在近红外（NIR）和短波红外（SWIR）区域MAE更低，准确性和泛化能力更强。

Conclusion: 物种特异性建模方法显著优于通用模型，将生化与结构性状整合到数据驱动架构中可有效提升光谱预测精度，为冠层性状反演、葡萄园监测和遥感驱动的作物管理提供了稳健框架。

Abstract: Accurate modeling of leaf spectral reflectance from physiological and biochemical traits is essential for advancing remote sensing applications in plant science and precision agriculture. Widely used radiative transfer models, such as PROSPECT-PRO, rely on generalized trait-reflectance relationships developed from a wide range of species, which may not fully capture the spectral behavior of specific crops like grapevines. In this study, we developed a trait-to-spectra prediction model using a multi-head attention neural network trained on a grapevine-specific dataset that includes 16 leaf traits measured across multiple varieties, growth stages, and years. The model was evaluated using stratified 5-fold cross-validation and achieved an average coefficient of determination (R^2) of 0.84 and normalized root mean squared error (NRMSE) of 1.52 percent, demonstrating high accuracy and generalizability. When compared to PROSPECT-PRO in forward mode, the neural network exhibited lower mean absolute error (MAE), especially in the near-infrared (NIR) and shortwave-infrared (SWIR) regions. These results emphasize the importance of species-specific modeling approaches and show that integrating biochemical and structural traits into data-driven architectures can significantly improve spectral prediction. The proposed model provides a robust framework for generating accurate leaf-level reflectance data, with potential applications in canopy trait retrieval, vineyard monitoring, and remote sensing-driven crop management.

</details>


### [922] [CEAR: Certified Ensemble Adversarial Robustness in DNNs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01437)
*Daniel Sadig,Mohammadreza Maleki,Hamed Karimi,Reza Samavi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了 CEAR，一种结合经验性和可认证防御机制的集成鲁棒方法，通过在集成网络中引入高斯噪声和温度变化来混淆梯度和 logits，并扩展到随机平滑来验证集成分类器的鲁棒性，在多个数据集上取得了更优的认证准确率和鲁棒半径。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 深度神经网络极易受到对抗性扰动的影响，现有的经验性防御机制在面对自适应白盒攻击时仍然效果不佳，而可认证防御虽能提供鲁棒性保证但往往牺牲了准确性，因此需要一种结合两者优势的混合方法。

Method: 1) 集成网络中各子网络使用不同的高斯噪声和温度参数进行训练，以混淆梯度和 logits；2) 提出两种基于噪声 logits 的投票机制；3) 将随机平滑扩展到集成分类器的鲁棒性验证中。

Result: 在 MNIST、CIFAR10 和 TinyImageNet 数据集上的实验表明，CEAR 平均认证准确率更高、鲁棒半径更大、迁移性更低，优于基线方法。

Conclusion: CEAR 通过混合经验性与可认证防御机制，有效结合了两者的优势，在提升模型鲁棒性的同时保持了良好的认证保证，为对抗防御提供了一种新的有效范式。

Abstract: Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) are highly susceptible to adversarial perturbations, leading to extensive research on robustness for safety-critical applications. State-of-the-art empirical defense mechanisms improve the robustness of DNNs through the training phase, but still struggle against adaptive white-box attacks. On the other hand, certified defenses offer provable guarantees of robustness within a specified perturbation bound. These guarantees hold regardless of the level of perturbations, even if the attacker is given full knowledge of the model. In this paper, we propose CEAR, an ensemble-based robust method that utilizes a hybrid of empirical and certified defense mechanisms. CEAR trains each network within the ensemble using varying Gaussian noise and temperatures to obfuscate gradients and logits, making the model more resistant to stronger gradient-based attacks. We then use noisy logits and propose two different voting mechanisms to further improve robustness. Furthermore, we extend randomized smoothing to verify the robustness of ensemble-based classifiers. Our experimental evaluations on MNIST, CIFAR10, and TinyImageNet datasets demonstrate superior certified accuracy on average, increased robustness radius, and decreased transferability compared to baseline methods.

</details>


### [923] [UR-JEPA: Uniform Rectifiability as a Regularizer for Joint-Embedding Predictive Architectures](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01443)
*Triet M. Le*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: UR-JEPA通过Carleson型平方函数正则化替代LeJEPA的各向同性高斯目标，在保持相近精度的同时产生更低方差和更优几何结构（PCA谱呈现4-5个数量级下降），解决了JEPA中的表征坍塌问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LeJEPA强制各向同性高斯嵌入与流形假设（嵌入应集中在低维子集）存在根本性张力，导致表征坍塌问题。作者希望设计一种与数据流形几何一致的正则化方法。

Method: 提出UR-JEPA，使用均匀n-可整流测度作为目标，通过高斯核平滑的Carleson型平方函数L^CGLT实现，并辅以Jones β-数公式。

Result: 在Inet10上比LeJEPA提升0.83个百分点（0.9141 vs 基准），种子标准差降低约30%；在Galaxy10、ImageNet-100、EuroSAT上精度相近，但UR-JEPA方差更低；PCA谱显示前20-25维占主导（4-5个数量级差异），而LeJEPA谱接近平坦。

Conclusion: 两种正则化方法在相同精度下产生结构不同的投影表征，UR-JEPA的几何更符合流形假设，且具有更低的种子方差。

Abstract: A central difficulty in training Joint-Embedding Predictive Architectures (JEPAs) is preventing representation collapse. LeJEPA addresses this by enforcing an isotropic Gaussian target on the embeddings via Sketched Isotropic Gaussian Regularization (SIGReg). This target is in tension with the manifold hypothesis, which expects embeddings to concentrate on a low-dimensional subset of the ambient space. We propose \emph{UR-JEPA}, which targets a uniformly $n$-rectifiable measure of local tangent dimension $n$ at small scales, realized through a Gaussian-kernel smoothed Carleson-type square function $\mathcal{L}^{\text{CGLT}}$, with a complementary Jones $β$-number formulation. On Inet10, UR-JEPA($\mathcal{L}^{\text{CGLT}}$) attains $0.9141 \pm 0.0014$ for a $+0.83$\,pp gain over LeJEPA($\mathcal{L}^{\text{SIGReg}}$) with $\sim 30\%$ lower seed standard deviation; on matched-recipe Galaxy10~SDSS, a single-seed ImageNet-$100$ run, and a $3$-seed EuroSAT remote-sensing run, the two methods lie in the same peak-accuracy band at convergence, with UR-JEPA retaining its lower-seed-variance signature. On EuroSAT the in-domain pair is competitive at $96.0$ to $96.1\%$ with large remote-sensing foundation-model transfer at a $25\times$ smaller backbone. The distinction is geometric: direct visualization of the projector output distribution shows that on all four datasets UR--JEPA($\mathcal{L}^{\text{CGLT}}$) produces a global PCA spectrum with a $4$ to $5$ order-of-magnitude drop at index $\sim 20$ to $25$ out of $D = 32$, while LeJEPA's spectrum is near-flat (top-to-bottom ratio at most $3.6$). Per-dimension marginals are simultaneously near-Gaussian for both methods (mean Shapiro-Wilk $W \in [0.992, 0.996]$) as a Diaconis-Freedman consequence. At matched accuracy the two regularizers therefore yield structurally distinct projected representations.

</details>


### [924] [Genotype-Conditioned Molecular Generation via Evidence-Grounded Multi-Objective Latent Perturbation in Diffusion Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01461)
*Brenda Nogueira,Gisela A. Gonzalez-Montiel,Nitesh V. Chawla,Nuno Moniz*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出一种基于潜空间优化的基因型到药物扩散模型，通过梯度上升优化复合奖励（药物敏感性、类药性、合成可及性），并结合多智能体LLM管线评估机制一致性，在15个癌细胞系上优于基线方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 肿瘤异质性和缺乏明确分子靶点使抗癌药物开发困难，现有生成模型缺乏对敏感性、可合成性和机制结合合理性的联合优化。

Method: 对预训练的基因型到药物扩散模型进行潜空间优化，引入可学习的扰动，通过梯度上升最大化复合奖励（AUC、QED、SAS），并通过多智能体LLM管线基于注意力机制评估机制一致性。

Result: 在15个癌细胞系（来自三个留出评估集）上，该方法在敏感性、类药性、可合成性和化学有效性方面一致且显著优于竞争基线。

Conclusion: 该方法通过将候选药物生成锚定于真实临床证据，实现了个性化抗癌药物发现中多目标优化与生物合理性的有效平衡。

Abstract: Developing effective anticancer therapeutics remains challenging due to tumor heterogeneity and the absence of well-defined molecular targets across cancer subtypes. Generative models conditioned on cancer genotypes offer a promising avenue for personalized drug discovery, yet existing approaches lack explicit optimization for simultaneous sensitivity, synthesizability, and mechanistic binding plausibility. We present a latent-space optimization approach for a pretrained genotype-to-drug diffusion model, introducing a learnable perturbation over the molecular latent space optimized via gradient ascent to maximize a composite reward combining predicted drug sensitivity (AUC), drug-likeness (QED), and synthetic accessibility (SAS). Critically, biological realism is enforced by grounding both reward design and evaluation in experimentally-derived cancer cell line data and validated pharmacologic signals, anchoring candidate generation in real-world clinical evidence. Mechanistic consistency plausibility is further assessed by a multi-agent LLM pipeline grounded in the diffusion model's attention mechanism. Experiments across 15 cancer cell lines from three held-out evaluation sets demonstrate consistent and noticeable improvements over competing baselines in sensitivity, drug-likeness, synthesizability, and chemical validity.

</details>


### [925] [OmniOPD: Logit-Free On-Policy Distillation via Speculative Verification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01476)
*Yuhang Zhou,Lizhu Zhang,Yifan Wu,Mingyi Wang,Peng Bo,Jiayi Liu,Xiangjun Fan,Zhuokai Zhao*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出OmniOPD框架，通过无logit、基于块级语义监控的监督信号替代传统的令牌级logit匹配，解决了On-Policy Distillation中教师模型需开放logit的问题以及令牌级信号的脆弱性，在数学基准上最高提升28.64%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准OPD存在两个耦合限制：1) 需要直接访问教师模型的令牌级logit，排除了强大的闭源模型作为教师；2) 令牌级logit信号本身脆弱，依赖教师和学生之间狭窄的下一令牌重叠，且容易放大退化模式（如重复循环）。

Method: OmniOPD用蒙特卡洛 rollout 替代确定性logit匹配，通过连续语义相似度度量在多令牌块上近似教师的局部偏好，并通过峰值熵调度器仅在学生高不确定性的推理分支进行监督。同时引入Dirichlet-Multinomial贝叶斯先验和基模型KL锚点来约束离散采样的方差并防止策略崩溃。

Result: 在多个竞争性基准上，OmniOPD比标准OPD在数学任务上最高提升28.64%。与更强的黑盒教师（Claude-4.5-Haiku、Gemini-2.5-Flash）配合时，在数学任务上比开放权重教师额外提升9.54%，超越自我探索式RL的性能。

Conclusion: 块级语义验证比令牌级logit匹配提取更可靠的学习信号，后者虽然信息密度高但噪声和脆弱性显著；OmniOPD框架成功打破了OPD对教师模型开放性的限制。

Abstract: On-Policy Distillation (OPD) trains a student model on its own generative trajectories under dense token-level feedback from a stronger teacher, mitigating both the off-policy distribution shift of Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) and the sparse credit assignment of Reinforcement Learning (RL). However, standard OPD faces two coupled limitations. First, it requires direct access to the teacher's token-level logits, excluding a broad class of capable proprietary models from serving as teachers. Second, the token-level logit signal itself is brittle, depending on a narrow overlap of plausible next tokens between teacher and student, and prone to amplifying degenerate patterns such as repetition loops. In this paper, we introduce OmniOPD, a novel framework that addresses both limitations through a logit-free, chunk-level supervision signal. OmniOPD replaces deterministic logit matching with Monte Carlo rollouts that approximate the teacher's local preferences through a continuous semantic similarity metric over multi-token chunks, and concentrates this supervision via a peak-entropy scheduler that audits the student only at its high-uncertainty reasoning forks. A Dirichlet-Multinomial Bayesian prior and a base-model KL anchor further bound the variance of discrete sampling and prevent policy collapse across unaudited tokens. Across competitive benchmarks, OmniOPD surpasses the standard OPD approach by up to +28.64% on math, confirming that chunk-level semantic verification extracts a more reliable learning signal than token-level logit matching, whose high information density is offset by significant noise and brittleness. Furthermore, when paired with stronger black-box teachers such as Claude-4.5-Haiku and Gemini-2.5-Flash, OmniOPD achieves an additional +9.54% relative on math over its open-weight teacher counterpart, advancing the student past the performance of self-exploratory RL.

</details>


### [926] [MURMUR: An Efficient Inference System for Long-Form ASR](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01483)
*Wei-Tzu Lee,Keisuke Kamahori,Baris Kasikci*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: Murmur是一个针对长语音识别（ASR）的推理系统，通过双层级设计（跨块调优块大小、块内利用注意力稀疏性进行KV缓存淘汰）打破准确率与延迟之间的权衡，在AMI-IHM上实现与单轮模型相同准确率的同时延迟降低4.2倍。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有长语音识别系统在准确率和延迟之间存在权衡：基于块的流水线延迟低但丢失跨块上下文且需脆弱启发式对齐；长上下文单轮模型准确率高但速度慢一个数量级。

Method: 提出Murmur双层级推理系统：1）跨块层级：将块大小作为可调超参数，发现适中块大小能平衡准确率和延迟；2）块内层级：利用注意力稀疏性，对输出token和语音token均采用滑动窗口的KV缓存淘汰策略。

Result: 在AMI-IHM数据集上，Murmur匹配单轮模型准确率的同时延迟降低4.2倍；采用token淘汰策略后，在tcpWER降解小于1%的情况下进一步提升性能。

Conclusion: Murmur通过双层级设计有效地打破了长语音识别中准确率与延迟之间的权衡，证明了适中的块大小配合注意力稀疏性利用可以达到最优的综合效果。

Abstract: Long-form automatic speech recognition (ASR) requires both high accuracy and low latency, but existing systems force a trade-off between the two. Chunk-based pipelines process audio in parallel windows for low latency, but lose cross-chunk context and need brittle heuristics to align speakers and timestamps at boundaries. Long-context ASR models resolve everything in a single pass for better accuracy, but are an order of magnitude slower. We propose Murmur, an inference system that overcomes this trade-off by operating at two levels. At the inter-chunk level, we revisit the chunk-based pipeline for modern long-context ASR, treating chunk size as a tunable hyperparameter, and show that intermediate chunk sizes strike a good balance of accuracy and latency. At the intra-chunk level, we exploit attention sparsity through a sliding window KV cache eviction policy applied to both output and speech tokens. On AMI-IHM, Murmur matches single-pass accuracy while reducing latency by 4.2x, with further gains from token eviction at less than 1% relative tcpWER degradation. The code of Murmur is available at https://github.com/uw-syfi/Murmur.

</details>


### [927] [CART: Context-Anchored Recurrent Transformer -- A Parameter-Efficient Architecture with Learned Stability](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01495)
*Chad A. Capps*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: CART是一个参数高效的语言模型，使用共享核心块循环R次。它通过预计算K/V张量并让循环核心通过多隐头潜在注意力交叉注意这些冻结张量来改进之前的循环Transformer。实验表明前奏深度P比循环次数R更重要，且在完整训练后最优R反转。在参数匹配基线测试中CART未能超越密集基线，性能差距约10%源于权重共享和异构框架，而循环核心机制本身是微弱的。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索参数高效的语言模型设计，通过循环共享核心块减少参数，同时研究循环深度与预前深度的权衡，以及测试时深度扩展的可行性。

Method: CART包含多层预前奏(prelude)计算K/V，然后共享核心块通过多隐头潜在注意力交叉注意冻结的K/V张量进行R次循环，并使用学习的线性时不变门控(LTI gate)保持循环稳定性，其谱半径稳定在[0.79, 0.83]区间。

Result: 在64个配置的初步筛选和36个配置的完整训练中：前奏深度P主导循环次数R；完整训练后R=6在d>=512时最优；在参数匹配测试中CART未超越密集基线，存储参数级损失1-2%，有效参数级损失约10%。诊断消融显示有效参数差距中~5%来自权重共享，~5%来自异构框架，循环核心机制本身贡献微弱。可变R推理在训练R两侧均退化。

Conclusion: CART在参数高效语言模型方面未达到预期效果，其循环核心机制贡献有限，且不支持测试时深度扩展。权重共享和异构框架是性能差距的主要来源。

Abstract: We present CART (Context-Anchored Recurrent Transformer), a parameter-efficient language model that reuses a single shared core block R times across depth. Unlike prior looped transformers that recompute key-value tensors at every iteration, CART computes K and V once from a multi-layer prelude and has the recurrent core cross-attend to those frozen tensors via multi-head latent attention. A learned Linear Time-Invariant (LTI) gate keeps the recurrence stable: its spectral radius settles in a narrow band (rho in [0.79, 0.83]) across all 36 fully-trained configurations.
  We evaluate CART on single consumer GPUs in two stages: a 64-configuration screen at 3,000 steps, then 36 configurations (P=6, R in {6,8,10}, three seeds) trained for 30,500 steps (~1B tokens). Two patterns hold across widths d in {256,512,768,1024}: prelude depth P dominates loop count R, and the Stage-1 ranking of R reverses at full training (R=6 becomes best at d>=512). At the binding d=1024 parameter-parity test, CART does not beat a parameter-matched dense baseline, losing by 1-2% at stored-parameter parity and by ~10% at effective-parameter parity. Diagnostic ablations split the effective-parameter gap into ~5% from weight sharing and a residual ~5% from the heterogeneous prelude/anchor/core/coda framing; the recurrent-core machinery (hyper-connections, LTI gate, loop-index embedding) is individually vestigial. Variable-R inference degrades on both sides of the trained R, a negative result for test-time depth scaling under this recipe.

</details>


### [928] [ProbMoE: Differentiable Probabilistic Routing for Mixture-of-Experts](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01509)
*Heng Zhao,Zilei Shao,Guy Van den Broeck,Zhe Zeng*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: ProbMoE 提出了一种概率路由框架，将专家选择建模为带基数约束的分布，通过每个专家的边际概率作为可微替代，支持精确k和动态k两种路由模式，在提升专家利用率和路由多样性的同时减少激活专家数量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: MoE模型通过top-k路由实现稀疏激活，但离散且不可微的路由选择需要梯度估计器，其设计仍是开放问题。

Method: 将专家选择建模为基数约束子集上的概率分布，前向采样k专家子集，反向通过每个专家的边际概率作为真实梯度的可微替代。支持精确k和动态k两种路由设置。

Result: Exact-k路由在多个基准和模型骨干上表现优异，提升了专家利用率和路由多样性；Dynamic-k路由在激活更少专家的情况下达到可比性能。

Conclusion: 概率路由框架有效解决了MoE中离散路由的梯度估计问题，并在固定k和动态k场景下均取得了良好效果。

Abstract: Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) models scale by activating only a small subset of experts per token. However, training such models remains challenging because top-$k$ routing is discrete and non-differentiable, requiring gradient estimators for expert selection whose design remains a central open problem. We introduce ProbMoE, a probabilistic routing framework that models expert selection as a distribution over cardinality-constrained expert subsets and formulates routing as probabilistic inference in this discrete subset space. We first propose ProbMoE Exact-$k$ routing, which samples $k$-expert subsets in the forward pass, and the backward pass uses gradients through each expert's exact marginal probability as a tractable surrogate for the true gradient. ProbMoE naturally generalizes to a dynamic-$k$ routing setting, where both training and inference constrain the routing cardinality to the same predefined range, allowing adaptive expert allocation per token. Across benchmarks and model backbones, ProbMoE Exact-$k$ achieves strong performance compared to competitive baselines, with improved expert utilization and routing diversity; ProbMoE Dynamic-$k$ achieves comparable performance with fewer activated experts.

</details>


### [929] [Fast Generalization after Interpolation via Critically Damped Momentum Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01521)
*Luca Muscarnera,Silas Ruhrberg Estévez,Yuanzhang Xiao,Mihaela Van der Schaar*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出GROKtimizer，一种双阶段优化策略，先快速收敛到插值阈值，再通过临界阻尼动量(CDM)最小化范数，从而在过参数化场景中选择低范数插值解，实现更优泛化。理论证明其在局部二次模型中相比经典梯度下降有二次加速，并在合成基准和真实数据集上验证了有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 机器学习模型在高维低样本场景下存在严重的泛化差距——模型训练表现近乎完美，但泛化能力却很差。许多插值解存在，而优化过程必须隐式地在具有不同泛化特性的最小值之间进行选择，因此需要一种能自然选择低范数插值解的优化策略。

Method: 提出GROKtimizer双阶段优化策略：第一阶段快速收敛到插值阈值（损失接近零），第二阶段采用临界阻尼动量(CDM)进行后插值范数最小化。理论分析基于局部二次模型，证明其二次加速特性及在一阶优化器中的最优性。

Result: 在经典grokking领域的合成基准以及多种真实世界数据集上进行了评估，GROKtimizer表现优于传统方法。理论层面证明了在局部二次模型下相比经典梯度下降具有二次加速，且在一阶优化器中达到最优。

Conclusion: GROKtimizer的双阶段策略有效解决了插值解的选择问题，与平坦最小值假说一致，强调了后插值动力学在构建高质量泛化模型中的重要性。

Abstract: A central problem in machine learning is that models can achieve near-perfect training performance while generalizing substantially less well to unseen examples. This gap is especially acute in high-dimensional, low-sample regimes, where many interpolating solutions exist and optimization must implicitly select among minima with different generalization properties. Following recent theoretical advances on optimization dynamics near the interpolation threshold, we note that the two-regime structure of risk minimization, with loss minimization followed by complexity minimization, motivates a biphasic optimization schedule. We thus theoretically demonstrate that GROKtimizer, a biphasic strategy that combines rapid convergence to interpolation with Critically Damped Momentum (CDM)-based post-interpolation norm minimization, offers a natural solution for selecting low-norm interpolating solutions. Under a local quadratic model of the post-interpolation basin, GROKtimizer provides a quadratic speedup over classical gradient descent, with provable optimality among first-order optimizers. To showcase the applicability of our method, we evaluate GROKtimizer on several synthetic benchmarks common in the classical grokking literature and on various real-world datasets. Finally, we reconcile our findings with the flat-minima hypothesis, highlighting the importance of post-interpolation dynamics in the construction of high-quality, generalizing models.

</details>


### [930] [Semi-Supervised Hyperbolic Hierarchical Clustering with Set-Level Structural Priors](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01525)
*Junjing Zheng,Xinyu Zhang,Xiangfeng Qiu,Chengliang Song,Weidong Jiang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出一种半监督层次聚类方法，通过引入集合级结构先验（将样本聚合成子树的集合）来替代传统的叶级约束，从而更好地指导非叶子层级的树结构学习，在11个基准数据集上提升了标签一致性和树质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统半监督层次聚类仅使用叶级约束（如成对链接约束或三元组约束），只能调节局部样本关系，无法直接指明哪些样本应形成连贯的子树，导致学习到的非叶子层级结构与真实标签偏好的层级组织不一致。

Method: 1) 学习约束一致的嵌入以获得可靠的集合划分；2) 构建约束诱导的集合并估计集合间相似度，形成集合级结构先验；3) 将这些先验融入双曲层次目标函数中进行连续树优化。

Result: 在11个基准数据集上的实验和消融研究表明，该方法在标签一致性上持续优于代表性层次聚类基线，同时改善了基于相似性的树质量。

Conclusion: 引入集合作为层次学习的基本建模单元，能够将叶级监督有效提升为子树级监督，从而更好地指导非叶子层级结构，提升层次聚类性能。

Abstract: Semi-supervised hierarchical clustering aims to learn a tree structure consistent with data patterns and user-provided supervision. Supervision is usually given as leaf-level relations, such as pairwise must-link/cannot-link constraints or triplet-wise must-link-before constraints. Although useful for regulating local sample relations, such supervision does not directly indicate which samples should form coherent subtrees. Consequently, the non-leaf structure of the learned tree may deviate from the hierarchical organization preferred by ground-truth labels. To address this limitation, we propose a semi-supervised hyperbolic hierarchical clustering method with set-level structural priors. The main contribution is to introduce sets as basic modeling units for hierarchy learning. Each set denotes samples expected to cohere within a subtree and is induced from leaf-level supervision together with a learned constraint-consistent similarity structure. These sets act as soft structural priors for subtree-level supervision, allowing supervision to guide non-leaf hierarchy formation beyond local leaf-level relations. Specifically, we first learn constraint-consistent embeddings to obtain a reliable set partition, then construct constraint-induced sets and estimate inter-set similarities to form set-level structural priors. Finally, these priors are incorporated into a hyperbolic hierarchy objective for continuous tree optimization. Experiments on eleven benchmark datasets and ablation studies show that the proposed method consistently improves label consistency over representative hierarchical clustering baselines while also enhancing similarity-based tree quality.

</details>


### [931] [Near-Optimal Pure Machine Unlearning for Smooth Strongly Convex Losses](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01527)
*Matthew Regehr,Gautam Kamath,Andrew Lowy*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了机器遗忘（machine unlearning）在光滑强凸随机优化中的统计成本，给出了近似ε-遗忘的过剩总体风险上下界，发现最优率等于常规统计误差加上遗忘惩罚项，当ε远大于d时，遗忘算法相比从头训练和差分隐私基线有指数级精度提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 受法律（如被遗忘权）和用户需求驱动，需要从训练模型中移除特定个体的数据影响。已有工作开发了遗忘算法和误差界，但遗忘的**统计成本**（即基础的信息论极限）尚不明确，本文旨在填补这一空白。

Method: 论文通过证明近似ε-遗忘的过剩总体风险（excess population risk）的上下界来刻画遗忘的统计成本。上界和下界在条件数因子范围内紧致，对单位球上的均值估计任务，上下界完全匹配。分析区分了两种情形：当ε ≫ d时，遗忘算法比从头训练有指数级提升；当ε ≤ d时，从头训练即为最优。

Result: 最优遗忘率 = 常规统计误差 + 遗忘惩罚（在从头训练误差与指数级更小的项之间插值）。当ε ≫ d时，ε-遗忘算法相比从头训练和差分隐私基线有指数级精度提升；当ε ≤ d时，从头训练即为最优。

Conclusion: 本文几乎完整解决了光滑强凸随机优化中机器遗忘的统计成本问题，为不同ε/d取值下的遗忘策略选择提供了理论依据。

Abstract: Machine unlearning is motivated by legal and user-facing requirements to remove the influence of individuals' data from trained models, such as the right to be forgotten. Prior work has developed algorithms and error bounds for unlearning in smooth strongly convex stochastic optimization, but the fundamental statistical cost of unlearning has remained unclear. We nearly resolve this problem by proving upper and lower bounds on the excess population risk of approximate $\varepsilon$-unlearning; our bounds are tight up to a condition-number factor. For mean estimation over the unit ball, our upper and lower bounds match. The optimal rate is the usual statistical error plus an unlearning penalty that interpolates between the retraining-from-scratch rate and an exponentially smaller term as $\varepsilon/d$ grows, where $d$ is the dimension of the model. In particular, when $\varepsilon \gg d$, our $\varepsilon$-unlearning algorithm offers an exponential accuracy improvement over retraining the model from scratch and differentially private baselines. On the other hand, when $\varepsilon \le d$, retraining from scratch is optimal.

</details>


### [932] [Rethinking the Role of Positional Encoding: Sliding-Window Transformers without PE Remain Turing Complete](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01532)
*Qian Li,Xinyu Mao,Shang-Hua Teng*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文证明，在有限滑动窗口生成的长序列推理场景中，无需位置编码，仅靠窗口滑动机制本身即可打破置换对称性，使Transformer具备图灵完备性。作者提出HIST模型，证明其可模拟图灵完备的Post机，并进一步构造了无位置编码的滑动窗口Transformer来模拟HIST模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 挑战"位置编码对于Transformer在有序序列上执行通用计算是必要的"这一广泛认知，探究在有限滑动窗口的长序列推理场景中，窗口机制本身是否能提供足够的表达能力。

Method: 1) 提出HIST抽象自回归模型，其更新仅依赖常数大小的内部状态和当前窗口内的token计数直方图；2) 证明HIST模型可通过窗口演化揭示刚离开窗口的token，从而模拟图灵完备的Post机；3) 构造一个无需位置编码、使用常数大小token字母表的滑动窗口Transformer，证明其可模拟HIST模型。

Result: 证明了在滑动窗口场景下，无需位置编码的Transformer仍然具备图灵完备性，位置编码并非不可或缺。

Conclusion: 窗口滑动机制本身已能打破置换对称性并捕获足够的位置信息，位置编码对于Transformer的通用计算能力不是必需的。

Abstract: Positional encoding (PE) is widely viewed as necessary for transformers to process ordered sequences: without them, the next-token map appears permutation-invariant in its context tokens. This intuition underlies all prior universality results, which rely on positional information to prove that transformers with chain-of-thought can perform arbitrary computation, i.e., they are Turing complete. We revisit this belief in the regime most relevant to long-form reasoning, where generation proceeds through a finite sliding context window. Our opening perception is that the window mechanism itself (mildly) breaks the permutation symmetry. To distill and precisely capture the degree of this added expressiveness, we introduce an abstract autoregressive model, the HIST model, in which each update depends only on constant-size internal state and the token-count histogram within the current window. We prove that this HIST model is Turing complete by showing that the evolution of the window can reveal the token that has just left the window, which suffices to simulate Turing-complete Post machines. We then construct a sliding-window transformer over a constant-size token alphabet, without PE, and show that it can simulate the HIST model. Our result demonstrates that positional encodings are not indispensable for transformers to perform universal computation: The window sliding itself already breaks permutation symmetry and captures sufficient positional information.

</details>


### [933] [TN-SHAP-G: Graph-Structured Tensor Network Surrogates for Shapley Values and Interactions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01540)
*Farzaneh Heidari,Guillaume Rabusseau*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出TN-SHAP-G框架，利用图结构输入高效计算Shapley值和高阶交互指标，通过训练与图对齐的张量网络代理模型实现确定性恢复，无需蒙特卡洛采样。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Shapley值计算涉及指数级子集空间，现有方法效率低，尤其在图结构数据上缺乏高效近似方案。

Method: 采用张量网络代理模型，其拓扑结构与输入图对齐，通过少量oracle查询训练后，利用多线性扩展直接恢复一阶和高阶Shapley指标。

Result: 在分子基准上，该方法在小图上精确匹配真实Shapley值，在大图上效率显著优于采样方法。

Conclusion: TN-SHAP-G为图结构数据的特征归因提供了高效、确定性的替代方案，兼顾准确性与可扩展性。

Abstract: Shapley values are a widely used tool for attributing importance and interactions among input variables in black-box models, but their computation involves a function defined over an exponentially large space of subsets. We propose TN-SHAP-G, a framework that exploits structure in graph-structured inputs to compute Shapley values and higher-order interaction indices efficiently. Given a predictor and a fixed masking scheme, TN-SHAP-G learns a compact, graph-aligned multilinear surrogate that approximates the masked-input behavior, represented as a tensor network whose topology mirrors the input graph. Once trained from a small number of oracle queries, the surrogate enables deterministic recovery of first- and higher-order Shapley indices via the multilinear extension, without additional model queries or Monte Carlo variance. Experiments on molecular benchmarks show that the learned factorization closely matches exact Shapley values on small graphs and scales efficiently to larger graphs where sampling-based methods become infeasible.

</details>


### [934] [CRePE: Convolution-aware Relative Importance in Post-training Pruning with Efficient Search](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01544)
*Cheonjun Park*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出CRePE方法，通过引入2D局部邻域上下文和自适应系数改进相对重要性剪枝评分，并进一步提出PHO方法将超参数搜索时间从11小时缩短至20分钟，在多种LLM上取得更好剪枝效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有PTP方法（如RIA）仅考虑1D十字形（行/列）方向信息，且对行列贡献赋予相等权重，忽略了局部邻域上下文信息，导致剪枝精度受限。

Method: 1) CRePE：在相对重要性评分中引入2D局部邻域上下文和自适应系数；2) PHO：基于代理的超参数优化，消除重复PPL测量，将搜索时间从11小时降至20分钟，且超参数可在不同模型间迁移。

Result: CRePE在多种模型和稀疏度设置下持续优于现有PTP方法；PHO将搜索时间从~11小时降至~20分钟，且找到的超参数配置具有良好的跨模型泛化性；CRePE可与Channel Permutation、非均匀稀疏分配、重剪枝等现有技术正交结合。

Conclusion: CRePE通过2D上下文感知的相对重要性评分显著提升了LLM后训练剪枝效果，PHO有效解决了超参数搜索效率问题，两种方法共同推进了LLM高效部署的发展。

Abstract: Deploying Large Language Models (LLMs) in practice incurs substantial memory and computational costs. Post-training pruning (PTP) is an effective approach to reducing these costs by removing weights without additional training. Among existing methods, RIA introduces relative importance scores normalized by row and column sums, achieving state-of-the-art accuracy. However, RIA considers only 1D cross-shaped (row/column) directional information and assigns equal weight to row and column contributions. In this paper, we propose \textbf{CRePE}, which incorporates 2D local neighborhood context and adaptive coefficients into Relative Importance scoring. CRePE consistently outperforms existing PTP methods across diverse models and sparsity settings. However, identifying optimal adaptive coefficients via perplexity (PPL)-based hill climbing requires numerous PPL evaluations and approximately 11 hours of search time. To address this, we propose \textbf{PHO} (Proxy-based Hyperparameter Optimization), which eliminates the need for repeated PPL measurements and reduces the search time to approximately 20 minutes. Furthermore, the optimal hyperparameter configuration found by PHO on one model transfers well to other models, demonstrating strong generalization. Finally, we verify that CRePE can be orthogonally combined with existing techniques including Channel Permutation, non-uniform sparsity allocation, and re-pruning methods.

</details>


### [935] [Flexible Online Representation Learning Based on Similarity Matching](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01546)
*Shagesh Sridharan,Yanis Bahroun,Anirvan M. Sengupta*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种通用的、在线且具有生物合理性的学习算法，能够学习稀疏的平移不变表示，适用于聚类、流形平铺或稀疏编码等任务。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 稀疏高维表示在无监督数据探索（如社区检测、流形平铺和特征学习）中具有重要作用，但现有算法存在计算复杂度过高（完全正矩阵）、无法处理大规模数据（双非负矩阵）、且缺乏支持在线学习规则的问题。

Method: 提出一种在线的、生物可解释的学习算法，能够学习稀疏的平移不变表示，不依赖于计算复杂的完全正矩阵或双非负矩阵松弛，而是通过生物启发的在线学习规则实现。

Result: 该算法能够根据数据结构，灵活适应聚类、流形平铺或稀疏编码等不同任务，且支持在线学习，具有较好的可扩展性。

Conclusion: 提出的在线生物合理算法有效解决了稀疏高维表示学习中的计算复杂度和在线学习问题，适用于多种无监督学习场景。

Abstract: Sparse high-dimensional representations are conducive to uncovering nontrivial structures in unsupervised exploration of data. Such a representation can deal with the dense connectivity in graphs relevant to community detection problems. However, sparse high-dimensional representations are capable of doing more, including manifold tiling and feature learning. Conventional algorithms optimize in the space of computationally intractable completely positive matrices or relax the problem to the space of doubly nonnegative matrices that scale with sample size in a way rendering them impractical for large data sets. Some of these methods also impose a row sum constraint, such as double stochasticity. Row sum constraints have the added advantage of being shift-invariant, in the context of manifold tiling. Constraints on the row sum of output similarity matrices require nontrivial online learning rules. Addressing these needs, we propose a versatile online biologically plausible learning algorithm capable of learning sparse shift-invariant representations, useful for clustering, manifold tiling, or sparse coding, depending on the data structure.

</details>


### [936] [Everywhere Learning: Artificial Intelligence with Pointwise Constraints](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01557)
*Ignacio Boero,Ignacio Hounie,Luiz Chamon,Alejandro Ribeiro*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出“无处不在学习”新范式，要求AI系统以概率1满足损失约束，而非传统平均损失最小化。通过近似对偶理论建立泛化分析，发现对偶变量重新加权数据分布，泛化受数据分布质量与困难约束点集中度的不匹配控制，并可用L1稀疏惩罚控制泛化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统AI训练优化平均损失，但在高风险场景（如医疗、自动驾驶）中，需要保证每个样本都满足约束，而非仅在平均意义上良好。本文旨在建立满足概率1约束的学习理论框架。

Method: 利用近似对偶理论，构建经验与统计无处不在学习问题的泛化分析；通过重新加权数据分布刻画对偶变量作用；引入稀疏L1惩罚控制约束松弛的泛化误差。

Result: 对偶变量会重新加权数据分布，使权重集中于难以满足约束的样本点；泛化误差受数据分布质量分布与困难样本集中度之间的不匹配程度控制；L1稀疏惩罚可有效控制泛化。

Conclusion: 无处不在学习为安全关键型AI提供新理论框架，并在智能体分类任务（语言模型）上展示了有效性，有望在高可靠性需求场景中替代传统平均损失优化范式。

Abstract: Everywhere learning is a new paradigm whereby Artificial Intelligence (AI) systems are trained to satisfy loss constraints with probability one over the data distribution. This is in contrast to the standard paradigm of training AI systems to minimize average losses. We develop an approximate duality theory to substantiate a generalization analysis that establishes the proximity between solutions of empirical and statistical everywhere learning problems. Our results show that dual variables reweigh the data distribution towards points in which loss constraints are more difficult to satisfy and that generalization is controlled by the mismatch between the concentration of mass of the data distribution and the concentration of mass on points where constraints are more difficult to satisfy. We further show that we can control generalization with a sparse L1 penalty on constraint relaxations. We illustrate the merits of everywhere learning with an experiment in agentic classification for language model tasks.

</details>


### [937] [GJDNet: Robust Graph Neural Networks via Joint Disentangled Learning Against Adversarial Attacks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01560)
*Canyixing Cui,Tao Wu,Xingping Xian,Xiao-Ke Xu,Mao Wang,Weina Niu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 针对GNN在异配/同配图上的对抗攻击（结构反转导致的结构-特征不匹配），提出GJDNet，通过软结构解缠+球面决策边界实现鲁棒节点分类。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有防御方法要么在同配性假设下将邻域视为整体，要么使用标准softmax分类器无法应对扰动导致的表征偏移，缺乏对结构反转攻击的统一防御。

Method: 提出GJDNet，包含两个核心模块：(1) 特征驱动的软结构解缠（skewness-aware邻域过滤），抑制扰动导致的结构-特征不匹配；(2) 球面决策边界（SDB），增强嵌入空间中的类内紧凑性与类间分离性。

Result: 理论分析论证了解缠表征与决策机制的有效性；大量实验表明GJDNet在不同连接模式（同配/异配）的图上均具有强鲁棒性。

Conclusion: GJDNet通过联合解缠表征空间与决策空间，统一提升了GNN在同配和异配图下的对抗鲁棒性，弥补了现有防御的不足。

Abstract: Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) are vulnerable to adversarial attacks, which inherently invert connectivity patterns by introducing disassortative edges in assortative graphs and assortative edges in disassortative graphs. This structural inversion creates structure-feature mismatches that disrupt neighborhood aggregation across different graph types. However, we find that existing defenses are limited, as they either treat neighborhoods as monolithic under fixed assortativity assumptions or rely on standard softmax classifiers that fail to account for perturbation-induced representation shifts. To further exploit this observation, we adopt a robustness perspective that jointly disentangles node representations and decision spaces, isolating perturbation effects while enforcing well-separated decision regions. Based on this principle, we propose Graph Joint Disentanglement Network (GJDNet), a unified framework for robust node classification across diverse graph assortativity regimes. GJDNet enhances robustness at both representation and decision levels: it employs feature-driven soft structural disentanglement with skewness-aware neighbor filtering to suppress perturbation-induced structure-feature mismatches, and introduces a Spherical Decision Boundary (SDB) to promote intra-class compactness and inter-class separation in the embedding space, thereby stabilizing decision boundaries under perturbations. Theoretical analysis provides insights into the effectiveness of the proposed disentangled representation and decision mechanisms, while extensive experiments demonstrate that GJDNet consistently achieves strong robustness across graphs with different connectivity regimes.

</details>


### [938] [MomentKV: Closing the Directional Gap in KV Cache Eviction for Long-Context Inference](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01563)
*Yu Li,Binxu Li,Tian Lan*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出MomentKV，通过维护被驱逐token的矩统计量（计数、键均值、值均值、值-键协方差）来修正KV缓存驱逐带来的方向性偏差，在LongBench和RULER上优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有KV缓存驱逐方法虽然减少了被驱逐token上的残余注意力质量，但忽视了保留集与驱逐集之间的方向性不匹配——被驱逐token与保留token往往近似正交，即使少量注意力质量偏差也会放大为显著的输出误差。

Method: MomentKV维护被驱逐token集的紧凑矩统计量（计数、键均值、值均值、值-键协方差）。驱逐时利用这些统计量识别与累积摘要已对齐的token；推理时通过闭式一阶近似修正被驱逐token的注意力输出，形成选择性驱逐与准确修正的互增强循环。

Result: 在LongBench和RULER上使用LLaMA-3.1-8B-Instruct和Qwen3-4B-Instruct，MomentKV在所有缓存预算下均优于所有基线方法，在激进压缩下提升最大。

Conclusion: 指出了现有KV缓存驱逐策略的根本局限——方向性不匹配，并提出了有效的矩统计修正方案。

Abstract: Autoregressive decoding in Transformer-based language models relies on the KV cache, whose memory footprint grows linearly with sequence length and becomes the primary bottleneck for long-context inference. KV cache eviction addresses this by retaining a fixed-size subset of key-value pairs and discarding the rest. We identify that a primary source of output degradation is not the residual attention mass on evicted tokens, which existing methods already minimize, but a directional mismatch between the retained and evicted token sets. Specifically, the evicted tokens in practice are often near-orthogonal to the retained ones. Thus, even a small evicted mass could have an oversized impact on the resulting direction distribution and amplify into substantial output error. This reveals a fundamental limit in existing strategies. To address this, we propose MomentKV, which maintains compact, small-size moment statistics over the evicted token set, including a count, key mean, value mean, and value-key covariance. During eviction, the moment statistics is leveraged to identify tokens already well aligned with and captured by the accumulated summary, keeping the evicted set geometrically regular. During inference, they yield a closed-form first-order approximation of the evicted attention output, forming a mutually reinforcing loop between selective eviction and accurate correction. On LongBench and RULER with LLaMA-3.1-8B-Instruct and Qwen3-4B-Instruct, MomentKV outperforms all baselines at every cache budget, with the largest gains under aggressive compression.

</details>


### [939] [RobustModelMaker: Coupling Bootstrap Stability Selection with Leakage-Safe Nested Cross-Validation for Scientific Machine Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01566)
*Amanda S Barnard*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出RobustModelMaker框架，通过耦合Bootstrap稳定性选择与严格嵌套交叉验证，在小到中等规模科学数据上同时解决特征选择不稳定和性能估计乐观偏差的问题，在预测分数和稳定性之间取得更优的权衡。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 小到中等规模科学数据集面临两个相互作用的失败模式：单次特征选择不稳定（数据微小扰动导致特征集大幅变化），以及用相同数据进行选择、调优和评估产生乐观偏差的性能估计。这两个问题常规上被分开处理，但在科学数据范畴内它们相互作用，且标准补救措施难以同时解决两者。

Method: RobustModelMaker是一个Python框架，核心思路是将Bootstrap稳定性选择与严格嵌套交叉验证耦合。所有预处理和特征选择均在每折内部完成，最终产生经过稳定性测试的特征子集和无泄漏风险的性能估计。支持二分类、多分类和回归共九种算法。

Result: 在三个真实科学数据集上与ANOVA F-test、递归特征消除（RFE-CV）和Boruta三种选择器比较，RobustModelMaker在预测分数上具有竞争力，且在联合分数-稳定性前沿上占据其他方法无法匹敌的位置。通过PLCO卵巢癌生物标志物发现和UCI超导临界温度回归两个案例展示了实践用法和权衡。

Conclusion: 将稳定性作为一等交付物而非附带属性来对待，可以在预测性能和特征稳定性之间实现更好的权衡。该框架通过确定性测试套件（涵盖单元、性能和可重复性检查）验证了其行为可靠性。

Abstract: Small-to-medium scientific datasets place machine learning pipelines under two compounding pressures. Single-run feature selection produces feature sets that change substantially under small perturbations of the training data, and any procedure that uses the same data for selection, tuning, and evaluation produces optimistically biased performance estimates. The two failure modes are routinely treated as separable, but in the regimes where scientific data live, they interact: an unstable selection inflates the variance of an already-optimistic score, and standard remedies for one rarely address the other. RobustModelMaker is a Python framework that couples bootstrap stability selection with strict nested cross-validation, performs all preprocessing and selection inside each fold, and produces a stability-tested feature subset together with a leakage-safe performance estimate. The framework supports nine algorithms across binary classification, multiclass classification, and regression. Behaviour is verified by a deterministic test suite spanning unit, performance, and reproducibility checks on three real scientific datasets comparing to three alternative selectors (ANOVA F-test, recursive feature elimination with cross-validation, and Boruta) on both predictive score and a Jaccard measure of selection stability. RobustModelMaker is competitive in score with the best alternative selector on each dataset, and occupies a position on the joint score-stability frontier that none of the alternatives match across all three task types. Two example applications, ovarian cancer biomarker discovery from the PLCO Trial and critical-temperature regression on the UCI Superconductivity Data, illustrate how the framework is used in practice and what trade-offs become visible when stability is treated as a first-class deliverable rather than an emergent property.

</details>


### [940] [Uncertainty-Calibrated Diffusion for Reliable 3D Molecular Graph Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01595)
*Fang Wan,Jingxiang Qu,Yi Liu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出UCD方法，通过校准逆扩散过程中的认知不确定性，有效解决了3D分子图生成中认知不确定性与偶然不确定性相互作用导致方差膨胀和分布失配的问题，在多个基准上取得最优性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有3D分子扩散模型忽略了认知不确定性（来自去噪器）与偶然不确定性（逆扩散注入）之间的相互作用，导致方差膨胀和分布失配，严重损害高精度分子生成的化学有效性。

Method: 提出UCD（Uncertainty-Calibrated Diffusion），一种校准逆扩散过程以考虑认知不确定性的方法，通过理论分析和实验验证认知不确定性的传播机制，并对扩散推理过程进行针对性校准。

Result: 在标准3D分子基准上，UCD一致提升了多种基线方法的采样质量，建立了全新的最优性能。

Conclusion: 认知不确定性的校准对高精度分子生成至关重要，UCD方法简单有效，能显著改善扩散模型的采样质量。

Abstract: Bayesian inference provides a principled framework for modeling epistemic uncertainty in neural networks by treating predictions as distributions rather than deterministic values. Meanwhile, diffusion-based models for 3D molecular graph generation operate on fragile geometric structures governed by strict chemical constraints, making inference highly sensitive to uncertainty miscalibration. A largely overlooked issue is that epistemic uncertainty arising from the learned denoiser interacts with the aleatoric uncertainty intentionally injected during reverse diffusion, leading to systematic variance inflation and a mismatch between the true distribution and the simulated distribution. This effect is particularly detrimental for high-precision molecular generation, where even small deviations can violate chemical validity. In this work, we provide a theoretical and empirical analysis of how epistemic uncertainty propagates through diffusion inference and degrades sampling quality. Building on this investigation, we propose UCD (Uncertainty-Calibrated Diffusion), a simple yet effective method that calibrates the reverse diffusion process to account for epistemic uncertainty. Extensive experiments on standard 3D molecular benchmarks demonstrate that UCD consistently improves sampling quality across diverse baseline methods, establishing new state-of-the-art performance for 3D molecular diffusion. The code is available at https://github.com/jiuguaiwf/UCD.

</details>


### [941] [Estimating Mutual Information between Time Series and Temporal Event Sequences Across Diverse Analysis Tasks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01602)
*Haoji Hu,Huaqing Mao,Yijun Lin,Xiaowei Jia,Jinwei Zhou,Minoh Jeong,Yao-Yi Chiang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种非参数互信息估计器，可直接度量连续时间序列与离散事件序列之间的依赖关系，无需数据转换或特设离散化，并在四个任务上验证了其准确性、鲁棒性和可解释性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法依赖特设转换或互信息估计器，对量化、重复值和事件冗余高度敏感，导致结果有偏或不稳定。亟需一种稳健且原则性的方法来量化异构时序数据（连续时序与离散事件序列）之间的依赖关系。

Method: 提出非参数互信息估计器：1）建模连续-离散二元性以处理量化与重复值伪影；2）引入潜在事件聚类策略以缓解事件共现与冗余导致的偏差。最终形成统一框架，桥接离散与连续互信息。

Result: 在四个代表性任务（因果分析的时延互信息、全局/局部时间重复发现、离散协变量选择、连续特征选择）的合成与真实数据集上，现有方法在准确性、鲁棒性和可解释性上均一致优于现有方法。

Conclusion: 所提方法可作为异构时序数据的通用依赖算子，类似于皮尔逊相关系数在同质时序数据中的地位，且代码已开源。

Abstract: Pairwise dependence measures such as correlation and causality are fundamental to temporal data mining, yet there is still no principled and robust way to quantify dependence between heterogeneous data types, especially between continuous time series and discrete temporal event sequences. Existing approaches rely on ad hoc transformations or mutual-information estimators that are highly sensitive to quantization, repeated values, and event redundancy, leading to biased or unstable results in practice. We propose a nonparametric mutual information estimator that directly measures the dependence between time series and event sequences without data transformation, learning, or ad hoc discretization. Our method models the continuous-discrete duality of real-world time series to handle quantization and repeated-value artifacts and introduces a latent event clustering strategy to mitigate bias from event co-occurrence and redundancy. Together, these yield a robust and unified framework that bridges discrete and continuous mutual information. We evaluate the proposed estimator on four representative tasks: discrete-continuous time-delayed mutual information for causality analysis, global and local temporal repetition discovery, discrete covariate selection for time series forecasting, and continuous feature selection for classification. Experiments on synthetic and real-world datasets show consistent improvements over existing methods in accuracy, robustness, and interpretability, positioning our approach as a general-purpose dependence operator for heterogeneous temporal data, similar to Pearson correlation for homogeneous time series. Code available at: https://github.com/HaojiHu/Multimodal-Temporal-Data-Quantification

</details>


### [942] [FedMTFI: Feature Importance Based Optimized Multi Teacher Knowledge Distillation in Heterogeneous Federated Learning Environment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01607)
*Nazmus Shakib Shadin,Aaron Cummings,Xinyue Zhang,Bobin Deng*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出FedMTFI架构，通过多教师知识蒸馏（MTKD）结合Shapley值特征重要性，解决联邦学习中异构设备和非独立同分布数据带来的性能不一致问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 联邦学习在实际应用中面临设备计算能力、内存容量差异大以及数据非独立同分布（non-IID）的问题，导致系统难以保持一致的性能表现。

Method: 1. 根据硬件和模型类型对客户端进行聚类；2. 每个聚类内使用FedAvg聚合本地模型形成多个原型模型（教师模型）；3. 利用多教师知识蒸馏（MTKD）训练全局学生模型；4. 引入Shapley值（SHAP）在蒸馏过程中强调重要特征。

Result: 实验表明FedMTFI在准确率上优于传统联邦学习算法，且在非独立同分布数据条件下表现更有效。

Conclusion: 结合多教师知识蒸馏与特征重要性（SHAP）能有效提升联邦学习在异构环境下的性能和可解释性。

Abstract: Federated learning (FL) is a decentralized approach that enables collaborative model training without exposing raw data. Instead of transferring sensitive data, it allows devices to share only model weights, keeping personal data locally and secure. However, in real world settings, the data held by devices is often not evenly distributed and devices mostly differ in computing power and memory capacity. These differences make FL harder to maintain consistent performance across the system. To address these issues, we propose FedMTFI, a novel architecture that combines multi-teacher knowledge distillation (MTKD) with feature importance to improve the FL process in heterogeneous environments. In FedMTFI, clients are clustered based on similar hardware and model types. Each cluster trains a specific model on not independently and identically distributed (non-IID) data. Within a cluster, every client updates that model using only its own local private data. The server then aggregates the locally trained models in each cluster using FedAvg to form multiple prototype models. Then these prototypes serve as teacher models to train a global generalized student model using MTKD. What makes FedMTFI more unique is the integration of Shapley values (SHAP) to emphasize important features during distillation, which enhances both accuracy and interpretability. Experimental results show that FedMTFI achieves higher accuracy than traditional FL algorithms and performs more effectively under non-IID data conditions.

</details>


### [943] [IMWM: Intuition Models Complement World Models for Latent Planning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01626)
*Baoqi Gao,Ruize Han,Miao Wang,Song Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文发现即使拥有完美世界模型，有限预算的规划器仍会在某些任务上失败，瓶颈在于搜索而非模型精度。为此提出IMWM，将世界模型与从示范中训练的直觉模型结合，通过检索初始化、混合成本和可靠性门控三个轻量组件提升规划效率。在四个像素级目标达成任务上，IMWM相比纯世界模型规划器成功率均有提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于学习的潜在世界模型的规划方法存在一个被忽视的问题：即使世界模型本身完美，有限预算的基于采样的规划器仍会在某些任务上失败。这表明瓶颈可能在于搜索过程而非世界模型的准确性，因此需要改进规划搜索策略。

Method: 提出IMWM框架，包含世界模型和直觉模型两部分。直觉模型从示范中训练，用于识别有前景的动作。两者通过三个轻量组件协作：(i) 检索初始化 - 从检索到的示范初始化规划器的动作提议；(ii) 混合成本 - 将直觉得分与世界模型rollout成本结合；(iii) 可靠性门控 - 根据不同场景调整对直觉的信任程度。

Result: 在Two-Room、Reacher、Push-T和OGBench-Cube四个像素级目标达成任务上，IMWM相比纯世界模型规划器在所有任务上成功率均更高。最大提升在Two-Room（99.2%，+11.5个百分点）和OGBench-Cube（94.7%，+28.5个百分点）。

Conclusion: 搜索瓶颈是影响基于世界模型规划效果的关键因素，通过引入直觉模型来引导搜索可以有效弥补这一不足。

Abstract: Planning with a learned latent world model is a promising route to control from raw pixels, but a strong world model alone is not enough. We show this experimentally: even with a perfect world model (operationalized by replacing the learned forward predictor with an idealized rollout of the true environment dynamics), a finite-budget sample-based planner still fails on some tasks, indicating that the bottleneck can lie in search rather than in world-model accuracy. Motivated by this gap, we propose IMWM (Intuition Model + World Model), which pairs the world model with an intuition model trained from demonstrations to recognize promising actions. The two models collaborate through three lightweight components: (i) Retrieval Initialization, which initializes the planner's action proposal from a retrieved demonstration; (ii) Hybrid Cost, which combines the intuition score with the world-model rollout cost; and (iii) a Reliability Gate, which adjusts how much the planner trusts intuition in each setting. Across four pixel-based goal-reaching tasks (Two-Room, Reacher, Push-T, and OGBench-Cube), IMWM has higher mean success than the world-model-only planner on all four, with the largest gains on Two-Room (99.2%, +11.5 percentage points) and OGBench-Cube (94.7%, +28.5 percentage points).

</details>


### [944] [E4GEN: Event-level Explainable Extreme-Enhanced Time-series Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01634)
*Lin Jiang,Dahai Yu,Ximiao Li,Guang Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: E4GEN是一个可解释的扩散框架，用于生成保留极端事件的时间序列，通过三个组件（E-Activator、E-Predictor、E-Control）控制何时、什么以及如何生成极端事件，在6个数据集上超越现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有时间序列生成方法虽然能保证整体分布保真度，但无法有效捕捉和生成极端事件，限制了其在科学研究和实际应用中的价值。

Method: 提出E4GEN扩散框架，包含三个核心组件：E-Activator学习自适应激活极端控制信号；E-Predictor通过自驱动语义预测生成控制信号，并设计数据条件训练与噪声初始采样解决标签缺失问题；E-Control通过可训练的极端控制网络将语义信号注入去噪过程。

Result: 在6个数据集上使用17个评估指标进行实验，E4GEN在整体保真度、极端事件保真度和下游任务效用等多个维度均优于最先进模型。

Conclusion: E4GEN通过可解释的框架有效解决了极端事件生成问题，为时间序列生成领域提供了新的思路和方法。

Abstract: Generating realistic time series is essential for scientific research and real-world applications. However, existing methods often emphasize overall distributional fidelity while failing to faithfully capture extreme events. To advance existing research, we propose E4GEN, an explainable diffusion framework for extreme event-aware time-series generation. E4GEN provides systematic insights into when, what, and how to control extreme-event generation through three key components. First, E-Activator learns the dataset-adaptive extreme-control signal activation step during the denoising process without interfering with regular temporal components, including trend and seasonality. Second, E-Predictor determines what control signal to enforce through Self-Driven Semantic Prediction, where each sample derives its own control signal by inferring latent extreme-event information during generation. It also includes a novel Data-Conditioned Training, Noise-Initiated Sampling mechanism to address the issue of unavailable training labels. Third, E-Control specifies how to control extreme-event generation through a trainable Extreme Control Network, which transforms the semantic control signal into layer-wise signals and injects it into the denoising process. We evaluate E4GEN on six datasets with 17 metrics, and extensive experiments show that E4GEN outperforms state-of-the-art models across multiple dimensions, including overall fidelity, extreme-event fidelity, and downstream utility.

</details>


### [945] [Gate the Filter, Not the Message: Node-Channel Mixtures for Pre-Propagation GNNs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01660)
*Zichao Yue,Zhiru Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出FilterMoE，一种混合专家预传播图神经网络，通过联合节点-通道自适应滤波（3D门控张量路由Chebyshev滤波器专家），解决了PPGNN中复杂跳聚合器性能不及简单MLP的谜题，在11个基准上超越强基线。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有预传播图神经网络（PPGNN）中存在一个矛盾现象：复杂的跳聚合器（如hop-attention）并不比简单MLP聚合器表现更好。作者从图滤波器视角重新审视该现象，发现现有设计要么是节点共享通道自适应（MLP），要么是通道共享节点自适应（hop-attention），缺少同时进行节点和通道联合自适应滤波的设计，这正是本文的动机。

Method: 提出FilterMoE，一种混合专家PPGNN架构。核心组件包括：(1) 预计算扩散基上的Chebyshev滤波器专家库；(2) 3D门控张量，在节点和通道两个维度上联合路由这些专家滤波器；(3) 在预传播计算约束下实现联合节点-通道自适应滤波。

Result: 在11个同配和异配基准数据集上，FilterMoE在9个数据集上超越强PPGNN基线，在所有3个大规模基准上排名第一，平均测试分数提升1.53个百分点。

Conclusion: 联合节点-通道滤波器路由是一种稳健的替代方案，无需针对数据集手动选择跳聚合器，为PPGNN的设计提供了新的有效范式。

Abstract: Pre-propagation graph neural networks (PPGNNs) push all graph-dependent computation into a preprocessing step and train only on the resulting dense hop features, which makes them highly scalable. A puzzle in this regime is that more complex hop aggregators do not reliably outperform simpler ones: on many benchmarks, a plain MLP-based aggregator matches or beats hop-attention variants. We revisit this behavior from a graph-filter perspective. Over a precomputed diffusion basis, existing PPGNNs differ mainly in how filter coefficients are shared across nodes and feature channels, rather than simply in raw aggregator capacity. MLP-based architectures learn channel-dependent filters that are largely shared across nodes, while hop-attention-based architectures learn node-dependent mixtures that are largely shared across channels. This reveals a missing regime in standard PPGNN designs: joint node- and channel-adaptive filtering under the pre-propagation computational contract. We propose FilterMoE, a mixture-of-experts PPGNN in which a small bank of learnable Chebyshev filter experts is routed jointly over nodes and channels by a 3D gating tensor. Across eleven homophilic and heterophilic benchmarks, FilterMoE outperforms strong PPGNN baselines on nine datasets and ranks first on all three large-scale benchmarks, improving the average test score by 1.53 points. These results establish joint node-channel filter routing as a robust alternative to dataset-specific hop-aggregator selection.

</details>


### [946] [Quantifying the Energy Floor: Direct Measurement and Replay Buffer Bias in SAC-Based HVAC Control on sbsim](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01665)
*Bo Li,Chen Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文量化了SAC算法在建筑暖通空调控制中的能量下限（35.51美元/天），发现标准SAC基线（37.18美元/天）比下限高4.7%，而缓冲区初始化是主要次优来源（空缓冲区训练可消除96%的差距）。此外，揭示了折扣因子耦合导致有效规划窗口从8.3小时大幅缩水至46分钟这一普遍性问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 量化强化学习暖通空调控制中的能量下限，并识别标准SAC算法与该下限之间的差距来源，以了解算法设计与设备物理约束之间的根本性限制。

Method: 通过在sbsim校准建筑模拟器上进行最小动作实验直接测量能量下限；对比标准SAC基线（带调度策略回放缓冲区初始化）与空缓冲区训练的SAC；进行供水温度范围扩展实验；系统性地消融规划周期、奖励权重和观测丰富度等超参数。

Result: 能量下限为35.51美元/天（电力占99.8%）；标准SAC基线为37.18美元/天（高出4.7%）；空缓冲区训练降至35.57美元/天（消除96%差距）；发现折扣因子耦合导致有效规划周期从8.3小时降至46分钟；所有预填充缓冲区配置均聚集在37.18-37.42美元/天范围内。

Conclusion: 设备最小功率（而非算法设计）是暖通空调控制性能的根本限制因素；缓冲区初始化是主要的次优来源；折扣因子耦合问题值得广泛审计。

Abstract: We quantify the energy floor -- the minimum achievable cost given action space constraints -- for Soft Actor-Critic (SAC) HVAC control on the sbsim calibrated building simulator. Through minimum-action experiments, we directly measure this floor at USD 35.51/day, dominated by continuous electrical loads (USD 35.44, 99.8%) with negligible gas consumption. The standard SAC baseline, initialized with schedule-policy replay buffer transitions, converges to USD 37.18/day, 4.7% above the floor. We identify buffer initialization as the dominant source of sub-optimality in this scenario: training from an empty buffer reduces cost to USD 35.57/day, eliminating 96% of the gap. Expanding the supply water temperature range by 10 K yields negligible additional savings (USD 0.03/day), and further expansion triggers physical constraint violations. We additionally uncover a discount factor coupling (gamma_eff = 0.891) shrinking the effective planning horizon from 8.3 h to 46 min -- a benchmark-wide issue warranting audit. Systematic ablation across planning horizon, reward weights, and observation enrichment confirms all pre-filled-buffer configurations cluster within 0.7% (USD 37.18--USD 37.42), demonstrating that equipment minimum power -- not algorithmic design -- imposes the binding constraint.

</details>


### [947] [DOT-MoE: Differentiable Optimal Transport for MoEfication](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01666)
*Udbhav Bamba,Arnav Chavan,Aryamaan Thakur,Steve Teig,Deepak Gupta*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了DOT-MoE框架，通过可微最优传输问题将稠密模型转化为稀疏MoE模型，在保持90%原始性能的同时减少50%的活跃参数。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大语言模型规模扩大带来了推理效率问题，虽然MoE架构可以解耦模型规模与推理成本，但从头训练MoE不稳定且计算密集。将预训练的稠密模型转换为稀疏MoE成为替代方案，但现有方法依赖启发式神经元聚类或随机分割，缺乏优化保障。

Method: 提出DOT-MoE框架，将稠密层的分解建模为可微最优传输问题；利用可微Sinkhorn-Knopp迭代强制执行严格的专家容量约束；使用Straight-Through Estimators联合学习离散的神经元到专家的分配和令牌到专家的路由策略。

Result: 在多个架构和基准上，DOT-MoE显著优于结构化剪枝、启发式聚类和随机分割基线，在减少50%活跃参数的情况下保留了原始稠密模型90%的性能。

Conclusion: 可微最优传输为将稠密模型高效转化为稀疏MoE提供了一种有理论支撑且效果显著的方法。

Abstract: The scaling of Large Language Models (LLMs) has driven significant performance gains but created substantial challenges in inference efficiency. While Mixture of Experts (MoEs) architectures address this by decoupling model size from inference cost, training MoEs from scratch is often unstable and compute intensive. Conversion of pre-trained dense models into sparse MoEs has emerged as an alternative solution; however, existing methods typically rely on heuristic neuron clustering or random splitting to partition the Feed-Forward Network (FFN) into experts. In this work, we propose DOT-MoE, a novel framework that formulates the decomposition of dense layers as a Differentiable Optimal Transport (DOT) problem. Instead of static heuristics, we model neuron assignment as a balanced transport problem, utilizing differentiable Sinkhorn-Knopp iterations to enforce strict expert capacity constraints. Furthermore, we utilize Straight-Through Estimators (STE) to jointly learn the discrete neuron-to-expert assignment and the token-to-expert routing policy end-to-end. Extensive experiments across multiple architectures and benchmarks demonstrate that DOT-MoE significantly outperforms structured pruning, heuristic clustering, and random-split baselines, retaining 90% of the original dense model's performance while reducing active parameters by 50%.

</details>


### [948] [ATLAS: Agentic Test-time Learning-to-Allocate Scaling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01667)
*Peijia Qin,Qi Cao,Pengtao Xie*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出ATLAS框架，让LLM作为编排器自主决定推理过程中的计算分配（何时探索、何时停止、如何合答案），在多个基准上超越固定工作流的基线方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的测试时扩展方法（如固定采样预算、固定精炼循环等）依赖人工设计的编排策略，模型只负责求解而不负责编排，缺乏灵活性。作者希望让模型自主掌握控制循环，实现端到端的推理计算分配。

Method: 提出ATLAS框架，核心是一个LLM编排器通过单一的"explore"动作调度独立的求解器，决定是否收集更多证据、何时停止以及如何合成最终答案。每个explore调用可指定求解器、推理努力度或提示策略。还提出多模型扩展ATLAS-MM，将求解器选择作为额外动作维度。

Result: 在Claude Sonnet 4.6骨干模型上，ATLAS在HLE-Verified达56.00%、LiveCodeBench达82.29%、GPQA-Diamond达85.75%、BabyVision达23.71%，且API调用数远少于固定工作流基线。ATLAS-MM进一步提升HLE-Verified至60.00%、LiveCodeBench至85.63%。消融实验表明，用独立整合器替代编排器的直接合成在4个基准中有3个效果下降。

Conclusion: 让LLM自主编排测试时计算分配是有效的，状态化的证据管理是性能提升的关键，同时该方法具有可扩展性和灵活性。

Abstract: Test-time scaling has become a major way to improve large language model reasoning, but its orchestration has remained designer-engineered: a fixed sample budget, a fixed refinement loop, a fixed scoring rule, or a fixed search policy decides how compute is spent, leaving the model in charge of solving but not of orchestration. We introduce ATLAS, an agentic test-time scaling framework in which an LLM orchestrator owns the control loop end-to-end. Through a single action, explore, which dispatches a fresh independent solver on the original problem, the orchestrator decides whether to gather more evidence, when to stop, and how to synthesize the final answer; the action space is extensible, with each explore call optionally specifying solver, reasoning effort, or prompting strategy. We evaluate ATLAS on four benchmarks covering scientific question answering, code generation, and multimodal reasoning under a Claude Sonnet 4.6 backbone, where it reaches 56.00% on HLE-Verified, 82.29% on LiveCodeBench, 85.75% on GPQA-Diamond, and 23.71% on BabyVision while using far fewer API calls than fixed-workflow baselines. A multi-model extension, ATLAS-MM, that exposes solver choice as an additional action dimension further improves HLE-Verified to 60.00% and LiveCodeBench to 85.63%, with consistent gains on GPQA-Diamond and BabyVision. Ablations replacing the orchestrator's direct synthesis with a separate integrator degrade or fail to improve accuracy on three of four benchmarks, consistent with the role of stateful evidence management in producing the gains.

</details>


### [949] [RDA: Reward Design Agent for Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01672)
*Hojoon Lee,Ajay Subramanian,Ben Abbatematteo,Vijay Veerabadran,Pedro Matias,Karl Ridgeway,Nitin Kamra*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出奖励设计智能体（RDA），一种基于VLM的智能框架，通过视觉语义理解分解任务、评估轨迹、总结失败模式并迭代改进奖励函数，使机器人策略更符合任务指令，在12个桌面操作任务和4个全身操作任务上显著优于基线方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于LLM的奖励自动设计方法（如Eureka）依赖成功率等粗粒度反馈信号，缺乏对学习行为的语义洞察，导致训练出的策略虽然达成最终目标，却经常与任务指令对齐不良。作者希望注入语义理解，使奖励函数更好地符合人类意图。

Method: 提出Reward Design Agent (RDA)，一种VLM驱动的智能体框架：1) 分解任务；2) 视觉评估轨迹；3) 总结失败模式；4) 基于语义理解迭代修改奖励代码。

Result: 在ManiSkill的12个桌面操作任务和HumanoidBench的4个全身操作任务上，RDA生成的策略在指令对齐方面显著优于其他基线方法，同时保持相当的任务成功率。

Conclusion: 注入视觉语义理解可以显著提升奖励函数与任务指令的对齐程度，而不会牺牲任务成功率，为自动化奖励设计提供了更符合人类意图的新范式。

Abstract: Reinforcement learning has enabled the acquisition of impressive robotic skills, but typically requires hand-crafted reward functions that are slow to design and difficult to align with human intentions. Recent work, such as Eureka, automates reward design by using an LLM to iteratively generate and refine reward code from task descriptions. However, they rely on coarse feedback signals such as success rate, which provide little semantic insight into the learned behavior. As a result, their trained policies achieve the final goal but are frequently poorly aligned with task instructions. We introduce the Reward Design Agent (RDA), a VLM-based agentic framework that injects semantic understanding into reward design. RDA decomposes tasks, visually evaluates trajectories, summarizes failure modes, and iteratively revises reward code to better align with task instructions. Across 12 tabletop manipulation tasks from ManiSkill and 4 whole-body manipulation tasks from HumanoidBench, RDA produces policies substantially more instruction-aligned than those of other baselines, while achieving comparable task success rates. Videos and the generated reward code are available on https://nitinkamra1992.github.io/reward-design-agent.

</details>


### [950] [CANARY: Zero-Label Detection of Fine-Tuning Contamination in Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01695)
*Swapnil Parekh*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: CANARY是一种无需标签的检查点审计工具，通过稀疏自编码器分析隐藏状态差异，能够在仅1%微调数据被投毒时（AUROC=1.000）检测出潜在有害行为，并在检测、验证、优先级排序和修复四个环节构建完整治理流水线。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 对抗者仅需污染1%的微调数据即可植入潜伏的有害行为，且这些行为在输出层面完全不可见——隐藏状态中潜伏的毒性需要超过7.5%的污染才会在生成文本中显现。现有输出级防御方法存在盲区，迫切需要一种能直接从模型内部状态检测早期污染的零标签审计方法。

Method: CANARY通过两次前向传播（在无标签提示集上）获取隐藏状态差异，利用稀疏自编码器（SAE）投影该差异，滤除风格噪声并隔离有意义的语义漂移。在此基础上构建完整治理流水线：SAE滤波放大（5倍提高表面化率）、分数排序提示（4.2倍红队攻击提升）、以及推理时抑制特定污染特征（使有害率从70%降至10%且不损失困惑度）。

Result: 在四种模型架构和两种训练范式下，1%污染水平时AUROC=1.000（95% CI=[0.997,1.000]，Cohen's d=3.28），检测阈值是输出级方法触发点的7.5倍以下。零假阳性（良性微调），对风格匹配和梯度噪声自适应攻击完全鲁棒。

Conclusion: CANARY是首个无需标签的框架，仅从隐藏状态实现对供应链污染的检测、验证、优先级排序和修复，填补了输出级防御在早期潜伏污染检测上的空白。

Abstract: Adversaries can implant latent harmful behavior by poisoning as few as 1% of fine-tuning examples. The contamination is invisible to every output-level defense: harmful behavior lies dormant in the model's hidden-state geometry and does not appear in generated text until contamination exceeds 7.5%. We introduce CANARY (Contamination Auditor via Neural Activation Representation Yield), a zero-label checkpoint auditor that detects this hidden shift directly from two forward passes over an unlabeled prompt set. CANARY projects the hidden-state difference through a Sparse Autoencoder, filtering style noise to isolate meaningful semantic drift. It achieves AUROC = 1.000 at 1% contamination (95% CI = [0.997, 1.000]; Cohen's d = 3.28) across four model architectures and two training paradigms, 7.5x below where any output-level method fires, with zero false positives on benign fine-tuning and full robustness to style-matching and gradient-noise adaptive attacks. The same SAE feature basis drives a complete governance pipeline: SAE-filtered amplification surfaces latent harm at a 5x higher rate than standard generation; score-ranked prompts yield 4.2x red-teaming lift; and suppressing a handful of contamination-specific features at inference time reduces harm from 70% to 10% with no perplexity penalty. CANARY is the first zero-label framework to detect, verify, prioritize, and remediate supply-chain contamination from hidden states alone.

</details>


### [951] [Two-Fidelity Best-Action Identification for Stochastic Minimax Tree](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01708)
*Peter Chen,Xi Chen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出2FFS算法，一种双保真度树搜索方法，用于随机极小极大树中的固定置信度最佳动作识别。该算法结合了极小极大快速扩展和MCTS随机采样，在廉价有偏评估与昂贵精确评估之间自适应权衡，在理论保证和实验效果上均优于现有基线。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现代AI规划中，深度极小极大搜索和带有语言模型长rollout的MCTS面临根本性权衡：启发式评估廉价但有偏，精确rollout可靠但成本过高。需要一种能自适应利用两种保真度评估的树搜索算法。

Method: 提出2FFS（Two-Fidelity Tree Search）算法，将多保真度平坦bandit思想引入树结构。算法结合极小极大式快速扩展与MCTS式随机采样，自适应决定何时使用廉价有偏评估、何时使用昂贵精确评估进行局部认证。

Result: 证明了固定置信度正确性、精确识别的有限停止性，给出了一般深度树的多项式深度成本上界。在数值随机树实验中，2FFS相比现有BAI-MCTS基线显著减少了样本量和计算操作量。

Conclusion: 2FFS有效解决了树搜索中启发式评估与精确rollout之间的权衡问题，为具有双保真度评估的AI规划问题提供了一种理论保证且实际高效的解决方案。

Abstract: We study fixed-confidence best-action identification (BAI) in stochastic minimax trees. This problem is increasingly relevant in modern AI planning, where deep minimax search and Monte Carlo Tree Search (MCTS) with language model long rollouts face a fundamental tradeoff: heuristic evaluations are cheap but biased, while accurate rollouts are reliable but prohibitively expensive. We propose 2FFS, a two-fidelity tree-search algorithm that brings multi-fidelity flat bandit ideas into trees. The algorithm combines minimax-style fast expansion with MCTS-style stochastic sampling, adaptively deciding when to exploit cheap biased evaluations and when to invoke expensive accurate evaluations for local certification. We prove fixed-confidence correctness, establish finite stopping for exact identification, and give a polynomial-depth cost upper bound for general-depth trees. Across numerical stochastic-tree experiments, 2FFS uses substantially fewer samples and computational operations comparing to existing BAI-MCTS baseline.

</details>


### [952] [Decentralized Instruction Tuning: Conflict-Aware Splitting and Weight Merging](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01717)
*Minsik Choi,Geewook Kim*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: MERIT提出了一种去中心化的指令微调方案，通过PCA检测数据冲突、独立微调各分区、最后加权合并参数，在多模态大模型上超越传统联合训练。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 指令微调在扩展到异构混合数据时面临梯度干扰和带宽同步两大瓶颈，作者希望探索能否通过独立训练各子集后在参数空间合并来解决这两个问题。

Method: 基于局部二次理论：1) 权重合并产生曲率加权方差缩减；2) PCA对齐的冲突分裂最大化此增益；3) 合并兼具谱滤波与隐式正则化。由此提出MERIT流程：估计数据集级梯度冲突、沿PCA冲突轴划分数据、独立微调各分区、最后通过token加权平均合并参数。

Result: 在Qwen2.5-VL-3B上使用136个Vision-FLAN任务，8个基准平均从54.3（联合训练）提升到57.0；扩展到7B模型/1.6M样本/176源混合，表现匹配或超越集中式联合训练；迁移到纯文本FLAN同样有效。

Conclusion: MERIT证明了去中心化指令微调的可行性，通过参数合并而非梯度同步来缓解异构数据冲突，在性能、扩展性和通信开销上均有优势，代码已开源。

Abstract: Instruction tuning aligns large language models, including multimodal ones, with diverse user intents, but scaling to heterogeneous mixtures is hindered by gradient interference and bandwidth-heavy synchronization. We ask whether these two bottlenecks can be addressed jointly by training parts of the mixture independently and reconciling them once in parameter space. We develop a local quadratic theory inside a shared flat basin that yields three results: weight merging produces a curvature-weighted variance reduction; PCA-aligned conflict splitting maximizes this gain along high-curvature directions; and merging additionally acts as spectral filtering with implicit norm regularization. These results directly motivate MERIT, a decentralized merge-ready instruction-tuning pipeline that estimates dataset-level gradient conflicts, partitions the mixture along the top PCA conflict axes, fine-tunes each partition independently with no inter-partition communication, and merges once via token-weighted averaging. On Qwen2.5-VL-3B with 136 Vision-FLAN tasks, MERIT improves the 8-benchmark average from 54.3 (joint training) to 57.0. The same recipe scales to a 7B model on a 1.6M-example, 176-source mixture -- matching or exceeding centralized joint training with minimal cost overhead -- and transfers to text-only FLAN. Our code is available at https://github.com/naver-ai/merit.

</details>


### [953] [Fair Finetuning Mitigates Distribution Inference Attacks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01719)
*Rakshit Naidu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出公平微调（FFt）方法，通过在补充分布上以均衡赔率约束进行微调，来防御分布推断攻击。理论证明了对抗优势与均衡赔率差异之间的紧界，并在六个数据集上验证了该方法能将推理准确率差距降至检测阈值以下。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究关注差分隐私和属性遗忘等防御手段，但公平性约束与分布泄露之间的联系尚未被探索。作者旨在填补这一空白，建立公平性与隐私保护之间的理论桥梁。

Method: 提出公平微调（FFt）：对已训练模型在补充分布样本上进行微调，同时施加均衡赔率（Equalized Odds, EO）约束。理论推导了对抗优势的上界 $\text{Adv}(\mathcal{A},M_f) \le Δ_{\text{EO}} \cdot W$，并给出了FFt降低对抗优势的必要条件及界限的紧性证明。

Result: 在六个数据集（ACS Income、COMPAS、German Credit、UTKFaces、Bias in Bios）上，基于重放的FFt均能将对抗准确率差距降至检测阈值0.1以下；在ACS Income上，差距从约15%降至4%以下。

Conclusion: 首次建立了模型均衡赔率差异与分布推断攻击中对抗优势之间的正式界限，为统一公平性与隐私防御开辟了新方向。

Abstract: Machine learning models trained on sensitive data can inadvertently leak population-level information about their training distributions -- a threat known as distribution inference attack (DIA). An adversary with black-box access can infer sensitive demographic properties, such as subgroup proportions, without observing any training data directly. While defenses such as differential privacy and property unlearning have been proposed, the link between fairness constraints and distributional leakage remains unexplored. We propose Fair Fine-tuning (FFt): a trained model is fine-tuned on samples from the complementary distribution under an Equalized Odds (EO) constraint. We provide a complete theoretical characterization, proving the tight bound $\text{Adv}(\mathcal{A},M_f) \le Δ_{\text{EO}} \cdot W$, where $W$ quantifies how distinguishable the two training distributions are by their sensitive-attribute composition. We also establish a necessary condition for FFt to reduce adversarial advantage and prove tightness of the bound. We evaluate across six datasets spanning tabular (ACS Income, COMPAS, German Credit), image (UTKFaces), and NLP (Bias in Bios) modalities. Rehearsal-based FFt consistently reduces the adversarial accuracy gap below the detection threshold $τ!=!0.1$ across all settings; on ACS Income, the gap falls from $\sim!15%$ to under $4%$. Our work provides the first formal bound connecting a model's measured EO disparity directly to its adversarial advantage in the DIA game, opening a new avenue for unified fairness-and-privacy defenses.

</details>


### [954] [A Note on Stability for Orthogonalized Matrix Momentum with Client Sampling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01720)
*Da Chang,Qiankun Shi,Lvgang Zhang,Yu Li,Ruijie Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了客户端抽样分布式优化中矩阵参数与正交动量更新的有限样本泛化界，推导了有限轮次的上尾保证，并探讨了矩阵正交化规则的Lipschitz条件及其必要性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在分布式优化中，当仅部分客户端参与每轮训练时，如何保证返回模型的泛化性能（即种群风险与经验风险之间的差异）是一个核心问题。现有理论多关注全参与场景，而对客户端抽样的有限样本分析不足，尤其是涉及矩阵参数和正交动量更新的情况。

Method: 采用耦合邻域稳定性递归与加权浓度步骤，推导了有限轮次的上尾保证。通过放大因子Y_i(C)捕捉客户端选择计数的影响，并分析了矩阵正交化规则（如正则化极坐标映射、归一化有限步Newton-Schulz正交化器）的Lipschitz连续性条件。

Result: 在均匀全参与全批量场景下，当水平依赖的放大项可控时，得到了Õ(n^{-1}+n^{-1/2})的缩放界。对于未正则化的矩阵符号函数，需要耦合谱分离条件；而高斯平滑则提供了有限轮次的平滑变体。

Conclusion: 通过一维反例证明了间隙、平滑或正则性条件的存在是必要的，否则泛化保证可能不成立。

Abstract: We study finite-sample generalization for a client-sampled distributed optimization scheme with matrix-valued parameters and orthogonalized momentum updates. The central quantity is the gap between the population and empirical objectives at the returned model when only a subset of clients participates in each round. Under independent heterogeneous client data, unequal local sample counts, and fixed aggregation weights, we derive a finite-round upper-tail guarantee from a coupled-neighbor stability recursion and a weighted concentration step. The bound keeps the client-selection counts through the amplification factor \(Y_i(\mathcal C)\); in the uniform full-participation full-batch regime, it yields \(\widetilde{\mathcal O}(n^{-1}+n^{-1/2})\) scaling whenever the horizon-dependent amplification terms are controlled. The matrix-orthogonalization rule is required to be Lipschitz along paired trajectories, a condition satisfied by regularized polar-type maps and normalized finite-step Newton--Schulz orthogonalizers. For the unregularized matrix sign, the same argument requires coupled spectral separation, whereas Gaussian smoothing gives a finite-round smoothed variant. A one-dimensional counterexample shows why a gap, smoothing, or regularity condition is necessary.

</details>


### [955] [Post-Deterministic Distributed Systems: A New Foundation for Trustworthy Autonomous Infrastructure](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01722)
*Jun He,Deying Yu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出后确定性分布式系统（PDDS）模型，用于协调确定性代码、随机模型与自主智能体共存的异构环境，并指出经典分布式计算模型仅是其中零歧义的特例。文章定义了五大架构支柱和新的故障分类体系。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统分布式系统假设参与者执行确定性的协议行为，但云控制平面、事故响应系统和金融基础设施中越来越多地引入自主推理引擎、随机模型驱动的智能体和策略驱动型参与者，这些产生分歧推理路径的实体挑战了该假设的普适性。

Method: 提出PDDS模型，将确定性执行视为参与者通用模型的零歧义特例；定义五大架构支柱（协议驱动开发、可验证智能体基础设施、自主状态控制平面、语义仲裁保证、认知状态复制）；扩展一致性模型从数据可见性到知识可见性；建立新的故障分类体系。

Result: 认知状态复制将持久化和一致性模型从数据可见性扩展到知识可见性，支持智能体记忆、可验证语义回滚和跨推理参与者的连贯性。定义了后确定性环境下的新型故障类别。

Conclusion: 确定性执行不再能作为自主基础设施的通用参与者假设，但也不会消失；后确定性分布式系统为异构参与者共存提供了新的研究和工程框架。
