Abstract: For decades, distributed systems have typically assumed that correct participants execute protocol-specified behavior with stable, externally defined, and deterministic semantics. Classical theory has extensively parameterized network timing, communication topologies, and failure domains, but this participant model has remained comparatively fixed. The integration of autonomous reasoning engines, stochastic model-driven agents, and policy-driven actors into cloud control planes, incident response systems, and financial infrastructure challenges the universality of this assumption. These agents often produce divergent reasoning paths, distinct operational traces, and heterogeneous internal representations while achieving semantically equivalent and correct outcomes. In this paper, we introduce Post-Deterministic Distributed Systems (PDDS) as a research and engineering model for coordinating heterogeneous environments where deterministic code, stochastic models, and autonomous agents coexist. We show that classical distributed computing models form a zero-ambiguity special case of this participant-general model. We do not argue that deterministic systems disappear; rather, deterministic execution can no longer serve as the universal participant assumption for autonomous infrastructure. Finally, we outline five architectural pillars of post-deterministic infrastructure: Protocol-Driven Development, Verifiable Agentic Infrastructure, Autonomous State Control Planes, Semantic Quorum Assurance, and Epistemic State Replication. Epistemic State Replication extends persistence and consistency models from data visibility to knowledge visibility, enabling agentic memory, Verifiable Semantic Rollback, and coherence across reasoning participants. We also define a taxonomy of failure classes that arise in this setting.

</details>


### [956] [Shortcut to Nowhere: Demystifying Deep Spurious Regression](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01723)
*Guanrong Xu,Jessica Li,Hao Wang,Yuzhe Yang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文针对回归任务中的虚假相关性问题，定义了深度虚假回归（DSR）问题，并提出利用标签空间和特征空间中虚假属性之间的相似性来校准分布，在多个真实世界数据集上验证了有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有虚假相关性研究主要针对分类任务，而许多现实任务需要连续预测，不存在明确的类别边界或离散的组标签对。本文旨在填补连续预测场景下虚假相关性研究的空白。

Method: 利用虚假属性在标签空间和特征空间中的相似性，通过考虑邻近目标和相关组，同时校准标签和特征分布在各个属性上的差异。

Result: 在计算机视觉、环境感知和大语言模型回归等多个真实世界DSR数据集上，所提策略显著优于现有方法。

Conclusion: 本文定义了DSR问题并提出了有效解决方案，填补了连续预测场景下虚假相关性研究的基准和技术空白。

Abstract: Real-world regression often exhibits shortcuts: attributes that are spuriously correlated with continuous targets in training, yet unreliable under deployment shifts; regressing targets using such shortcuts may fail catastrophically at test time. Existing studies on spurious correlations focus primarily on classification, where labels are categorical and groups are naturally defined. However, many real-world tasks require continuous prediction, where hard label boundaries or discrete group-label pairs do not exist. We define Deep Spurious Regression (DSR) as learning from regression data with attribute-label confounding, addressing continuous spurious correlations, and generalizing to all attribute-label combinations at test time. Motivated by the intrinsic difference between classification and regression shortcuts, we propose to exploit the similarity among spurious attributes in both label and feature spaces, thereby accounting for nearby targets and related groups while calibrating both label and learned feature distributions across attributes. Extensive experiments on common real-world DSR datasets that span computer vision, environmental sensing, and large language model (LLM) regression verify the superior performance of our strategies. Our work fills the gap in benchmarks and techniques for studying spurious correlations in continuous prediction.

</details>


### [957] [Adaptive Auto-Harness: Sustained Self-Improvement for Agentic System Deployment on Open-Ended Task Streams](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01770)
*Zewen Liu,Zhan Shi,Yisi Sang,Bing He,Minhua Lin,Tianxin Wei,Dakuo Wang,Benoit Dumoulin,Wei Jin,Hanqing Lu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出Adaptive Auto-Harness框架，通过状态化多智能体进化器、带路由的解构工具树和人工引导机制，解决在开放任务流中自动优化LLM智能体装备（提示词、技能、工具等）时遇到的性能退化问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有自动装备系统（如A-Evolve、GEPA、Meta-Harness）在固定离线基准上表现良好，但真实部署面临开放任务流：历史无限增长、任务异构、分布漂移，导致单一密集更新的装备变得脆弱，准确率早期达到峰值后下降。需要一种可持续的、任务自适应的装备构建方法。

Method: 1) 将智能体与理想装备的差距分解为进化损失（演化过程不足）和适应损失（任务适配不足）；2) 状态化多智能体进化器保持历史状态持续演化；3) 构建装备树，在求解时动态路由选择最合适的装备；4) 当历史信号不足时，提供人工引导钩子进行干预。

Result: 在预测市场、安全竞赛和事件预测三个任务流上，Adaptive Auto-Harness优于五种现有自动装备基线。消融实验表明，性能提升归因于更好的装备构建、动态路由和针对性的人工引导。

Conclusion: 面向开放任务流的自适应自动装备构建是可行且有效的，代码已开源。

Abstract: Auto-harness systems such as A-Evolve, GEPA, and Meta-Harness improve LLM agents by optimizing prompts, skills, tools, memories, and supporting infrastructure from execution feedback, but they are typically evaluated on fixed offline benchmarks. Real deployments instead present open-ended task streams: histories grow without a fixed endpoint, heterogeneous tasks require different harnesses, and problem distributions shift over time. These challenges make a single repeatedly and densely updated harness brittle, causing performance degradation as accuracy peaks early and then declines. This motivates sustained harness construction with task-wise adaptation. We introduce Adaptive Auto-Harness, a framework and system for such streams. The framework decomposes the gap to an oracle harness into evolution loss and adaptation loss. The system addresses these losses with a stateful multi-agent evolver, a harness tree with solve-time routing, and human-steering hooks for cases where history lacks the needed signal. Across prediction-market, security-competition, and event-forecasting streams, Adaptive Auto-Harness outperforms five existing auto-harness baselines and ablations attribute gains to better construction, routing, or targeted human steering. Code is available in https://github.com/A-EVO-Lab/AdaptiveHarness .

</details>


### [958] [FLARE: Diffusion for Hybrid Language Model](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01774)
*Yuchen Zhu,Jing Shi,Chongjian Ge,Hao Tan,Yiran Xu,Wanrong Zhu,Jason Kuen,Koustava Goswami,Rajiv Jain,Yongxin Chen,Molei Tao,Jiuxiang Gu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: FLARE 是一个针对混合注意力架构 LLM 的系统性转换框架，通过 token 等价的 AR 和扩散联合训练，实现单一模型同时支持自回归验证解码和扩散并行去噪，实验表明其性能与开源扩散语言模型相当，并指出数据质量比损失函数或注意力掩码设计更重要。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自回归 LLM 的序列解码是低延迟部署的关键瓶颈。现有工作分别在高效架构（混合注意力骨干）和并行生成（扩散语言模型）两个方向取得进展，但如何结合两者优势仍面临挑战：AR 转 dLLM 难以保留种子检查点能力，且混合注意力的循环状态和掩码约束增加了扩散训练和推理的难度。

Method: 提出 FLARE 框架，包含三个关键组件：(1) token 等价的 AR 和扩散联合训练目标；(2) 硬件感知的 kernel 优化；(3) 统一推理接口，使单一检查点同时支持 AR 式验证解码和扩散式并行去噪。

Result: FLARE 在多个模型规模上与领先的开源扩散语言模型竞争力相当，在单 GPU 并发服务场景下相比开源 dLLM 基线实现了持续的吞吐量提升。

Conclusion: 实际扩散语言模型的局限性不仅来自解码算法，更受限于迁移数据质量和当前块扩散目标的训练低效性，未来需要联合设计数据、目标函数、架构和推理系统。

Abstract: Autoregressive (AR) large language models (LLMs) have achieved broad practical success, but sequential decoding remains a key bottleneck for low-latency deployment. Recent efficient-inference work has progressed along two axes: reducing the cost of each model invocation through efficient architectures, and reducing serial decoding steps through parallel generation. Hybrid attention backbones address the former, while diffusion language models (dLLMs) pursue the latter via iterative parallel denoising. Combining these advantages remains challenging: AR-to-dLLM conversion often fails to preserve seed-checkpoint capability, and hybrid-attention recurrent states and masking constraints make diffusion training and serving nontrivial. We present FLARE, a systematic conversion framework for hybrid-attention LLMs. Our analysis identifies transfer data quality as the primary determinant of capability preservation, outweighing loss formulation and attention-mask design. The resulting framework combines a token-equal AR-and-diffusion objective, hardware-aware kernels, and unified inference, enabling one checkpoint to support both AR-style verified decoding and diffusion-style parallel denoising. Starting from strong AR checkpoints with limited post-training data, FLARE is competitive with leading open-source dLLMs across model scales and delivers consistent throughput gains over open-source dLLM baselines in single-GPU concurrent serving. Our results further suggest that practical dLLMs are limited not only by decoding algorithms, but also by transfer data quality and the training inefficiency of current block-diffusion objectives, motivating joint design of data, objectives, architectures, and inference systems.

</details>


### [959] [Tree-Guided Identify-Then-Exploit: A Unified Framework of Best Arm Identification and Regret Minimization for Dueling Bandits](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01799)
*Pu Wang,Yao-Xiang Ding*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出TG-ITE，首个统一框架同时解决N臂随机决斗赌博机下的最佳臂识别、弱遗憾和强遗憾三个目标，在Condorcet胜者假设下分别达到O(N)样本复杂度、O(N)弱遗憾和O(N log T)强遗憾，并首次实现BAI与弱遗憾的联合优化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有决斗赌博机研究通常针对最佳臂识别、弱遗憾或强遗憾分别设计专用算法，缺乏统一框架；且BAI方法常需更强假设，弱遗憾和强遗憾的算法也彼此独立。作者希望提出一个统一框架，在不引入额外假设的前提下同时优化这三个目标。

Method: 提出Tree-Guided Identify-Then-Exploit (TG-ITE)框架，包含两个阶段：(1) 共享的树引导识别阶段，通过锦标赛式比较在O(N)次比较内找出高置信度的当前最优臂；(2) 针对不同目标的差异化利用阶段，根据具体目标（BAI、弱遗憾、强遗憾）设计不同的利用策略，充分发挥warm-start阶段的优势。

Result: (1) BAI样本复杂度达到O(N)，无需更强假设；(2) 首个winner-stays风格算法实现O(N)弱遗憾；(3) 强遗憾达到O(N log T)，与专用算法相当；(4) 首次实现BAI与弱遗憾的联合优化，两者均达O(N)保证，消除了现有方法中O(log N)的次优间隙。

Conclusion: 证明了决斗赌博机中最佳臂识别与遗憾最小化之间的权衡相对温和，不同目标可以在统一框架下高效协同优化。

Abstract: We study $N$-armed stochastic dueling bandits under the Condorcet-winner assumption, where three widely adopted objectives are considered: best-arm identification (BAI), weak regret, and strong regret. We propose Tree-Guided Identify-Then-Exploit (TG-ITE), the first unified framework to tackle all these objectives to our knowledge. Without requiring stronger assumptions, we propose a shared tree-guided identification approach to find a high-confidence incumbent within $O(N)$ comparisons. We further propose varied exploitation strategies to utilize this warm-start stage to optimize the specific objectives at hand. This methodology enables our approach to (1) achieve $O(N)$ sample complexity in BAI without commonly adopted stronger assumptions; (2) build the first winner-stays-style algorithm to achieve $O(N)$ weak regret; (3) enjoy the same $O(N \log T)$ guarantee as specialized strong-regret approaches; (4) realize the joint optimization of BAI and weak regret with $O(N)$ guarantees for both, eliminating the sub-optimal gap of $O(\log N)$ in the existing approach. Our results provide evidence that the trade-off between BAI and regret minimization is relatively benign in dueling bandits.

</details>


### [960] [Learning Implicit Bias in Generative Spaces for Accelerating Protein Dynamics Emulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01833)
*Kaihui Cheng,Zhiqiang Cai,Wenkai Xiang,Zhihang Hu,Siyu Zhu,Tzuhsiung Yang,Yuan Qi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了一种历史依赖的生成偏差方法，增强预训练蛋白质动力学模拟器的采样多样性，使长时程轨迹能探索稀有构象状态。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的生成式蛋白质动力学模拟器虽然高效，但受限于训练分布，在长时程外推时倾向于重复访问已知状态，难以达到稀有构象，限制了其在新药发现等领域的应用。

Method: 在预训练生成式模拟器的生成空间中引入隐式的、历史依赖的偏置。具体通过历史感知的评分估计器，对逆向采样过程施加距离加权偏置，使其远离已生成结构，并用环境支撑项进行正则化。同时采用基于评分的精炼步骤将漂移样本重新投影到数据流形上。

Result: 在DynamicPDB-80数据集上多样性提升35%；在12个零样本Fast-Folding蛋白上，仅偏置项即可在约15倍的速度下达到无偏模拟器的覆盖度，结合精炼步骤后速度提升约37倍，覆盖的低能态数量约为3倍。

Conclusion: 该方法有效克服了生成式模拟器在长时程下探索能力不足的问题，显著提升了构象多样性和稀有状态覆盖效率，具有良好的可扩展性和实用性。

Abstract: Generative emulators of protein dynamics produce plausible trajectories at a fraction of the cost of molecular dynamics, but they inherit their training distribution and tend to revisit known states rather than reach rare ones under long-horizon extrapolation. Inspired by classical enhanced sampling, we introduce an implicit, history-dependent bias in the generative space of a pretrained emulator. Specifically, a history-aware score estimator augments the frozen emulator with a distance-weighted bias that steers reverse-time sampling away from previously generated structures, regularized by an environment-support term. To preserve structural validity at long horizons, a score-based refinement step re-projects drifted samples onto the data manifold using the frozen emulator. Our experiments demonstrate that the method (i) raises diversity by $35\%$ on DynamicPDB-80; (ii) on $12$ zero-shot Fast-Folding proteins, the learned bias alone reaches the unbiased emulator's coverage up to ${\sim}15\times$ faster, and pairing it with refinement reaches the coverage up to ${\sim}37\times$ faster while covering ${\sim}3\times$ as many low-energy states. Code will be released soon.

</details>


### [961] [ContinuousBench: Can Differentially Private Synthetic Text Improve Capabilities?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01849)
*Peihan Liu,Lucas Rosenblatt,Weiwei Kong,Natalia Ponomareva,Gautam Kamath,Rachel Cummings,Roxana Geambasu,Yu Gan,Lillian Tsai,Alex Bie*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: ContinuousBench是一个持续更新的基准测试，用于评估差分隐私合成文本是否能真正传递训练语料库中的新知识。实验发现，非隐私合成能有效传递知识，而最先进的DP合成方法即使在ε=100时也基本失败。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有DP文本合成评估使用近乎无需训练即可解决的基准任务，因此无法验证DP合成数据是否能替代原始数据访问并传递真正的新知识。

Method: 构建ContinuousBench基准，每季度发布一对从未见过的训练语料库和派生QA集（不可无语料解决且可在DP下学习）。包含两个轨道：程序生成的虚构生物数据集Geminon和新爬取的新闻文章流News。研究者从训练语料生成DP合成数据，并通过标准化训练和评估框架测量知识增益。

Result: 非隐私合成能有效从原始语料传递实质知识；但最先进的DP合成方法即使在ε=100时也基本无法传递知识。

Conclusion: 现有DP合成方法在传递语料库特有知识方面能力不足，标准基准已接近饱和但无法反映真实能力差距，ContinuousBench为评估DP合成数据价值提供了更严格的测试。

Abstract: Differentially private (DP) text synthesis promises to unlock sensitive corpora for model training, but it remains unclear whether DP synthetic data transmits genuinely new knowledge and capabilities present only in those corpora. This is because existing evaluations rely on tasks that are nearly solvable without training, so strong benchmark performance does not establish that DP synthesis can substitute original data access. Thus, we introduce ContinuousBench, a continuously and automatically-regenerated benchmark that measures capability gain from DP synthetic text. Each quarter, a new release pairs a never-before-seen training corpus with a derived QA set, constructed to be: (1) unsolvable sans-corpus; and (2) learnable under DP, as the tested knowledge is supported by hundreds of independent records. Researchers produce DP synthetic data from the training corpus and run our standardized training and evaluation harness on their synthetic data to measure gains. We instantiate two tracks: Geminon, a procedurally-generated dataset about fictional creatures; and News, a stream of newly crawled public news articles. Although standard benchmarks are nearly saturated, on ContinuousBench we find that non-private synthesis transfers substantial knowledge from the original corpus, while state-of-the-art DP synthesis methods generally fail to do so, even at $\varepsilon=100$.

</details>


### [962] [Mos-Gen: A Generative Molecular Framework for Mosquito Insecticide Design](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01846)
*Lina Wang,Yaning Cui*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出Mos-Gen框架，一种结合预训练分子表示模型Uni-Mol与变分自编码器的基序感知生成协作框架，用于从头设计含二硫键的大蒜素衍生物作为蚊虫杀虫剂。实验验证中，预测阳性化合物的命中率达78%，预测阴性均无活性，验证了框架的高精度筛选能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统化学杀虫剂的长期使用导致严重耐药性问题，急需开发新型高效且生态可持续的替代品。现有AI方法仅聚焦于活性预测和分类，缺乏从头生成新颖分子骨架的能力。

Method: 提出Mos-Gen框架，将预训练分子表示模型Uni-Mol与变分自编码器(VAE)耦合，采用基序感知的生成式协作策略，专为设计含二硫键的大蒜素衍生物蚊虫杀虫剂而定制。

Result: 从生成候选物中选出14个化合物（9个预测阳性+5个预测阴性）进行合成与实验验证。预测阳性命中率达78%，而预测阴性均无蚊虫杀灭活性。

Conclusion: 实验结果充分验证了Mos-Gen框架的高精度筛选能力，为蚊虫杀虫剂的从头分子设计提供了有效的新途径。

Abstract: Mosquito-borne infectious diseases cause more than 700000 deaths worldwide each year. The long-term use of conventional chemical insecticides has induced serious resistance problems, creating an urgent need to develop novel, highly effective, and ecologically sustainable alternatives. While existing artificial intelligence approaches in this domain have focused primarily on activity prediction and classification, they leave a critical gap in the de~novo generation of novel molecular scaffolds. In this study, we propose Mos-Gen, a motif-aware generative collaborative framework that couples the pretrained molecular representation model Uni-Mol with a variational autoencoder (VAE), specifically tailored for the design of disulfide-containing allicin derivatives as mosquito insecticides. Among the generated candidates, fourteen compounds -- comprising nine predicted positives and five predicted negatives -- were selected for chemical synthesis and experimental validation. The hit rate among the predicted positives reached 78%, whereas none of the predicted negatives exhibited mosquitocidal activity. These experimental results fully validated the high-precision screening capability of the Mos-Gen framework.

</details>


### [963] [HMPO: Hybrid Median-length Policy Optimization for Chain-of-Thought Compression](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01934)
*Minghui Zheng,Hongxu Chen,Huimin Ren,Hongsheng Xin,Xiaoyang Qu,Ze Wang,Shuling Yang,Ziyu Peng,Kaike Zhang,Pan Zhou,Kun Zhan*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出HMPO，一种单阶段强化学习框架，通过自适应中位数预算、余弦衰减令牌奖励和乘法奖励公式，高效压缩思维链推理，在9B到122B模型上实现19%-46%令牌压缩且精度几乎无损。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大语言模型通过长思维链推理获得优异性能，但推理开销巨大。现有压缩方法存在手动长度预算不灵活、多阶段训练成本高、可扩展性差等问题。

Method: 提出HMPO框架，包含三个核心组件：基于成功轨迹的自适应中位数预算、余弦衰减令牌奖励、乘法奖励公式（优先保证答案正确性），采用单阶段强化学习训练。

Result: 在数学、代码、科学、指令跟随等任务上，从9B到122B参数（包括密集和MoE架构）的实验中，实现19%-46%令牌压缩，准确率几乎无下降，训练成本远低于多阶段基线方法。

Conclusion: HMPO是一种高效、可扩展的CoT压缩方法，仅用数学数据训练即可泛化到多种任务，显著降低推理和训练成本。

Abstract: Large language models achieve remarkable performance via extended chain-of-thought (CoT) reasoning, yet this lengthy process incurs substantial inference overhead. Existing CoT compression methods struggle with inflexible manual length budgets, computationally expensive multi-stage training pipelines, and fragile scalability restricted to small models. We propose HMPO (Hybrid Median-length Policy Optimization), a cost-effective, single-stage reinforcement learning framework. HMPO efficiently compresses CoT via three synergistic components: an adaptive median-based budget derived from successful rollouts to eliminate manual tuning, a cosine-decay token reward for smooth length penalization, and a multiplicative reward formulation that substantially mitigates trivial reward hacking by strictly prioritizing answer correctness. Trained exclusively on mathematical data, HMPO generalizes seamlessly across math, code, science, and instruction-following tasks. Extensive experiments scaling from 9B to 122B parameters across dense and Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) architectures demonstrate that HMPO achieves 19%--46% token compression with negligible accuracy degradation, all while drastically reducing training costs compared to existing multi-stage baselines.

</details>


### [964] [A Theoretical Framework for Self-Play Theorem Proving Algorithms](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01861)
*Thomas Chen,Zhiyuan Li*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文为定理证明中的自对弈算法提供了理论框架，形式化定理图为连通图，证明可逆随机游走能指数级扩展可证定理集，并提出基于扩散相似性的多样化猜想算法及对比学习实现方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自对弈算法在基于LLM的定理证明中展现出良好实证效果，但缺乏理论理解，特别是猜想器倾向于生成复杂非基础定理的问题尚未被理论分析。

Method: 将定理集形式化为图结构（节点为定理，边为语义相似关系），引入原始假设刻画证明器保证和猜想器对图结构的访问能力；设计基于可逆随机游走的猜想算法；提出基于扩散相似性的多样性度量及局部最大化算法；利用对比学习将节点嵌入欧氏空间并通过内积计算扩散相似性。

Result: 证明若定理图良好连通，可逆随机游走猜想算法能使可证定理集指数级增长；提出多样性度量可缓解猜想器生成非基础复杂定理的问题；扩散相似性可通过对比学习嵌入内积高效计算。

Conclusion: 该理论框架解释了自对弈在定理证明中自我改进的能力，并为设计更有效的猜想算法提供了理论基础和实用方法。

Abstract: Self-play, a type of training algorithm that enables a model to self-improve, has recently shown promising empirical results in the context of formal theorem proving using Large Language Models (LLMs). (Dong & Ma, 2025) instantiate self-play with two cooperating agents: a prover, which proves theorems, and a conjecturer, which generates new theorems as a curriculum to the prover. In this paper, we provide a theoretical framework for understanding the self-improvement capabilities of self-play algorithms for theorem proving. First, we formalize the set of theorems as a graph, with nodes as theorems and edges between pairs of theorems with similar semantics. We introduce a set of primitive assumptions that characterize the guarantees of a trained prover and how a conjecturer can access the structure of the graph. Second, we show that if the underlying graph of theorems is well-connected, then a prover-conjecturer system, where the conjecturing algorithm is based on a reversible random walk, is sufficient to grow the set of proved theorems exponentially. Third, motivated by an issue encountered empirically by self-play algorithms, where the conjecturer tends to generate artificially complex and non-fundamental theorems, we propose a diversity measure for a training distribution of theorems generated by a conjecturer and an improved conjecturing algorithm that locally maximizes this diversity measure, by computing the diffusion similarity between neighboring theorems in the theorem graph. Finally, we describe a method to compute the diffusion similarity by using contrastive learning to embed nodes into Euclidean space and then computing the inner-product between embeddings.

</details>


### [965] [Continual Learning as a Multiphase Moving-Boundary Problem](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01863)
*Snigdha Chandan Khilar*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: Stefan-CL通过物理相变中的熔化概念，将知识固化为"固态"、未用容量保持"液态"，利用"潜热"调节边界扩展，在不存储原始数据的情况下，将遗忘率降至接近零，优雅解决了持续学习中的稳定性-可塑性困境。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 持续学习中存在稳定性-可塑性困境：既要保留旧知识（稳定性），又要吸收新任务（可塑性）。现有方法难以同时兼顾，尤其是希望在不存储原始数据（减轻内存负担）的前提下实现低遗忘率。

Method: 借鉴物理学中的熔化与相变思想：将已巩固的知识视为受保护的"固态"，未使用的容量视为可适应的"液态"。通过"潜热"（latent heat）作为调控旋钮，控制固态-液态边界的扩展，数学上"冻结"已学习的内核区域。

Result: 遗忘率降至接近零（near zero），性能与需要存储原始数据的内存重放基线方法相当，但无需存储原始数据。

Conclusion: Stefan-CL提供了一条物理启发式的优雅路径，用于解决持续学习中的核心矛盾，兼具高保留率与低存储需求。

Abstract: Continual learning struggles to balance retaining past knowledge with absorbing new tasks. Stefan-CL elegantly resolves this stability-plasticity dilemma through the physics of melting. It frames consolidated knowledge as a protected "solid" and unused capacity as an adaptable "liquid." As the network learns, this boundary expands, governed by a "latent heat" tuning dial. By mathematically freezing the learned interior, Stefan-CL cuts forgetting to near zero, matching memory-heavy baselines without storing raw data, forging a beautiful, physics-grounded path for AI.

</details>


### [966] [OpenWebRL: Demystifying Online Multi-turn Reinforcement Learning for Visual Web Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02031)
*Rui Yang,Qianhui Wu,Yuxi Chen,Hao Bai,Wenlin Yao,Hao Cheng,Baolin Peng,Huan Zhang,Tong Zhang,Jianfeng Gao*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出OpenWebRL，一个用于在真实网站上通过在线多轮强化学习训练视觉Web智能体的开源框架。仅用少量数据（0.4K初始化轨迹+2.2K RL任务），训练的4B模型在多个基准上达到开源SOTA，与闭源系统（如OpenAI CUA）竞争。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有视觉Web智能体高度依赖大量人工标注的轨迹数据进行监督微调，数据收集成本高昂且静态数据集难以覆盖动态变化的开放网络环境；而在线RL在视觉Web智能体上的潜力尚未被充分探索。

Method: 构建了完整的在线多轮RL训练流程，包括：可扩展的实时浏览器基础设施、监督初始化、多模态上下文管理、轨迹级成功判定、高效的多轮策略优化。

Result: OpenWebRL-4B在Online-Mind2Web上达到67.0%成功率，在DeepShop上达到64.0%成功率，超越同类或更大规模的开源智能体，与OpenAI CUA和Gemini CUA等闭源系统竞争。

Conclusion: 在线RL为训练视觉Web智能体提供了一条实用、可复现且成本高效的路径，其关键设计选择和RL如何提升智能体推理能力值得深入分析。

Abstract: Building capable visual web agents requires long-horizon reasoning, precise grounding, and robust interaction with dynamic real-world websites. Despite rapid progress, the strongest systems remain largely proprietary, while open agents still depend heavily on supervised post-training over large collections of curated web trajectories. This dependence creates a major scalability bottleneck: high-quality demonstrations are expensive to collect, and static datasets offer limited coverage of the diverse, ever-changing open web. Although online RL has shown promise for text-based agents, its potential for training visual web agents directly on live websites remains largely underexplored. In this paper, we introduce OpenWebRL, an open framework for training visual web agents with online multi-turn RL on real websites. OpenWebRL covers the full training pipeline, including scalable live-browser infrastructure, supervised initialization, multimodal context management, trajectory-level success judging, and efficient multi-turn policy optimization. Using this framework, we train OpenWebRL-4B, which establishes a new open-source state of the art on challenging live-web benchmarks. With only 0.4K initialization trajectories and 2.2K open-ended RL training tasks, OpenWebRL-4B achieves 67.0% success on Online-Mind2Web and 64.0% on DeepShop, outperforming prior open agents of similar or larger scale and remaining competitive with proprietary systems including OpenAI CUA and Gemini CUA. Beyond strong benchmark performance, we systematically study the key design choices that make online RL effective for visual web agents, and analyze how RL improves agentic reasoning. Overall, our work offers a practical path toward building more capable, reproducible, and cost-efficient open web agents. We will release our training data, models, and code to support future research.

</details>


### [967] [Task-Induced Representational Invariances Depend on Learning Objective in Deep RL](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01868)
*Manu Srinath Halvagal,Sebastian Lee,SueYeon Chung*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文通过MDP约简理论分析深度强化学习表示，发现基于值的方法（DQN）学习MDP同态不变表示，而策略梯度方法（PPO）学习动作对称不变表示，且这些差异影响迁移学习并在LLM中表现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 深度强化学习在神经科学中作为动物目标导向行为的模型，但其学习到的抽象表示缺乏理论理解，阻碍了模型与动物学习的直接比较。

Method: 运用MDP约简理论，在导航任务中分析经典RL算法（DQN和PPO）学习到的表示，并扩展到其他领域和LLM中验证。

Result: 性能相当时，DQN学到MDP同态对称不变表示，PPO学到动作对称不变表示；这些差异在不同领域一致出现，影响迁移学习，在LLM中与提示方式相关。

Conclusion: 提供了一种比较不同RL算法学习表示的理论框架，具有实际应用价值，并为大脑神经编码研究提供可能洞见。

Abstract: Reinforcement Learning (RL) has long served as a model for goal-directed animal behavior in neuroscience. Modern deep RL has shown remarkable success across many domains, further strengthening this connection. The ability to learn abstract representations of high-dimensional state spaces underlies much of this success. However, theoretical understanding of these learned representations remains limited, hindering direct comparisons between models and animal learning. We address this gap by analyzing deep RL representations through the lens of MDP reduction theory. Investigating canonical RL algorithms in a navigation task, we find that even when performance is comparable, the value-based method (DQN) learns representations that are invariant to MDP homomorphism symmetries, while the policy-gradient method (PPO) learns representations invariant to action symmetries. These differences emerge consistently across domains, have downstream consequences for transfer learning, and appear in LLMs in a prompt-dependent manner. Our findings provide a principled approach to comparing learned representations across RL algorithms, with demonstrated practical implications and possible insights for neural coding in the brain.

</details>


### [968] [G2LoRA: Gradient Orthogonal Low-Rank Adaptation Framework for Graph Continual Learning on Text-Attributed Graphs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01873)
*Yuhan Wang,Yibo Ding,Yutong Ye,Mufan Zhao,Wenbo Zhang,Ruijie Wang,Jianxin Li*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出G2LoRA框架，解决LLM-as-Aligner模型在文本属性图上的持续学习问题。该框架通过统一的图-文本对齐目标、类别感知梯度投影和梯度幅度调制，有效缓解了灾难性遗忘和跨模态漂移，在多个基准数据集上取得最优性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM-as-Aligner模型在顺序微调流式任务时存在严重的灾难性遗忘问题，现有参数高效微调方法不足以解决任务干扰和无效知识迁移。

Method: 提出G2LoRA框架：(1) 将节点级、链接级和图级任务统一为单一图-文本对齐目标；(2) 类别感知梯度投影在结构化子空间中解决冲突更新；(3) 梯度幅度调制协调图编码器和文本编码器的更新速率，防止跨模态漂移。

Result: 在多个基准数据集上，G2LoRA在不同骨干架构下持续优于强基线方法，展现出卓越的持续学习性能和可迁移性。

Conclusion: G2LoRA通过统一目标、梯度投影和幅度调制，有效平衡了前向与后向知识流动，实现了任务干扰最小化和正迁移最大化。

Abstract: LLM-as-Aligner has emerged as a prevalent pre-training paradigm for Text-Attributed Graphs(TAGS), aligning graph and text modalities into a shared embedding space via CLIP-style contrastive learning. While effective on individual downstream tasks, we observe severe catastrophic forgetting when such models are sequentially fine-tuned on streaming tasks. Although parameter-efficient fine-tuning alleviates forgetting to some extent, it remains insufficient to resolve task interference and ineffective knowledge transfer. In this work, we study graph continual learning for LLM-as-Aligner models on TAGs, with the goal of mitigating interference while promoting positive transfer across tasks. This setting introduces two fundamental challenges: (1) heterogeneous downstream tasks induce shifting optimization objectives, hindering unified fine-tuning; and (2) graph and text encoders exhibit different sensitivities to adaptation, making uncoordinated updates prone to misalignment. To address these challenges, we propose G2LoRA, a continual learning framework for TAGs. G2LoRA unifies node-, link-, and graph-level tasks under a single graph--text alignment objective, and enables consistent optimization across domain/class/task incremental modes. To reduce task interference while encouraging positive transfer, G2LoRA performs category-aware gradient projection in structured subspaces, resolving conflicting updates and enabling conditional backward transfer to balance forward and backward knowledge flow. To further prevent cross-modal drift, G2LoRA introduces gradient magnitude modulation to coordinate update rates between graph and text encoders. Extensive experiments on benchmark datasets demonstrate that G2LoRA consistently outperforms strong baselines across different backbone architectures, achieving superior continual performance and transferability.

</details>


### [969] [Beyond the Simplex: Balanced Prototype Geometry for Scorer-Agnostic Open-Set Recognition](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01883)
*Mayank Sharma,Rohit Kumar Mourya*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文对基于单纯形的开集识别方法进行了理论分析，证明了平衡等范数编码在任意嵌入维度下的性质，并揭示了原型在一维距离对称性上的二分现象。实验表明原型几何结构有用，但OSR性能更依赖于评分规则。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 开集识别要求在安全关键场景（如医学影像）中拒绝未见类别的输入。基于单纯形的方法虽然经验表现良好，但缺乏理论依据，且现有分析仅适用于嵌入维度d ≥ C-1的情况，无法覆盖更广泛的d < C-1场景。

Method: 1）提出平衡等范数编码（balanced equal-norm codes）的概念，适用于所有d ≥ 2；2）证明辅助平方比率评分的子水平集是欧几里得球的精确并集；3）揭示原型在d ≥ C-1时达到一距离对称性，d < C-1时存在由显式缺陷参数控制的退化；4）理论证明假接受率随维度d指数衰减，操作评分全局Lipschitz且接受区域紧致。

Result: 在CIFAR和MedMNIST数据集上，平衡原型几何结构提供了有用结构，但原始比率评分通常不如近邻和基于logit的替代方案。假接受率在自然各向同性假设下随维度d指数衰减。

Conclusion: 平衡原型几何作为分析工具和表示学习先验是有价值的，并非独立的SOTA检测器。OSR性能高度依赖于评分规则的选择，原始比率评分在实际应用中表现欠佳。

Abstract: Open-set recognition (OSR) requires a classifier to reject inputs from unseen classes which is essential in safety-critical settings such as medical imaging. Simplex based methods, which fix class prototypes at the vertices of a regular simplex and then reject via a distance-ratio score, perform well empirically but lack theoretical justification, and existing analysis applies only when the embedding dimension d is at least C-1, which is the regime in which a regular simplex exists.
  We give a theoretical account of simplex-ratio OSR that holds in every embedding dimension, including d < C-1. Our analysis centers on balanced equal-norm codes: prototype configurations with equal lengths and zero sum, which exist for all d >= 2 and include the regular simplex as a special case. For these codes we show that an auxiliary squared ratio score has sublevel sets that are exact unions of Euclidean balls, which in turn bracket the acceptance region of the operational score; and we prove a sharp dichotomy: the prototypes attain one-distance symmetry, behaving like a regular simplex, if and only if d >= C-1, with controlled degradation governed by an explicit defect parameter below that threshold. We further show the false-acceptance rate decays exponentially in d under natural isotropy assumptions, and that the operational score is globally Lipschitz with compact acceptance regions.
  Empirically, we study balanced prototype geometry as both an analytic tool and a representation-learning prior, rather than as a stand-alone state-of-the-art detector. Across CIFAR and MedMNIST open-set splits, the geometry provides useful structure, but OSR performance remains strongly dependent on the scoring rule: raw ratio scores typically underperform nearest-neighbor and logit-based alternatives.

</details>


### [970] [Segment-driven Structural Induction and Semantic Alignment for Heterogeneous Tabular Representation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01890)
*Woojun Jung,Susik Yoon*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: NAVI是一个以片段为中心的预训练框架，通过掩码段建模和熵驱动段对齐，处理异构表格中标题-值对的语义耦合与对齐，在异构表上提升了重建、语义一致性和下游任务表现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现实领域的异构表格中，表头各异但底层属性语义共享，现有编码器未能充分利用列级值分布，且对所有属性应用统一的训练目标，忽略了不同语义角色的差异。

Method: 提出NAVI框架，以每个标题-值对为基本单元，聚合模式级别的结构证据和列级别的分布证据；通过Masked Segment Modeling和Entropy-driven Segment Alignment实现结构化标题-值耦合与语义对齐，覆盖稳定属性和实例特定属性。

Result: 在异构域内表格上，NAVI在重建质量、语义一致性和下游任务实用性方面均有提升。

Conclusion: NAVI通过片段级建模有效处理了异构表格的语义对齐挑战，验证了标题-值对作为基本单元的有效性。

Abstract: Real-world domains often contain heterogeneous tables whose headers vary while their underlying attribute semantics are shared, making it difficult to induce domain-specialized semantics from table-local evidence alone. Existing encoders model parts of this problem, but often underuse column-level value distributions and apply uniform objectives across attributes with different semantic roles. We propose NAVI, a segment-centric pretraining framework that treats each header-value pair as the unit for aggregating schema-level structural evidence and column-level distributional evidence. We realize this design through Masked Segment Modeling and Entropy-driven Segment Alignment, which jointly enforce structured header-value coupling and semantic alignment across stable and instance-specific attributes. Experiments on heterogeneous in-domain tables show improved reconstruction, semantic consistency, and downstream utility across evaluation settings overall.

</details>


### [971] [Private and Stable Test-Time Adaptation with Differential Privacy](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01908)
*Zefeng Li,Qiaoyue Tang,Mathias Lecuyer,Evan Shelhamer*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文首次将差分隐私（DP）引入测试时自适应（TTA）领域，通过对多种主流TTA方法（如Tent、EATA等）应用每样本梯度裁剪和高斯噪声，在ImageNet-C上实现了隐私保护与准确率的平衡，并发现DP的裁剪机制甚至能提升持续自适应的准确率和稳定性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: TTA在推理时更新模型，但模型参数会依赖于所有历史测试数据，这带来了隐私泄露风险。现有TTA方法未考虑该隐私问题，因此作者希望将差分隐私引入TTA以控制隐私风险。

Method: 将Tent、EATA、SAR、DeYO和COME五种TTA方法改造成差分隐私形式（DP-TTA），核心操作为每样本梯度裁剪和添加高斯噪声，在保持模型更新的同时限制单个样本的影响。

Result: 在ImageNet-C上，DP-TTA方法在提供足够隐私保护的同时仅带来较小的准确率损失；在低隐私预算下，梯度裁剪甚至能提升持续自适应的准确率和稳定性；计算开销也相对较低。

Conclusion: 这篇开创性工作引起了学界对TTA隐私问题的关注，为开发更隐私友好的测试时更新方法提供了指导，同时表明每样本裁剪是提升自适应准确率和稳定性的有效技术。

Abstract: Test-time adaptation (TTA) can reduce error on new and different data by updating the model on these inputs during inference. However, these updates raise the issue of privacy w.r.t. the testing data, because the model parameters now depend on all past inputs. To control this privacy risk, we cast multiple popular TTA methods (Tent, EATA, SAR, DeYO, and COME) into differential privacy (DP) forms that apply per-sample gradient clipping and Gaussian noise for all updates. On ImageNet-C, our DP-TTA methods provide adequate privacy at small cost to accuracy, and in the low-privacy regime the clipping mechanism of DP can even improve the accuracy and stability of adaptation in the continual setting. These improvements to privacy and accuracy come at only modest computational overhead. These first results on private TTA raise awareness of the issue, inform the development of more private test-time updates, and identify per-sample clipping as an effective technique for improving the accuracy and stability of adaptation.

</details>


### [972] [Randomized Least Squares Value Iteration itself is Joint Differentially Private](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01952)
*Haiyang Lu,Pratik Gajane,Shaojie Bai,Mohammad Sadegh Talebi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了在强化学习（RL）中，随机探索算法（如RLSVI）如何在保护隐私的同时进行有效探索。作者证明RLSVI在表格型MDP中天然满足联合差分隐私，并给出了具体的隐私损失上界。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着RL应用于医疗、推荐系统等敏感领域，保护用户隐私变得至关重要。现有工作缺乏对随机探索算法与隐私保护之间内在联系的理论分析。

Method: 通过理论分析，重新审视RLSVI的噪声机制，证明其用于探索的随机噪声同时起到了隐私保护的作用，推导出在表格型MDP下的联合差分隐私界。

Result: 证明RLSVI在表格型MDP中是$(\varepsilon(δ),δ)$-联合差分隐私的，其中$\varepsilon(δ) = \frac{2AK}{H^2\log(2HSA)} + 2\sqrt{\frac{2AK\log(1/δ)}{H^2\log(2HSA)}}$。

Conclusion: 随机探索算法中的固有噪声可以同时提供隐私保障，为设计隐私保护的RL算法提供了新视角，减少了额外隐私预算的消耗。

Abstract: As reinforcement learning (RL) increasingly applies to sensitive domains, such as health care and recommendation systems, privacy-preserving techniques have become essential to protect users' sensitive information. We investigate privacy-preserving RL under an episodic setting, focusing on algorithms based on randomized exploration, such as Randomized Least Squares Value Iteration (RLSVI). The overall goal is to study how randomized exploration interacts with the injected noise required by privacy mechanisms. In this work, we show a new privacy analysis that characterizes how the noise in RLSVI set for exploration simultaneously provides privacy protection. Specifically, we prove that RLSVI is $(\varepsilon(δ),δ)$-joint differentially private in tabular MDP as is with $\varepsilon(δ) = \frac{2AK}{H^2\log(2HSA)} + 2\sqrt{\frac{2AK\log(1/δ)}{H^2\log(2HSA)}}$, where $S$ and $A$ are the number of states and actions respectively, $H$ is the length of an episode and $K$ is the number of episodes.

</details>


### [973] [Flow-Transformed Implicit Processes for Function-Space Variational Inference](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01954)
*Luis A. Ortega,Andrés R. Masegosa,Thomas D. Nielsen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出FTIP方法，使用归一化流替代高斯分布作为组合权重的变分分布，结合Black-Box α目标进行训练，从而在函数空间中捕捉非对称、重尾和多模态的后验不确定性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 隐过程先验在贝叶斯函数空间建模中很有吸引力，但后验推断困难。现有方法使用高斯分布近似组合权重，限制了后验不确定性的表达能力，尤其在真实后验非对称、重尾或多模态时表现不佳。

Method: 提出Flow-Transformed Implicit Processes (FTIP)，用归一化流（normalizing flow）替代高斯分布作为有限函数样本组合权重的变分分布，并使用Black-Box α散度目标进行优化，支持质量覆盖和众数搜索两种变分行为。

Result: 实验表明，FTIP能够捕捉函数空间中的非对称和多模态后验结构，而传统高斯系数近似会导致这些结构被平滑或坍塌。

Conclusion: FTIP通过归一化流增强了有限维函数空间近似的表达能力，在保持可优化性的同时显著提升了后验不确定性建模的灵活性。

Abstract: Implicit-process priors define distributions over functions through flexible generative mechanisms, making them attractive for Bayesian function-space modelling. However, performing posterior inference with such priors is challenging because their induced function-space distributions are typically not available in closed form. One practical strategy is to approximate the prior using a finite collection of sampled functions, and then represent posterior functions as learned combinations of these samples. Existing approaches commonly place a Gaussian variational distribution over the combination weights. While tractable, this choice limits the shapes of posterior uncertainty that can be represented, especially when the true posterior is asymmetric, heavy-tailed, or multimodal. We propose Flow-Transformed Implicit Processes (FTIP), a variational inference method that makes this finite-dimensional function-space approximation more expressive. Instead of using a Gaussian distribution over the combination weights, FTIP uses a normalizing flow to define a richer variational distribution. This induces a flexible posterior distribution over functions while preserving tractable optimization. We train the model using a Black-Box α objective, allowing us to compare mass-covering and mode-seeking variational behaviour. Experiments show that FTIP captures asymmetric and multimodal posterior structure in function space that Gaussian coefficient approximations tend to smooth or collapse.

</details>


### [974] [A Local Perturbation Theory for Cross-Domain Interference and Recovery in Multi-Domain RL](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02398)
*Lei Yang,Siyu Ding,Deyi Xiong*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文发现多领域RL后训练中，单领域训练产生稀疏、小幅度的参数编辑，不同领域共享活跃计算路径，冲突主要发生在低维共享子空间。通过领域刷新可恢复受损性能，理论分析验证了二阶损伤项是主要干扰来源。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的解释（灾难性遗忘、全局梯度冲突）不足以说明多领域RL训练中的干扰现象，因为即使全模型梯度近似正交时仍存在显著干扰。需要更精细的机制性理解。

Method: (1) 实证分析单领域RL产生的参数编辑稀疏性及神经元重叠程度；(2) 建立局部扰动模型，证明多领域RL中后训练领域主要通过二阶损伤项损害先前领域；(3) 提出领域刷新机制及稀疏代理冲突坐标集的免训练回滚方法。

Result: 在Code→Math→QA→CW顺序训练后，通过简短Re-Math刷新将Math性能从57.66恢复至66.04，同时保持其他领域性能，平均分达66.39。免训练回滚方法也在代理坐标层面验证了局部化损伤。

Conclusion: 多领域RL中的干扰和恢复存在可解释的局部化机制，冲突集中在低维共享子空间，领域刷新能有效选择性地恢复受损性能而附带损害有限。

Abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) post-training improves large language models (LLMs) on individual domains such as mathematical reasoning, code generation, question answering, and creative writing (CW), but training on one domain often degrades performance on others. Existing explanations based on catastrophic forgetting or global gradient conflict are incomplete: substantial interference can occur even when full-model gradients are nearly orthogonal. We show that single-domain RL produces sparse, small-magnitude parameter edits with weak overlap among top-changed neurons, while different domains still share substantial active computation routes on which update directions determine whether they act synergistically or conflict. Guided by this observation, we prove under a local perturbation model of multi-domain RL that later-domain training harms an earlier domain mainly through a second-order damage term, which under the observed sparse route structure concentrates in a low-dimensional shared conflict subspace. Moreover, a short domain refresh contracts the harmful component on this subspace, enabling selective recovery with limited collateral damage. Consistent with the theory, a brief Re-Math refresh after Code $\rightarrow$ Math $\rightarrow$ QA $\rightarrow$ CW recovers Math from 57.66 to 66.04 while largely preserving performance on the other domains, yielding the best average score of 66.39. Beyond refresh, a training-free rollback on a sparse proxy conflict coordinate set for the Math-QA pair partially restores Math, providing direct proxy-level evidence for localized damage. These results provide a localized mechanistic account of interference and recovery in multi-domain RL.

</details>


### [975] [A Closer Look at In-Distribution vs. Out-of-Distribution Accuracy for Open-Set Test-time Adaptation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01973)
*Zefeng Li,Evan Shelhamer*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文系统评估了开放集测试时自适应（TTA）方法在分布内（InD）识别与分布外（OOD）检测之间的权衡，发现现有方法难以同时兼顾两者，并提出了基于sigmoid/多标签输出的新基线来探索这种平衡。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有开放集TTA方法主要关注已知类别的分布内准确率，而对未知类别（OOD）的检测能力研究不足，缺乏系统的评估与基准。

Method: 在CIFAR-10-C和ImageNet-C基准上，评估了SAR、OSTTA、UniEnt、SoTTA等方法；构建了不同近远距离的OOD数据集；提出了sigmoid/多标签输出替代softmax/多类输出的基线方法。

Result: 当前开放集TTA方法在InD准确率和OOD拒绝之间难以平衡；它们对OOD数据的过滤不完善；OOD数据的比例和出现率变化会影响性能。

Conclusion: 首次揭示了现有开放集TTA方法在InD与OOD之间的权衡困境，提出的sigmoid/多标签基线为未来研究提供了新方向。

Abstract: Open-set test-time adaptation (TTA) updates models on new data in the presence of input shifts and unknown output classes. While recent methods have made progress on improving in-distribution (InD) accuracy for known classes, their ability to accurately detect out-of-distribution (OOD) unknown classes remains underexplored. We benchmark robust and open-set TTA methods (SAR, OSTTA, UniEnt, and SoTTA) on the standard corruption benchmarks of CIFAR-10-C at the small scale and ImageNet-C at the large scale. For CIFAR-10-C, we use OOD data from SVHN and CIFAR-100 in their respective corrupted forms of SVHN-C and CIFAR-100-C. For ImageNet-C, we use OOD data from ImageNet-O and Textures in their respective corrupted forms of ImageNet-O-C and Textures-C. ImageNet-O is nearer to ImageNet, as unknown but related object classes (like ''garlic bread'' vs. ''hot dog'' for food, or ''highway'' vs. ''dam'' for infrastructure), while Textures is farther from ImageNet, as non-object patterns (like ''cracked'' mud, ''porous'' sponge, ''veined'' leaves). We evaluate the accuracy and confidence of TTA methods for InD vs. OOD recognition on CIFAR-10-C and ImageNet-C. We verify the accuracy of each method's own OOD detection technique on CIFAR-10-C. We also evaluate on ImageNet-C and report both accuracy and standard OOD detection metrics. We further examine more realistic settings, in which the proportions and rates of OOD data can vary. To explore the trade-off between InD recognition and OOD rejection, we propose a new baseline that replaces softmax/multi-class output with sigmoid/multi-label output. Our analysis shows for the first time that current open-set TTA methods struggle to balance InD and OOD accuracy and that they only imperfectly filter OOD data for their own adaptation updates.

</details>


### [976] [Why Do Time Series Models Need Long Context Windows?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01999)
*Luca Butera,Giovanni De Felice,Andrea Cini,Cesare Alippi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文重新审视了长观测窗口对时间序列预测的好处，提出这不仅是捕获长程依赖，更是通过降低数据生成过程的不确定性来提升预测精度。作者证明即使对于有限记忆过程，也需要超长输入窗口才能达到最优误差，并展示了将生成过程识别与条件预测解耦可提升计算效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究简单地将长窗口的好处归因于捕获长程依赖，缺乏对全局预测模型如何利用输入观测的深入讨论。作者希望从生成过程识别和条件预测两个目标的视角，重新解释长窗口的作用机制。

Method: 提出将时间序列预测分解为两个目标：生成过程识别（GPI）和条件预测（CF）。从贝叶斯角度看，最优预测是对所有可能数据生成过程按其似然加权的平均。作者从理论上证明即使记忆长度为P的过程，也需要大于P的输入窗口才能达到最小误差。同时提出解耦GPI和CF以提升计算可扩展性。

Result: 理论证明：对于记忆长度为P的过程，输入窗口需严格大于P才能达到最小可达到误差。实验上，在合成数据和真实数据上验证了长窗口通过降低过程不确定性来提升预测精度的观点，并展示了GPI-CF解耦方法的有效性。

Conclusion: 长观测窗口的好处不仅在于捕获长程依赖，更在于降低对数据生成过程的不确定性。将GPI和CF解耦可以在不牺牲精度的情况下提升计算效率，对预测架构设计具有重要指导意义。

Abstract: Modern deep learning models for forecasting groups of time series rely on increasingly longer observation windows. However, the benefit of increasing the window size is often simply attributed to capturing long-range dependencies, and broader discussion on how global forecasting models leverage input observations has been limited. In this paper, we show that forecasting groups of time series involves two objectives: (i) generative process identification (GPI), i.e., inferring the specific process generating the input sequence, and (ii) conditional forecasting (CF), i.e., predicting future values given input observations. From this perspective, optimal predictions can be interpreted as an average over plausible data-generating processes, weighted by their likelihood given the input window. This suggests another explanation for the benefits of long context windows: they reduce the uncertainty about which specific process is generating the input time series during operation. We prove that even for processes with memory length $P$, an input window size strictly larger than $P$ is necessary to achieve the minimum attainable error. Finally, we show how decoupling GPI and CF can improve computational scalability without compromising accuracy. Experiments on synthetic and real-world data validate our insights and their relevance for designing forecasting architectures.

</details>


### [977] [On the Scaling of PEFT: Towards Million Personal Models of Trillion Parameters](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02437)
*Mind Lab,:,Song Cao,Vic Cao,Kaijie Chen,Bunny Fan,Hera Feng,Huan Feng,Arthur Fu,Jun Gao,Hongquan Gu,Aaron Guan,Mutian Hong,Hailee Hou,Peixuan Hua,Charles Huang,Miles Jiang,Nora Jiang,Yuyi Jiang,Autumn Jin,Fancy Kong,Kyrie Lei,Alexy Li,Dawn Li,Ray Li,Theo Li,Wenhao Li,Jiayi Lin,Domini Liu,Heshan Liu,Kairus Liu,Logan Liu,Maeve Luo,Runism Lv,Pony Ma,Verity Niu,Anson Qiu,Vincent Wang,Maxwell Yao,Regis Ye,Wenlin Ye,Yanying Ye,Josh Ying,Danney Zeng,Salmon Zhan,Anya Zhang,Ruijia Zhang,Shiyang Zhang,Sueky Zhang,Ya Zhang,Wei Zhao,Ada Zhou,Sizer Zhou,Xinyue Zhu,Murphy Zhuang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出将参数高效微调（PEFT）视为在强大基础模型上携带实例特定行为（如偏好、技能、工具习惯和记忆）的持久本地状态，而非仅是全量微调的廉价替代品。通过三个维度（Scale Up/Scale Down/Scale Out）分析，并借助MinT基础设施管理适配器的身份、版本、来源、评估和服务驻留，证明PEFT可作为持久个性化模型的紧凑基础。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统上PEFT仅被视为全量微调的更廉价替代方案，但本文认为其有更广泛的角色：作为共享基础模型之上的持久局部状态，携带实例特定的行为（如偏好、技能、工具习惯和类似记忆的更新），从而支持个性化、持久化的模型应用。

Method: 从三个缩放轴分析问题：1) Scale Up：更强的共享先验使小规模局部更新更有用；2) Scale Down：研究适配器能多小仍保持可靠；3) Scale Out：大量持久化适配实例共存。同时提出MinT基础设施，管理适配器的身份、修订、来源、评估和服务驻留。

Result: 表明PEFT可以作为持久个性化模型的紧凑基础，而不仅仅是全量微调的预算替代品。通过三个缩放维度的分析，展示了适配器在不同规模下的有效性和可靠性。

Conclusion: PEFT不应仅被视为一种节省成本的微调替代方案，而应被重新定位为在强大共享基础模型上实现持久、个性化、实例特定行为的紧凑基础设施。MinT框架证明了这一方向的可行性。

Abstract: Parameter-efficient fine-tuning (PEFT) is usually treated as a cheaper alternative to full fine-tuning. We study a broader role: small trainable adapters as persistent local state on top of strong shared foundation models. In this framing, the base model provides shared competence while adapters carry instance-specific behavior such as preferences, skills, tool habits, and memory-like updates. We organize the problem around three scaling axes: Scale Up, where stronger shared priors make small local updates more useful; Scale Down, where we study how small adapters can be while remaining reliable; and Scale Out, where many persistent adapted instances coexist. MinT provides one infrastructure example for managing adapter identity, revision, provenance, evaluation, and serving residency. Together, the results suggest that PEFT can be a compact substrate for persistent personal models rather than only a budget substitute for full fine-tuning.

</details>


### [978] [Evaluating Real-World Generalizability of Algorithm Selection Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02016)
*Gjorgjina Cenikj,Jakub Kudela,Eva Tuba,Tome Eftimov*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本研究系统评估了算法选择（AS）模型在合成基准（BBOB、CEC）与真实世界优化问题（机器人轨迹规划、无人机路径规划）间的泛化能力，揭示了跨域迁移的成功与失败条件。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有AS研究多局限于合成基准测试，缺乏对真实世界优化问题泛化能力的系统性评估，需要探究AS模型在不同领域间的迁移表现。

Method: 采用系统性跨基准评估方法，在两类合成基准（BBOB、CEC）和两类真实问题（机器人轨迹优化、无人机路径规划）上训练并测试AS模型，分析其迁移泛化表现。

Result: 明确了AS模型在哪些跨域场景下泛化成功、在哪些场景下失效，并识别了现实领域特定应用中的关键挑战。

Conclusion: 当前AS方法的鲁棒性存在局限，需要开发更可靠、广泛适用的AS系统以应对真实世界优化需求。

Abstract: Algorithm Selection (AS) aims to automatically identify the most suitable optimization algorithm for a given problem instance by leveraging measurable problem characteristics and historical performance data. In this study, we investigate the generalization ability of AS models across both synthetic and real-world optimization landscapes. We consider two widely used academic benchmark suites (BBOB and CEC) and two real-world problem sets (robotics trajectory optimization tasks and unmanned aerial vehicle path-planning problems). Through a systematic cross-benchmark evaluation, we analyze how AS models transfer between domains, identify where generalization succeeds or breaks down, and highlight the challenges that arise when applying AS in realistic, domain-specific contexts. Our findings provide insights into the robustness of current AS approaches and inform the development of more reliable, broadly applicable AS systems for real-world optimization.

</details>


### [979] [Realistic noise synthesis reduces bias and improves tissue microstructure estimation with supervised machine learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02044)
*Bradley G. Karat,Maëliss Jallais,Ali R. Khan,Santiago Aja-Fernández,Jelle Veraart,Marco Palombo*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种**现实噪声合成（RNS）框架**，通过在模拟训练数据中融合Rician期望和有效后处理噪声方差，减轻因噪声特性不匹配导致的信号域协变量偏移，从而在低SNR条件下实现无偏的微结构参数估计。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 扩散MRI的微观结构参数估计受噪声影响显著，而监督学习框架中模拟数据与真实数据的噪声特性不匹配（协变量偏移）会导致有偏估计。现有方法未充分解决此问题。

Method: 提出RNS框架：（1）用MPPCA估计噪声标准差建模Rician期望；（2）从球谐残差推导有效后处理噪声方差。在cylinder-zeppelin和SANDI模型上评估，涵盖多SNR模拟数据及多次采集的活体数据。

Result: 忽略噪声效应引入SNR依赖的有偏估计；加入Rician期望显著降低偏差至噪声感知NLLS水平；建模有效标准差进一步提升精度。性能对回归架构不敏感，但依赖噪声准确估计。

Conclusion: 在模拟训练数据中实施现实噪声建模可有效缓解信号域协变量偏移，对于低SNR（高b值或高分辨率）下的无偏监督微结构估计至关重要。

Abstract: Diffusion MRI enables non-invasive probing of tissue microstructure, but accurate parameter estimation is challenged by noise-related effects. In supervised machine learning frameworks trained on simulated data, discrepancies between the noise characteristics of simulated and acquired signals introduce a form of covariate shift, whereby the input signal distribution differs between training and inference. We investigated the impact of this mismatch on microstructure parameter estimation and propose a realistic noise synthesis (RNS) framework to mitigate it. RNS incorporates both the Rician expectation and the effective post-processing noise variance into simulated training signals. The Rician expectation was modelled using a noise standard deviation estimated with MPPCA, while the effective standard deviation was derived from spherical harmonic residuals of preprocessed data. The method was evaluated using the cylinder-zeppelin and the SANDI models on simulated datasets across multiple SNR levels and on in vivo diffusion data with repeated acquisitions. Sensitivity to noise misestimation was also assessed. Ignoring magnitude-induced noise effects during training produced systematic, SNR-dependent parameter bias, particularly at low SNR. Incorporating the Rician expectation substantially reduced bias to the level of noise-aware nonlinear least-squares fitting. Modelling the effective standard deviation further improved precision. Performance was largely independent of regression architecture but sensitive to accurate noise estimation. These findings demonstrate that realistic noise modelling in simulated training data mitigates signal-domain covariate shift and is essential for unbiased supervised microstructure estimation, particularly in low-SNR regimes associated with high b-values or high spatial resolution.

</details>


### [980] [Ablating Archetypes: The Stability of Archetypal SAEs is an Artifact of Initialization and Metric Design](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02061)
*Michał Brzozowski,Neo Christopher Chung*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文揭示Archetypal SAEs声称的稳定性源于固定的确定性初始化，而非其算法本身。去除初始化后，该方法在稳定性上并无优势。作者区分了"稳定性"（stability，独立训练间的一致性）与"稳定化"（stabilization，向共同解收敛）两个概念，并指出预处理相关的余弦几何问题会干扰稳定性评估。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: SAE特征在不同随机种子下差异巨大（不稳定性问题），Archetypal SAEs声称能解决此问题。本文旨在检验该声称是否成立，并厘清可解释性研究中"稳定性"这一模糊概念。

Method: 分析Archetypal SAEs的初始化设置（确定性k-means解码器初始化），通过去除该初始化进行对照实验，并识别预处理依赖的余弦几何问题。

Result: Archetypal SAEs的稳定性来自共享的确定性初始化，去除后无任何稳定化优势。此外，预处理方式会影响余弦相似度几何，导致稳定性指标解读复杂化。

Conclusion: 稳定性声称需要轨迹诊断和初始化消融实验的支持；研究SAE应放在更广泛的字典学习传统中；必须区分stability与stabilization两个概念。

Abstract: Dictionary learning with sparse autoencoders (SAEs) produces overcomplete bases from neural network activations that are often interpretable and reduces polysemanticity. However, features from SAEs vary substantially across random seeds -- a problem known as instability. Archetypal SAEs (Fel et al., 2025) were proposed as a general dictionary-learning intervention for more reliable concept extraction, and report more stable dictionaries at the end of training. We demonstrate that the stability claimed by archetypal SAEs is a result of setting identical initialization across multiple runs. Through our analyses, we attempt to clarify two distinct notions in mechanistic interpretability that may be ambiguously used: stability is agreement between two independently trained models, whereas stabilization is the convergence of independently initialized runs toward a common solution. This distinction is critical for mechanistic interpretability of natural language processing (NLP), where feature stability is increasingly used as evidence that SAE features are reusable units of analysis. Experiments from archetypal SAEs share a deterministic k-means decoder initialization, setting inter-run dictionary distance to zero before training begins. When this initialization is removed, the archetypal constraint provides no stabilization advantage in our setting. We further identify a preprocessing-dependent cosine geometry issue that complicates interpretation of endpoint stability metrics. Overall, our study supports the value of studying SAEs within the larger dictionary-learning tradition while showing that stability claims require trajectory diagnostics and initialization ablations.

</details>


### [981] [Planar Symmetric Pattern Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02073)
*Ning Lin,Luxi Chen,Huaguan Chen,Jiacheng Cen,Chongxuan Li,Wenbing Huang,Hao Sun*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出一种通用的平面群对称化框架，能将任意2D连续表示转换为保持连续性的对称表示，并验证了其在视觉设计和材料设计任务中的有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有2D连续表示难以直接施加平面群对称约束，因为非反射群元素的变换会破坏表示的连续性，亟需一种通用的对称化方法。

Method: 提出一个对称化框架，将任意2D连续表示转换为其对称版本，同时保持连续性。给出了数学公式、逼近能力证明以及具体构造方法。

Result: 在图案设计、剪纸设计、风格化拓扑设计（三种视觉任务）以及材料设计任务中验证了方法的有效性，表明该方法能够实现有效的对称控制且具有广泛的适用性。

Conclusion: 所提出的对称化表示能够有效施加平面群对称约束，同时保持连续性，并在多个实际任务中展现出良好效果和泛化能力。

Abstract: Generating objects with specific symmetries is essential in various real-world scenarios. However, adapting existing 2D continuous representations to enforce planar group symmetry remains a challenge, as the transformation of non-reflective group elements may disrupt continuity. To overcome this limitation, we propose a symmetrization framework for arbitrary planar groups. Our method transforms any 2D continuous representation into a symmetric one while preserving continuity. We provide the mathematical formulation of this representation, demonstrate its approximation capability for symmetric functions, and detail the construction methodology. We validate our approach through three visual design tasks (pattern design, paper-cutting design and stylized topology design) and one material design task. Experiments confirm that our representation enables effective symmetry control and demonstrate its broader applicability.

</details>


### [982] [Beyond $\ell_2$-norm and $\ell_\infty$-norm: A Curvature-Inspired $\ell_p$-Norm Scheme for Deep Neural Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02078)
*Jianhao Xu,Zhuang Yang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文针对深度神经网络训练中ℓ2范数优化器受高曲率方向主导导致收敛慢，以及ℓ∞范数优化器在平坦区域易振荡的问题，提出动态ℓp范数方案（p从大到小动态调整），结合SGD和SGDM得到LPSGD和LPSGDM两个新优化器，在非凸设置下达到O(T^{-1/2})收敛率，并在CIFAR-10/100和ImageNet-1K上验证了优越性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有优化器通常依赖ℓ2或ℓ∞范数，无法良好适应深度神经网络训练过程中曲率各向异性的剧烈变化：早期曲率各向异性强，ℓ2优化器受高曲率方向主导限制低曲率方向更新；后期趋于平坦区域，ℓ∞优化器因坐标等幅更新易产生振荡。这些极端情况影响收敛速度和泛化性能。

Method: 提出动态ℓp范数方案，p值在训练早期设为较大值（p>2）以抑制高曲率方向主导，随后通过余弦退火策略使p逐渐减小到2，实现更稳定精细的更新。将该方案分别融入SGD和SGDM，得到LPSGD和LPSGDM两个新优化器。

Result: 理论证明LPSGD和LPSGDM在非凸设置下达到O(T^{-1/2})收敛率。在CIFAR-10、CIFAR-100和ImageNet-1K数据集上使用VGG-11、ResNet-18和ResNet-50进行广泛实验，验证了更好的泛化性能。

Conclusion: 提出的动态ℓp范数优化器能够自适应地平衡早期高曲率抑制和后期稳定更新的需求，在理论和实验层面均证明其有效性和优越的泛化性能。

Abstract: The existing optimizers for deep neural networks (DNNs) typically rely on either the $\ell_2$ norm or the $\ell_\infty$ norm, resulting in optimizers that do not adapt well to substantial changes in curvature across parameter dimensions. Generally, the training process of DNNs often exhibits strong curvature anisotropy in the early period, whereas in the later period, the training process of DNNs tends to move toward flatter regions with weaker anisotropy. Particularly, optimizers based on the \(\ell_2\)-norm are usually dominated by high-curvature directions, restricting updates of optimizers along with lower curvature direction and thus leading to a slower convergence rate. While optimizers based on the \(\ell_\infty\)-norm are prone to oscillations in flatter regions, due to the coordinate-wise updates of the same magnitude. To address these two extreme cases generated by $\ell_2$ and $\ell_\infty$ norms, we propose a novel $\ell_p$-norm scheme with a dynamical value of $p$ and incorporate it into stochastic gradient descent (SGD) and SGD with momentum (SGDM), leading to two novel optimizers with better generalization performance: ${\ell_p}$-SGD (LPSGD) and ${\ell_p}$-SGDM (LPSGDM). Particularly, the resulting optimizers suppress the dominance of high-curvature directions in the early period by utilizing a large $p$ ($p>2$), followed by a gradual decrease of $p$ toward 2 to enable more stable and refined updates, where the latter process is motivated by the cosine annealing strategy. We establish theoretical guarantees of the resulting algorithms and analyze that both LPSGD and LPSGDM achieve an \(O(T^{-1/2})\) convergence rate for the nonconvex setting. Extensive experiments are conducted on benchmark datasets, including CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, and ImageNet-1K, with multiple DNNs such as VGG-11, ResNet-18, and ResNet-50.

</details>


### [983] [When Tabular Foundation Models Transfer Across Modalities: A Systematic Evaluation Across 95 Datasets, 7 Modalities, and Two Regimes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02106)
*Julien Lafrance*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出一个结合ETF预处理和表格基础模型的统一分类流水线TabICL，在95个数据集、7种信号模态上评测，性能接近强基线但速度快4-200倍，并解决了校准问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有分类方法在不同模态上需要专门设计，缺乏统一的轻量级分类流水线；同时需要在不牺牲太多性能的前提下大幅提升推理速度，并保证概率校准的可靠性。

Method: 采用Equiangular Tight Frame (ETF)进行预处理，结合tabular foundation model进行in-context推理。固定特征表示，将性能与最强轻量级调优基线对比，并分别报告oracle选择、部署选择和专门微调的结果。

Result: 在95个数据集（7种模态）上，TabICL与强轻量级基线性能相当；速度比全骨干网络微调快4-200倍，且质量接近；ETF预处理会破坏校准，但后处理rescaling可恢复校准概率。

Conclusion: TabICL是一个实用的统一分类流水线，在速度和性能之间取得了良好平衡，且提供了可用的置信度信号；论文给出了具体部署指南及不适用场景的识别方法。

Abstract: We present a single classification pipeline that combines an Equiangular Tight Frame (ETF) preprocessing stage with a tabular foundation model for in-context inference, applied identically across modalities once data is mapped to fixed vector representations. We evaluate it on 95 datasets spanning seven signal modalities -- vision, audio, speech, text, molecular, time-series, and tabular. The main methodological contribution is to fix the comparison object: throughout the paper, performance is judged against the strongest lightweight tuned baseline on the same frozen features, while oracle selection, deployed selection, and specialized fine-tuning are reported separately.
  The pipeline is broadly competitive with strong lightweight tuned baselines on the same frozen features. It does not match the very best specialized models or heavily tuned pipelines on every task, but it stays close, and it runs much faster -- typically 4 to 200 times faster than full backbone fine-tuning, often at comparable quality.
  We describe how to deploy the pipeline in practice: when to apply ETF preprocessing, how to stop its training without a validation split, how to set up the in-context classifier, and how to calibrate the resulting probabilities. The calibration step is non-cosmetic: TabICL produces well-calibrated probabilities by construction, ETF preprocessing initially disrupts that calibration, and the post-hoc rescaling restores it -- yielding a per-prediction confidence signal that practitioners can use as a trust threshold for confidence-gated deployment. We also report where the pipeline should not be expected to help, and how to identify those cases in advance.

</details>


### [984] [How Hard Can It Be? Hardness-Aware Multi-Objective Unlearning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02119)
*Jiangwei Chen,Xinyuan Niu,Rachael Hwee Ling Sim,Zhengyuan Liu,Nancy F. Chen,Bryan Kian Hsiang Low*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出一种基于约束优化的机器遗忘算法HAMU，通过量化遗忘数据与保留数据的相似性来保证遗忘质量的同时最小化保留效用损失，并能在无法同时优化两者时提示停止。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有机器遗忘算法（如加权损失组合）无法保证在遗忘数据与保留数据上同时达到指定程度的优化目标，缺乏对两者可调和性的量化分析与理论保障。

Method: 从约束优化视角出发，用遗忘数据与保留数据的相似性量化两者可调和难度；基于此硬度度量设计HAMU算法，通过更新模型权重保证遗忘质量提升的同时最小化保留效用损失；当两者无法同时改善时给出停止建议。算法适用于非凸模型且易并行化。

Result: 在图像和文本数据集上使用大型模型进行实验，HAMU在遗忘质量和保留效用上均优于基线方法。

Conclusion: HAMU提供了一种有理论保障的机器遗忘方案，能够量化遗忘与保留之间的权衡，并在不可避免的效用损失时给出明确信号，且具备实际部署的可行性。

Abstract: Machine unlearning aims to remove the influence of specific forget training data due to privacy, copyright or bias concerns while maintaining the model performance on the remaining retain data. Existing unlearning algorithms, such as optimizing a weighted combination of losses, have tried to achieve these objectives of improving forget quality and maintaining retain utility. However, they do not guarantee that these objectives can be improved by a specified extent for all forget and retain data. In this work, we address this limitation with a novel and theoretically-grounded approach from a constrained optimization perspective. Firstly, we identify that the hardness of reconciling both objectives can be quantified by the similarity between the forget data and the retain data. Next, we derive an unlearning algorithm (HAMU) with the overall goal of guaranteeing a specified improvement in forget quality while minimizing the retain utility cost/degradation by updating the model weights based on our hardness measure. Our hardness measure also informs users when retain utility degradation is unavoidable, i.e., both objectives cannot be improved simultaneously, and stopping should be considered. Our algorithm is applicable to non-convex models and is easily parallelizable, making it readily deployable in real-world scenarios. We empirically demonstrate HAMU's superior performance over baselines on both image and text datasets using large models. Our code is available at https://github.com/aoi3142/HAMU.

</details>


### [985] [Variational Learning for Insertion-based Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02133)
*Yangtian Zhang,Zhe Wang,Arthur Gretton,Rex Ying,David van Dijk,Michalis K. Titsias,Jiaxin Shi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出插入过程（IP），一种基于排列变分推断的非单调序列生成框架，能够联合学习插入位置、内容和终止条件，支持可变长度生成，在目标规划与分子字符串生成任务上优于顺序无关的固定网格方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有非单调序列生成方法（如掩码扩散模型）虽能打破从左到右的固定顺序，但大多是与顺序无关的，且依赖固定长度的网格，无法支持可变长度生成和自适应的插入顺序。本文旨在引入一个概率框架，让模型能学习数据驱动的插入顺序，同时支持可变长度生成。

Method: 首先形式化了插入轨迹与排列之间的双射对应关系，从而将数据似然精确重参数化为排列求和。基于此，提出插入过程（Insertion Process, IP），通过排列变分推断联合学习三个任务：在何处插入、插入什么内容、何时终止。支持可变长度生成，无需固定画布。

Result: 在目标条件规划（Goal-conditioned Planning）和分子字符串生成任务上，学习插入顺序比顺序无关的方法在建模质量和泛化能力上均有所提升。

Conclusion: 在缺乏标准从左到右结构的领域中，学习插入顺序是一种有效的非单调序列生成策略，IP框架为此提供了理论完备且实践可行的解决方案。

Abstract: Non-monotonic sequence generation methods, such as masked diffusion models, provide a flexible alternative to left-to-right autoregressive modeling by allowing tokens to be generated in non-fixed and prescribed orders. Despite their practical advantages, most existing non-monotonic models are order-agnostic and rely on a fixed-length grid, limiting their ability to support variable-length generation and adaptive insertion order. In this work, we introduce a probabilistic framework for learning insertion order in variable-length insertion models. We formalize a bijective correspondence between insertion trajectories and permutations, which enables an exact reparameterization of the data likelihood as a sum over permutations. Building on this result, we propose the Insertion Process (IP), a stochastic generative model that jointly learns where to insert, what to insert, and when to terminate, trained via permutation-based variational inference. Unlike prior fixed-canvas approaches, IP natively supports variable-length generation and learns data-driven preferences over insertion orders. Experiments on goal-conditioned planning and molecular string generation demonstrate that learning insertion order improves both modeling quality and generalization in domains without a canonical left-to-right structure.

</details>


### [986] [Rethinking Evaluation Paradigms in IBP-based Certified Training](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02134)
*Konstantin Kaulen,Hadar Shavit,Holger H. Hoos*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出通过帕累托前沿比较来评估认证训练方法在自然精度与认证精度之间的权衡，并通过自动多目标超参数优化发现现有方法存在严重欠调优，建立了新的最优表现，揭示了先前进展被高估以及不同方法间存在性能互补性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有认证训练方法在自然精度与认证精度之间存在内在权衡，但常见做法仅报告单一配置，这会导致对整体性能的误导性结论，并妨碍对现有技术的公正评估。

Method: 采用帕累托前沿比较替代单一指标评价，通过自动化多目标超参数优化为每种方法寻找一组帕累托最优配置，从而实现公平且与具体方法无关的性能对比。

Result: 发现先前报告的方法存在严重欠调优，通过优化获得了更优性能并建立了新的最优结果；首次全面的多目标比较表明先前进展被高估，并发现了之前未被报道的性能互补性。

Conclusion: 多目标帕累托前沿比较是评估认证训练方法的更公正、更全面的方法，能够揭示被单一指标掩盖的真相，为未来研究提供更可靠的基准。

Abstract: Deep neural networks achieve strong performance on many supervised learning tasks but remain vulnerable to adversarial perturbations. Neural network verification provides mathematically rigorous robustness guarantees, yet at substantial computational cost. To mitigate this, certified training techniques optimise for verifiable robustness during training, typically inducing a trade-off between natural and certified accuracy controlled by method-specific hyperparameters. Because these metrics are inherently conflicting, the common practice of reporting a single configuration is problematic: it can mislead conclusions about overall performance and prevents unbiased assessments of the state of the art. We address this by evaluating certified training methods via Pareto front comparisons over the natural--certified accuracy trade-off. To enable fair, method-agnostic comparisons, we perform efficient automated multi-objective hyperparameter optimisation to identify a set of Pareto-optimal configurations for each method. This approach often uncovers substantial undertuning in previously reported configurations, yielding superior performance and establishing a new state of the art. Leveraging these fronts, we present the first comprehensive multi-objective comparison of certified training approaches, showing that prior advancements are less pronounced than assumed and revealing previously unreported performance complementarities.

</details>


### [987] [Edge-aware Decoding for Neural Asymmetric Routing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02136)
*Li Liang,Jinbiao Chen,Zizhen Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 神经非对称路由模型中存在"表示-决策不匹配"问题：模型上游编码了成对代价信息，但最终决策logit仍主要参数化为上下文-节点兼容性。本文提出解码器设计原则：最终得分应显式暴露问题代价-待定结构所建议的转移级信息。通过边感知解码器（添加当前有向边、返回起点闭合、静态轻量前瞻等项），在ATSP-1000上将差距从4.13%降至2.73%，并在ACVRP上验证了定性趋势一致性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有神经非对称路由模型将方向性编码为矩阵表示和非对称感知注意力，但最终路由动作并非孤立节点，而是在当前部分路径下选择的有向转移。这导致"表示-决策不匹配"：成对代价信息在上游编码，但最终候选logit仍主要作为上下文-节点兼容性参数化，未显式暴露转移级信息。

Method: 提出解码器设计原则：最终得分应显式暴露问题代价-待定结构建议的转移级数量。实例化为边感知解码器，在保持表示骨干网络固定前提下，添加三类候选特定项：当前有向边项、返回起点闭合项、静态轻量前瞻项。

Result: 在受控SVD/Sinkhorn非对称骨干上，该解码器在ATSP-100训练、零样本评估ATSP-100/200/500/1000时优于RADAR参考，ATSP-1000差距从4.13%降至2.73%。在ACVRP上呈现相同定性趋势。消融实验和定向转移诊断表明：最关键的信号是当前有向边的敏感性，闭合和静态前瞻作为启发式延续线索。

Conclusion: 神经非对称路由中，关键的解码器端信号是在决策时刻暴露转移级边信息。支持机制研究表明：决策时间暴露转移级边信息是解码器端的关键信号。

Abstract: Neural asymmetric routing models increasingly encode directionality through matrix representations and asymmetry-aware attention. The final routing action, however, is not a node in isolation but a directed transition chosen under the current partial route. This creates a representation--decision mismatch: pairwise cost information may be encoded upstream while the final candidate logit is still largely parameterized as context--node compatibility. We propose a decoder-design principle for neural asymmetric routing: the final score should explicitly expose transition-level quantities suggested by the problem's cost-to-go structure. We instantiate this principle with an edge-aware decoder that adds candidate-specific terms for the current directed edge, return-to-start closure, and static lightweight lookahead, while keeping the representation backbone fixed. On a controlled SVD/Sinkhorn asymmetric backbone, the decoder improves over the RADAR reference when trained on ATSP-100 and evaluated zero-shot on ATSP-100/200/500/1000, reducing the ATSP-1000 gap from $4.13\%$ to $2.73\%$. On ACVRP, the same score-level modification shows the same qualitative trend under a richer routing state. ATSP ablations and directed-transition diagnostics sharpen the mechanism: the strongest evidence concerns sensitivity to the current directed edge, while closure and static lookahead act as heuristic continuation cues. The results support a mechanism study: a key decoder-side signal in neural asymmetric routing is decision-time exposure of transition-level edge information.

</details>


### [988] [VLBM: Variational Latent Basis Modeling for OOD Robust Multivariate Time Series Forecasting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02138)
*Xudong Zhang,Jierui Lei,Jiacheng Li,Lingdong Shen,Jian Cui,Haina Tang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 针对多变量时间序列预测中罕见但风险极高的OOD事件，提出VLBM框架，通过变分隐空间建模分离稳定动态与OOD偏差，在12个基准任务上实现SOTA，MAE/MSE平均提升15.08%/7.74%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准平均风险训练下，罕见OOD事件的优化信号会被频繁的ID模式淹没，导致强基准精度无法转化为高影响偏移下的可靠性。

Method: VLBM学习共享隐基元（定义低秩子空间用于稳定ID动态），显式将输入分解为基元子空间分量和正交残差分量；对齐未来感知后验与未来盲先验，使测试时隐推断仅依赖历史输入。

Result: 在交通、天气、电力等12个基准任务上（含新构建的真实OOD交通数据集），VLBM达成OOD鲁棒性和ID精度的SOTA，MAE/MSE分别比最强基线提升15.08%/7.74%；合成仿真数据上持续最优且更好追踪OOD脉冲恢复。

Conclusion: 隐空间结构化预测是实现ID/OOD混合条件下鲁棒预测的原则性路径。

Abstract: Out of distribution (OOD) events in multivariate time series forecasting are rare but often dominate real world risk, making average case forecasting insufficient for reliable deployment. Under standard average risk training on mixed ID/OOD distributions, optimization signals from rare OOD events can be overwhelmed by frequent in distribution (ID) patterns, so strong benchmark accuracy may not translate into reliability under high impact shifts. To address this issue, we propose VLBM (Variational Latent Basis Model), a theory guided latent forecasting framework that separates stable dynamics from OOD induced deviations. VLBM learns a shared latent basis that defines a low rank subspace for stable ID dynamics, explicitly decomposes inputs into basis subspace components and orthogonal residual components, and aligns a future aware posterior with a future blind prior so that test time latent inference depends only on historical input. Across 12 benchmark tasks spanning transportation, weather, power systems, and other real world domains, including newly constructed real world OOD traffic datasets, VLBM achieves state of the art OOD robustness and ID accuracy, with average MAE and MSE gains of 15.08\% and 7.74\% over the strongest baseline. On a synthetic simulation dataset, VLBM also consistently achieves the best performance and better tracks OOD pulse recovery. These results support latent structured forecasting as a principled route to robust prediction under mixed ID and OOD conditions. The code is available at https://github.com/leijieruilq/VLBM_OOD_forecast.

</details>


### [989] [TimeBlocks: Foundational and Continual Time-Series Blockbase -- Extended Version](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02142)
*David Campos,Bin Yang,Tung Kieu,Lei Chen,Chenjuan Guo,Christian S. Jensen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出TimeBlocks框架，通过模块化模型块池和流数据核心集方法StreamCore，实现在资源受限的流式场景下构建轻量级、多任务、可持续校准的时间序列模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基础时间序列模型过于庞大，无法在数据流场景中实现实时处理、持续校准和硬件受限部署，缺乏轻量级且支持多任务的基础模型。

Method: 维护一个可互换的模块化模型块池，通过路由策略迭代选择最佳模块构建轻量模型；提出StreamCore方法从数据流中构建具有近似保证的紧凑核心子集，支持持续校准。

Result: 在多个数据集和多项任务上的实验表明，TimeBlocks构建的模型能够超越现有基线方法。

Conclusion: TimeBlocks成功解决了基础时间序列模型在流式场景下的大小、持续校准和部署约束问题，为实时数据流处理提供了可行的轻量级多任务解决方案。

Abstract: The ongoing digitization has led to a proliferation of time-series data streams that monitor a variety of processes, from which valuable insights may be obtained. Further, the emergence of successful foundational language models begs the question of whether it is possible to achieve time-series models with the foundational properties of handling multiple tasks, while being sufficiently lightweight to allow real-time data stream processing. Existing foundational time-series models are often large and only effective in offline settings without stringent time and computational constraints, and where repeated model calibration is not needed. However, when applied to data streams, these models are ineffective due to their size and lack of support for continual calibration, which compromise their ability to deliver accurate real-time responses, their durability, and their deployability in hardware-limited settings. We propose TimeBlocks to enable versatile time-series processing by facilitating the efficient building of lightweight models suitable for multiple tasks under variable conditions. In particular, the method maintains a pool of interchangeable and modular model blocks that can be used to construct new time-series models. When presented with specific time-series data, a routing strategy iteratively selects the most suitable blocks to construct a lightweight and accurate model for the data. We equip TimeBlocks with a method called StreamCore to build a representative small subset of the data stream, which preserves a guaranteed approximation of the stream over time, enabling continual model calibration. An experimental study on multiple data sets and covering multiple tasks shows that TimeBlocks enables to build models capable of outperforming existing baselines.

</details>


### [990] [Hybrid Neural Ordinary Differential Equations for Data-Efficient Polymerization Modeling with Incomplete Kinetics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02145)
*Marah Almanasreh,Alexander Mitsos,Eike Cramer*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出一种混合神经常微分方程（NODE）框架，将自由基聚合的机理模型与神经网络结合，仅学习部分表征的有效自由基浓度，在稀疏数据条件下实现了比纯数据驱动模型更准确、更物理一致的预测。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决聚合动力学建模中纯机理模型参数化繁琐、纯数据驱动模型需要大量昂贵数据的矛盾，特别是在早期设计阶段数据有限的情况下。

Method: 构建混合NODE框架：保留机理质量平衡方程，仅将部分表征的"有效自由基浓度"通过神经网络代理学习，而已知反应（引发剂分解、增长、终止）仍由物理模型描述。

Result: 在稀疏数据（仅10个测量点）条件下，混合NODE的预测误差和物理一致性均优于离散时间前馈神经网络和纯数据驱动NODE；在含噪数据与未见操作条件的泛化场景中，混合NODE的RMSE为0.013，远低于纯数据驱动NODE的0.31和离散模型的0.68。

Conclusion: 仅学习闭合项而非完整动力学，在数据有限条件下足以实现可靠预测，为聚合反应过程建模提供了一种数据高效的解决方案。

Abstract: Accurate prediction of polymerization dynamics is essential for process design, control, and optimization. Yet, purely mechanistic models require labor-intensive parameterization of partially characterized kinetics, while purely data-driven models demand large, diverse datasets that are costly to obtain, particularly in early-design stages. We propose a hybrid Neural Ordinary Differential Equation (NODE) framework for data-efficient modeling of free-radical polymerization. Using batch polymerization of methyl methacrylate (MMA) as a case study, the mechanistic mass balances are retained explicitly, and only the partially-characterized effective radical concentration governing monomer consumption is learned from data through a neural network surrogate, while established reactions such as initiator decomposition, propagation, and termination remain physically modeled. The hybrid NODE is evaluated against a discrete-time feedforward neural network and a purely data-driven NODE under sparse data conditions, with models trained on as few as ten measurements under both regular and irregular sampling. The hybrid NODE consistently achieves lower prediction errors and more physically consistent extrapolations than both purely data-driven baselines. In a generalization scenario with noisy data and unseen operating conditions, the hybrid NODE achieves an RMSE of 0.013, compared to 0.31 for the data-driven NODE and 0.68 for the discrete-time model, demonstrating that learning only a closure term rather than the full dynamics is sufficient for reliable prediction under limited data availability.

</details>


### [991] [EEG-FuseFormer: A Transformer-Driven Feature Fusion Framework for Seizure Onset Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02166)
*Vigneshwar Hariharan,Chithra Reghuvaran,Arlene John,Nhat Pham,Omer Rana,Deepu John,Ganesh Neelakanta Iyer*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出EEG-FuseFormer，一种基于Transformer的特征融合框架，结合CNN-LSTM和ResNet-18提取的EEG特征，用于癫痫发作前预测，在CHB-MIT数据集上达到98.85%的平均召回率，优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 癫痫发作具有不可预测性，现有诊断技术难以有效降低患者风险，准确的发作前预测对改善患者生活质量至关重要。

Method: 提出EEG-FuseFormer框架：1) CNN-LSTM从原始EEG信号提取时空特征；2) ResNet-18从STFT时频表示提取特征；3) Transformer编码器融合两种特征；4) 全连接层生成最终预测。

Result: 在CHB-MIT数据集上，平均召回率98.85%，优于多数现有方法；跨患者测试中，基于目标适应的微调策略提升了召回率、精确率和F1-score；评估了多硬件平台的计算复杂度。

Conclusion: EEG-FuseFormer通过特征融合有效提升了癫痫发作预测性能，跨患者泛化能力良好，且可通过微调适应新患者，在性能与复杂度间取得平衡。
